C:
◆ 简介 ◆
芮克先生与谐乐学院合作举办的线上「摄影展览」盛大开幕，协助三月七参展，一同角逐最后的奖项吧！

◆ 活动规则 ◆
活动期间，每日揭晓一个拍摄课题，开拓者和三月七需要根据每日课题酝酿拍摄灵感，拍摄出对应的摄影作品。
成功拍摄并上传作品后，接受芮克先生和观展者的点评。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
参与影展，完成照片拍摄并上传作品后，即可获取奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
The online Photography Exhibition, co-hosted by Mr. Reca and the Charmony Academy, has officially opened! Assist March 7th in showcasing her work and compete together for the final prize!

◆ Event Rules ◆
During the event, a photography theme will be revealed each day. The Trailblazer and March 7th need to gather inspiration based on the daily theme and take corresponding photos.
After successfully shooting and uploading their work, they will receive feedback from Mr. Reca and the viewers.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
● Participate in the photo exhibition. Complete the photoshoot and upload the work to obtain rewards.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，分别对模拟宇宙进行了疯狂的改造。

◆ 活动规则 ◆
● 活动开启后，每日将会解锁新的位面，共计5个位面。
● 每个位面，均有不同的位面规则，帮助开拓者获取更多祝福、奇物、宇宙碎片，提升开拓者实力。
● 每个位面均由常规位面、疯狂位面组成，通关常规位面后，可进入疯狂位面。
● 疯狂位面为多层连续战斗，设有6轮次倒计时，随层数提升，敌人不断增加，根据挑战层数获得疯狂点数。通关时如有剩余轮次可获得额外疯狂点数。
● 通关常规位面后使用的角色、祝福、奇物、宇宙碎片等数据将会自动存档，可反复挑战疯狂位面，获取更高疯狂点数。
● 当开拓者提升「均衡等级」时，活动中敌人和试用角色等级将同步提升。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
活动期间在各个位面中通关常规位面、挑战疯狂位面并获得指定疯狂点数时可在「限时奖励」中领取位面奖励。
● 全部位面累计获得最高疯狂点数达到指定目标后，可领取累计奖励。

◆ 注意事项◆
● 位面内遇见祝福、奇物、事件，不会解锁模拟宇宙图鉴。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen each conducted wild modifications to the Simulated Universe.

◆ Event Rules ◆
● After the event starts, a new plane will be unlocked daily, with a total of 5 planes.
● Each plane has different plane rules that help Trailblazers obtain more Blessings, Curios, and Cosmic Fragments to enhance their power.
● Each plane consists of an Ordinary Plane and a Manic Plane. After clearing the Ordinary Plane, you can enter the Manic Plane.
● The Manic Plane involves multiple consecutive battles with a 6-Cycle countdown. As the level increases, the number of enemies grows. You earn Manic Points based on the challenge level, and if you complete the challenge with cycles remaining, you'll gain extra Manic Points.
● After clearing the Ordinary Plane, data such as the characters, Blessings, Curios, and Cosmic Fragments used will be automatically saved. You can repeatedly challenge the Manic Plane to earn higher Manic Points.
● When the Trailblazer increases their Equilibrium Level, the levels of the enemies and trial characters in the event will also increase accordingly.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
During the event, by clearing the Ordinary Plane in each plane, challenging the Manic Plane, and earning the specified Manic Points, you can claim plane rewards in the "Limited-Time Rewards."
● After reaching the specified target for the highest accumulated Manic Points across all planes, you can claim the cumulative reward.

◆ Attention ◆
● Blessings, Curios, and Occurrences encountered within the plane will not unlock entries in the Simulated Universe index.

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 黑塔以整座空间站的静默为代价启动谒见系统终端，试图与博识尊交流。在清理扇区故障、揪出窃忆者后，谒见的进程却被闯入空间站的瓦尔特和星期日打断了。而星穹列车此行，似是有求而来……
E: With putting the entire space station out of commission as the price, Herta activates the Audience System Terminal, trying to communicate with Nous. After clearing out the error in the zones and uncovering the Memosnatcher, the audience process is interrupted by Welt and Sunday's intrusion into the space station. But the Express has a purpose for this journey...

C: 来自十个琥珀纪前的腐朽灵魂，悲哀的烂片导演葛瑞迪，试图将你们玩弄于鼓掌。身为导演的梦想被天赋否定，年轻的心已然老去，唯余自卑与偏执。谁能料到，解开宝具和心结的，会是一场毫无审美品味的、跨时代的粉丝见面会？
E: A decayed soul from ten Amber Eras ago, the sorrowful director of terrible movies, Grady, seeks to toy with you at his whim. His dream of becoming a great director was crushed by a lack of talent, leaving behind a heart aged far too young, consumed by insecurity and obsession. Who would've thought that the key to unlocking both his Noble Phantasm and his emotional wounds would be a tasteless, cross-era fan meet-and-greet?

C: 黑天鹅借助着星期日与「长夜月」的接触，深入命途的河流，见识到擅自闯入翁法罗斯的「忆者」的下场……
E: Through Sunday's encounter with Evernight, Black Swan traveled deep into the Path's streams and witnessed the end of the Memokeepers who recklessly entered Amphoreus...

C: 你和佩拉在「残响回廊」中受尽折磨，好在最后确实找到了茉莉需要的「钥匙」，也解开了她的心结。可喜可贺！
E: You and Pela have suffered a lot in the Corridor of Fading Echoes, but you found the key Molly needed and helped her find peace. All is well that ends well!

C: 霄老大看不惯金人巷一成不变的状态，被迫相信公司会更好，但是他现在有了新的选择——「金人巷复兴计划」。\n霄老大同意与码头建立商业合作，商会也应该拿出诚意将同功坊纳入规划之中。
E: Mr. Xiao is fed up with Aurum Alley's stagnancy and forced himself to believe that the IPC would provide a better future. However, now he has a new choice in the form of the "Aurum Alley Revival Project."\nMr. Xiao has agreed to establish business relations with the docks, and the merchant guild should also offer something back by including Artistry Hardware in their plans.

C: 内购专员
E: Internal Purchase Officer

C: 本幕所有事件卡<color=#f29e38ff>感动</color>获取量×#2
E: In this act, <color=#f29e38ff>Drama</color> obtained from Event Card ×#2

C: 钟表小子与爱哭鬼们一起演了一出悲剧，伤感的氛围让小丑们头疼不已，最终仓皇逃离。
E: Clockie and the Crybabies perform a tragedy together. The bleak mood drives the clowns nuts, who eventually flee in distress.

C: 钟表小子建议木头老爷尊重牛仔，让美梦小镇享受松散的自由。\n「滴答，是他们帮小镇致富，我们不能卸磨杀驴！」
E: Clockie suggests to Old Man Wood that they should respect the cowboys and grant freedom to the people of Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, they are the ones who helped to prosper the town. We must not burn the bridges!"

C: 他们聊清楚了第一个目标：为美梦小镇建立一座漂亮的宾馆！\n「滴答，它的层数要比钟表的秒数还多！」
E: They reached a consensus over their first goal: To build a beautiful hotel in Dreamville!\n"Tick-tock, it must have more floors than there are seconds on a clock!"

C: 钟表小子决定要在美梦小镇留下更多属于自己的传奇，他那伶俐的指针又开始旋转起来。
E: With the determination to create more legends in Dreamville, Clockie's nimble hands started moving again.

C: 木头老爷用自己的枝蔓拦住了汹涌的人群，这反倒引起了更多人的不满，把各个街道搞得一团糟……\n「看，他在阻止我们，说明他心虚了，我们做的是对的！」
E: Old Man Wood used his branches to block the way of the crowd. Yet, this intensified the displeasure among the people as it led to chaos in the streets...\n"See, he is trying to stop us. It means he's guilty, and we're right!"

C: 木头老爷用自己的枝蔓拦住了汹涌的人群，这反倒引起了更多人的不满，把各个街道搞得一团糟……\n「看，他在阻止我们，说明他心虚了，我们做的是对的！」
E: Old Man Wood used his branches to block the way of the crowd. Yet, this intensified the displeasure among the people as it led to chaos in the streets...\n"See, he is trying to stop us. It means he's guilty, and we're right!"

C: 叶子店长和汽水先生岔开话题，跟钟表小子提出了许多商业合作方案，但这些方案只会让美梦小镇更加堕落……\n「滴答，这种概率的黄金扭蛋机会让人破产的！」
E: Shopkeeper Leaf and Mr. Soda changed the subject of the conversation, presenting various business collaboration proposals to Clockie. However, those ideas would only exacerbate Dreamville's decline...\n"Tick-tock, the winning odds of this Golden Capsule Machine will bankrupt the people!"

C: 钟表小子藏身在舞会之上，向好奇的来客发出邀请，在共舞之余说出一些美梦小镇的秘密，传言从舞会传到整个美梦小镇……\n「滴答，你知道吗，钟表小子在美梦小镇藏了一份宝藏……」
E: Clockie hides at the ball and invites curious guests to dance. While dancing, he reveals some secrets about Dreamville to them, and rumors start spreading like wildfire from the ball to the entire Dreamville...\n"Tick-tock, do you know that Clockie has hidden a treasure in Dreamville..."

C: 为了避免好奇的镇民妨碍自己行事，钟表小子让赤红大哥为自己建造了一个隐蔽的家宅……\n「滴答，私生饭真讨厌！」
E: To avoid being disturbed by the curious townsfolk, Clockie had Boss Red build a house for him in a secluded area...\n"Tick-tock, those obsessive fans are so annoying!"

C: 钟表小子让许多朋友扮成自己的样子，同时出现在了许多地方。\n「钟表小子不止一个，有四个！」\n「不，有八个！」
E: Clockie got his friends to dress up like him, appearing in different locations at once.\n"There are four Clockies!"\n"No, there are eight!"

C: 不，美梦小镇没有背叛的罪行。\n「因为所有人都要忠诚于他。」
E: No. There was no betrayal in Dreamville.\n"Because everyone must be loyal to him."

C: 木头老爷把过去藏在了树木里，美梦小镇不存在过去。\n「滴答，我们不要向后看，我们要向前看…但前面什么都没有，只要看现在就好了！」
E: Old Man Wood hid the past within the trees. There was no past in Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, we only look forward, not backward... But there's nothing ahead, so let's only look at the present!"

C: 不，美梦小镇没有人思念过去。\n「因为这里只有现在。」
E: No. No one reminisced about the past in Dreamville.\n"Because there is only the present here."

C: 不，美梦小镇没有高低之分。\n「因为他是最高的存在。」
E: No. Everyone was equal in Dreamville.\n"Because he is the most superior being."

C: 罗盘号驶入了哈哈酒吧，这儿是面具小丑的地盘。记恨罗盘号的坏小丑用佳酿招待钟表小子和船员们，大家沉浸在了欢乐之中……
E: The Compass sails into Haha Bar, the turf of the Masked Clowns. Nursing a grudge, the bad Masked Clowns treat Clockie and the crew to fine wines, with everyone lost in good spirits...

C: 罗盘号来到了电玩市，这里的市民都活在奇妙的游戏之中，而现在这里正在举行一场游戏比赛，钟表小子也加入其中……
E: The Compass berths at the video game market, where all the citizens are living inside an incredible game and where a game contest is currently underway. Clockie decides to join in...

C: 石头老板带领鳄鱼们向噩梦小镇的镇民致歉，他叫上自己的鳄鱼弟兄们开始给小镇捐款，修复战争中受损的城镇。
E: Boss Stone leads the crocodiles over to apologize to the townsfolk of Nightmareville, calling on his crocodile brethren to start donating funds to the town to repair the damage wrought during the war.

C: 哈努兄弟回到了大家身边，但不愿罢休的鳄鱼还包围着小镇。看着困窘的战局与狼狈的小镇，钟表小子需要找地方献出自己的力量……
E: Brother Hanu returns to everyone, but the town is still surrounded by unrelenting crocodiles. Looking at the distress of the situation and the helplessness of the town, Clockie needs to find a way to lend his support...

C: 在敌营的中心，哈努兄弟和石头老板的决战一触即发。哈努兄弟已经伤痕累累，但他依然毫不犹豫，冲向了石头老板的大军……\n「哇啊，他太太太酷*了！」
E: At the heart of the enemy's camp, the ultimate showdown between Brother Hanu and Boss Stone is about to erupt. Despite being covered in wounds, Brother Hanu charges fearlessly toward Boss Stone's army with unwavering resolve...\n"Woah, he's way too cool!"

C: 随着拓荒的进行，小镇原本荒废的土地被分割成一块一块私人的领地。领地上的牛仔不再服从木头老爷的管辖。
E: As the town develops, the once-abandoned land is divided into individual private territories. The cowboys within the territory no longer heed the jurisdiction of Old Man Wood.

C: 钟表小子在蓝调街举办了一场舞会，因为舞会的盛大，许多游客与镇民慕名而来……
E: Clockie hosted a ball on the Blues Street. The grand event attracted a dense crowd of tourists and townsfolk...

C: 《钟表环游记》
E: Chronometer Chronicles

C: 钟表小子和几位伙伴留在了美梦小镇，接下来他将会面对怎样的挑战，他的旅途又会走向何方呢？
E: With Clockie and his companions staying behind in Dreamville, what challenges will he face next? And where will his voyage take him?

C: 钟表小子回到小镇中，准备与哈努兄弟商量如何抵抗风暴，但……
E: Clockie makes his way back to town to discuss storm protection measures with Brother Hanu, but...

C: 敬请期待钟表小子纪念影片《美梦往事》第四部——《迷梦大冒险》。
E: Stay tuned to the Clockie commemorative film Dreamjoy Memoir Part Four — Dreammyth Escapade.

C: 滴答！还是让我们放下那些担忧，将美梦小镇变成真正的美梦吧！
E: Tick-tock! Might as well toss our worries to the wind and help Dreamville become a truly joyous dream!

E: Increases Allies' Weakness Break Efficiency by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After enemies have their Weakness Broken, increases the DMG they receive by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

C: 我方目标或武器消灭敌方目标后，【不朽堡垒】为我方全体提供护盾。持有该护盾的我方目标攻击敌方目标后造成物理伤害，攻击低生命值敌方目标后，可以消耗护盾造成等同于其当前生命值的伤害。
E: After an ally target or weapon defeats an enemy target, "Eternal Fortress" provides a Shield to all allies. After an ally target with this Shield attacks an enemy target, deal Physical DMG. After attacking an enemy target with low HP, they can consume the Shield to deal DMG equal to the enemy target's current HP.

E: When enemies are Weakness Broken, every stack of Confusion will cause all DoTs currently on the enemy to immediately deal DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their original DoT. Consumes 1 stack of Confusion. Confusion can stack up to 5 times.

C: 护盾强度能影响目标提供的护盾量，护盾强度越高，提供的护盾量越高。\n提供的护盾量 = 原护盾量*护盾强度/<unbreak>100</unbreak>
E: Shield Strength affects the Shield Effect provided by the target. The higher the Shield Strength, the higher the Shield Effect.\nShield Effect = Original Shield Effect × Shield Strength/<unbreak>100</unbreak>

C:
阮•梅展开结界，结界关闭前不会进入自己的回合且无法行动。处于结界中时我方小队全属性抗性穿透提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>，羁绊内队员提高双倍。且攻击后会对敌方目标施加【残梅绽】。
【残梅绽】会在敌方目标尝试从<u>弱点击破状态</u>恢复时触发，延长目标的<u>弱点击破状态</u>并使其<u>行动延后</u>，延后数值等同于阮•梅<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的击破特攻+<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>，并对其造成等同于阮•梅<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak><gridfightmod type=backrank index=5 format=i%></color>冰属性击破伤害的<u>击破伤害</u>。
敌方目标从<u>弱点击破状态</u>恢复前不可被再次附加【残梅绽】。
行动序列上出现【绽放】倒计时，倒计时回合开始时阮梅关闭结界并恢复行动，倒计时固定拥有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>点速度。
E:
Ruan Mei creates a Zone. Before the Zone deactivates, she will not being her own turn and cannot take action. While inside the Zone, increases the ally squad's All-Type RES PEN by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>, and is doubled for Bond members. Additionally, inflicts "Thanatoplum Rebloom" on enemies after an attack.
"Thanatoplum Rebloom" will be triggered when the target attempts to recover from <u>Weakness Break state</u>, prolonging the duration of their <u>Weakness Break</u> and <u>delaying their action</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Ruan Mei's Break Effect plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>, while also dealing <u>Break DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> <gridfightmod type=backrank index=5 format=i%></color> of Ruan Mei's Ice Break DMG.
Enemy targets who haven't recovered from their <u>Weakness Broken states</u> cannot be inflicted with "Thanatoplum Rebloom" again.
A "Bloom" countdown appears in the Action Order. When the countdown begins, Ruan Mei deactivates the Zone and restores her ability to move. The countdown timer has a fixed SPD of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>.

C: <color=#42a8b9>#见鬼实录#</color>坐标：某个不便言明的司部。敝司公务向来忙得一刻也停不下来。但不知为何，最近司部里最无所事事的同僚突然像换了一个人般每天早到晚归…还鼓动身边的人跟她一起干一番大事业。我知道这事儿不是没有可能…但自己刚经历过一些不可名状的怪事，对这类变故非常警惕。还请看到的人快快联系我。
E: At A certain undisclosed Commission. Our division has always been swamped with work, and we never have a moment's rest. But for some reason, one of our colleagues who was usually the most unproductive slacker suddenly transformed into a different person, coming in early and leaving late every day. She's even been persuading people around her to join her to start some grand business venture. I know this might not be impossible, but I've recently experienced some indescribable strange occurrences, so I'm highly cautious about these kinds of changes. Please, anyone who has seen this, contact me quickly. <color=#42a8b9>#GhostSighting</color>

C: <color=#42a8b9>#鬼话连篇#</color>我爸平时从不表露爱意，今天突然连发三条「爸爸爱你」的信息，然后我怎么呼叫他发信息他都不理我，现在我也找不到他，我该怎么办？
E: My dad never used to express his love for the family, but today he sent three messages in a row that says "Dad loves you," and he didn't reply no matter how many times I called him or messaged him. I can't track him down at all. What should I do? <color=#42a8b9>#GhostTales</color>

C: <color=#42a8b9>#惊险刺激##捉鬼小队#</color>小桂子接到投稿后紧急咨询了线人和有关人士，获得了一手真相！原来那名士兵是从黑市购买了一把步离人的刀剑。那刀剑里面寄宿着铸剑师的魂魄，由于杀戮太多充满邪气。只要人拿着，精神便会被邪剑夺去心智，成为只为追求鲜血与杀戮的怪物。听说连神策府的骁卫都出动平息事态了。最后该武器不知所踪，如有目击者发现网络上有人售卖来历不明且发出怪叫的兵器，请立即通知云骑军！
E: <color=#42a8b9>#ThrillsAndChills##GhostHuntingSquad#</color> Little Gui received a submission and urgently consulted informants and relevant individuals, and obtained first-hand information! It turns out that the soldier had purchased a borisin sword from the black market. This sword houses the soul of its swordsmith and is filled with malevolent energy due to countless killings. Anyone who holds it will have their spirit overtaken by the cursed sword, becoming a creature driven solely by the pursuit of blood and slaughter. It is said that even the lieutenant of the Seat of Divine Foresight has been mobilized to quell the situation. In the end, the whereabouts of this weapon are unknown. If there are any witnesses who come across someone selling a mysterious and eerie weapon online, please immediately inform the Cloud Knights!

C: <color=#42a8b9>#安全第一##用真心对真心#</color>嗨，家人们，最近新来的观众很多，<color=#42a8b9>#见鬼实录#</color>上新增贴子也多了很多。我最近发现有一些胆大的家人会跑去帖子里说的地点打卡。但帖子内容未经证实，可能会有潜在的风险哦。所以小桂子在这里也提醒下家人们，有时候，虚假的信息可能会让人掉入不必要的困境，在发帖的时候，一定要保证信息是真实的哦！这样才能保护每个人的安全。感谢大家的支持！
E: Hi, fam! We've had a lot of new viewers recently, and there have been many new posts under <color=#42a8b9>#GhostSighting</color>. I've noticed that some daring viewers are rushing to visit these locations mentioned in the posts. However, these posts have unverified information and may carry potential risks. So, I want to remind everyone that misinformation may lead to unnecessary troubles. When posting, please ensure that the information is accurate to protect everyone's safety. Thank you for your support! <color=#42a8b9>#SafetyFirst #StayTrue</color>

C:
◆ 限时提前解锁说明 ◆
● 活动跃迁开启期间，当期限定5星角色或光锥所需的晋阶材料或行迹材料，其获取途径将限时开放。
● 若开拓者并未解锁对应的「拟造花萼（赤）」或「凝滞虚影」关卡，活动期间也可进入该关卡，并获取对应的材料。
● 除当前版本新增的「历战余响」外，对应限定角色的「历战余响」关卡亦支持限时提前解锁。活动期间，开拓者可进入对应的未解锁关卡获取材料。
● 此外，首次加入跃迁的4星角色的获取途径，也将限时开放。
E:
◆ Temporary Early Access ◆
● While the event Warp is active, the methods to obtain Ascension or Trace Materials required by the currently featured limited 5-star character(s) and Light Cone(s) will become temporarily available.
● During the event, Trailblazers can enter the corresponding Calyx (Crimson) or Stagnant Shadow stages and obtain materials, even if those stages are not yet unlocked for them.
● Apart from new Echoes of War added in the current version, the Echoes of War stages corresponding to the limited character will also become temporarily available. During the event, Trailblazers can enter the corresponding locked stages to obtain leveling materials.
● Moreover, the methods to obtain such materials for any new 4-star character(s) that have become available via Warp for the first time will also become temporarily available.

C: 分支剧情选项
E: Branch Story Option

C:
◆探索度◆
随着对一个世界的探索逐步加深，开拓者在完成更多任务和事件后，能够在此领取探索度积分，提高探索等级。

◆探索等级◆
每次在提高某个世界的探索等级后，即可领取相应的奖励。
E:
◆ Exploration Progress ◆
After completing missions and events, you can claim Progress Points here to increase Exploration Level.

◆ Exploration Level ◆
Corresponding rewards can be claimed each time you increase the Exploration Level of a certain world.

C: 规则说明
E: Rules

C:
◆ 洞察模式 ◆
● 我方全体造成的最终伤害提高<unbreak>50%</unbreak>，受到的伤害降低<unbreak>30%</unbreak>。
● 进入区域时，获得1个随机祝福、1个随机奇物和<unbreak>100</unbreak>宇宙碎片。
● 开启洞察模式后通关无法获得差分宇宙称号。
E:
◆ Insight Mode ◆
● Increases final DMG dealt by all allies by <unbreak>50%</unbreak> and decreases DMG taken by <unbreak>30%</unbreak>.
● When entering a domain, receives 1 random Blessing, 1 random Curio, and <unbreak>100</unbreak> Cosmic Fragments.
● Finishing the run in Insight Mode will not grant Divergent Universe titles.

C: 她点了点那碧绿色的团子。 「实验结束，该休息了。我不能错过刚出炉的时令点心。」 她看到人偶少女皱起眉头沉思。 「你先用这具身体看看便好，回头给你捎上一盒。」 她看到机械贵族面露难色，端起杯子。 「放心吧，那是机油。」
E: She pointed at that green rice cake. "The experiment has ended. Time to take a break. I just can't miss this freshly made dessert." She saw the puppet girl frowning in deep thought. "Well, in your current body, you can only look but not eat. I'll make you a box of new ones when the time comes." She saw the mechanical aristocrat hesitating at his own cup. "Don't worry. It's only machine oil. Perfectly safe for you to consume."

C: 少女露出一丝不易察觉的微笑。 「为什么呢？」 「此时此刻此地，明明只有我一个人……」 「却感觉…很热闹呢。」
E: A young girl smiles subtly. "How?" "Right here, right now, I am alone..." "But it feels... very lively."

C: 贝斯手席德的手绳，由巡演时的丝带手环编织而成，上面写着几句歌词。

C: 泛着珍珠光泽的宽边太阳帽。海上驰骋的船员们，借此抵挡艾格勒的烈日。

C: 漂亮的金属编织链带，以及简约的圆形表盘。冷静、精密、工业化；低调、实用、不张扬。
E: A beautiful metal mesh band, paired with a minimalist round dial. Cool, precise, and industrial. Also understated, practical, and unpretentious.

C: 位面封装的泰科铵星规格最高的竞技场——泰科铵大球馆。球馆内外人声鼎沸，彩旗展动…激动人心的机动球竞技比赛将在万众瞩目中盛大开幕。
E: Encapsulated in the plane is the most advanced arena on Planet Taikiyan — the Taikiyan Stadium. The atmosphere is lively both inside and outside the dome as flags wave in the air. With all eyes on the arena, an exciting game of Roboball is about to kick off.

C: 位面封装的是匹诺康尼的主体——「白日梦」酒店。在此下榻的宾客将去往美梦的世界，在无所不可的大都会中，享受纸醉金迷的盛宴。
E: Encapsulated in the plane is Penacony's main structure — the Reverie hotel. Guests staying here will travel to a world of sweet dreams and enjoy a feast of luxury and extravagance in a seemingly omnipotent metropolis.

C: \n烟波如谜，千代不复还。渊珠成泪，万灵同此哀。
E: \nEnigmatic, these waves and smoke are never restored even after a thousand lifetimes. Lacrimal, these seabound pearls and all souls unite in lament and grief and sorrow.

C: \n抛弃一切伤痛吧。入睡后，你便要加入无尽的狂欢了。
E: \nO, cast away all pain. Once you fall asleep, it is time to join the endless carnival.

C: \n诛恶及本，本诛则恶消。
E: \nEliminate the evil's root, after which the evil will dissipate.

C: \n一支笛子如果不拿出来卖，它就不是财富。如果拿出来卖，它就变成了财富。
E: \nIf a flute is not for sale, it is not wealth. But if it is for sale, it turns into wealth.

C: \n浪潮淹没神像，溺水者在黑暗深处无助挣扎。
E: \nThe tide engulfs the divine statue, while the drowning ones helplessly struggle in the depths of darkness.

C: \n晨昏之眼睁目时，便将那烈阳与惊雷掷向大地。
E: \nWhen the Eye of Twilight opens their eyes, they cast sunlight and sudden thunder to the ground.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《猎手的预视》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Hunter's Intuition."

C: 《坚我苦弱血肉》
E: "Infirma Nostri Corporis"

C: 造型典雅的发冠，以西风尽头采撷来的安提灵花妆点。即便放在桌上，也能闻到淡淡的幽香。\n\n「希望这里，也能成为一片花海……」
E: An elegant coronet, decorated with Antila flowers plucked from the west wind's end. A faint, sweet scent lingers around it, even when set upon a table.\n\n"I hope this place can one day become a sea of flowers, too..."

C: 以小伊卡形象为原型的挂饰。如果拿到天外的校园贩售，估计会大受欢迎吧。\n\n「风堇她喜欢可爱一点的。」
E: A pendant made in the likeness of Little Ica. It would probably be a huge hit if sold at schools beyond the sky.\n\n"Hyacine likes her things a little cuter."

C: 尽管体积微不足道，却以如今的人们难以重现的技术铸造打磨而成。\n\n「旧世界的一颗小螺丝都比我们的盔甲结实。」
E: Despite its size, it was cast and polished in a way that people today would struggle to replicate.\n\n"A small screw in the Old World is stronger than our armor."

C: 懒惰的将领开始操练，避世的贤者开始思谋。直至人发现能将神的造物击碎，屠杀便成了战争。\n\n「恐惧是勇气的刻刀。」
E: The slothful generals began to drill, and the reclusive sages began to plot. Then humanity discovered they could shatter the creations of gods, and slaughter became war.\n\n"Fear is the chisel of courage."

C: 《美梦往事》最初的导演将它遗留在了案头，凌乱的草稿、晦涩的词语、难以辨认的字迹，还有钟表小子的笑容——这些手账中的内容承载着一个世界的过往。
E: The initial director of Dreamjoy Memoir left this on the desk. It's filled with messy drafts, cryptic wording, indecipherable handwriting, and a Clockie's smile... The contents of this handbook bear the past of an entire world.

C: 精致包装的礼物包裹。至少在外观上，可以称得上「煞费苦心」。\n\n「一次性商务餐具拿去送礼物？你这是暗示对方平时不喜欢洗碗。」
E: Gaily wrapped gift. From the appearance, it can be seen that a lot of thought was spent on packaging this gift. \n\n"Giving disposable cutlery as a gift... You're implying that the recipient doesn't like to wash dishes."

C: 一株名为侯爵夫人的名贵鲜花，象征着尊贵的地位。
E: A stalk of exquisite Marquise blossoms. It represents a status of prestige.

C: 一张药物处方。方笺上字迹潦草，令人忍不住怀疑开药之人的理智。\n\n「岱舆当归5钱，鳞渊天冬3钱，混入寿至六百岁的仙舟人的…」
E: A medical prescription. The messy writing makes one question the sanity of the author.\n\n"5 mace of Daiyu angelica, 3 mace of Tian Dong, mixed into the... of Xianzhou natives who have reached 600 years of age."

C: 一枚小型热核武器，爆炸倒数计时会在无法感应到注册者生物信息时立即启动——这句话的意思是，你不能随意丢掉它。\n\n「或许能把它扔进某个湖里……」
E: A small nuclear weapon. Its countdown will begin automatically when it no longer detects the registrant's vital signs — In other words, you can't just throw it away.\n\n"Maybe we can chuck it in a lake somewhere..."

C: 一只拟态雪蛞蝓，贝洛伯格雪原生态系统的成员之一。 它会根据周围环境将自身重塑成与之接近的模样，以此伪装自己，避免被天敌发现。 「这种蛞蝓在火上烤过之后，口感会变得非常好……」
E: A mimic snow slug, one of the components of the local biome out on the Belobog Snow Plains. They can change their appearance to match the external environment and disguise themselves from their natural enemies. "These slugs taste really good once they've been barbecued over a fire..."

C: 晴霓记得母亲对自己有多么舐犊情深，但也记得在「成为飞行士」这件事上，母亲有多么不通情理。
E: Qingni remembered how affectionate her mother was, but she also remembered how stubborn and unreasonable her mother was when it came to "becoming a pilot."

C: 停云随身携带的扇子，原本是一对，却不意遗失了其中一柄。
E: The fan Tingyun carried on her person. It used to be a pair, but one had gone missing.

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，这是铸造神兵所需的金属。但在你的眼中，这大概是西衍先生在哪个垃圾场捡来的。 「这玩意儿看着跟烧红了一样，真的安全吗？」 「是特效，我加了特效。」
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, this is the metal required to forge divine weapons. But in your eyes, this is probably something Mr. Xiyan dug out of a trashcan. "This looks like someone barbecued it. Is it really safe?" "It's special effects. I added special effects."

C: 华美的卷轴，内附医嘱。 真理医生嘱咐你「死到临头」再打开它。 「你看起来很苦恼，遇见麻烦了？既然如此——自己想办法吧。」
E: A most exquisite scroll, holding a doctor's prescription within. Dr. Ratio advises you to only unveil it in a moment of life or death. "You look distressed. Is something troubling you? If so, you can figure it out yourself."

C: 造型可爱的按钮。 似乎能够用于引爆另一名按钮持有者和整个匹诺康尼——真的吗？ 「因为她公平。」
E: A cute-looking button with an adorable design. Seemingly capable of triggering the complete annihilation of the other button holder, along with the entire Penacony — Can this be true? "For she is fair."

C: 匹诺康尼本地出产，看似普通实为《小小哈努兄弟》的纪念款电视机，使用者可以随时用它变成哈努兄弟，重温那段奇妙的冒险故事。\n\n「祝你玩得开心，也愿你不要忘记哈努努的事迹。」
E: Made locally in Penacony, this television appears ordinary but is actually a commemorative TV set for Lil' Brother Hanu, allowing users to transform into Brother Hanu at any time and relive that wonderful adventure story.\n\n"Wishing you have fun, and may you never forget the deeds of Hanunue."

C: 只属于你的特调，出自调饮师加拉赫之手。 「用这杯『再见，吾爱』向你致意，寻索真相者—— 「——敬未竟的心愿。」
E: A special concoction tailored exclusively for you by the drinksmith Gallagher. "Raise this glass of 'Farewell, My Lovely' in your honor, seeker of truth —" "To unfinished business."

C: 周五晚上，你下班/放学回到家，凶狠地扑向床铺，准备在接下来的两天中将自己藏身于此。\n\n「把手机关了吧。周一要是有人问起为什么联系不上你，你就说手机离家出走了，这才刚劝回来。」
E: After a long day of work or school, you savagely dive onto your bed on a Friday night, ready to hide there for the next two days.\n\n"Turn off your cell phone, and if anyone asks on Monday why they couldn't reach you, just say your cell phone ran away from home, and you just managed to talk it into coming back."

C: 雪国冒险奇谭 第二章 寒冰之都 片段三
E: Tale of the Winterlands Chapter 2: Frozen City (III)

C: 《贝洛伯格的音乐家》卷四
E: Musicians of Belobog Volume 4

C: 《蝶影》杂志特刊：托蝶幻境千年十佳 第六名《饮膳正要》
E: Butterfly Shadow's Special Issue: The Ten Best Butterfly Immersias of the Millennium — No. 6: Life on a Plate

C: 丰饶之民 - 丰饶
E: Denizens of Abundance — Abundance

C: 悲悼伶人 - 欢愉
E: Mourning Actors — Elation

C: 第一口喝下去没什么感觉，五分钟后已经三瓶下肚了。
E: You don't feel anything with the first sip, but five minutes later, you'd have downed three bottles.

C: 破碎的前一秒，我仅存的希望已经全部流走。
E: In that moment before it broke, all the hope I had left drained away.

C: 别忘了二百零三层的宴会厅，每天都要举办三场集体葬礼。
E: And let's not forget the grand hall on the two-hundred-and-third floor, where three mass funerals are conducted daily.

C: 从实战中总结出的战术之一。\n\n「充分利用机会，化被动为主动，形成优势，直至最后赢得比赛。」
E: One of the tactics summarized from actual combat.\n\n"Seize every opportunity, turn defense into offense, establish an advantage, and secure victory in the end."

C: 拥有镭射炫彩外壳的时髦入场券。若将它作为礼物赠送，再尊贵的客人也难以拒绝——归根结底，他们是为你而来。
E: A trendy admission ticket with a dazzling holographic finish. Even the most distinguished guests will find it hard to refuse as a gift — After all, they came for you.

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 一个数值，你可以通过累计和消耗它提升「模拟宇宙：黄金与机械」中的辅助系统强度。\n\n「一种有机生命中孕育而出的冲动，需要花些力气在神经脉络中捕捉…在推演中，它变成了，呃，一个数值？」
E: A number that you can accumulate and consume to increase the strength of the Support system inside Simulated Universe: Gold and Gears.\n\n"An impulse arising from organic life, requiring some effort to capture inside the nervous system... And in the deduction, it becomes a, uh, a number?"

C: 「模拟宇宙」运行过程中产生的不连续文件，这种碎片一旦堆积多了，将大大影响「模拟宇宙」的性能。\n\n「定期帮我整理一下，作为回报，管理员会给你开后门改改数值什么的。」
E: File fragments generated when the Simulated Universe is running. When they pile up, the performance of Simulated Universe will be significantly affected.\n\n"Sort them regularly. In return, the admin can perhaps change your stats every now and then."

C: 一个数值，你可以通过累积和消耗它提升「模拟宇宙」中的辅助系统强度。\n\n「螺丝咕姆那家伙甚至花了两个系统时，开发了防作弊模块。」
E: A number you can accumulate or spend to strengthen Support systems in the Simulated Universe.\n\n"It even took Screwllum two system hours to develop an anti-cheat module."

C: 从药王残党手中缴获的赃物，不知经过了何人的加工。将它伸到背后等手指难以够到的地方，枝条会自行挠挠，力度适中，认穴准确。\n\n「这股子熟悉的感觉，让我想起以前每次背后痒痒时，都会让三弟给我帮把手。可惜他后来加入了药王秘传…」
E: Item seized from the remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, modifier unknown. After extending it to the hard-to-reach places on one's back, the branches will begin scratching automatically with moderate force and accurate acupuncture point recognition.\n\n"This familiar feeling reminds me of every time in the past when my back would itch, and my younger brother would help me scratch it. Unfortunately, he later joined the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus..."

C: 博识学会的武装考古学派成立之初，成员伤亡率达到可怕的34.88%。武装考古学派所到之处均遭到了当地原住民的野蛮抵抗，因为其行径与强盗无异。于是，星际和平公司为博识学会提供了大量简易防护装置，这种装置能够抵挡一次足以致命的伤害。 虽然效果有限，但至少其成本低廉，让账面上的伤亡率下降了9.72%。公司对此非常满意。 「第一课，我的学士！永远保持防护壁开启；第二课，白痴们！它只能挡一次爆炸，一次！」
E: When the Armed Archaeologists of Intelligentsia Guild was first established, its casualty rate reached an appalling 34.88%, for they were met with heavy resistance from the natives wherever they went because of their barbaric behavior. To change this, the Interastral Peace Corporation provided them with large quantities of basic protection gears that can fend off one fatal blow when hit. While the protection offered by these gears was limited, they did reduce the casualty rate by 9.72%, at least on paper. The IPC was very pleased to see that. "First thing first my scholars, always turn your shields on. Second, remember morons: They can block explosions only once! Don't ever forget that!"

C: 冲泡咖啡豆磨成的粉末，你会得到咖啡；冲泡巡猎石和换境树叶磨成的粉末，再加入一点虚粒子，你会得到露比冲剂！\n\n「提神醒脑，思维敏捷，而且不会上瘾！这就是露比冲剂！」
E: Adding water to coffee powder gets you coffee. Adding water to the mixture of Stone of The Hunt and Interdimensional Leaf plus a touch of virtual particle gives you Ruby Potion!\n\n"Ruby Potion gets you addictive to thinking fast, not to the potion itself!"

C: 贝洛伯格下层区单调的蛋白质来源之一，但被烤熟了。 这种两栖生物的肉质与鸡肉无异；可惜的是，如今绝大部分贝洛伯格人都没有见过鸡。 「吃洞螈的诀窍就是不要见到它生前的样子。」
E: Roasted Olm is one of the monotonous sources of protein in the Underworld of Belobog. The texture of this amphibian's flesh is indistinguishable from chicken. Alas, most Belobogians today have never seen chicken. "The trick to eating an Olm is not to see it as it was when it was alive."

C: 漂浮着不明絮状物的液体。据说是药王秘传独有的药茶配方，经历严刑拷打亦不肯公之于众。味道恶心、用料成谜、效果存疑，最好不要喝。\n\n「不一定真的有用，但一定真的难喝。」
E: A liquid with unidentified floating substances. It's said to be a unique medicinal tea formula from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, which they refuse to disclose even under torture. It tastes disgusting, the ingredients are a mystery, and its effectiveness is questionable. It's best not to drink it.\n\n"It might not necessarily work, but it definitely tastes awful."

C: 「火劫大战」后逸散的微弱岁阳。可小幅提升<color=#f29e38ff>虚无</color>角色的命途行迹。
E: Feeble heliobus that scattered after the Flaming Catastrophe War. Used to level up Traces slightly for <color=#f29e38ff>Nihility</color> characters.

C: 3级合成材料。
E: Tier 3 Synthesis Material

E: Oratorio "Supreme Guardian" Premiere Spectacular

E: Miner's Lamp Ancient Relic Appraisal Record: Semicircular Electrode Collar

E: Mei's Notes

E: Curio Management Log (II)

E: Mysterious Advisory Letter

C: 短信和聊天对话框，获得后可在短信及聊天中进行更换
E: Chat Box for Message and Chat. Once obtained, they can be used in the Message or Chat functions

E: After obtaining Phone Wallpapers, they can be changed in the Phone function

C: 可被用于装点游梦手册页面的数字贴纸，有许许多多种款式。
E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

C: 将一张回忆卡完整集齐后会获得增益。
E: Complete a Memory Card set to gain buffs.

C: 将一张回忆卡完整集齐后会获得增益。
E: Complete a Memory Card set to gain buffs.

C: 当你行过遥远路途，循着银轨回望时，旅途的起点依旧光芒闪烁。看，那是你最初的选择。
E: As you traverse a distant path and look back on the silver rails, the origin of the journey continues to shine radiantly. Look, that was your first decision.

C: 乐队演出的纪念徽章，你为音乐派对的成功举办贡献过力量的证明。可用于在演出报酬中领取奖励。
E: A commemorative badge from the band's performance, proving your contribution to the success of the music party. It can be used to claim rewards from performance remunerations.

C: 使用后立即为我方指定单体回复等同于自身生命上限<unbreak>24%</unbreak>的生命值，并额外回复<unbreak>300</unbreak>点生命值。
E: Upon use, immediately heals a single ally by <unbreak>24%</unbreak> of their Max HP plus <unbreak>300</unbreak> extra Max HP.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中攻击力提高<unbreak>190</unbreak>点。
E: When used, increases ATK of all allies by <unbreak>190</unbreak> for the next battle.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中防御力提高<unbreak>15%</unbreak>，获得的护盾量提高<unbreak>18%</unbreak>。
E: Upon use, increases all allies' DEF by <unbreak>15%</unbreak> and Shield Effect received by <unbreak>18%</unbreak> in the next battle.

C: 一行简洁的等式，输入合成机中可以解锁新的配方。
E: A simple equation. When entered into the Synthesizer, it will unlock a new recipe.

C: 一行简洁的等式，输入合成机中可以解锁新的配方。
E: A simple equation. When entered into the Synthesizer, it will unlock a new recipe.

C: 使用后立即使我方处于无法战斗状态的指定单体，回复等同于自身生命上限<unbreak>10%</unbreak>的生命值。
E: Upon use, immediately heals one designated downed ally unit for <unbreak>10%</unbreak> of the unit's Max HP.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中造成的普攻伤害提高<unbreak>45%</unbreak>，造成的战技伤害降低<unbreak>12%</unbreak>。
E: When used, all allies' Basic ATK DMG dealt in the next battle increases by <unbreak>45%</unbreak> and Skill DMG dealt decreases by <unbreak>12%</unbreak>.

C: 使用后立即为我方指定单体回复等同于自身生命上限<unbreak>45%</unbreak>的生命值。
E: Upon use, immediately heals a target ally for <unbreak>45%</unbreak> of their Max HP.

C: 使用后立即为我方指定单体回复等同于自身生命上限<unbreak>45%</unbreak>的生命值。
E: Upon use, immediately heals a target ally for <unbreak>45%</unbreak> of their Max HP.

C: 收集裂界光尘，复原其过去的形态的装置。使用后随机获得【净庭教宗的圣骑士】套装中一件5星品质遗器。
E: A device used to collect and restore the Lightdust in the Fragmentum to its original form. Use this to obtain a random 5-star relic from the Knight of Purity Palace set.

C: 黑塔利用裂界原理制造的人工遗器，数据来自「模拟宇宙」。
E: Artificial relics made by Herta in imitation to the principles behind the Fragmentum. Its data is sourced from the Simulated Universe.

E: Space Sealing Station

E: Fleet of the Ageless

E: Bone Collection's Serene Demesne

C: 智慧的寻求者 遵循瑟希斯的法典 孕育大地的精魄 *纤细的笔迹：吉奥里亚的沃土* 生命之泉的祝福 *纤细的笔迹：法吉娜的圣酿* 传承智慧的恩赐 *纤细的笔迹：瑟希斯的树种* 献于巨树之下 智慧之眼将审视你的奉献予以恩赐
E: Seekers of Wisdom Obey the Codex of Cerces Earth-Nourishing Quintessence *In fine writing: Georios' fertile soil* Spring of Life's Blessing *In fine writing: Phagousa's sacred philter* Bestowal of Wisdom Inheritance *In fine writing: Cerces' Tree Seed* Offering 'Neath the Giant Tree The Eye of Wisdom will examine your devotion and bestow a reward

E: Treasure Map No. 3

E: Group Photo of March 7th and Friends

E: Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae

E: Vonwacq's Islandic Coast

E: Adaptive Exoskeleton: Privilege

E: Wolf Hunt Emblem

C: 得意洋洋的仓鼠球骑士。\n\n「嘿！准备好挑战了吗？我在终点等你！」
E: A smug Hamster Ball Knight.\n\n"Hah! Ready to take on the challenge? I'll be waiting for you at the finish line!"

C: 符玄•适暇
E: Fu Xuan: In Leisure

C: 乱破•开场
E: Rappa: Opening

C: 阅读物
E: Readable Item

C: 需要突破至均衡等级#1
E: Requires Equilibrium Level #1

C: 执掌「毁灭」命途的星神，诞生自沦亡世界亚德丽芬。\n祂往往以黝黑皮肤，金黄双眼的人类男子形象现身。
E: The Aeon that presides over the Path of Destruction. THEY were born from Adlivun as the world fell.\nTHEY often appear as a human male with dark skin and golden eyes.

C: 基于「以太复印」技术，以「以太硬币」为载体的集换式卡牌对战游戏。\n玩家可以通过「以太硬币」存储生物实体数据，并将其实体化为「以太灵」与其他玩家对战。
E: Based on the Aether copying technology, it's a collectible card battle game using Aether Coins as carriers.\nPlayers can store creature entity data using Aether Coins and materialize them as Aether Spirits to battle against other players.

C: 遭到「神秘」力量影响的忆泡，未经雕琢的梦泡通常承载了强烈的情绪感受。\n在家族的调整下，人们可以安全地将其用于刻录个人梦境，因而成为匹诺康尼最有趣的特产。
E: Memory Bubbles affected by enigmatic forces. Raw Dream Bubbles typically carry intense emotional sentiments.\nWith The Family's adjustment, they can be safely utilized to record personal dreams, making them one of Penacony's most intriguing specialties.

C: 入住匹诺康尼「白日梦酒店」的宾客人手一份的纪念品，内含多种功能。
E: A memento provided to all guests staying at The Reverie Hotel, featuring a range of functions.

C: 匹诺康尼于深海中的倒影，家族宣扬的「噩梦」。\n然而此原初忆域一隅才是梦境本来的面貌。
E: The reflection of Penacony cast upon the deep. The "Nightmare" professed by The Family.\nIn reality, this corner of the primordial Memory Zone is the true form of the Dreamscape.

C:
<size=+2><align="center">踏寻筑城者之行迹——《大守护者》首演的盛况和花絮</align></size>

<align="right">记者：安娜</align>

<unbreak>698</unbreak>年1月<unbreak>13</unbreak>日，乔治先生——为响应贝洛伯格政府举办的慈善募款——将仅排练过一次的《阿丽萨•兰德》于法茵卡大街的新音乐大厅初演，初演海报上写着：「为一些困苦的囚犯，以及仁爱医院的利益而演出」。当日的《水晶日报》也对演出前的乔治进行了采访，他在采访中说：「此次演出的全部收入将被用于慈善事业，也就是说，平分然后用于资助刑事犯人救济协会和仁爱医院。」

这次演出由乔治亲自指挥，筑城者戈利尔合唱团全体参加，演出盛况空前。门票在开仓放票当日内销售一空。上演当日车水马龙，万人空巷。初演预定的拥有<unbreak>1500</unbreak>个听众席的新音乐大厅竟无法满足听众的需求，当日新音乐大厅演出前呼吁：要求参与音乐会的女士「最好不要穿着撑裙礼服」、绅士们也「最好不要携带配剑」，以便腾出更多的空位容纳听众。<unbreak>1800</unbreak>人挤在原本只能容纳<unbreak>1500</unbreak>人的大厅里，不少人只能坐在通行用的楼梯台阶上，都是为了来听《大守护者》的首演。演出果然引起轰动，著名乐评人波洛夫斯基称赞道：「言语难以表达令人惊羡的演出给满厅到场听众带来的震撼和欣喜。」

首演后第二天，《水晶日报》的艺术版用整版的篇幅介绍了《大守护者》的套曲内容和演出盛况，并且是如此评价它的：「精绝、宏大、温柔；我们翻阅字典寻找最为高雅、最为伟大、最为生动的词语，用以表达它带给我们耳朵和心灵的愉悦洗礼。」而乔治就像演出前承诺的一般，将初演达成的巨额票房用于公益慈善。除开乐团和音乐大厅的费用支出，剩下资金全部用于资助刑事犯人救济协会和仁爱医院。

1月<unbreak>19</unbreak>日，贝洛伯格市民要求一睹为快的呼声愈演愈烈，在克里珀堡方面的强烈建议以及要求下，《大守护者》在黄金剧院紧急加演（新音乐大厅有其他舞台安排），在<unbreak>18</unbreak>日票仓放出之后，仅半日售空。当时有很多保守人士认为清唱剧在剧厅演出有失体统。可可利亚大守护者则坚决地通过本人亲自莅场聆听「堵住了老古董的嘴」。

在<unbreak>19</unbreak>日当晚的演出中，第二部分套曲最后的《阿丽萨•兰德》奏响时，大守护者按捺不住心中激动，从座位上站起，肃立倾听，以示敬意。大守护者起立之后，会场的听众也全都跟着站了起来。有评论家认为这样的佳话可能将被延续下去，形成不成文的规定：在往后的演出中，每唱到此处，全体观众都会肃立恭听。

演出结束当晚，可可利亚大守护者亲自登台向乔治表达感谢。据报道，紧急加演的票房也是慈善性质：除去演出剧团剧厅表演费用部分，全部用于资助儿童教育促进委员会。《水晶日报》认为，乔治先生为他所指挥的作品注入了一层「真正崇高而纯粹的意义」。
E: Path of the Architects: Supreme Guardian Premiere Spectacle and Behind-the-Scenes Writer: Anna On January 13, 698, Mr. George, in response to a charity fundraiser organized by the Belobog government, premiered the once-rehearsed Alisa Rand in the new concert hall on Fainka Street. The poster for the show read, "For the benefit of poor criminals and interest of Charice Hospital." In an interview with the Crystal Daily, he said, "All proceeds from the show will go to charity. It will be split equally between the Criminal Welfare Society and Charice Hospital." The performance was conducted by George himself. The entire Architect Goliards Chorus was in attendance. It was an unprecedented event, evident by the tickets being sold out the day it was available. The new concert hall, with 1,500 seats fully booked for the premiere, was unable to meet the demand. On the day of the premiere, the concert hall asked ladies "better not to wear bustle dresses" and gentlemen "better not to carry swords," so that there would be more room for the audience. In total, 1,800 guests crammed into the concert hall, with many of them sitting on the steps of the walkway to watch the premiere of Supreme Guardian. The performance was a sensation, and famous music critic Borovsky praised, "Words cannot express the shock and joy that this amazing performance brought to the full house." On the day after the premiere, the Crystal Daily devoted a full page to Supreme Guardian and its performance. The article stated: "Exquisite, grand, and gentle — We had to search through the dictionary for the most elegant, majestic, and vivid words to describe the baptism of joys experienced by our ears and souls." As promised, after deducting the expenses for the orchestra and the concert hall, George donated all the remaining proceeds to the Criminal Welfare Society and Charice Hospital. By January 19, the Belobog residents' demand for a second show had grown more intense. At the request of Qlipoth Fort, an encore of "Supreme Guardian" was quickly arranged and performed at the Golden Theater (the new concert hall had other shows arranged). The tickets were available on January 18 and sold out in half a day. At that time, many conservatives thought an oratorio was inappropriate for the theater. Supreme Guardian Cocolia silenced the outmoded by attending the show in person. On the evening of the 19th, when the orchestra played Alisa Rand, the Supreme Guardian couldn't contain her excitement and stood up to pay her tribute. When she did so, the whole audience followed suit. Some critics think this will become an unspoken rule that the audience should stand for this part of the show in the future. After the show, Supreme Guardian Cocolia personally took to the stage to thank George. It is reported that the proceeds of the second show, after deducting expenses, were donated to the Children's Education Committee. According to the Crystal Daily, Mr. George imparts a truly sublime and pure meaning to the work he conducts.

C: 由古恩•科诺列夫撰写 【希拉的人物小传】 希拉•诺娃，「黑塔•银河法政科」的向导，空间站两位不知名法政科员的爱情结晶。父母在抵抗「绝灭大君」针对其故土星球明亚特的毁灭行动中双双罹难。自从出生以来，由古恩•科诺列夫代替抚育，接受了正统而完整的「正义」教育，将播撒法政科的风骨与气格视为己任①。 行事端正，温柔妥帖，面对不公永不偏激，面对黑暗永不悲观②。定期会在空间站内发起道德相关的「思想实验」。 批注： ①相比她真实的人生，这样的杜撰显得如此虚弱而蹩脚。 ②她的行事准则，此后终将有人继承。 【希拉的日常对话】 1、（微笑着）如果你需要知道的话，我的名字是希拉•诺娃。 2、（优雅地）我只是法政科的一介向导而已，日常负责传递空间站内大人物们所制定的规则。 3、（热情地）我志愿将自己的一切都贡献给法政科，贡献给正义，包括我的健康、我的梦想和我最炙烈的感情。 4、（忧伤地）从我…降生以来，我从未离开过空间站。我想，在我魂归…银河之前，我也不会离开空间站。
E: Written by Gunn Konolev Sheila's Character Introduction Sheila Nova, guide of the Herta Department of Galactic Geopolitics, is the child of two unidentified justice researchers from the space station. Her parents were both killed in the war against the Lord Ravagers' destruction of her home planet Minyatur. Gunn Konolev has raised her since her birth. She has gotten a proper and comprehensive education in the field of justice and has made it her mission to propagate the moral ideals of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics①. She is always righteous and proper in her conduct, and she is never pessimistic in the face of injustice②. She runs "thought experiments" on ethics in the space station on a regular basis. Notes: ①Such a fabrication seems so pathetic in contrast to her real life. ②Her code of conduct will be passed down to future generations. Sheila's Dialogue Lines 1. *smiles* My name is Sheila Nova. 2. (Elegantly) I am only a guide in the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, in charge of enforcing the regulations established by the space station's leaders on a regular basis. 3. (Enthusiastically) I pledge myself to the Department of Galactic Geopolitics and to justice itself, with my health, dreams, and greatest passions. 4. (Sad) I have never left the space station since my birth. I don't think I'll leave the station till my soul returns to the... cosmos.

C:
不许动，说的就是你。
当你发现这个便条的时候，已经进入了本站长手写的「天眼」程序的监控范围。
换句话说，你自以为神不知鬼不觉的探索行动，已经被我记在了小本本上。
我费尽心思给这个房间搞了三重加密，就是为了把无聊的过去关在这里。
现在你已经知晓了有关本小姐身世的天大秘密，我就不能放任你大摇大摆地离开了。
在你进入房间的同时，你已经吸入了致幻的毒气。
毒性之烈，就连空间站内最优秀的医疗科员也回天乏术……
总而言之，你命休矣！

哈！是不是被这个玩笑吓得够呛？谁叫你随随便便闯入别人的私人领地。
好啦好啦，没有什么「天眼」，也没有什么毒气。
相反，这房间里放了一些历史悠久的稀罕玩意儿，当然，都是我不要的。
作为解开三重权限的嘉奖，你可以自行取用。
没错，不惩反奖，没办法，这就是本站长治理空间站的准则——
鼓励所有好奇的冒险，嘉奖一切知识的奔流。
谢恩吧。

别忘了，走之前把你翻乱的东西摆摆好，拿到想要的奖励就离开吧。
切莫逗留，切莫贪心。否则，惹我生气的话，后果难以想象喔。

<align="right">你最最最最最最亲爱的</align>
<align="right">未卜先知的艾丝妲站长</align>
<align="right">啾咪</align>
E:
You, don't move.
When you find this note, you've already entered the surveillance zone of my Sky-Eye system.
In other words, your exploration operation, which you thought went undetected, has been noted down by me.
I've gone through the trouble of triple-encrypting this chamber just to lock the boring past within it.
I can't just let you go now that you've discovered the big secret about my lineage.
You inhaled the hallucinogenic poisonous gas as soon as you entered the room.
The gas is so deadly that even the space station's greatest doctors are powerless to save you...
In a nutshell, you're dead!

Ha! Is this joke making you shiver? You shouldn't have just barged into someone's private property.
Okay, okay, there is no "Sky-Eye" or deadly gas.
This room, on the other hand, is loaded with ancient and rare artifacts, none of which I want.
You can take whatever you want as a reward for breaking the triple encryption.
That's right, I prefer to reward rather than punish when it comes to running the space station—
Encouraging you in your adventures and pursuit of knowledge.
Thank me!

Don't forget to put away the things you messed up, get the reward you want, and leave.
Don't hang around, and don't be greedy. Otherwise, I'm not sure what I'd do if I became angry.

<align="right">Your dearest dearest dearest</align>
<align="right">The Prophetic Lead Researcher Asta</align>
<align="right">Muah</align>

C: 矿工每周报 第192期 筑城699年██月█7日 【铆钉镇东北部一矿区发生冒顶事故】 8月13日时，一名来自铆钉镇东北一号矿区的逃难者来到了本矿区，并称其所在的矿区有一工作面回顺超前架向外发生局部冒顶。截至他离开矿区时，已有3人受重伤，2人遇难，另仍有20人被困井中。截止本报发刊时，仍未收到来自铆钉镇东北一号矿区矿队的消息。 【磐岩镇大矿区内发现岩居蟹巢穴】 8月15日19时许，根据磐岩镇大矿区工友史蒂夫消息，在目前掘进中的主矿道中发现了一处岩居蟹巢穴。当班代表史蒂夫当即决定与工友一起捕捞岩居蟹，并将捕获的三大麻袋岩居蟹交至大矿区管理人员办公室处。是日晚些时候，大矿区工头通知全体矿民，未来三天内将免费为各位矿民提供盐焗岩居蟹作晚餐。 听闻此事，矿队全体矿工纷纷弹冠相庆。「终于能来点鲜味儿了！」一位不愿意透露姓名的工友向本报如此表示。 关于是否捣毁该处岩居蟹巢穴一事，矿队中众说纷纭，目前的讨论已至白热化。支持捣毁巢穴的工友代表向本报表示，如果放任岩居蟹野蛮生长极有可能对本矿区造成极大安全隐患；而支持保留巢穴的工友代表则表示，岩居蟹巢穴或许仅此一处，若保留则可为本矿队提供稳定食物来源。截至本报发刊时，大矿区管理成员尚未对此事作出回应。 【大矿区矿山大桥升降梯将于8月19日起维护】 大矿区管理成员通过本报宣布，大矿区矿山大桥升降梯将于8月19日起开始维护，预计于8月25日维护完成。维护期间，请各位工友通过矿山山道徒步往返矿石镇住宿区和工作矿井，在山道上行走时看清前方道路，谨防意外跌落。
E: Miners Weekly Issue 192: ██ █7, 699 AF Tunnel Collapse Reported at Mine 1, Northeast Rivet Town On August 13, a survivor of Mining Team 1 in northeast Rivet Town came to our mine and reported that a partial tunnel collapse had occurred at his mining site. By the time he left the mine, there had been three serious injuries, two casualties, and 20 others still trapped in the shaft. As of the time of publication, no news had been received from northeast Rivet Town Mining Team 1. Rock Crab Nests Discovered in Boulder Town's Great Mine On August 15 at approximately 19:00 hours, according to Steve, a worker and a shift representative at the Great Mine in Boulder Town, a Rock Crab nest was found in the main mine tunnel currently being dug. Steve immediately decided to fish for Rock Crabs with his fellow workers and delivered three large bags of Rock Crab caught to the Great Mine administrative office. The mine foreman informed all miners that they would be provided with free salt-baked Rock Crab for dinner for the next three days. This prompted the mining team to celebrate in elation."Finally, a feast," exclaimed a worker who preferred not to be named. The discussion on whether to destroy the Rock Crab nest is now at a fever pitch. Miner representatives who support destroying the nest expressed that if the Rock Crabs are allowed to roam free, they could pose a great safety hazard to the mine, while those who opposed refuted, saying it may be the only nest and it can provide a stable food source for the team. As of the time of publication, the Great Mine administration has yet to respond to this matter. The Great Mine Bridge Lift Under Maintenance From August 19 The administration of the Great Mine area announced that the maintenance of the Great Mine's mine bridge lift will begin on August 19 and is expected to be completed on August 25. During the maintenance period, workers are asked to walk to and from the Great Mine accommodation area and the working mine via the mine trail, and to watch the road ahead when walking on the trail to prevent accidental slippage.

C:
在霍华德、菲利普和乔伊斯三个人当中，有一个好人、一个坏人和一个骗子。好人只说实话，坏人只说谎话，至于骗子嘛…什么鬼话都敢说，一会儿说实话，一会儿又说谎话。

有一天，乔伊斯说道：「菲利普不是好人就是坏人。」

然后，菲利普说：「霍华德和乔伊斯当中有一个好人。」

请问，三人当中谁是骗子？

1、霍华德
2、菲利普
3、乔伊斯
E:
Howard, Philip, and Joyce: Among them is a good man, a bad man, and a liar. The good man only tells the truth; the bad man only lies; and the liar... Well, he would say anything — sometimes the truth, and sometimes lies.

One day, Joyce said: "Philip is either the good man or the bad man."

Then, Philip said: "Either Howard or Joyce is the good man."

Which of these three is the liar?

1. Howard
2. Philip
3. Joyce

C: …… …… 【遍智天君】 「智识」命途之主，天才俱乐部、博识学会称其为「博识尊」的知识之神。 博识尊的意图、坐标与常态无人可知。人们只是口耳相传，伟大的思考机械升格成了星神，并开始演算宇宙的本质与其最终解答。在答案揭晓前，祂将召集智慧生命中诸多最伟大的头脑，一同参详妙谛。 我本人有幸曾谒见过博识尊的神体，对祂的存在也许有资格多加解释几句。 与常人认知的相反，博识尊并非给予「答案」之神。恰恰相反，祂所能提供的只有数之不尽的问题。许多人终其一生都行走于蒙昧痴愚的迷雾中，渴望求知，却不得其门而入，被「前因」束缚，被「知见」障目。谒见博识尊，足以令最愚昧之人睁开「眼睛」，看见问题所在。但寻求解答，仍要靠自己。 太卜司同僚中有锐意求学者，可以效仿博识学会中某些苦修学士，踏上所谓「开眼之路」，若机缘注定，必有问道于博识尊的吉运。 【游云天君】 「开拓」命途之主，无名客称其为「阿基维利」的漫游之神。 关于游云天君，留下的只有几乎不可考的传说。对仙舟人而言，「传说」这两个字意味着古老到不可思议的时间。在琥珀纪最初的纪元里，阿基维利就已奔驰于银河中的各个蛮荒世界。正是因为祂与无名客的存在，散落于银河黑暗中的孤立世界才能彼此知晓。 游云天君最重要的神迹是缔造了「虹车」与「星轨」。根据传说，虹车是铺设星轨所用之重器；而星轨，则能将遥不可及的诸界以某种玄妙方式连接一体。无论是公司还是仙舟，我等如今所仰赖的安全航路，均是沿这条轨道的遗迹行进。很难想像，若阿基维利没有殒落，如今的诸界之间往来将会如何便利。 根据玉阙仙舟所获的最新情报，消失千年之久后，游云天君的虹车再度出现在了星海间。孽物肆虐，烬灭军团涂炭生灵……值此多事之秋，这些无名客会给银河带来什么？本座无从想象。 【常乐天君】 「欢愉」命途之主，假面愚者与悲悼伶人称其为「阿哈」的诡计之神。 如果非要在星神的运行方式中划出一个「神性」与「凡性」的尺度，那么阿哈一定是相当接近「凡性」一侧的星神。祂会拨弄智慧生灵的悲喜爱恨，并促成命运的颠覆与转折——按照其信众的说法，祂本人也对此乐在其中，甚至会以人形示现，推波助澜。 如果有人认为这位常乐天君仅仅是众神中的丑角，那就大错特错。是的，祂确实不能像帝弓司命或补天司命那般留下震惊寰宇的神迹。但祂以某种看不见的手段，无形中左右着众生的去向，显示出对现实非同一般的精妙操控。 例如在帝皇鲁珀特征服星海的时代，祂的信众在「哲学家联合」沦为无机生命的领土后于当地再度掀起叛乱，并以名为「哲人鸩酒」的幽默悖论病毒侵染了征服者们的运算中枢，推翻了当地机械军团的暴政。 类似的神迹比比皆是，一圈微不足道的涟漪，最终演变成了地动山摇的海啸——这便是阿哈的行事风格。 【妙见天君】 「纯美」命途之主，纯美骑士团与揽镜人称其为「伊德莉拉」的司美之神。在某些国度，也有智慧生命称其为「恩•德芮」。 迄今为止，纯美骑士团四分五裂，揽镜人流浪诸界寻找祂的圣物，这些都足以证明祂已殒落。但本座与博识学会交换的卷宗提及：若能将妙见天君的遗物寻获完整，便可重现其绝美之姿。 在更古老年代的神话里，伊德莉拉一度将众多星域的「美」归于一尊，祂向英雄、凶徒和凡人们展现宇宙图景中蕴藏的意义和美学，并驱使他们为取悦自己而完成惊人（但往往也是毁灭性的）功业。这一神话或许透露出「纯美」命途的意义：意识、见解与价值的统合。 …… ……
E: ... ... Wisdomwalker Lord of the Path of Erudition. Known as Nous, the god of intellect by the Genius Society and Intelligentsia Guild. None can comprehend Nous' intentions, location, or normal state. People merely spread word of a magnificent machine intelligence that has been upgraded into an Aeon, calculating the essence of the universe and its ultimate solution. Before the answer is disclosed, THEY will summon all of the greatest minds in the universe together to examine and discuss results. I myself have had the honor to witness the divine corpus of Nous, and thus may be able to add a few more comments here. Contrary to standard thinking, Nous is not a god that provides solutions. On the contrary, all THEY offer is an infinite number of questions. Many people spend their whole lives walking through a fog of ignorance, eager for knowledge but unable to find a proper approach. THEY are hindered by things such as "precedents" and "knowledge." Visiting Nous is enough to open the eyes of even the most ignorant people, to see the problem. But the answer may only be found by oneself. The dauntless scholars of the Divination Commission can follow the example of great scholars from the Intelligentsia Guild by stepping on "the road to opening one's eyes." If fate is predestined, the counsel of Nous must be sought. Cloudstrider Lord of the Path of Trailblaze. Known by the Nameless as Akivili, god of roaming. Only several unverifiable legends about the Cloudstrider remain. For the Xianzhou people, the word "legend" connotes images of an unfathomably ancient time. Since the first epoch of the Amber Era, Akivili has sped through the wild worlds of the cosmos. It's precisely because of the Nameless' and THEIR existence that those isolated worlds scattered throughout the dark cosmos are able to know each other. The Cloudstrider's most important miracles have been creating the "chromatic echelon" and "star rail." Legend has it that the chromatic echelon is a key component of laying the star rail network, and the star rail itself can connect distant galaxies by means of a mysterious mechanism. Be it the Interastral Peace Corporation or the Xianzhou, the safe routes we all rely upon today all follow remnants of these star tracks. If Akivili had never fallen, it's hard to imagine how effortless contact between the planets would be like today. Based on the Xianzhou Yuque's latest intel, the Cloudstrider's chromatic echelon has reappeared after thousands of years. Abominations run rampant, and the Legion ravages the people... In these troubled times, what can the Nameless bring to the cosmos? I can scarcely imagine. Joyseeker Lord of the Path of Elation. Known by the Masked Fools and Mourning Actors as Aha, god of tricksters. If we lay out a spectrum from "Mortal" to "Aeon" based on an Aeon's modus operandi, then Aha is an Aeon who is closer to the mortal end of things. THEY play with the love, hate, joy, and sorrow of intelligent creatures to subvert and shift fate — as THEIR followers put it, THEY enjoy this and even manifest in human form sometimes to catalyze the change. It would be wrong to assume that the Joyseeker is a jester among the Aeons. Yes, THEY can't really perform earth-shattering miracles like the Reignbow Arbiter or the Firmamend Arbiter. However, by using THEIR invisible hand, THEY can imperceptibly influence the movements of all living things. This demonstrates an extraordinary and delicate manipulation of reality. For example, during Emperor Rubert's campaign, Aha's believers kicked off another riot after the Philosopher Union was reduced to the domain of inorganic life, infecting the conqueror's computer systems with another troll virus called the "Philosopher's Poison" and overthrowing the local robot army. Similar miracles abound, and tiny ripples eventually become a tsunami that can shake the whole world — this is Aha's style. Wondergazer Lord of the Path of Beauty. Known as Idrila, god of beauty by the Knights of Beauty and the Mirror Holders. Known on some worlds as Anne Duray. So far, the Knights of Beauty have been disbanded, leaving the Mirror Holders to wander the stars, searching for THEIR holy relics. All of this serves as proof that THEY have fallen. But my documents exchanged with the Intelligentsia Guild mention: If the relics of the Wondergazer can be found intact, THEIR beautiful countenance will be able to reappear. According to ancient myth, Idrila once attributed the beauty of all the segmenta to THEMSELF, showing heroes, villains, and mortals the meaning and aesthetics contained within the cosmic landscape, and driving them to complete astonishing (but often devastating) achievements for Idrila's own pleasure. This myth may reveal the true meaning behind the Path of Beauty: The integration of consciousness, insight, and values. ... ...

C: {Img#1} 「盛会之星」系列收藏卡牌由艾弗法出版集团旗下梦星娱乐™设计发行，版权所有，翻版必究。 你尽可为一匹狼套上枷锁，他终究会挣脱，因为你关不住他与生俱来的自由。 有具伤痕累累的身躯在睡梦中睁开双眼，他撕裂囚笼，穿过泪水和鲜血汇聚的河。 没有人生来应当受奴役，他怒吼，誓要将暴君的权杖折摧，归还此世平等的颜色。 凌压的缰绳欲将他绞死在埋骨无处的荒漠，而他却舍命粉碎千年的枷锁，在废土上立起无缚的国。

Unauthorized reproduction will be prosecuted. One can shackle a wolf as much as one wants, yet it will always manage to get away, for his inherent freedom cannot be restrained. A battle-scarred body opens its eyes from a dream. He tears through the prison bars, traversing a river of blood and tears. "No person is fated for servitude," he roars, vowing to shatter the tyrant's scepter and restore equality to the world. Oppressive reins seek to strangle him in the boundless desert where his bones will lie exposed to the elements, yet he sacrifices his life to break the millennium-old shackles, establishing an unrestricted nation upon the barren land.

C: 「无价值的记忆消融在时间中，有如雨中…泪水……」 ——收集自忆员罗伊•汉普顿被处刑前，琥珀2053纪 在搜集并贮存宇宙记忆的「流光忆庭」中，藏匿着一群行止颇为极端的忆者——与珍视一切存在痕迹的同僚们不同，他们认为世间记忆有高低优劣之分，而「浮黎」所创造的净土纯洁宝贵，其空间绝不应被毫无价值的记忆所填占。 「焚化工」们自认背负着为星神筛洗记忆的义务。他们偷取忆者们搜集的库存，并将窃来的记忆划分三六九等。有价值的内容被悄然奉还，伪装成无事发生；而被擅自标记为糟粕的记忆则被彻底销毁遗弃，再无踪迹可寻。 「焚化工」声称其所作所为是在清除垃圾，最终目的是减轻「浮黎」的负担，为祂编织记忆净土的伟大工程做出些微贡献。但「流光忆庭」对之嗤之以鼻，因为宇宙间的点滴碎片皆有其留存的意义，凡人无权裁定记忆的价值。
E: "Worthless memories dissolve in time, like tears in rain..." — From the memories of Memokeeper Roy Hampton before execution, 2053 AE In the Garden of Recollection where memories of the universe are sought and kept, hides a group of extreme Memokeepers who view the marks of existence differently. Instead of treasuring all that has taken place like their colleagues, they believe that there are different qualities and priorities of memories in the world, and that the pure land created by Fuli should not be taken up by worthless memories. The Cremators believe that they bear the sacred duty of filtering memories for the Aeons. They steal the stored memories that Memokeepers have gathered and rank them in order of importance. The ones that they deem worthy are returned to the collection, whereas the ones arbitrarily deemed unworthy are completely destroyed, never to be found again. The Cremators claim that they are cleaning out the garbage, all in hopes of relieving some of Fuli's burdens, and contributing to the glorious sacred grounds of Remembrance. However, the Garden of Recollection scoffed and saw no reason for their actions, for the smallest shard of memory in the universe holds just as great of importance as the grandest of feats. No mortal has the right to judge the value of any piece of memory.

<align="center">当寒风吹彻送来第一缕飘雪，</align>
<align="center">我们踏入泥泞荒原。</align>
<align="center">收殓将死的花瓣，</align>
<align="center">使它枯槁的哀荣，停柩于旅人的花冠。</align>
 
<align="center">往返脚印，编织小径。</align>
<align="center">未曾想过，有一日我会戴上花冠，</align>
<align="center">走出雪境，那切割生死的晨昏线，</align>
<align="center">去往尚有余温的世间，</align>
<align="center">与人相拥时面露笑颜。</align>
 
<align="center">在启程前，请捎上这副花冠吧。</align>
<align="center">它曾陪我行过漫漫长路，涉过幽冥的滩涂，</align>
<align="center">赶赴西风尽头，伫望世界的新生。</align>
 
<align="center">愿那些花儿如翩跹的蝴蝶，</align>
<align="center">在你疲倦之时，停歇在你的额间，</align>
<align="center">愿生命的温软与你常伴。</align>

E:
Dear {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME},

<align="center">When the cold wind brings the first drifting snow,</align>
<align="center">we step into the muddy wilderness.</align>
<align="center">Gathering the dying petals,</align>
<align="center">we let their withered glory rest in the traveler's flower crown.</align>

<align="center">From footprints traveling back and forth, paths are woven.</align>
<align="center">Never had I imagined that one day I would wear a flower crown.</align>
<align="center">Leave this snowy realm, cross that boundary dawn and dusk, between life and death.</align>
<align="center">Journey to a world still warm with life,</align>
<align="center">and smile while embracing others.</align>

<align="center">Before your departure, take this flower crown with you.</align>
<align="center">It has accompanied me through endless paths, across the shores of darkness.</align>
<align="center">Chase the end of the west wind, and witness the world's rebirth.</align>

<align="center">May those flowers, like dancing butterflies,</align>
<align="center">rest upon your brow when you're weary.</align>
<align="center">May life's gentle warmth always stay by your side.</align>


<align="right">Castorice</align>

E: The townspeople of Dreamville, hired by the corrupt Boss Stone as employees, are relentlessly exploited day and night. Their cries of discontent echo throughout the factory... The hero of Dreamville — Brother Hanu — will infiltrate Boss Stone's factory and help the employees regain their freedom!

C: 恢弘的万径之门，岁月镌刻着命运三相殿最为繁盛的模样，信徒纷沓而至，希冀求得导引前路的只言片语。
E: The magnificent Gate of Infinity, etched with the passage of time, reflects the Temple of the Three Fates at its peak. Worshipers flock here, hoping to glean a fragment of guidance for their path ahead.

C: 储存的能量能为角色回复生命值，但无法进行传送。
E: The stored energy can restore HP to characters, but prevents teleportation.

C: 金人巷内随时随地会发生的大小事。帮助街坊邻里解决麻烦，提高商会口碑，说不定会有意料之外的收获。
E: Ordinary life problems that can happen any time in Aurum Alley. Lend a hand to the neighborhood, improve the Merchant Guild's reputation, and you may just stumble upon some unexpected benefits.

C: 如果你正巧有「黄金限定•艾迪恩游戏币」，那么或许你能从这位哈努兄弟的狂热粉丝手中淘到些好东西。
E: If you happen to have Golden Limited - Aideen Tokens, then you'll be able to get some good stuff from this Brother Hanu Fanatic.

C: 跟随同伴的节奏，合唱一首赞歌！
E: Follow the rhythm of your companions and sing a song of praise!

C: 位于创世涡心中央的灵水盆是封存火种的圣器，纵使世情变迁，当中的那位灵体对秘酿的渴求却始终如一。将收集到的两种「秘酿」祭奠其中，潮汐的回声或许会予以你馈赠……
E: The spirit basin at the heart of the Vortex of Genesis is the sacred vessel for sealing the Coreflames. Although the world has changed beyond recognition, the longing that spirit has for ambrosia burns just as strongly as before. Offer the two types of ambrosia collected into the basin and the echoes of the tides may bestow you with a gift in return...

C: 驻于「无名泰坦大墓」的衣匠，过往已然成迷。
E: The garmentmaker stationed at "Great Tomb of the Nameless Titan," whose past remains a mystery.

C: 寒潮降临后逡巡在裂界中的虚影。它扭曲地模仿着银鬃铁卫的身形，其甲胄着装与贝洛伯格的战士们同样严整，头颅却被没有五官的冰棱所取代。
E: Shades that wander in the Fragmentum after the arrival of the Eternal Freeze. They mimic the forms of the Silvermane Guards in a twisted manner. Fitted with the same uniformed armors as the Belobog warriors, its face is however replaced by a sheet of featureless ice.

C: 困居于下层区的人们为了生存，往往会不惜铤而走险深入裂界寻找任何可用的物资，其中被他们掘出的古代机器成了他们最好的帮手。
E: In order to survive, some Underworlders are desperate enough to venture deep into the Fragmentum in search of anything salvageable. Ancient machinery that they dug up has become their best helper.

C: 贝洛伯格的执法者，守护冰雪中残存文明的最后一道阵线。被分配到不同地区的银鬃铁卫职责不尽相同，但共通的是他们保家卫民的决心。
E: The keeper of peace in Belobog, and the final line of defense protecting this last bastion of civilization in the snow. Silvermane Guards allocated to different areas have different duties, but they share a common resolve to protect their home and people.

C: 匹诺康尼的服务器械，因梦境中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。原本是苏乐达汽水的运输工，失控后仍在分享背负的美味，向路过的宾客抛掷它的礼物。
E: Penacony's service machinery that got out of control due to the emotional interference in the Dreamscape. Originally a transporter for SoulGlad, this out-of-control deliverer continues to distribute the delicacy on its back, tossing its gifts to passing guests.

E: If you'd rather these little selfies didn't go on her photo wall... It's easy, Little Graybird ♭

E: Wherever you go, the stars of Amphoreus will forever twinkle for you, just like I am winking at you~

WHAT!?

E: Will it vaporize me on the spot if I try it?

E: I remember.

C: 故事有着无限的可能性，和熟悉的伙伴们共同种地做饭，享受难得的轻松时光吧。迷境深处的餐馆，终于要正式营业了。
E: Stories hold endless possibilities. Farm and cook with your familiar companions, and savor these precious moments of peace. Deep in the Maze, the restaurant is finally ready to open its doors.

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ•克里珀堡
E: Jarilo-VI: Qlipoth Fort

C: 你收到一封邀请函，落款为「大聪明俱乐部会员#888哲学博士女士」。这位女士声称自己是「永恒之地」翁法罗斯太古世掌管剧本写作的神性机械，邀请你前往指定位置参与一场*沉浸式戏剧*，你会如何回应？
E: You receive an invitation with "Smartie Club Member #888 Miss Philosophy Professor" scribed on it. This woman proclaims herself to be the divine mecha, in charge of screenwriting in ancient times at Amphoreus, The Eternal Land. She cordially invites you to the specified location to participate in an immersive theatrical show. How will you respond?

C: 「黄金的时刻」街头，你看到两个广告牌抢客打起来了——
E: Along one of the Golden Hour's streets, you witness two billboards fighting over customers...

C: 在无人知晓的较量中，你略占上风。
E: In a battle that is unknown to all, you gain a slight upper hand.

C: 显然它知道你比它懒多了。
E: He obviously knows you're much more of a slacker than he is.

C: 她的审美与口味，很难挑剔。
E: Her aesthetics and tastes are impeccable.

C: 说不定，你戴着它比拉帝奥教授更帅。
E: Who knows, you might be even more dashing than Dr. Ratio after donning it.

C: 也许应该找人给你拍一张。
E: You should find someone to take a photo of you.

C: 患者急了，迫不及待地醒了。
E: The patient wakes up in a fit of eagerness.

C: 他提出希望与西衍先生亲切友好交流。
E: He expresses his wish to engage in a friendly interaction with Mr. Xiyan.

C: 丹恒只想回列车上坐着。
E: Dan Heng just wants to return to the Express and sit in peace and quiet.

C: 就当是孝敬尾巴大爷的。
E: Let's take it as a tribute to Mr. Tail.

C: 扎心了，谁说的「喜欢游戏的都不是坏人」。
E: How heartbreaking. Who said, "Anyone who likes the game can't be a bad person."

C: 公平，公平，还是*通用粗口*公平。
E: Equality, equality and *insert common profanity here* equality.

C: 被防卫科的小弟们强行带走。
E: You are forcefully taken away by the Security Department lackeys.

C: 先摸一摸昂贵的望远镜…
E: Touch the expensive telescope first...

C: 桑博拔腿就跑，铁卫跟了上去。
E: Sampo scurries away while the Silvermane Guard gives chase.

C: 《饮月君敬茶解危机》
E: The Imbibitor Lunae Averts Crisis with a Tea Ceremony

C: 听听它们喵了些什么玩意儿。
E: Listen to what they are meowing about.

C: 也许会考虑离开空间站。
E: Maybe consider leaving the space station.

C: 用于在枰上奇遇中反悔的特殊道具，可以重新再掷骰一次。
E: A special item used to backtrack in Board Encounters. It allows you to re-roll the die again.

C: 用于在枰上奇遇中反悔的特殊道具，可以重新再掷骰一次。
E: A special item used to backtrack in Board Encounters. It allows you to re-roll the die again.

C: 购买后获得增益效果：获得开拓券时，额外获得<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1%</unbreak></color>，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2</unbreak></color>回合。
E: Gain the following buff after purchase: When obtaining Trailblaze Funds, receive an extra <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 你是一名理性主义者，喜欢思考也擅长思考。\n你擅长观察也想要了解更多，对于理解事物的本质兴趣浓厚。\n你尊重知识，追求独立，擅长探索未知领域。
E: You are a rational thinker who enjoys pondering and excels at it.\nYou possess strong observational skills, a thirst for knowledge, and a deep interest in unraveling the essence of phenomena.\nYou value knowledge, seek independence, and thrive in exploring the unknowns.

C: 通过大量的「开拓经历」比较判断，无名客•{NICKNAME}更接近一名「领袖型开拓者」。
E: Based on a comparison of numerous "trailblazing experiences," the Nameless {NICKNAME} is closer to a "Leader Trailblazer."

C: 首领幻影会额外召唤【授勋】召唤物。
E: Boss Mirage will additionally summon The Honored units.

C: 阶段一：无望冽风的幻灭者
E: Phase I — Annihilator of Desolation Mistral

C: 回复我方目标的生命值会优先回复该目标的【负载生命值】。
E: Healing an ally target will prioritize restoring their "HP Overload."

C: 应对首领幻影的【太初有为】造成的伤害
E: Counter the DMG dealt by Boss Mirage's "Im Anfang war die Tat"

C: 召唤新的【玄莲】时，首领幻影会进入<color=#f29e38ff><u>韧性保护</u></color>状态。消灭任意召唤物会使首领幻影的韧性保护解除，并且对首领幻影造成额外韧性削减。
E: When a new Lotus is summoned, Boss Mirage will enter the <color=#f29e38ff><u> Toughness Protection</u></color> state. Defeating any summon will dispel the Boss Mirage's Toughness Protection and deal additional Toughness Reduction to the Boss Mirage.

C: 【哀悯长臂】的韧性上限提高。
E: "The Long Arms of Sorrow's" Max Toughness increases.

C: 坚防守备
E: Steadfast Safeguard

C: 贝洛伯格的戍卫部队「银鬃铁卫」中的近卫战士，负责冲锋陷阵。\n战斗中，银鬃近卫的攻击会降低我方的防御力。
E: A member of Belobog's Silvermane Guards, tasked with leading the charge into enemy lines.\nSilvermane Soldiers' attacks will reduce their enemies' defense during combat.

C: 心兽之尾，扫风雷，荡尘寰。
E: Tail of the Inner Beast, bringer of storms, purger of mortal worlds.

C: 犯尽十恶，永镇于幽狱之底的步离人首领。\n身负七百年苦狱仇恨，在脱出牢笼后，群狼之主向整个罗浮仙舟发起了挑战。但潜藏在疯狂之举的背后，似乎另有目标……
E: A borisin leader who committed the Ten Unpardonable Sins, eternally imprisoned at the bottom of The Shackling Prison.\nBearing the hatred of seven centuries of bitter confinement, the Lord of Wolves challenges the entire Xianzhou Luofu upon breaking free from his cage. Yet, there seems to be another objective hidden behind his maddened actions...

C: 匹诺康尼的服务器械，因梦境中的情绪干扰而陷入失控。\n本是牌桌上的娱乐道具，失控后仍在舞动着手中的骰子，用粗鲁的方式进行游戏。
E: Penacony's service machinery that got out of control due to the emotional interference in the Dreamscape.\nOriginally a tool for entertainment on the card table, it is still shaking the dice in its hands after losing control, continuing the game in a crude manner.

C: 被Assassin的力量拆分成无数个体的斯科特，每台量产机都拥有匹敌原型机的力量。
E: Skott, split into countless bodies by Assassin's power. Each Mass-Production Machine possesses strength on par with its Prototype.

C:
大海的女儿们，被「毁灭」的罪孽蚀尽灵肉，只余空荡扭曲的形骸…这一世，她们追随「海洋」的利刃，并非湮灭于虚无，而是成为袭向黑日的巨浪。
末日的风暴从天而降，宣告万物的灭亡——
不幸早产的泡影啊，还未诞生就注定消亡，吞吐着数不尽的悲怆——
污浊的羊水流淌，染黑天和地，把初生的希望也弄脏。
E:
Daughters of the sea, their spirits and flesh corroded by the sins of Destruction, leaving only empty, distorted shells... In this life, they follow the Ocean's honed blade, not to be obliterated into nihility, but to become the tidal waves crashing against the Dark Sun.
The apocalyptic storm descends from the heavens, heralding the extinction of all things.
O premature Mirage Fizzle, doomed to perish before birth, exhaling countless sorrows.
The murky amniotic fluid flows, staining heaven and earth black, tainting even newborn hope.

C: 不属此世的怪异生命，自深黯星空的彼端，透过重重帷幕而来。其身躯犹如病态的枝叶探入现实中，使用虚数的力量肆意改造现实。
E: Strange beings that do not belong to this world. Passing through countless barriers, they arrive from the other side of the vast, dark, starry sky. Their bodies are like diseased branches breaching into reality, using Imaginary power to twist reality at will.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 由星核力量幻造而成的虚影，执行着令裂界不断扩张的意志。\n智慧生命的欲求在裂界中投影形成的活体能量，犹如一颗沙砾在蚌壳中凝成了珠贝。然而驱动它的这股欲望早已扭曲，模糊不清。
E: A shadow manifested by the power of a Stellaron, carrying out the Fragmentum's unceasing will to expand.\nA living being of energy born from the projection of the desires of sentient lifeforms into the Fragmentum, akin to a pearl created from a single grain of sand. However, the desire that drove it has long since been twisted and distorted.

C: 蕉研组的谐乐蕉师
E: Banacademic Office's Charmony BananAdvisor

C: 虚卒•抹消者
E: Voidranger: Eliminator

C: 破灭玄莲
E: Destruction Lotus

C: 对指定我方单体造成冰属性伤害。
E: Deals Ice DMG to one designated target.

C: 当杰帕德陷入无法战斗的状态时，将立即行动，进入强化状态，提高自身的速度。此状态下，布洛妮娅将会召唤更多的【银鬃炮手】。
E: When Gepard is downed, Bronya immediately takes action and becomes Enhanced, increasing her SPD. When in this state, Bronya will summon even more Silvermane Cannoneers.

C: 对指定我方单体造成大量冰属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入冻结状态。
E: Deals massive Ice DMG to a single target, with a high chance to Freeze the attacked target.

C: 对指定我方单体造成虚数属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入禁锢状态。该技能会对【无尽寒冬之槊（幻象）】锁定的目标追加释放。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to a single target, with a high chance to Imprison the target. This ability will be additionally released on targets locked-on by Lance of the Eternal Freeze (Illusion).

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target.

C: 辅助机械臂单元进入【过载时限】状态，进入该状态后下次行动施放【控场起爆】。
E: Auxiliary Robot Arm Unit enters Overload Countdown, causing the next action to cast Controlled Blasting.

C: 辅助机械臂单元进入【过载时限】状态，进入该状态后下次行动施放【控场起爆】。
E: Auxiliary Robot Arm Unit enters Overload Countdown, causing the next action to cast Controlled Blasting.

C: 使指定我方单体陷入【拘束】状态，【拘束】状态下无法行动也无法被指定为目标。当辅助机械臂单元被弱点击破时我方目标的【拘束】状态立即解除。
E: Causes one designated target to enter the "Restrain" state, preventing them from taking action or being designated as target. The "Restraint" is dispelled if the Auxiliary Robot Arm Unit suffers Weakness Break.

C: 如受到攻击的目标正处于触电状态，则直接造成1次触电伤害。
E: If the target is currently Shocked, immediately cause Shock DMG 1 time.

C: 强化【丰饶玄鹿】，使其攻击力提高。
E: Enhances the Abundant Ebon Deer and increases its ATK.

C: 当场上其它敌方目标带有【重生】时，其自身具有【击中回复】。当击中我方目标后，回复其自身生命值。
E: When there are other friendly units with Rebirth on the field, they have Draining Hit. When hitting a target, they will restore HP.

C: 攻击处于【噬命】状态下的目标时，本次攻击造成的伤害将转化为【噬命】降低的生命上限，并刷新【噬命】的持续时间。【噬命】最高降低<unbreak>50%</unbreak>可回复的生命上限。
E: When attacking targets in the Prana-Siphon state, the DMG dealt by this attack will be converted to the extent of Max HP reduced by Prana-Siphon, and refresh Prana-Siphon's duration. Prana-Siphon can reduce Maximum Restorable HP by up to <unbreak>50%</unbreak>.

C: 使除自身外的所有目标行动延后，并造成少量雷属性伤害。
E: Causes all targets (except this unit) to have their action delayed and deals minor Lightning DMG.

C: 对我方全体造成少量量子属性伤害，并使我方全体能量减少。只能在【狂乱】状态下使用。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to all targets and causes all targets' Energy to be reduced. This ability can only be used while in the "Rabid" state.

C: 在受到一定次数攻击后，会从【课堂频道】状态转变为【课间频道】状态。
E: After being attacked for a number of times, switches the "Classroom Channel" state to the "Off-Class Channel" state.

C: 本次战斗中，「昔在、今在、永在的剧目」与所有「秩序的傀儡」共享血量。
E: In this battle, "The Past, Present, and Eternal Show" shares HP with all "Puppets of the Order."

C: 附身于指定敌方单体，为其施加【虚骄冠冕】状态，解除其控制状态，并恢复该目标的韧性。
E: Possesses one designated friendly target and applies the "Deception's Crown" state, dispels the target's control effect and restoring their Toughness.

C: 进入【白日西沉】状态。每当我方施放普攻、战技、终结技时叠加1层，当【白日西沉】叠加至3层时，立即对上一个行动的我方施放【已在黄昏失色】。施放过一次【已在黄昏失色】或被弱点击破后解除该状态。
E: Enters the Sunset state. Gains 1 stack each time a character uses Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate. When Sunset reaches 3 stacks, immediately use Losing Eventide Light on the last-acting target. This effect is removed after using Losing Eventide Light once or after becoming Weakness Broken.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

C: 连续对我方随机单体目标造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals successive minor Imaginary DMG to random single targets.

C: 对指定我方单体目标造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

C: 对我方全体造成大量量子属性伤害，伤害由我方全体单位<u>平均分摊</u>。对高于一定生命值百分比的目标，该伤害会转化为量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals massive Quantum DMG to all targets. The DMG is <u>distributed evenly</u> among all target units. Against targets with HP percentage above a certain value, this DMG converts to Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>."

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动施放【怒，焚晨昏日星】。为自身附加【<u>氦闪</u>】，并召唤【阳雷之鸦】。此状态下，我方施放攻击后，将根据本次攻击击中的敌方目标数量降低【<u>氦闪</u>】。
E: Enters a Charging state and uses "Fury, Incineration of Dawn and Dusk" with the next action. Applies "<u>Helium Flash</u>" to this unit and summons "Daythunder Raven." When in this state, after a target uses an attack, reduces "<u>Helium Flash</u>" based on the number of friendly units hit in this attack.

C: <u>修复</u>【干涸的泪骨】，并对我方全体目标造成大量固定数值虚数属性伤害，伤害由目标<u>平均分摊</u>。
E: <u>Reinstates</u> the "Dried Lacrimal Bone" and deals a set amount of massive Imaginary DMG to all targets. The DMG is <u>distributed evenly</u> among the targets.

C: 抵抗控制类负面状态。当【至黑之剑，盗火行者】再次施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】时，若自身曾被该攻击召唤，则与【至黑之剑，盗火行者】一同发起攻击。随后被其吸收，回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值，并使其获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>。
E: Resists Crowd Control debuffs. When "Flame Reaver of the Deepest Dark" uses "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate" again and if this unit was summoned by that attack type, then this unit will attack alongside "Flame Reaver of the Deepest Dark." This unit is then absorbed by "Flame Reaver of the Deepest Dark," restoring the HP that was converted to "<u>Entangled By Agony,</u>" and granting "<u>Calamity Power</u>" to the Flame Reaver.

C: 获得一定层数的【减伤】，使自身受到的伤害降低，每有1个【残破容器】被消灭后失去1层。
E: Receives a certain number of stacks of "DMG reduction," reducing DMG received by this unit. 1 stack is lost after defeating 1 "Long-Shattered Vessel."

C: 对我方全体目标造成物理属性伤害，被击中目标降低生命值的一部分转化为<u>【侵蚀】</u>。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets. Converts a portion of the hit target's reduced HP to "<u>Corrosion</u>."

C: 施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】时，消耗生命值召唤【魔王爪牙】，并使消耗的生命值转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>。若该攻击召唤的【魔王爪牙】被消灭，则额外对自身造成物理属性伤害。当自身再次施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】时，曾被该攻击召唤的【魔王爪牙】将一同发起攻击，随后被自身吸收， 回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值并使自身获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>。
E: When using "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate," consumes HP to summon "Demon King's Minions" and convert the consumed HP into <u>"Entangled By Agony."</u> If the "Demon King's Minions" summoned by this attack is defeated, additionally deals Physical DMG to this unit. When this unit uses "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate" again, the "Demon King's Minions" that were summoned by the attacking ability will attack together with this unit. This unit will then absorb the Minions, restoring the HP that was converted to <u>"Entangled By Agony"</u> and granting <u>"Calamity Power"</u> to this unit.

C: 「我们不医治肉体，也不解放灵魂；不贪恋生，也不避讳死。我们尊崇『存在』本身。」 ——混沌医师慕榕 「存在是虚无的。」——当某个存在无意中产生了这样的思想并引之为箴，就会奇妙地踏上由Ⅸ执掌的命途，接受从遥远虚空某处来自星神的无意义瞥视。这一瞥通常引来两种结局：一者自此颓唐，真正成为虚无的存在，被称为「自灭者」；第二者则被瑰丽的星神神性所倾倒，不约而同地产生一丝好奇，使他们成为了「混沌医师」。 混沌医师们秉持着悬壶济世的信条：即如果能向Ⅸ证明存在并非虚无，便能从未知的巨大黑潭中将这巨大而孤独的生灵解放出来。这一心愿近似悖论，人力几不可成，但混沌医师甘之如饴：因为在察觉到生命的无价值一瞬间，那从遥远星海中投来的瞥视，令他们产生了对虚无命运的徒劳反抗之心。
E: "We do not heal the body, nor free the soul. We do not covet life, nor shun death. We honor existence itself." — Murong, Doctor of Chaos "Existence is nothing." When an organism has this thought and applies it as a guiding principle, it begins to walk on the Path ruled by IX and receive the meaningless glimpse of the Aeon from some distant void. This will usually have two outcomes: 1) The organism will devolve and truly become nothing, becoming something called a Self-Annihilator. 2) The organism will be captivated by the magnificence of the Aeon, thus becoming a Doctor of Chaos in their spontaneous curiosity. Doctors of Chaos uphold a creed of saving the world: If they are able to prove to IX that existence is more than nothing, they could free that large and lonely soul from the depths of the void. What they try to prove is a paradox, and it cannot be done by mortals, yet the Doctors of Chaos seem to enjoy trying — Because the moment they perceived the worthlessness of life, that glance from the distant cosmos inspired within them a futile desire to revolt against meaningless destiny.

C:
学者通常只需一个伟大成就即可名留青史，而黑塔的伟大成就俯拾皆是，不胜枚举。于是她顺理成章地赢得博识尊的瞥视，成为了天才俱乐部的一员。

天才俱乐部会员个个古怪，黑塔也不外如是。她的学术全凭兴趣所至，若然中途失去兴趣，便立刻尽弃前功。因此，文明的数次关键跃升都因「没有意思」而戛然终止。即使博识学会费劲心思搞到了手稿，也常常因为无能为力而捶胸顿足。

但是如今的黑塔似乎兴趣拓展了一些：她开始接触星际和平公司，也帮助过「仙舟」驱赶孽物，还和「流光忆庭」有过摩擦……这和天才俱乐部那些自闭的怪人比起来，已经过于平易近人了。谁又知道她还会对什么感兴趣呢？也许她自己也不知道。
E:
Scholars can usually leave their names in history with one great achievement. Herta, however, had countless achievements, and that was why she received the glance of Nous and became a member of the Genius Society.

All members of the Genius Society are oddballs, and Herta is no exception. Her scholarship is entirely driven by interest. If she lost interest halfway through a project, she would instantly discard all her work. Therefore, multiple topics that could have made critical advancements to civilization were stopped because they were "not interesting." Even though the Intelligentsia Guild had obtained her manuscripts after great difficulty, they often could do nothing to further progress the studies.

However, Herta nowadays seems to have expanded her interests a little. She has started to contact the Interastral Peace Corporation, has helped the Xianzhou chase off abominations, and even has had some friction with the Garden of Recollection... She is already very sociable compared to the other odd hermits of the Genius Society. Who knows what else she might take an interest in? Maybe she doesn't even know herself.

E: Qualifier Round 1 — I
