C: 你知道吗？平均每四个逐梦客里就有一个患有严重精神疾病——真不愧是有钱人！
E: Did you know? On average, one in four Dreamchasers suffers from severe mental illness... as expected from wealthy people!

C: 霓虹闪烁的幻梦街头，你与她的邂逅始于一场意外的纠纷。若你的脑中不曾冒出调停的想法，故事的结局又会走向何方？
E: On the neon-lit streets within the sweet dream, your encounter with her started with an unexpected conflict. If you hadn't chosen to intervene, how would the story's ending have unfolded?

E: Obtain the Nameless' Planet of Festivities Collectible Card at the secret billiards room high above Dreamflux Reef

C: 噩梦
E: Nightmare

C: 黄泉拔刀，将匹诺康尼的梦境斩断。巡海游侠从银河各地向波提欧鸣枪之处赶来。你从「太一之梦」中醒来，与伙伴们再度对抗神主日。
E: Acheron drew her blade, severing Penacony's dreamscape. Galaxy Rangers rushed from across the cosmos to Boothill's rallying call. You awoke from Ena's Dream, ready to face The Great Septimus with your companions once more.

C: 银枝对列车上的盆栽表达由衷的称赞。随后，这份真诚的溢美之辞也落在你和三月七身上。
E: Argenti offered heartfelt praise for the potted plants aboard the Express. Soon, that same genuine admiration was directed at you and March 7th.

C: 杰帕德称，天外怪物在七百年前降临雅利洛，而入侵的军团被寒潮掩埋。在「存护」克里珀的护佑下，「筑城者」们建立起贝洛伯格。
E: According to Gepard, monsters from beyond the sky descended upon Jarilo <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago, and the invading forces were buried underneath the Eternal Freeze. Under the protection of Qlipoth the Preservation, Architects had built Belobog.

C: 可可利亚欲借星核重塑世界，试图说服布洛妮娅臣服。在你们的激励下，布洛妮娅选择与母亲决裂，保护贝洛伯格的人民。
E: Cocolia, intent on reforging the world through the Stellaron, sought to bring Bronya to her side. But your words gave Bronya strength. She chose to defy her mother to protect the people of Belobog.

C: 托帕质疑家族现状，老奥帝高调回应，宣示以公开募股重塑匹诺康尼的未来格局。
E: Topaz questioned The Family's current situation. Old Oti responded defiantly, declaring that he would launch an initial public offering of Penaconian stocks to reforge Penacony's future path.

C: 遐蝶在冥界与妹妹玻吕茜亚相会，亦即觐见已陨的「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯。在新世界创生时，塞纳托斯以巨龙模样承载遐蝶重返人间，导致「生」与「死」相分离，灵魂无从流转。遐蝶成为「赐予死亡」的永生之人，塞纳托斯则背负「拒绝死亡」的命运，陨落于诞生之时。
E: In the nether realm, Castorice finally reunited with her sister, Polyxia, a meeting that was also an audience with the fallen Death Titan, Thanatos. When the new world was created, Thanatos reshaped Castorice's soul and took the form of the great dragon Pollux to carry her back into the mortal realm. With "life" and "death" separated, souls were denied passage down the River of Souls. Castorice became the undying human who "grants death," while Thanatos bore the fate of "defying death," and they died the moment they entered the world of the living.

C: 盗火行者追至浴场，丹恒留下迎战以拖延其行动，让你护送白厄前往涡心。「开拓」的宿命，就是把每个世界的存亡与自身系在一起。
E: The Flame Reaver chased you to the bath. Dan Heng stayed behind to hold them off while you led Phainon to the Vortex. That's the destiny of Trailblaze: to tie the fate of every world to that of your own.

C: 葛瑞迪发动宝具力量，将砂金等人拉入一场<color=#f29e38ff>「永不腐朽的默片恐怖秀！」</color>，影片中的人无法发出说话声音。
E: Grady unleashed his Noble Phantasm, pulling Aventurine and the others into <color=#f29e38ff>"The Silent Horror Picture Show"</color>, a movie where no one could make a sound.

C: 愤怒的大祭司长诋毁逐火神谕，意图谋反，被判处死刑。海瑟音称，<color=#f29e38ff>刻律德菈</color>率众来此正是为了迎见<color=#f29e38ff>「天外的救世主」</color>。
E: The furious high priest slandered the prophecy of the Flame-Chase and plotted rebellion. He was sentenced to death. Hysilens stated that <color=#f29e38ff>Cerydra</color> had come with her followers to meet <color=#f29e38ff>"the Deliverer from beyond the sky."</color>

C: 哀丽秘榭的帷幕外，是不再有黑潮侵扰的新世界。三千万世的「记忆」改变了昔涟的模样，她询问你是否做好准备，去迎接世人的召唤。
E: Beyond the curtains of Aedes Elysiae lurked a new world, free from the black tide's torment. Thirty million cycles of Remembrance had changed Cyrene's appearance, and she asked if you're ready to answer the call of the world.

C: 克拉拉从帕斯卡身上感受到了和史瓦罗一样的特质——「情感」，所以她决定保护帕斯卡，并承担这一选择的责任与后果。
E: Clara sensed the same quality in Pascal as she did in Svarog — "emotion" — so she decided to protect Pascal and take responsibility for the consequences of this choice.

C: 你们陪着半夏走走停停，而她的症状愈发严重。最后，她请求你们暂避，独自留在原地呼唤梁沐。
E: You accompanied Banxia as she walked with increasing difficulty, her symptoms growing more severe. Eventually, she asked you to step away, staying alone to call out to Liangmu.

C: 依镜流所言，应星曾借助丰饶令使的血肉帮助丹枫复活挚友，却将自己变作不死的怪物。此后镜流授他剑法，令他不忘业报，而他也在重获新生后为自己取了一个新的名字。
E: According to Jingliu, Yingxing once used the flesh of the Abundance Emanator to help Dan Feng resurrect their dear friend, but in doing so transformed himself into an undying monster. Afterward, Jingliu taught him swordplay, engraving the Karmic Wheel in his memory. Upon his rebirth, he chose a new name for himself.

C: 呼雷向狼卒分享赤血，用来感染狐人，制造恐惧。貊泽自暗处现身，与呼雷对峙。呼雷令貊泽传话给飞霄，他将不再躲藏，开始袭掠。
E: Hoolay shared crimson blood with the Wolftrooper to infect foxians and spread fear. Moze emerged from hiding to confront Hoolay. Hoolay ordered Moze to tell Feixiao that he would no longer hide and would begin raiding.

C: 你们得知布洛妮娅决意向可可利亚道出自己的立场与想法。布洛妮娅请你们将她的亲笔信出示给杰帕德与希露瓦，以获取他们的帮助。
E: From the letter, you learned Bronya was determined to speak her truth to Cocolia. Bronya asked you to deliver her handwritten message to Gepard and Serval, hoping to win their support.

C: 能源恢复供应，希露瓦成功取得操控栈桥的权限。
E: With the power restored, Serval secured full control of the gear bridge.

C: 你们汇总线索，种种提示都将你们引向电梯。停云感觉到，你们距离卡芙卡已经很近了。
E: You compiled the clues, and they all led you towards the elevator. Tingyun felt that you were getting very close to Kafka.

C: 你们遇到把守据点的云骑守卫。守卫称符玄命令部队驻扎此处，而她率领斥候前去探查。守卫请你们到阵中稍后，等待符玄返回。
E: Guards at the outpost explained that Fu Xuan led scouts to investigate ahead, inviting you to head to the troops and await her return.

C: 入住手续办理完成，你获得一本<color=#f29e38ff>「梦境护照」</color>。它既是酒店客房的房卡，也是一份特别的匹诺康尼纪念品，可以用于记录美梦中的生活。
E: After completing the check-in process, you obtained a <color=#f29e38ff>Dreamscape Pass</color>. It served both as a room card for the hotel and a special souvenir for Penacony, allowing you to document your life in the sweet dreams.

C: 你与流萤于此眺望匹诺康尼大剧院。剧院散发着耀眼的光芒，宛若五光十色的美梦本身。沐浴光芒之人会被其温暖吸引，一如逐火飞萤。
E: You and Firefly gazed out upon the Penacony Grand Theater. The theater gave off a dazzling radiance, with its varied light show resembling a colorful dream in of itself. Those bathed in the luminosity will be drawn by the warmth, like Fyreflies.

C: 黑天鹅称，将你扔进梦境的人是名为「花火」的假面愚者，而那片诡异的忆域源自匹诺康尼本身。你所见到的正是梦境原本的样子。
E: Black Swan claimed that the person who cast you into the Dreamscape was a Masked Fool named Sparkle, and the strange Memory Zone you saw came from Penacony itself. What you saw was the true form of the Dreamscape.

C: 数日前，黄泉将冥火大公逼入绝境，要求其交出作为邀请函的八音盒。冥火大公决意践行「毁灭」，与身为「令使」的黄泉拼死一战。
E: After a few days, Acheron threatened Duke Inferno and demanded him to hand over the music box that acted as an invitation. Duke Inferno was determined to tread on Destruction and fought to the death against Acheron, an Emanator.

C: 砂金对真理医生的援手表示感谢，真理医生将「弹珠」模型放入沙盘中。
E: Aventurine thanked Dr. Ratio for his assistance, and the latter placed the pinball model in the sandpit.

C: 黑天鹅接听未知来电，对方称黄泉是「冒牌货」，根本不是巡海游侠中的一员，并且自己很快会来到匹诺康尼找她算账。
E: Black Swan picked up an unknown call and the caller asserted that Acheron was an "imposter," not a member of the Galaxy Rangers, and that he was on the way to Penacony to make her pay.

C: 你与伙伴们抵达演播大厅，在这里接受了记者的采访，准备参与海选挑战。
E: You and your companions arrived at the live studio, where you were interviewed by a reporter and prepared to participate in the open audition challenge.

C: 引导员为你讲解「动作派」的挑战规则，你需要在三场舞台战中击败《逐梦往事》的反派，挑战红发选手的最快纪录。
E: The guide explained the rules for the School of Action: You needed to defeat the villains from Once Upon a Time in Dreams across three stage battles and challenge the red-haired contestant's fastest record.

C: 你们进入《囚人颂》的剧目世界，目睹匹诺康尼由囚牢走向自由的过往。
E: You entered the world of the play Ode to Prisoner, witnessing Penacony's past where it went from a prison to a place of freedom.

C: 乱破思考如何在念白中彰显缭乱•忍道，丹恒则提醒你提防谐乐蕉师，小心行事。
E: Rappa pondered how to showcase the Way of the Dazzling Ninja in his monologue, while Dan Heng reminded you to be wary of Charmony BananAdvisor and proceed with caution.

C: 波提欧遭遇芮克先生，对方刚刚解决一名助蕉。芮克先生称，能见到猴子以外的演员，实在令人愉快。
E: Boothill encountered Mr. Reca, who had just dealt with an Assistanana. Mr. Reca said it was truly delightful to meet an actor who wasn't a monkey.

C: 你与阿格莱雅交流对翁法罗斯历史的感受。阿格莱雅邀请你们随她前往浴场上层，进入会谈正题。
E: You talked with Aglaea about your thoughts on Amphoreus's history. She invited you to come with her to the upper level of the baths to start the main discussion.

C: 大黑塔察觉到有某位窃贼在跟踪自己，于是叫第四面镜唤出其他镜子，想要将追踪者拿下。
E: The Herta sensed someone tailing her. She ordered the Fourth Mirror to summon the other mirrors, aiming to trap the intruder.

C: 窃忆者潜入并破坏「谒见系统」，目的是窃取博识尊的记忆。大黑塔将窃忆者封印在镜子里，让其在余生中好好反省与天才作对的下场。
E: The Memosnatcher had infiltrated the Audience System, seeking to steal the Nous' memories. The Herta imprisoned the Memosnatcher inside a mirror, condemning her to a lifetime of reflection for daring to cross a genius.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝前往雅努斯宝库，那里是「门径」火种的保管处，也是缇里西庇俄丝出生的地方。
E: Tribios continued onwards to find the Janus Vault, where the Coreflame of "Passage" was being kept. It was also the place where Tribios was born.

C: 缇宝鼓励遐蝶背负命运，那是由神谕所指引的「明天」。缇安为遐蝶准备的礼物没能完成，缇宝与缇宁正在加工，一定送到遐蝶手上。
E: Tribbie encouraged Castorice to shoulder her destiny, the "tomorrow" as ordained by her prophecy. Tribbie also told Castorice about the gift that Trianne wanted to make for her but never finished. Tribbie assured Castorice that they and Trinnon were working on it, and that they would definitely give it to her.

C: 公民们对白厄的登场议论纷纷。白厄稳住局势，以被毁灭的故乡哀丽秘榭，向听众阐述奥赫玛所面临的危机。
E: The Okheman citizens murmured among themselves as Phainon took the stage. Phainon told them of his destroyed hometown, Aedes Elysiae, and of the crisis Okhema still faced.

C: 丹恒与来古士在列车坠落点交谈。丹恒猜想在「天空」火种归还后，翁法罗斯的隔绝状态便能打破。来古士检查车厢，寻求维修的方法。
E: Dan Heng and Lygus conversed at the crash site of the Express's train car. Dan Heng speculated that after the Coreflame of "Sky" was returned, Amphoreus's state of isolation would be shattered. Lygus inspected the train car for a way to repair it.

C: 艾格勒切断彩虹桥，拼尽最后手段阻止你们靠近。然而在风堇的努力下，彩虹桥再次被修复。
E: Aquila severed the rainbow bridge and tried everything in their power to stop you from getting closer. However, with Hyacine's efforts, the rainbow bridge was restored.

C: 赛飞儿变作白厄模样，主动等待盗火行者，提出以决斗处置「火种」归属。盗火行者不予理会，径直走向「火种」，却再次得到陶罐。
E: Disguised as Phainon, Cipher waited for Flame Reaver and proposed a duel for the Coreflame. The Flame Reaver ignored her, reaching for the Coreflame, only to find another dolium.

C: 赛飞儿回忆起与阿格莱雅眺望黎明云崖的时刻。阿格莱雅看到赛飞儿穿着自己赠送的金靴，希望赛飞儿踏着它奔跑时不是为了逃脱追捕。
E: Cipher recalled the time when she and Aglaea gazed at the Dawncloud. Aglaea had seen her wearing the golden boots she gifted her, hoping Cipher would wear them to run toward something, not just to run away.

C: 你们在谷仓发现了白厄童年时雕刻到一半的木制小兵人，还遇到哀丽秘榭校舍唯一一位老师皮西厄斯。在谷仓没有发现神谕牌。
E: At the barn, you found a half-carved wooden toy soldier Phainon carved in his childhood and ran into Pythias — the only teacher at the school of Aedes Elysiae. No sign of the cards here.

C: 贼灵吐出火种赝品。白厄与赛飞儿、那刻夏对峙，以杀戮为威胁逼迫二人交出火种。在「救世」夙愿的灼烧下，白厄向一切阻碍挥剑。
E: The Spirithief spat out a fake Coreflame. Phainon confronted Cipher and Anaxa, threatening to kill the two if they do not give him the Coreflame. Burnt by the intense wish of "Deliverance," Phainon swung his sword at anything that stood in his way.

C: 你曾在贝洛伯格拾起筑城者遗留的炎枪，得到克里珀的瞥视。你尝试与「存护」同调，但什么也没有发生，正如克里珀忽视其无数信徒。
E: You once picked up the flaming lance left by the Architects in Belobog and received Qlipoth's gaze. You tried to resonate with the Preservation, but nothing happened, just as Qlipoth ignored THEIR countless followers.

C: 命运的箴言揭示：<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。」</color>凯撒改写的律令尚不为人知。刻律德菈不愿被定义，宁愿被遗忘。
E: Fate's oracle once foretold: <color=#f29e38ff>"You shall complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides."</color> What law the Imperator rewrote remained a mystery. Cerydra refused to be defined and would rather be forgotten.

C: 你与布洛妮娅、托帕总结此次事件。托帕并不在意处罚，认为解决问题才是硬道理。布洛妮娅为星穹列车的斡旋与担保而向你致谢。
E: You reviewed the entire incident with Bronya and Topaz. Topaz paid little mind to the disciplinary actions, believing that resolving the situation was what truly mattered. Bronya thanked you for the support and mediation provided by the Astral Express.

C: 你与克拉拉向流浪者询问关于零件小偷的线索。流浪者称窃贼的脑壳是方形的，逃跑时撞倒了许多东西，应该留下了一些痕迹线索。
E: You and Clara asked the vagrant about clues regarding the parts thief. The vagrant mentioned that the thief had a square-shaped head and knocked over many things while escaping, likely leaving behind some traces to follow.

C: 希露瓦曾是银鬃铁卫技术部的研究组长之一，专精机械工程等领域。布洛妮娅召见希露瓦，希望她为贝洛伯格的重建贡献力量。
E: Serval was once a research team leader in the Silvermane Guards' Technology Division, specializing in mechanical engineering and related fields. Bronya summoned Serval, hoping she would contribute to Belobog's reconstruction efforts.

C: 你在缆车道与朗道姐弟会合。杰帕德稍后要在磐岩镇诊所与「地火」首领会谈，得麻烦你为他和希露瓦带路。
E: You met up with the Landau siblings at the cable car station. Gepard would be meeting with the Wildfire leader at the Boulder Town clinic later, so he needed you to guide him and Serval there.

C: 你们发现逃散的人群。为掩护非战斗人员向矿区大桥撤离，你与杰帕德、希露瓦断后阻截裂界怪物。
E: You discovered a scattering crowd. To cover non-combatants retreating toward the bridge in the mining area, you stayed behind with Gepard and Serval to intercept the Fragmentum monsters.

C: 玲可决定以七百年前的生鱼片作为主菜，让佩拉见识下她的厨艺。霜纹鲑面包出炉，佩拉与玲可从露营料理中感受到了奇妙的力量。
E: Lynx decided to serve <unbreak>700</unbreak>-year-old sashimi as the main dish to show off her culinary skills to Pela. As the Frostweave Salmon Bread was made, both Pela and Lynx felt a mysterious power emanating from their camping cuisine.

C: 奥列格与希儿谈论他的徒弟卢卡，并提议由希儿带你去搏击俱乐部，看看卢卡守擂的样子。
E: Oleg spoke with Seele about his student, Luka, and suggested she take you to the Fight Club to see Luka defend the ring.

C: 卡西迪的两个机器人伙伴——「小飞」和「大奔」神秘失踪。卢卡认为有人用暴力手段把「小飞」弄坏，随后偷走了「大奔」。
E: Cassidy's two robot companions, Little Fay and Big Ben, had mysteriously vanished. Luka suspected someone had forcefully damaged Little Fay and then stolen Big Ben.

C: 你与桂乃芬被幽府武弁发现。不由分说地，幽府武弁尝试将你们逮捕。
E: A Wraith Warden spotted you and Guinaifen. Without a word, the warden moved to detain you both.

C: 你在丹鼎司遇到正在执勤站岗的素裳。素裳欣喜于与你重逢，称等她过几天忙完了，要叫上你、桂乃芬和藿藿一起去金人巷聚一聚。
E: You ran into Sushang on duty at the Alchemy Commission. She was thrilled to see you again and said once she finished work in a few days, she would get together with you, Guinaifen, and Huohuo at Aurum Alley.

C: 三月七艰难取胜。彦卿认为三月七应加强步法练习，云璃则认为应开展力量练习。在一片热闹之中，三月七的剑术训练开始了。
E: March 7th barely managed to win. Yanqing thought she should work on her footwork, while Yunli suggested strength training. Amid the lively discussion, March 7th's swordplay training began.

C: 布洛妮娅接任「大守护者」，宣布废除上下层区封锁令，呼吁全体民众合作重建家园。她向「开拓者」们为雅利洛所做的贡献表达感谢。
E: Bronya stepped forward as Jarilo's new Supreme Guardian. She declared the blockade between the Overworld and Underworld officially lifted, calling on all citizens to unite and rebuild their shared home. Then she expressed her gratitude to the Trailblazers for everything they had done for Jarilo.

C: 三月七 / 赵相机
E: March 7th / Say~Cheese~

C: 岁阳蹦迪 / 岁阳雅集 / 岁阳阴乐节
E: Heliobi in Rave / Heliobi Literati / Heliobi Spooktacular Music Fest

C: 拍摄者通过镜头构图，管窥了都市腥风血雨的商业风云…匹诺康尼和谐的表象之下，总有暗流涌动。
E: Through the lens and composition, the photographer glimpses the turbulent world of urban commerce... Beneath the harmonious surface of Penacony, there is always an undercurrent stirring.

C: 表情
E: Expressions

C: 铆钉镇
E: Rivet Town

C: 永冬岭
E: Everwinter Hill

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 差分宇宙
E: Divergent Universe

C: 模拟宇宙
E: Simulated Universe

C: 你搜肠刮肚，念了首儿歌。
E: You try your best and manage to recite a nursery rhyme from memory.

C: 你在折纸小鸟对对碰中险胜。
E: You narrowly win in Origami Bird Clash.

C: 砂金知趣地表示让负。
E: Aventurine graciously concedes defeat.

C: 成为战舰高级指挥官。
E: I'll be a high-ranking warship commanding officer.

C: 你在大街上阴暗地爬行。
E: You crawl in the shadows along the street.

C: 百年摇滚经典。
E: Timeless rock classics.

C: 记得要说给未来的自己听。
E: Remember to tell that to your future self.

C: 「啊，那是滤下来的药渣……」
E: "Ah, that's the leftover herbal sediment..."

C: 没事找事？不是不会，而是不想。
E: Got nothing better to do? Nah, it's not that they can't... they just don't want to.

C: 它开始纠结，然后它枯了。
E: It becomes twisted, then withers.

C: 这就是「禅与摩托车维修艺术」。
E: That's "Zen and the Art of Motorcycle Maintenance."

C: 在神策府闲逛时，你偶然碰上了景元将军…站在桌前打瞌睡的状况。将军居然可以站着睡觉？真不愧是闭目将军。但是后面不就有椅子吗……\n你瞥了一眼桌上堆放的「公文」，全是些无关紧要的杂项——看来将军是被气晕的。
E: During a stroll through the Seat of Divine Foresight, you stumble upon General Jing Yuan... napping while standing at his desk. The General can sleep standing up? Well, he is the Dozing General. Though there's a perfectly good chair behind him...\nA peek at the "official documents" on his desk reveals only minor matters — apparently the General was annoyed into unconsciousness.

C: 不止一位来宾这样评价乱破：光是听她说话，心情就能好起来。\n「这是你的奖励收好~快快拿到学校炫耀。」
E: Many visitors have said this about Rappa — just hearing her voice makes their day better.\n"Here's your reward sweetie~ Now go make all your classmates jealous!"

C: 骨灰级游戏玩家，对广义和狭义的游戏都非常热情。但不开挂时水平并不高，偶尔会急，一急操作就更变形了。
E: A die-hard old-school gamer who loves all kinds of games, no matter how you define the word "game." Not particularly skilled without cheats, and tends to perform even worse when frustrated.

C: 阮•梅
E: Ruan Mei

C: 种小小的种子，长大大的星槎。
E: Sow tiny seeds, grow huge starskiffs.

C: 「嘀嗒！这下吃撑了！」
E: "Tick-tock! I can't eat anymore!"

C: 监控室
E: Monitoring Room

C: 持明龙影
E: Vidyadhara Dragon Silhouette

C: 仙舟有句古话，「民以食为天」。该柜台售有多种罗浮风味的食物，吃了不饿，不吃犯馋。
E: True to the old Xianzhou saying "Food is the primary concern of people," this counter has various Luofu delicacies on sale. Guaranteed to sate your hunger, or overwhelm you with craving.

C: 听！风中的歌谣如是传唱——在那黎明照拂的城邦，异邦的英雄已经到来，创世的凯歌将要奏响！
E: Hark! The song in the winds carry a tale: In that city bathed in light, an outlander hero has arrived. A new paean that will shape the world is about to resound!

C: 发电机
E: Generator

C: 选择「在笼中精心饲养」
E: Choose "Nurture with care in a cage"

C: 黄金钟表小子
E: Golden Clockie

E: A Child's Moongazing Spot

C: 螺中笑声
E: Crackup Conch

C: 控制装置
E: Controller

C: 探索虚数深龋
E: Explore Imaginary Deep Caries

C: 侵蚀隧洞
E: Cavern of Corrosion

C: 长乐新朋，青鸟候风
E: New Friends Bring New Joy

C: 在狐眠冢栖木附近累计收集#4个逸散岁阳。
E: Gather a total of #4 dispersed heliobi near the Foxsomn Tomb roost.

C: 累计消耗#4点开拓力<color=#f29e38ff>（上限<unbreak>1400</unbreak>点开拓力）</color>
E: Consume a total of #4 Trailblaze Power <color=#f29e38ff>(<unbreak>1400</unbreak> Trailblazer Power max)</color>

C: 在「忘却之庭」中累计获得#4星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of #4 stars from clearing Forgotten Hall stages

C: 在「银河球棒侠传说」活动中，声望等级达到#4级
E: Attain a Reputation Rank of #4 in the "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer" event

C: 在「末日幻影」中累计击败#4个首领
E: Defeat a total of #4 bosses in Apocalyptic Shadow

C: 完成开拓续闻「命运 / 归还星之海洋」
E: Complete the Trailblaze Continuance "Fate/Return to the Starry Sea"

C: 将任意遗器等级提升1次
E: Level up any Relic 1 time

C: 展开1次主命途为「毁灭」的3星方程
E: Expand 3-star Equations with Destruction as its main Path 1 time

C: 在「第6折：得胜而归」中获得#1分
E: Obtain #1 points in "Scene 6: Triumphant Return"

C: 完成所有磐岩镇斗技表演赛
E: Complete all matches in the Boulder Town Martial Exhibition

C: 收集章节「存护Ⅱ」
E: Collect Chapter "Preservation II"

C: 超链接对决（二）
E: Hyperlink Match II

C: 在「留影计划·第二日」关卡中获得3个奖杯
E: Win 3 trophies in Operation Snapshot: Day 2

C: 在简单和困难难度的音乐挑战中累积获得#4颗星
E: Accumulate a total of #4 star(s) in the music challenge's Easy and Hard difficulties

C: 在「创世涡心」供奉「仙馔秘酿」，提升「潮汐的馈赠」等级至#2级
E: Offer Celestial Ambrosia to the Vortex of Genesis and raise Celestial Ambrosia to Lv.#2

C: 累计获得<unbreak>20</unbreak>块嗷呜饼干
E: Obtain <unbreak>20</unbreak> Awoo Cookies.

C: 完成#4个展览任务
E: Complete #4 Exhibition Mission(s)

C: 完成海选赛第三轮-Ⅰ
E: Complete Qualifier Round 3 — I

C: 在当前关卡冒险挑战中，积分达到#2
E: Reach #2 points in the current Stage's adventure challenge

C: 拥有2个3级「餐桌」
E: Own 2 Level 3 dining tables

C: 在该挑战中获得B级评价
E: Achieve B rank in this challenge

C: 使用「装备追踪」，追踪#4名角色的推荐装备
E: Use Equipment Tracking to track #4 characters' recommended equipment

C: 激活黄金品质以上的羁绊通关2次
E: Complete 2 stages with a Bond of Gold quality or higher.

C: 完成本章7个任务
E: Complete 7 missions in this chapter

C: 在紫金及以上职级胜利通关时，至少上阵8名角色，且所有人都穿戴了3件装备
E: When winning at Amethyst Gold rank or above, have at least 8 characters deployed, and all of them equipped with 3 pieces of equipment

C: 唉，仙舟剑士（未成年）间的自尊与骄傲，就像霜不容火，猫飞狗跳……
E: Alas, the pride and dignity among the (young) swordmasters of Xianzhou are like frost and fire, constantly clashing...

C: 坐在观众席上的智者，曾静观囚徒与傀儡的挣扎。也许它明白自己亦身处洞穴，但这洞穴大到吞没了它仅有的世界。
E: The wise in the audience seat once silently watched the struggles of prisoners and puppets. Perhaps he understood that he, too, dwelt within a cave, but the cave was so vast that it swallowed his whole world.

C: 流云渡
E: Cloudford

C: 「大衍万象」困难模式I
E: Mutare Magnus Hard Mode I

C: 协助佩佩将安保机器人辩倒
E: Help Peppy win the debate with the security robot.

C: 被哈努飞弹误伤的广告牌员工不超过<color=#f29e38ff>#1</color>个
E: Accidentally injure no more than <color=#f29e38ff>#1</color> billboard employee(s) with Hanu Rocket

E: Star Rail Pass ×1

C: 过客的游龙臂鞲
E: Passerby's Roaming Dragon Bracer

C:
肃静骑士从未在人前卸下过坚硬厚重的面具，肃穆的宗教面庞与萨菲娜的沉默共同塑造了难以呼吸的威圧感。

无论目中无人的恶魔，还是陷入疯狂的圣职，只会在肃穆的威压下露出本能的畏惧。

只有少数教廷的圣职知道，在那宗教盔面之下，是萨菲娜隐藏起的恶魔出身。教廷畏惧恶魔，又渴望恶魔的力量，这才有了矛盾的结果…俘获了幼年的恶魔，将她培养成骁勇的肃静骑士，却禁止她在人前露出真实的面孔，而是服从教宗的命令，化身为圣女的沉默骑士。

年龄相仿的圣女瓦妮拉曾亲自教导萨菲娜学习经文，她还记得烛光里恶魔的侧颜。

「我亲爱的萨菲娜，我见过你的面庞，我始终都记得。」圣女瓦妮拉在成年之后逐渐失明。
E:
The Solemn Knight had never taken off her hard and heavy casque before anybody. Safina's religious solemnity and silence projected an unbearable air of intimidation.

Haughty devils and mad clergy all instinctively cowered in fear before her solemn presence.

Only few of the clergy knew that Safina's devilish origins were concealed behind that casque of religiosity. The church both feared and craved for the devils' powers, which was how the conflicted result came to be... The church captured a newborn devil, trained her to become a valiant Solemn Knight, yet forbid her to ever reveal her true appearance, molded her to always obey the pontiff's order, and eventually made her the Maiden's silent knight.

Maiden Vanira was of a similar age to Safina, and she was the one who guided Safina to learn the scriptures. To this day, Maiden Vanira could still remember the devil's profile in candlelight.

"My dear Safina, I have seen your face. I will remember it, always." Maiden Vanira gradually lost her eyesight after reaching adulthood.

C:
银鬃铁卫野战部队常因战术需要，不得不在齐腰深的积雪中日行千里。长途奔袭的疲惫、严重的冻伤考验着战士们的双足。

漫漫的雪地远征，偶尔会遇到一些久违的老友。

负责雪原游击的银鬃铁卫时常在营地里听见冰原狼的长嚎，这种可怜的生物也在入侵者的铁蹄下流离失所。野战中队的耶格尔士官本是猎户出身，将狼鬃做成皮草制品是他的看家本领。而在漫无止境的寒潮来临之后，他极少再见到这些凶猛野兽。寒夜里，少数冰原狼放下戒备心，凑近铁卫的营火，伏卧在耶格尔身旁一言不发。黎明时分，这些野兽在温暖的梦境中永久睡去。

耶格尔士官将处理过的狼鬃填进士兵的白银护胫里，让他们的远行稍微好受一些。

「冰原狼还没有彻底失去家园，我们也一样。」耶格尔士官如此表达对冰原狼的怜惜。
E:
The Silvermane Guard field battalions often found themselves forced to march for miles in deep snow due to tactical needs. Exhaustion induced by the long-range raids and awful frostbite on their feet were the bitter ordeals all soldiers had to endure.

The long march across the Snowy Plains, however, would occasionally bring back friends from the old days.

Silvermane Guards tasked with patrolling the Snow Plains will often hear the howls of direwolves. These pitiful creatures were also driven from their homes by the invaders. Field Company Sergeant Jaeger, who came from a family of hunters, was skilled at making fur cloaks from direwolf manes. However, after the onset of the Eternal Freeze, he rarely saw these ferocious animals. Occasionally, on cold winter nights, a direwolf desperate for warmth would approach the guards' campfire and silently lie down right next to Jaeger, falling into warm, pleasant dreams. After dawn, however, the beast would never wake up again.

Sergeant Jaeger would often stuff the processed wolf mane into the soldiers' silver greaves to alleviate the pain during their long march on foot.

"The direwolves haven't completely lost their home, just like us," Sergeant Jaeger thus lamented the plight the direwolves.

C: 【序号】 EVD-W019EI06-003 【名称】晶石单片镜 【基本特征】有明显的碎痕 【取证地点】俄亥提中央综合科学院能源研究部「柏环」研究室 【当事人】柏环，能源分析领域首席科学家，天才俱乐部#7成员 【现场分析】 根据现场情况来看，当事人在启动观测仪操作不当，导致容器内燃素聚合体泄露，当事人左手严重受伤。事故发生时，单片镜不巧从高处摔落导致损坏。 【证言补充】 柏环称实验过程中，单片镜内出现异常可见光，强光刺激导致一系列巧合接连发生，并最终导致燃素聚合体泄露事故发生。 由于当事人描述的巧合过多，该证言不被采信。 【备注信息】 种种迹象暗示了这是一次蓄谋已久的犯罪行为。由于连续巧合发生的「蝴蝶效应」无法被认定为「可复现的犯罪手段」，该泄露事件最终以「意外」结案。 【相关录音】 「…我可能还要感谢这次意外，它把拉姆重新送回了我身边。这是我们第四次复婚了…说起来怪不好意思的，这还是第一次由我提出复婚呢。」该音频记录来自柏环。
E: [ID] EVD-W019EI06-003 [Name] Crystal monocle [Key Feature] Displays evident fractures [Location] Bohdan laboratory in the Energy Research Lab, Ohioti Central Academy of Sciences [Individual Involved] Bohdan, the Chief Scientist in the energy analysis field and member No. #7 of the Genius Society. [Site Analysis] The traces on the site indicate that the subject inadvertently triggered a reaction while operating the observation device, leading to Phlogiston leakage from the vessel and severe injury to the subject's left hand. During the incident, the monocle fell from a height and was fractured. [Supplementary Testimony] Bohdan mentioned abnormal visual light emissions in the monocle during experimentation, resulting in a series of coincidences that eventually led to the Phlogiston leak. The testimony was deemed inadmissible due to an excessive number of coincidences mentioned by the witness. [Additional Information] Suspected as a premeditated criminal act. However, the cascading coincidences creating the Butterfly Effect did not constitute a reproducible criminal method, therefore this event was ultimately classified as an accident. [Recording] "...This accident is actually a blessing in disguise, because it sent Lambda back to me again. Actually, this is our fourth remarriage... and it's a bit embarrassing to say, but this is MY first proposal for a remarriage." Sourced from Bohdan.

C:
无论是大捷或是惨败，竞技场的冠军总能从战场归来。城主将他的强运视作「胜利象征」，夺过他手中的长矛与盾牌，换以号角与战旗，命他将强运赐予全军。将士们深信，尼卡多利的荣光与他同行，只要他引领向前，必是胜利之途。

「从此以后，你无需再是一名战士，而应成为一个符号。」

那日夜锤炼、如铁石般坚韧的躯体，如今却如同神殿的石像，仅用来观瞻。

他被挡在备战的训练营外，士兵们生怕「胜利象征」遭遇任何微小的意外；他受邀来到城主宴会上，嘉宾们询问着那十六场生死相搏的传奇故事。如今，他伫立在战场的边缘，手握号角，金光流转的腕甲映出那张逐渐陌生的侧脸，不禁心头猛然一紧——他只需吹响胜利号令，早已无须冲锋陷阵…原来，这便是人们口中的「不战英雄」。

「…如果这能为全军带来胜利，我甘愿放弃战场上的荣耀。」

尼卡多利从不为「一个符号」选择胜利之道，他不敢懈怠，也许此生的最后一战即将到来……
E:
Be it a triumphant victory or total defeat, the coliseum champion is always able to return from the battlefield. The lord of the city attributes his fortuitous luck as a "symbol of victory," thus robbing the lance and shield in his hands in exchange for trumpets and banners, ordering him to bequeath his good fortune unto the whole army. The soldiers firmly believe that Nikador's glory walks with him, and as long as he spearheads the front, the path to victory is all but assured.

"Henceforth, you are no longer needed as a warrior, but should become a symbol."

The body honed sturdy as rock over days and nights of strenuous training, now exists only to be admired like a temple statue.

He has been barred from the training grounds, for the soldiers mortally fear the slightest accident befalling this "symbol of victory." He has been invited to the lord of the city's feast, where guests insist he regale them with the legendary tale of those sixteen fights to the death. Now, he has been stationed at the borders of the battlefield, holding a trumpet, his scintillating gold braces reflecting a profile growing ever more unfamiliar, and a sudden tightness grips his heart — he only has to blow on this trumpet, never needing to charge into the fray again... So, this is the "A hero who wins without fighting" of which people speak.

"...If this can bring victory to the army, I will voluntarily forsake my glory on the battlefield."

Nikador never chooses a path to victory for a "symbol," so he dares not slack off — the final battle of his life may be upon him...

C: 虚无
E: Nihility

C: ……瞧不起博识学会，我却挺喜欢他们。同样是「智识」的追随者，这群学士没有俱乐部的桀骜脾气，大多很朴实，问什么答什么。按照编辑克利欧的说法，0-<unbreak>180</unbreak>琥珀纪并不像公司宣称的那样空白。多项考古发现证明在「存护」登神的初期古兽依然活跃，这和公司的说法：「『黄昏战争』因琥珀王的诞生而终结」相违背。甚至还有一种假说，认为在克里珀之前已经存在其祂的星神……用小拇指想想也知道，公司肯定不会支持这种研究，他们用经费投资胁迫星空生态学派放弃了这类考古。这也是我不再对克里珀感兴趣的原因：公司实在是太烦了……
E: ...I don't respect the Intelligentsia Guild, but I like them. They are also followers of Erudition but have none of the arrogance and temper of the Genius Society members. They are also down-to-earth and answer honestly when asked. According to Cleo the editor, the period between AE 0 and <unbreak>180</unbreak> was not as much a blank as the IPC had claimed. Many archeological discoveries proved that Leviathans were still active in the early days after the Preservation ascended, which goes against the IPC's official line that "the Dusk Wars ended with the birth of the Amber Lord." There is even a hypothesis that other Aeons already existed before Qlipoth did... I can tell that the IPC won't fund such research from a mile off. Using threats to withdraw funding, the IPC coerced the Astral Ecology School to give up on these archeological projects, and that's why I'm no longer interested in Qlipoth. The IPC is just too annoying...

C: 作为虚构有力的对手之一，遗传学家的基因分析，曾长期作为对付仿造化石的最终手段。但显然，虚构史学家已找到了应对手段，他们将基因序列作为谱写故事的载体，以超越学者的敬业精神，编撰出完美的分子进化树，把已有的物种体系搅得一团糟。香蕉成了两栖动物，呜呜伯被归入雀形目，据不可靠统计，随着越来越多的化石沾染上「神秘」气息，虚构史学家在生物领域的影响已呈现出指数级上升趋势。
E: As one of the powerful adversaries to fictional entities, genetic analysis by geneticists has long served as a final gambit against falsified fossils. However, it is clear to see that History Fictionologists have come up with a way to counter this. By taking genetic sequences as vessels for stories they wish to compose, they dedicate themselves with greater determination than any scholar and compile perfect molecular evolution trees, bringing the current species system into complete disarray. Bananas become amphibians and Wubbaboos were classified into birds. Unreliable data already illustrate that with more and more fossils becoming tainted with the scent of Enigmata, the influence of the History Fictionologist within biological fields is increasing exponentially.

C: 学者之间的观点冲突一般通过论文和辩论解决，但对于武装考古学派而言，使用物理手段能够更高效的说服对方。「深度睡眠」就是为此发明的，当灯罩打碎时，四散而出的波状粒子能渗透进坚固的墙壁，让吸入者陷入婴儿般的睡眠。不过使用前请务必仔细测定风向，尤其禁止在逆风时使用。
E: Scholars typically resolve their differences through papers and debates, but for the Armed Archaeologists, physical intervention proves more effective. Deep Sleep was invented for the purpose: When the lampshade shatters, its wave-like particles permeate solid walls, inducing infant-like sleep in those who breathe them in. However, always measure the wind direction before use, especially avoiding downwind deployments.

C: 尼卡多利的眷属之所以是令所有翁法罗斯人畏惧的战争机器，一方面归功于纷争泰坦赐予的力量，另一方面则是因为出色的后勤保养。每当一场战争结束，悬锋人都会用特制的按摩仪为眷属们进行全身放松，这种仪器通过每秒钟数十次的快速击打，可以有效缓解各关节的迟钝，提高眷属的作战能力。唯一的缺点是，该按摩器的使用寿命十分有限，但悬锋人很快发现，退役的按摩器依旧可以在拷问战俘方面有很大的发挥空间。
E: The kins of Nikador are feared across Amphoreus as relentless war machines, owing not only to the power bestowed by the Strife Titan, but also to their exceptional logistical upkeep. After every battle, the Kremnoans use specially designed massage devices to relax the kins' bodies. These instruments deliver rapid dozens-per-second strikes, effectively loosening stiff joints and enhancing combat readiness. The only drawback? The devices have a notoriously short lifespan. However, the Kremnoans soon discovered that even after retirement, these massage tools could still serve a rather effective role in the interrogation of prisoners of war.

C: 或沉默，或身陨，但泰坦的赐福却仍残留于世间。往昔的呐喊与呼唤被封存进水晶，为后继者带来些许希望。倘若赐福的存在并不依赖于泰坦，那泰坦与神权究竟谁先一步诞生？树庭曾围绕这一话题展开一场空前的辩论，可直到愤怒压倒了理性，也没能得出答案。
E: The Titans have all either fallen silent or demised, but their benedictions remain in this world. The calls and bellows of the past were sealed into crystals and will bring some meager hope to those who will come after them. But if such benedictions exist independently of the Titans, then what came first — Titans or divine authority? The Grove had once conducted a spectacular debate on this topic, but could not reach an answer before the participants' rage overwhelmed their reason.

C: 或沉默，或身陨，但泰坦的赐福却仍残留于世间。往昔的呐喊与呼唤被封存进水晶，为后继者带来些许希望。倘若赐福的存在并不依赖于泰坦，那泰坦与神权究竟谁先一步诞生？树庭曾围绕这一话题展开一场空前的辩论，可直到愤怒压倒了理性，也没能得出答案。
E: The Titans have all either fallen silent or demised, but their benedictions remain in this world. The calls and bellows of the past were sealed into crystals and will bring some meager hope to those who will come after them. But if such benedictions exist independently of the Titans, then what came first — Titans or divine authority? The Grove had once conducted a spectacular debate on this topic, but could not reach an answer before the participants' rage overwhelmed their reason.

C: 最爱与纯美骑士打交道的派系恐怕是假面愚者，这些愚者时常拿骑士对伊德莉拉终将归来的信仰逗闷取乐，而高洁的骑士总是十分虔诚，固执地践行纯美的信仰。出于上述理由，悲悼伶人从骑士团的精神中获得了共情——他们收藏了纯美骑士在践行「纯美」时牺牲的一颗牙齿，它也如此美丽。
E: The faction that likes dealing with the Knights of Beauty the most are most likely the Masked Fools. These Fools like to amuse themselves by exploiting the knights' faith in the eventual return of Idrila, while the knights themselves remain ever-pious and obstinate practitioners in the ways of Beauty. Due to the reasons listed above, the Mourning Actors developed a sense of empathy for the knights from the spirit they demonstrated, and they collected a tooth sacrificed by the Knights of Beauty in their practice of seeking aesthetic perfection, with the tooth's desirability enduring even till the present.

C:
接过少年递来的花朵，他的触角缓缓地抽动，微妙的电磁波输入你的传感器中，写满了他的不舍。虽然无法接受一个没有复眼的族人，但朴素的膜翅目居民仍将你视作他们的朋友，带着你往返于蜜田和巢穴之间。在你的书里，他们甚至比泯灭帮还要野蛮可恶。

你开始困惑，什么才是真实？傲慢与偏见渗透进了知识，组合成「完美无缺」的宇宙模型，以至于消解了知识的价值，让它们成为任人摆弄的空中楼阁。

你知道自己迷路了，可方向却无从找寻。每当你以为能在下一颗星球找到答案，疑问却只会变得越来越多。
E:
When you accept the flowers from the young man, his antennae twitch slowly, sending subtle electromagnetic waves to your sensors that convey how much he doesn't want to let go. The humble Hymenoptera residents still see you as their friend, even though they can hardly accept someone without compound eyes as one of them. They bring you along as they go back and forth between the honey fields and their nests. In your book, they are described as a group even more savage and despicable than the Annihilation Gang.

You can't help wondering what constitutes truth. Pride and prejudice have seeped into knowledge, forming a "perfect" model of the universe, so much so that it diminishes the value of knowledge, turning it into a mere illusion anyone can tamper with.

You know you are lost, but there is no way to find your bearings. Whenever you think the next planet can offer you the answer, it only leaves you more confused than ever.

C:
你还在收集那些故事？独眼的赫利塔克。
不如歇歇脚，来讲讲你自己的过去。
听说，你那喉咙曾被墨涅塔的鳞粉亲吻，
它在最后的远征时被海水腐蚀，你也就此失去了一只眼睛。
这是一种好运吗？那场无归的逐火，让你从中逃离。
可你仍漫步于大地，记述黄金的英雄，嗜血的恶徒，
乃至吟唱那些无足轻重的凡夫俗子，
从蝴蝶的低语、刻录的石板和冥河的潮汐声里，
聆听他们的足迹。
你是想用这种方式将他们留下？还是希冀，能够在那天，
与时代一同故去。
E:
One-eyed Helioticus, are you still collecting those stories?
Take a moment to rest your feet and share your own past.
I've heard that Mnestia's scales once kissed your throat,
Yet it was corroded by the seawater in the final expedition, taking with it your eye.
Was that a type of good fortune? From that doomed Flame-Chase, you managed to survive.
Yet, you continue to wander across the land, chronicling the golden heroes, the bloodthirsty villains,
And even sing of insignificant mortals.
You listen for their steps
Through the whispers of butterflies, inscribed tablets, and the tides of the River of Souls.
Are you endeavoring to immortalize them through your words? Or do you hope to
Have faded away with the times on that fateful day?

C:
没想到，在海上也能遇见同行，嗝。
船上的人类，可别被我这怪异的容貌吓到，
谁叫法吉娜那迷糊鬼醉得厉害，创造我的时候，
放了太多的海草和水藻，才不如我的兄弟姐妹漂亮。
可论弹琴奏乐的技艺，除却你们女皇身侧的那位海瑟音，
就连墨涅塔也要称我为师长。
还愣着做什么？我可不会因老东西的陨落向谁寻仇，
趁海洋尚未被黑潮吞没，让我们再彻夜狂欢！
那个独眼的吟游诗人，我来唱歌，你来弹琴，
赌上我们最好的蜜酿，看这满船的客人愿意为谁鼓掌！
E:
Well, I never expected to encounter a fellow entertainer here on the sea. Hic.
Hey, humans on the ship, you'd better not get startled by my otherworldly appearance.
Phagousa was so drunk when they created me
That they added too much seaweed and algae for me, making me less charming than my siblings.
But I have my own strength. In terms of making music, no one rivals me except Hysilens who stands by your Empress' side.
Believe it or not, even Mnestia would call me their master.
Hey, what are you doing there? Easy! I won't seek revenge for the fall of that old timer.
Before the black tide takes the ocean in, let's revel the night away!
I sing, and you will play, that one-eyed bard over there.
Let's wager our finest honey brew and see who the guests aboard will cheer for!

C: 并非所有星球都对星际和平公司的商业帝国张开双臂表示欢迎，在不断扩张的星系版图之中，总有极个别的例外拒绝了公司的好意。「谢谢，」他们说，「但我们不需要信用点，我们完全有能力照顾自己。」面对如上情况时，公司的代表会耸耸肩，然后轻描淡写地摧毁该星球的金融体系根基——通常是黄金。
E: Not all planets opened their arms and welcomed the expansion of the Interastral Peace Corporation's commercial empire. While the cosmic map kept expanding, there were always rare exceptions that refused the IPC's beneficence. "Thank you," they stated, "but we don't need Credits. We can look after ourselves just fine." The representative of the IPC would usually shrug at these statements, then casually destroy the root of that planet's commercial system — it is usually based on gold.

C: 星际和平公司市场开拓部发售的银河大乐透，其营销方针正如奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德本人一样充满激情与热血，只需一块星际货币就可以赌一次自己的好运，贩卖人人都有机会成为宇宙富豪加入商业体系的造梦体验，在奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德的营销下，通常很少有新世界能抵御这种诱惑——他们为了赢得入场券，纷纷加入星际和平公司的宇宙商业体系，从而获得在自己的国度开展银河大乐透活动的加盟资格。
E: The marketing tactics for the Cosmic Big Lotto, sold by the Interastral Peace Corporation's Marketing Development Department, is as passionate and hot-blooded as Oswaldo Schneider himself. You just need one galactic currency to bet on your luck and become a trader in the experience of making dreams, where everyone has a chance to become a cosmic tycoon and join the business structure. Under Oswaldo Schneider's marketing strategy, few new worlds are able to resist such temptations — They eagerly join the Interastral Peace Corporation's universal business structure to win an entry ticket, obtaining the right to operate the Cosmic Big Lotto in their own realms.

C: 相较石块、木料、黄金、超钛金属与货币，游牧矿工更热衷于挖掘「以太」。他们曾一度痴迷在矿地间用手指挖掘巨量「以太」的手感，但这种体验曾招来不幸：数名超巨型矿工终在不明区域被火药炸死，其间仅一位身材矮小的矿工得以幸存，它的胡须自此以后永远跳跃着一撮火焰。
E: Compared to currencies of stone, wood, gold, or supernium metals, the nomadic miners are more obsessed with the excavation of Aether. There was a period when they were infatuated with the sensation of digging vast quantities of Aether using their bare hands while in the mines, but these experiences brought calamity upon them. Several large-stature miners finally met their ends via exploding gunpowder in unknown areas, while only a short and small miner managed to survive. Its beard henceforth always flickered with a pinch of flame.
