C: 不善言辞的空间站「黑塔」防卫科负责人。\n虽然不懂科研，但为了保护珍视研究的空间站科员顺利完成他们的研究，阿兰可以拼上性命。他早已习惯疼痛，并将负伤视作勋章。\n也只有抱着佩佩时，男孩才会放下戒备，露出难得一见的笑容。
E: The inarticulate head of the Herta space station's Security Department.\nWhile scientific research is beyond his understanding, Arlan is willing to risk his life to protect the staff who value research so very much. He is used to pain and wears his scars like badges of honor.\nOnly when holding Peppy does the boy let down his guard and show a rare smile.

C: 大守护者的决策是正确的。 战事过后，贝洛伯格的许多人终于暂歇一口气，重新拾起那尚不完整的简单日常。然而，包括戍卫官在内的人们并不知道——待虚伪的和平过后，他们即将面对的只有更加惨烈的长期拉锯；若无外物干涉，这旷日持久的战事将以贝洛伯格的陨落作结。 此时，他正在寝室中检查自己的盾牌「壁垒」是否运转如初。这架沉重的力场防护装置由他的姐姐用琴盒亲手改装而成——如果真出了什么问题，可怜的戍卫官恐怕又要向那位历来放飞自我的摇滚明星求援了。 「杰帕德，如果，我是说如果，」他想起她的话，「如果有一天，大守护者命令你放弃贝洛伯格的人民，只为了实现她的某个目的…你会怎么做？」 「她绝不会那么做。她是大守护者。」他很坚定。 「我是说如果。」她看着他。 「我不清楚你为什么如此发问，但我已向克里珀立下存护誓言。我将捍卫贝洛伯格与她的人民，不计任何代价——当然也包括我的生命。」 「如果有一天，保护人民意味着违抗大守护者的命令，并且无论如何选择都会令我深陷险境，那我仍会选择前者。因为这才是我该做的事。」 他们沉默。然后，她大笑。 「杰帕德啊杰帕德……」 「你不愧是我们朗道家的人。」
E: The Supreme Guardian made the correct choice. After the war, many residents of Belobog could finally let out a sigh of relief and pick up the pieces of their simple lives. However, not even the Captain himself could have imagined that after this facade for peace, they would face an ever more tragic all-out war. Without outside help, this protracted war would usher in the demise of all Belobog. Right now, he is checking whether his shield, Earthwork, is still functioning as before. This heavy force field device was hand-crafted by his sister out of an instrument case — and if anything is broken, the poor captain would have to rely on his rockstar of a sister to help fix it. "Gepard, if — and I do mean, if — " he thinks back to her words, "If one day, the Supreme Guardian orders you to abandon the people of Belobog to complete some goal of hers... What would you do?" "She would never do that. She is the Supreme Guardian." He was resolute. "I'm speaking hypothetically." She looked at him. "I'm not sure why you're asking, but I've pledged an Oath of Preservation to Qlipoth. I will protect Belobog and her people at any cost — including my own life, of course." "If one day, protecting the people means disobeying the Supreme Guardian's orders — and if either choice would land me in danger — then I'd still choose the former, because that is what I'm supposed to do." They both fell silent, before she laughed out loud. "Gepard, oh Gepard..." "You really are a Landau, aren't you?"

C: 以下内容摘录自《银鬃铁卫面试选拔记录•情报部•第二十四卷》一〇三页。 有关为何是荣誉学士学位—— 「大人，请允许我向您复述《贝洛伯格士官教育及学位军衔授予规则》第三编第五章第二十三节第一条第七款中的相关内容……」 「若学位授予对象未满足最低年龄需求、且已修满目标专业教学计划学分时，应授予对象『荣誉学士』学位头衔。」 「是的，本人目前没有任何继续进修的计划——将来也不会有。」 「实践胜于理论，大人。」
E: The following is an excerpt from page 103 of the Silvermane Guards Recruitment Records: Intelligence Department — Vol. 24: As for what is an honorary degree — "Please allow me to recite from the Belobog Sergeant Education and Degree Awarding Regulations Version 3, Chapter 5, Section 23, Article 1, Paragraph 7...:" "An Honorary Bachelor's degree will be conferred to students who have not met the minimum age requirement but have earned enough credits from courses of corresponding majors." "That's right. I currently have no plans for postgraduate study, and never will." "I find practice far better than theory, Madam."

C: 「██年██月██日  天气：好冷 心情：很开心」 「今天，我去了『机械  木   慕  墓场』，想要找一个合适的兵器。作为老大，必须要有一个厉害的兵器！」 「我在那里认识了一个女孩子。她比我大几岁（但我还是老大！），穿着一件很漂亮的红色外套，但是没有穿鞋子。我不知道她为什么不穿鞋子，我觉得那样会很冷！可能她不会觉得很冷吧。」 「她的头发是白色的，就像雪一样，非常好看！我也想有白色的、长长的头发。」 「她很害羞，一开始不敢和我说话。但是没关系！我  超级喜欢说话  超级会交朋友！我和她聊天，聊了很久。我知道了她叫克拉拉，而且，她的爸爸原来是一台好大的机器人！」 「她的爸爸很帅气，但是没有费斯曼老爹帅气！我和她成为了好朋友，她还帮我找到了很厉害的『洞洞机』！她现在是鼹鼠党的荣誉队员啦！」
E: "██/██/██ Weather: Freezing Mood: Very happy" "Today I went to the machine garv gravy graveyard to find a suitable weapon. As the boss of The Moles, I've got to have a great weapon!" "I met a girl there. She was a few years older than me (but I'm still the boss!) and was wearing a pretty red coat. But she had no shoes on. I don't know why she had no shoes on, since that's gotta be very cold! Maybe she wasn't feeling very cold though." "Her hair was white like snow, and it was pretty! I want white hair too. Long and white hair." "She was very shy, too shy to talk to me at first. But that's cool! I super love talking and super love making friends! I chatted with her for a long, long time. I know her name is Clara, and her dad is a super big robot!" "Her dad is really cool, but not as cool as daddy Fersman! She is my friend now and she helped me find a really strong Diggertron! She's now an honorary member of The Moles!"

C: 金发俊雅的年轻人，背着巨大的棺椁。 \n身为天外行商的他，不幸被卷入仙舟「罗浮」的星核危机。 \n一手精湛医术莫名有了用武之地。
E: An elegant and handsome blond young man who carries a giant coffin on his back.\nAs an intergalactic merchant, he was unfortunately caught in the Xianzhou Luofu's Stellaron crisis.\nAnd that is how he found his mastery of medicine to come in handy.

C: 「美梦中只有快乐，这恰恰是最大的悲哀。 这些美梦中的失意者们，害怕家族的驱赶，如同幽灵一般行在梦境的边缘，小心翼翼藏起自己的情绪，回避那些闻着酸涩且微苦的记忆，只有在饮下特调的片刻，他们的防线才会溃不成军，仿佛要把这辈子剩下的话说完—— 『看不起我的人可以绕酒店三圈，但愿意正眼瞧我的人…哎，死一个就少一个了……』 『每个人都在白日做梦。我像你这么大的时候，就想去当个星际大流氓。结果显而易见，喏——白日梦碎了。』 『领带乱了自己又看不见。在匹诺康尼，没人会在乎别人穿了什么。他们甚至不在乎对方到底是不是「人」。』 …… 他们口是心非，他们词不达意，他们永远不会说出心中所想——但也只有这样，故事才显得真实。」 ——《手记•梦中的失意者》
E: "There is only happiness in the sweet dream, which forms its greatest misfortune. These disillusioned individuals in the dream are terrified of The Family chasing them away. They wander like specters on the fringes of the Dreamscape, carefully concealing their emotions and avoiding memories that smell sour or bitter. Their defenses will only crumble during the brief moments after they imbibe the special mix as if they want to say everything they would ever want to say in the rest of their lives... 'If people who look down on me lined up, the queue be long enough to go around The Reverie three times. But those who are willing to treat me with respect... *sigh* there's one less of them every time one of them dies...' 'Everyone daydreams. When I was your age, I aspired to become an intergalactic outlaw. The result is clear: The daydream shattered.' 'You won't notice it when your tie is askew. In Penacony, no one cares about what others were. They don't even care if others are *human* or not.' ... Their words ring hollow, often insincere and perfunctory, never revealing their true thoughts. However, that's the only way the story can feel real." — Note: Disillusioned Ones in the Dreamscape

C: 他的故乡曾历经战火数年。炮火纷飞中，他最初的童年记忆总是萦绕着鲜血与硝烟。某次在地下躲避炮火时，他掀开一块石砖，找到一枚陶笛。 他尝试将流动的空气制成旋律—— 但他的音乐的确是场灾难。 只是彼时的陶笛声，对他来说是唯一的「精神逃避之地」。 音调的旋律随时间溶解在他的记忆中，成为「神秘」的片刻。直至数年后，他在某地吟游时救下阁塔炮火中的孩子，被赠予一枚珍贵的陶笛时，记忆又被再次唤起。 他于手中揣摩笛身，白璧无瑕高贵的质感，空气穿梭于孔中，由气压制成音调。音调再被组合，竟能唤起回忆的情绪—— 但他的音乐仍旧是场灾难。 「我如此愚钝，处理不好与它的关系……」 他惶惑不安，思忖许久，一种使人生畏的勇气再次发芽。他再次尝试将流动的空气制成旋律—— 音律如旧，但他开怀大笑。 「但我爱它，我真的爱它——我相信它是『美』的。」 他将其陶笛收起，妥帖收藏，不再犹豫，继续前行。
E: His hometown was ravaged by war for years, and the memories of his early childhood were tainted by the horrors of bloodshed and relentless shelling. Amidst the chaos, he sought refuge underground and, by chance, discovered an ocarina beneath a stone tile. With trembling hands, he attempted to coax a melody from the instrument. However, his "music" proved to be terrible. Yet, the ethereal notes emanating from his ocarina became his sanctuary, a spiritual escape from the harsh reality. Over time, the melodic strains faded into the recesses of his memory, becoming a mysterious and elusive moment. It was only years later, during a bard tour, when he saved a child from the flames of war and received a precious ocarina as a token of gratitude, that the melodies of his past resurfaced. Holding the exquisite instrument in his hands, he examined its flawless and noble craftsmanship. Once again, the melodies of his childhood converged, evoking a flood of emotions and memories. However, his "music" remained terrible. "I'm too clumsy to master this instrument..." He murmured in self-deprecation. Yet, after a profound moment of contemplation, a resolute courage ignited within him. He resolved to try once more, to weave a melody. The music remained unchanged, but this time, he laughed wholeheartedly. "Despite the terrible music, I love it. I believe it to be beautiful." Carefully stowing away his ocarina, he once again embarked on his journey without hesitation.

C: 骑士团对如何秉持「纯美」态度各不相同： 有人以一生贯彻自己的信念；有人不断假设，不断绝望推翻假设； 有人获得授勋，征戎沙场；有人自认是钟楼陋人，羞于接受「纯美」的华袍； 不变的是众人皆在宇宙中苦苦寻找「伊德莉拉」的真身。 他发誓牢记谦卑，怜悯，公正，一路从未违背过誓言；他将「纯美」戒律铭记于心，信仰也变得愈发偏执。 「怪人…纯美骑士真是一群怪人！」 自「伊德莉拉」可能已死的流言传播于宇宙后，他们的惶惑更甚： 更多地虔诚，却对应更多地不解；更多地大笑，却对应更多地怪异。 于洪荒中往回窥视，各类「荣誉」、「美名」、「恶名」皆在冗长时间中湮灭。 一切的最后。 当他再次遇见往日同行的「骑士」时，对方已变成迷失在追求力量之路上的审美者。 那位曾经高举传奇武器，弑杀吞天巨兽的英雄，其铠甲化为巨兽的鳞皮，其武器成为无法取下的爪牙，其血成了粘稠躁动的火焰，其双眸只余野性而无人智，曾经唤他「挚友」的声音，如今只余嘶嘶的叫声。 试炼的话语化为「终末」的预言，近在眼前： 自己，又是否…会同样堕为「恶兆」？
E: The knights embraced diverse approaches in their pursuit of Beauty. Some fervently embodied their beliefs until their final days, while others grappled with assumptions and defied heresies that could lead them into despair. Some adorned themselves in armor and waged battles, while others saw themselves as unworthy, considering themselves the "ugly ones" unable to don the robe of beauty. Yet, the unchanging truth remained in their collective quest to unravel the enigma of Idrila in the vast universe. He vowed to uphold humility, mercy, and justice, remaining steadfast in honoring his oaths along the arduous path. "Those freaks!... The Knights of Beauty are a bunch of freaks!" As rumors of Idrila's demise spread throughout the cosmos, their perplexity deepened. Piety intermingled with doubt, and laughter intertwined with lunacy. Notions of honor, reputation, and infamy dissolved into nothingness. This marked the end of everything. When he finally encountered his former comrade, he found a knight who had become a fanatic, lost in a blind pursuit of power. The former hero who had wielded a legendary weapon and vanquished the sky devourer had degenerated into a beast. His armor transformed into the scaly hide of the behemoth he had slain, his weapon into unyielding claws and fangs, and his blood into a viscous and restless flame. His eyes, once filled with wisdom, now burned with untamed wildness. The voice that had once addressed him as "my dear friend" had dwindled to a hissing cry. The words spoken during the trial carried the weight of the Finality's impending prophecy, signaling the looming end. Will he, himself... succumb to the clutches of the Omen of Evil?

C: 「银链星系已正式纳入公司的贸易版图，下一周期的利润预计将提升47%。」 富丽堂皇的会议室中，三位「P46」围桌而坐。 「那地方就该被一场离子风暴毁掉，简单直接。」 说这话时，男人始终看着窗外。庇尔波因特的黄昏是紫红色的，林立的高楼反射出欧泊石般七彩的光芒。 「我的意见恰恰相反。自然死亡的猎物…有什么乐趣可言？」 圆桌的另一边，女士轻晃着手中的酒杯，那酒是血红色的。 「和二位不同，我只是一名商人。」 翡翠起身，微笑着结束了陈述。她知晓这个结果，这房间里的三人从来不会达成共识。 「所以我擅长的，也无非是在一场又一场交易中，等待最关键的那笔投资出现。 「那些身处绝境的人们，他们甘愿付出一切去实现自身的欲求，所以这些欲求也会赐予他们无与伦比的力量。 「看，始终抗拒公司的银链星系，如今也成了『战略投资部』可靠的盟友。 「所以期待吧，我们在今天种下种子，当然是为了让它在明天结果。」
E: "The Silverchain Galaxy has been officially included in the IPC's commercial sphere. Our profits for the next cycle are expected to increase by 47%." Three P46-level representatives sat around the table in an opulent conference room. "That place should just get destroyed by the ion storm, straightforward and simple." The man kept his gaze fixed at the window as he talked. The dusk in Pier Point is purplish red, while the towering buildings reflected the opalescent glow. "My opinion is the opposite. Prey that dies a natural death... what fun is there in that?" The woman sitting across the round table remarked, gently swirling the wine in her goblet, red as blood. "I am unlike the two of you. I am simply a merchant." Jade rose, smiling as she finished her statement. She knew this outcome would come to pass, that there was no chance of the three people in this room coming to an agreement. "My expertise is but waiting for that critical investment to present itself in transaction after transaction." "The desperate will give anything to see their desires manifest, and these desires will also imbue them with unparalleled power." "Witness: The Silverchain Galaxy that once rejected the IPC have now become reliable allies of the 'Strategic Investment Department.'" "So, look forward to it. The seeds I plant today will be sown as tomorrow's fruits."

C: 「『光历████年，机缘月』风堇医师 展信佳。虽然当年姐姐没能挺过来，但姐姐最后在庭院度过的时光…她临走前的微笑一直温暖着我的梦境。我想跟您说，今天我也正式成了一名医师，我想像您一样，去帮助那些在末世中煎熬的人们，希望在这长夜中，我也能成为一盏小小的灯……」 「『光历████年，门关月』堇宝 …真的很感谢你这段时间的陪伴。当我蜷缩在昏光庭院治疗室的时候，你允许我的悲伤像积雨一样堆积又蒸发，当我说自己『天气不好』时，你又完整地包容了我…或许，我也应该更勇敢一点……」 「『光历████年，自由月』风堇女士 小家伙们都恢复得很好，特别是那位上次吵着要喝石榴汁的奥赫玛小战士。城邦间的宿仇很难很快消除，但我现在相信，不同的色彩也能共存。」 「『光历████年，长夜月』风堇助教 感谢你执着的提醒，我会考虑和她缓和关系。当然，完全是看在你的面子上……」 「『光历████年，哀悼月』风堇小姐 不必费心为我寄来新的药剂了，我自知人性的流失已无法挽回。你也不必担心，我们与树庭的关系并非降至冰点……」 「『光历████年，欢喜月』风堇女士 我从来没有想过，家乡的麦种能有一天重新发芽。躺在昏光庭院的花园，又像是回到了哀丽秘榭一样。每次心情低落的时候，闻闻这里的麦香，我就又有干劲了！」 「『光历████年，长昼月』小风堇 人们总称赞以前包容烈阳与惊雷的天空，*我们*却觉得你比那样的天空更温柔。无论*我们*明天将去向何处，*我们*一定会永远、永远记得你！」 从满溢的箱中露出的几封信件，被珍藏在诊疗记录册旁。 在旅程之初，女孩微弱的光似乎旋即会被黑暗吞没，然而在启程成为明日的天空前—— 在她走过的地方，晴空早已不知不觉绽开了第一缕笑颜。
E: "'Light Calendar ████, Month of Fortune' To Physician Hyacine I hope this letter finds you well. Although my sister couldn't make it back then, the last days she spent in the courtyard... and the smile she gave before she left... have always warmed my dreams. I wanted to tell you that today, I have officially become a physician. I want to be like you, to help those who suffer in the end times. I hope that in this long night, I too can become a small, guiding light..." "'Light Calendar ████, Month of Gate' To Little Cinny ...I'm truly grateful for your companionship during this time. When I was curled up in the Twilight Courtyard's infirmary, you allowed my sorrow to pile up like storm clouds and then evaporate. When I said my 'weather was bad,' you embraced me completely... Perhaps, I should try to be a little braver too..." "'Light Calendar ████, Month of Freedom' To Lady Hyacine The little ones have all recovered well, especially that young Okheman warrior who was fussing about wanting pomegranate juice last time. The feuds between city-states are not easy to dissolve quickly, but now I believe that different colors can coexist." "'Light Calendar ████, Month of Evernight' To Assistant Instructor Hyacine Thank you for your persistent reminders. I will consider mending my relationship with her. Of course, this is only for your sake..." "'Light Calendar ████, Month of Mourning' To Miss Hyacine There is no need to trouble yourself by sending me new medicine. I am well aware that the erosion of my humanity is beyond recovery. And you need not worry, our relationship with the Grove has not reached a breaking point..." "'Light Calendar ████, Month of Joy' To Lady Hyacine I never thought that the wheat seeds from my homeland would sprout again one day. Lying in the garden of the Twilight Courtyard, it almost feels like being back in Aedes Elysiae. Whenever I feel down, the scent of wheat here gives me the strength to keep going!" "'Light Calendar ████, Month of Everday' To Cinny People always praise the sky of the past for embracing both blazing suns and roaring thunder, but we think you are even gentler than that sky. No matter where we go tomorrow, we will always, always remember you!" A few letters spilling out from an overflowing box were carefully preserved beside the medical records. At the beginning of her journey, the girl's faint light seemed as though it would be swallowed by the darkness at any moment. Yet, before she set forth to become the sky of tomorrow... In the places she passed through, the clear sky had already unknowingly unfolded its first gentle smile.

C: 可可利亚或杰帕德的弱点被击破时，我方全体恢复能量和战技点。
E: When Cocolia or Gepard's Weakness is broken, all allies will recover Energy and Skill Points.

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.

C: 你们平安着陆雅利洛-Ⅵ，却发现此处只有冷冽的霜风和无垠的雪原向各位表示欢迎。\n毫无头绪的你回想起姬子的话：成功的开拓需要「探索」、「了解」、「建立」和「连结」…现在大概是正处于「探索」的阶段吧——\n无论如何，现在恐怕只剩下在风雪中前进，或者等星核自己找上门这两种选择了。
E: You land on Jarilo-VI safely, but now find yourselves standing in frigid winds among barren snowfields stretching as far as the eye can see.\nFeeling stuck, you recall Himeko's words: Successful trailblazers must learn to explore, understand, establish, and connect... Maybe this is what exploring looks like.\nIn any event, your options are now clear: Push through the snow or wait for the Stellaron to miraculously appear by itself.

C: 桑博如约带你们来到了通向史瓦罗基地的大门前，却又在此处卖了个关子：原来，想要打开这道铁门，你们必须从认证机器人处收集认证才行。\n如果他能一次性把话说完的话，你们也不至于浪费时间兜这个圈子了——这就是你不想和桑博共事的原因…之一。\n你已经取得了第二级认证，距离打开大门还差一级。加油！
E: As promised, Sampo leads you to the gate of Svarog's base. He then leaves you with a cliffhanger: In order to open this gate, you'll have to collect certifications from the certification robot.\nIf he could just tell you everything at once, you wouldn't have to waste time running in circles — this is the reason why you dread working with Sampo... One of the reasons at least.\nYou've collected the Level-2 Certification, just one more level until the gate opens. Keep it up!

C: 你和同伴击退了裂界生物，保证了克拉拉的安全。你本想借此机会说服克拉拉将大家带到史瓦罗面前，可惜她是个比三月七更透彻、更坚持自己信念的孩子…因此，这次交涉以失败告终。\n但是，这次交流也并非没有收获：你们觉察到了或许能令她和史瓦罗松口的突破口——接下来，只需找到克拉拉重新交涉即可。
E: You and your companions defeated the Fragmentum organisms and secured Clara's safety. You wanted to take the opportunity to persuade Clara into bringing you to Svarog, but she has a firmer and clearer conviction than March 7th... Your persuasion ended in failure.\nHowever, all is not lost. You've noticed a breakthrough that could make her and Svarog talk — all you have to do now is to find Clara and revisit the conversation.

C: 司辰宫中，满心以为会获得支持的你们却遭到了驭空的回绝。\n所幸云骑军将军景元现身定策。但他并未将搜索星核的重任交给你们，而是让你们找到行踪无定的卡芙卡。\n出得司辰宫，你们暂得片刻休憩，却不知此时此刻，丹恒正在做什么呢？
E: In the Palace of Astrum, the hopeful Trailblazers are rejected by Yukong.\nFortunately, General Jing Yuan of Luofu's Cloud Knights appears and intervenes. However, he does not entrust you with the task of searching for the Stellaron, instead instructing you to locate Kafka's unpredictable whereabouts.\nYou have a short rest after leaving the Palace of Astrum, and you wonder what Dan Heng might be doing right now.

C: 追踪星核猎手——你们想象着这桩任务的艰巨危险，猜测卡芙卡会准备怎样的诡计和陷阱。她却悠闲自若地现身，告诉你们已等候许久。一切并不如你们所想的那样。
E: Tracking the Stellaron Hunter — You could feel the gravity and danger of the task at hand and speculated on the tricks and traps Kafka prepared for you. But instead, she shows up at ease and tells you that she's been waiting for your arrival for a long time. It's not at all how you imagined it.

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 桑博带着你回到了「梦境贩售店」，并让爱德华医生老实交代了面向资深客人的服务（他怎么不早点说？），订制了一枚个性化梦泡让你体验。\n虽然不知道他在打什么主意，但直觉告诉你，接下来的体验恐怕会很…超乎想象。
E: Sampo has led you back to the Dreamscape Sales Store and confessed to Dr. Edward the service reserved for regular customers (why didn't he say this earlier?), then ordered a customized dream bubble for you to experience.\nThough you have no idea what he is up to, your instincts fear that what you're about to experience is going to be... beyond your imagination.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你似乎回到了熟悉的空间——怎么回事？
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he's a habitual crossdresser, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nIt seems you have returned to a familiar place... What is going on?

C: 你的█ ██ ██ █注意力彻底被那█ ███ █埃维金男孩夺去了。他到底是██ █ ██ █ 什么来头？还有时间，或许你可以追上█ ███ ██，问问他究竟是什么██ ███ ██ ██。
E: You are c█m█lete██ ██tranc█d by t█e █vgin boy.██ust who ███he? There█s sti█l tim███Mayb█ you ███ catch up ██ h██ and as█ █im exactly wha█ █████████.

C: 你们将那位乐见混乱的假面愚者驱散，听到远方的天空中传来渡鸦的低语——是「梦主」来了，你们深知这一点。\n为了匹诺康尼的未来，现在就前去接引那位昔日的恩人吧。
E: You chase off the Masked Fool who revels in chaos and hear a murmuring of ravens coming from the distant skies... The "Dreammaster" has come, that you are certain.\nFor the sake of Penacony's future, go forth and greet this past benefactor.

C: 尘埃终于落定，新的「开拓」之旅也即将开始。\n返回星穹列车，整理思绪，做好准备，迎接新的冒险吧。
E: Now that the dust has finally settled, a new trailblazing expedition is about to begin.\nGo back to the Astral Express, collect your thoughts, and prepare yourself — for a new adventure.

C: 你来到了一片——长满香蕉的小岛，睡蕉小猴的爱巢！蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉…这里看起来像是筑梦边境，但如果你没记错，筑梦边境应该没有开设动物园的业务。\n看看这猴子是怎么回事吧，万一折纸大学教课的真是猴子呢？
E: You find yourself on... An island full of bananas, a lovely nest for Slumbernana Monkeys! Bana bana... Bana bana... This place resembles Dream's Edge, but as far as you remember, there are no zoos in that area.\nCheck out that bizarre monkey. What if it's actually monkeys teaching at Paperfold University?

C: 这份报告所记录的人，会是自己吗？停云…念起来有些陌生。啊…她说话的声音又传来了，会是某种善意的呼唤吗？
E: The person in these records... could this be you? Tingyun... That name doesn't sound familiar. Ah... You can hear her voice in the distance again. Could this be some kind of friendly call?

C: 纵有万分不舍，也还是到了送别停云小姐的时候——眼下发生的不是重逢，这或许也不算坏消息。重逢如此美好，不如留待今后。\n前往晖长石号与姬子会合。
E: Though you wish it wasn't true, the time has come to bid farewell to Miss Tingyun... This is not a reunion, but maybe that is not such a bad thing. When a reunion is so perfect, it gives you something to look forward to in the future.\nGo to Radiant Feldspar and meet up with Himeko.

C: 名为缇宝的女孩借助奇妙的时空复现能力帮助难民脱离了险境，一行人即将安全奔赴奥赫玛。
E: A girl named Tribbie aids the refugees to lead them out of danger, using her remarkable ability to replicate space and time. The group is now preparing for a safe departure to Okhema.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
E: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

C: {NICKNAME}与白厄、万敌来到了悬锋城。曾经兵戈作响的尚战之邦，如今已成了一座阴森的荒墟。疯溃的尼卡多利就身在这座移动堡垒的深处。
E: {NICKNAME}, Phainon, and Mydei arrive at Castrum Kremnos. What was once a fierce city filled with the clamor of armaments has become a haunting ruin. Deep within this mobile fortress lies the maddened and fallen Nikador.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 我与{NICKNAME}他们失散在这片幻境中。据{NICKNAME}所说，{F#她}{M#他}看到了万敌心中的恐惧：那是来自悬锋一族以血铺就的荣耀……
E: {NICKNAME} and I became separated in this illusion. {NICKNAME} told me that {F#she}{M#he} travelled with Mydei and had seen the man's deepest fear, which was the blood-soaked glory of the Kremnos...

C: 缇安以耗尽神力为代价，将缇宝与缇宁送离战场。城中英雄会合，准备制定战术，救回缇安、围猎「盗火行者」。
E: Depleting her divine power, Trianne manages to send Tribbie and Trinnon away from the battle. The heroes gather in the city to plan tactics for rescuing Trianne and hunting down the Flame Reaver.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的职责。\n根据迷迷所说{NICKNAME}早在车厢坠落中途就已死去，而如今只是一簇行走的记忆。多亏了翁法罗斯当地独特的生死规律，{NICKNAME}尚有一线生机，而找到塞纳托斯变成了不得不优先完成的要务。\n眼下，{NICKNAME}要去找最接近死亡之人确认自身状况。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the authority of Time.\nAccording to Mem, {NICKNAME} had died halfway through the Express's descent, and now is just a walking memory. Thanks to the unique life-death laws of Amphoreus, {NICKNAME} still has a slim chance of survival, and finding Thanatos has become the priority task.\nNow, {NICKNAME} must find the one closest to death to confirm their condition.

C: 元老院如你所料派出了使者抢在阿格莱雅行动前将你带到了黎明云崖。在这里，你将接受众元老们的庇护。\n元老们已经知晓你的到来，跟随传令兵前去会面吧。
E: The Council of Elders dispatched a messenger, as you anticipated, to escort you to Dawncloud before Aglaea could make her move. Here, you will be under the Elders' protection.\nThey await your arrival. Follow the Messenger to meet them.

C: 与风堇一同前往友爱之馆，获取能够补充智库的资料，补充对翁法罗斯的认识。\n找找与阿那克萨戈拉斯有关的资料。
E: Head to the Library of Philia with Hyacine to collect materials for the data bank and expand our understanding of Amphoreus.\nLook for documents related to Anaxagoras.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 克拉特鲁斯向我传达了阿格莱雅的死讯，而随后衣匠发来的短信也证明了他所言非虚，我相当震惊。摆脱「清洗者」的纠缠，我立即赶回奥赫玛，和{NICKNAME}汇合后，向同伴们了解情况…
E: Krateros brought word of Aglaea's death, and the Garmentmaker's message that followed confirmed it, I was stunned. After shaking off the "Cleaners," I returned to Okhema at once. Upon reuniting with {NICKNAME}, I sought out our companions to learn what had happened...

C:
你还记得吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
在那酣醉的迷梦中，山高而陡峻，你看见了自己。
相信我吧，后来的观众啊，他就在那山巅与众人欢歌。
残缺的黄金裔，还有畸形的半神们，他们同他歌唱，旋飞舞，脚跺地。
欧呵！恐惧令他的心震颤：神谕充满每一颗灵魂，狂喜而迷乱。
欧呵！请宽恕他们吧，卡厄斯兰那，请宽恕他们——你那无匹的烈焰令人胆寒！
就让他们歌唱不知疲倦的英雄，歌唱再创世，那酒与蜜奔腾之地。
歌唱他如何在星辰当中加增荣光，永恒之城如何轰然陨落。
奥赫玛人、悬锋城，还有他们所知的一切血脉如何毁灭。
至于卡厄斯兰那——他就在那酣醉的迷梦中，陡峭的山巅！
他用血点燃火焰，火焰点燃血，似太阳逼迫一切邪恶无法抵近。
山高而陡峻，他就在那里独自狂欢，起舞，永不停歇。
但一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
E:
Do you still remember, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
In that drunken dream, the mountains loomed high and steep — and there, you saw yourself.
Believe me, O future witness — he stood atop that peak, and the people sang with him in ecstasy.
The broken Chrysos Heirs, the twisted demigods — they sang, they spun, they stamped their feet upon the ground with him.
Hail! Terror struck his heart: Prophecy burned in every soul, wild with rapture and madness.
Hail! Spare them, Khaslana, spare them — your peerless flame sends chills down every spine!
Let them sing of the tireless heroes, sing of the Era Nova, sing of that land where wine and honey flow in torrents.
Let them sing how he wove new glory among the stars, and how the Eternal City crashed to dust.
How Okhemans, Castrum Kremnos, and every lineage they knew were destroyed.
As for Khaslana — He is still within the drunken dreams, upon the sheer and jagged peak!
There he lights flame with blood, and blood with flame, like a sun whose blaze banished all evil from its path.
The mountains rise cruel and steep. Yet still he dances there alone, wild and unceasing in his joy.
Yet all proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.
All proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.

C: 异乡的故事，异乡的风。
E: Stories of a foreign land, carried on a foreign breeze.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n为了继续访问控制节点，先获取不同扇区的密钥。\n长夜月应该也在那深处的房间里，继续前进吧。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nTo continue accessing the control node, obtain the encryption keys from each sector.\nEvernight is probably in that room deep within. Keep moving.

C:
丹恒，你最信任的列车护卫，「开拓」之旅中最靠谱的伙伴。
他接受了「大地」的神权，只为与你，与黄金裔的伙伴们一起，并肩面对新世界，以及即将到来的决战——仅仅是知道他回到了翁法罗斯，就让你多了一份、不，一百份的安心感。

当他的神识深入无人可及的忆潮中时，他既是层岩，他也是海浪，他还是霜风…
他是大地，亦是其上的万物。
他为你而来，现在你们要为小三月而去。

烈阳已经指明了方向，继续前进吧。
E:
Dan Heng, your most trusted Express Guard, and the most reliable companion on your Trailblaze journey.
He accepted Earth's divine authority, solely to stand alongside you and the Chrysos Heir friends, facing the new world and the impending final clash together. Just knowing he's back in Amphoreus gives you not just one, but a hundred times more peace of mind.

When his consciousness delves into the memoria tide where no one else can reach, he is the bedrock, the waves, and the frosty gales...
He is the Earth and all that exists upon it.
He came for you, and now you will both go for March.

The blazing sun has shown the way. Press onward.

C: 如今翁法罗斯被三重命途之一的「记忆」所裹挟，三月、{NICKNAME}…{F#她们}{M#他们}俩去向不明，能将他们带回的就只有我了。\n如今翁法罗斯迷雾重重，还有一位友人能为我拨云见日。
E: Now Amphoreus is ensnared by the Remembrance, one of the Three Paths, and March and {NICKNAME}... they are nowhere to be found. I'm the only one who can bring them back.\nAmphoreus is shrouded in mystery now, but I have a friend who can help me see through the fog.

C: 铁墓之战，以「毁灭」的落败告终。我在熟悉的车厢中醒来，只是列车似乎不同往日，似有稀客到访……
E: The Battle of Irontomb ended in Destruction's defeat. I woke up in the familiar car, but the Express felt different today, as if some rare visitors had arrived...

C: 倘若世间因果是一条顺流而下的溪涧，那么少女就是被岁月之风吹起、溯流而上的花朵。沿着回望的方向，她踮着脚在水面上播撒着涟漪，圆满了因果、拂留了芬芳，将一切重要的瞬间铭刻于此，慢慢地靠近…那最初的起点。
E: If the world's causality were a stream flowing downstream, then the girl would be a flower, blown against the current by the winds of time. Following her backward gaze, she tiptoes across the water, casting ripples, completing the cycle of cause and effect, and leave a lingering fragrance. Engraving every precious moment here, she gradually draws closer... to that very beginning.

C: 铁墓之战，以「毁灭」的落败告终。我在熟悉的车厢中醒来，只是列车似乎不同往日，似有稀客到访……
E: The Battle of Irontomb ended in Destruction's defeat. I woke up in the familiar car, but the Express felt different today, as if some rare visitors had arrived...

C: 「黑塔」特许通行认证失败、三重权限扼守的神秘舱门、三张散落各处的残破权限卡……\n破碎的拼图一旦还原，背后的谜底即会揭晓。
E: The Space Station Special Permit's failure, the mysterious hatch controlled by three separate access permissions, and three broken access cards found in different places...\nOnce all the puzzle pieces are put together, the mystery behind them will be revealed.

C: 近日，地概科的年轻科员洛奇陷入了重重心事。原来，他一直与暗恋对象保持着通讯，但这一次，对方却没有如期回信。\n考虑到二人一度相谈甚欢，以及他「刚刚表白」这一特殊时间节点，心急如焚的他请求你调查双方联络中断的因由。
E: A young researcher named Rocky from the Department of Cosmic Geography seems to have a lot on his mind lately. As it turns out, he's been keeping in contact with his crush. However, this time, the expected letter of reply from his crush never came.\nThe two never run out of things to talk about, and seeing that he had just confessed his love, he is urgently asking for you to investigate why their communications have abruptly ended.

C: 某位科员的所有物被「军团」怪物抢走，呜呜伯拜托你帮忙夺回来。\n清理空间站的「军团」余孽是防卫科的分内之事，阿兰与你答应了这个请求。
E: A researcher was robbed blind by monsters of the Legion. The Wubbaboo asks you to help retrieve the goods.\nGetting rid of Legion remnants around the space station is the Security Department's job. You and Arlan both agree to this request.

C: 击败被识别程序标记的怪物，收集信标数据。
E: Defeat enemies marked by the recognition system and collect beacon data.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆——史无前例的天才集会！这场面可不多见！\n阮•梅单独把你叫走，看来你无法再听到更多天才们商议的只言片语了…现在你有更要紧的事情去做。
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, and Screwllum: A gathering of geniuses never seen across the span of history! Scenes like this don't happen every day!\nRuan Mei calls you aside. Looks like you won't be able to hear any more snippets of exchanges and proposals between the geniuses. You have more important things to do right now anyway.

C: 老婆婆应该找到她的小孙子了吧，确认一下，你从来都是一个有责任感的人。\n说不定老婆婆一开心，就决定去买下「菌菌」了…这想得有点太美了，不过也是合理的嘛。
E: As someone with a high sense of responsibility, you need to be sure that the old lady has found her grandson.\nPerhaps she will buy "Junjun" out of joy... This sounds unrealistic, but who knows?

C: 嫌疑人果然奔着地髓探针来拍卖会的，如果已经销赃完成，那个时候就为时已晚了。赶紧去抓住嫌疑人！\n等等，这种熟悉的既视感是怎么回事，好像前不久才发生过一次……
E: Of course, the suspect came to the auction for the Geomarrow Probe. It will be too late once they've sold it off, so hurry up and catch them!\nWait, what's this feeling of déjà vu? Like this happened not too long ago...

C: 娜塔莎与她住在上层区的养父母重新建立了沟通，希望能藉由他们在医界的人脉为下层区的病患谋取资源。\n你挑选好了花束，回去找娜塔莎聊聊吧——希望她能对你的选择感到满意。
E: Natasha has reconnected with her adoptive parents living in the Overworld, hoping that their network in the medical community could help the patients in the Underworld obtain more medical resources.\nYou have chosen a flower bouquet. Go back and talk to Natasha again. Hopefully, she will be satisfied.

C: 佩拉和玲可对于如何处置神秘生物产生了分歧——为它拍照？还是及时出手将未知的危险扼杀在摇篮里？女孩们需要做出选择。
E: Pela and Lynx have opposing ideas over what to do with this mysterious creature — take a photo of it? Or to sniff out this dangerous element while they can? The two girls need to make a choice.

C: 你已经成功打入了药王秘传内部。等待青镞的进一步联系吧。
E: You have successfully infiltrated the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Wait for further contact from Qingzu.

C: 在艾丝妲的要求下，你一掷千金，直接让对面删除了联系方式。你不是很理解这种「零花钱的使用方式」，艾丝妲也似乎早有对策。无论如何这都是艾丝妲的钱，还是去问问她到底是作何感想吧。
E: At Asta's request, you spent a ridiculous amount of money and let the other side delete the contact information. You don't quite understand this way of spending pocket money, but Asta seems to have a plan. It's Asta's money anyway, so it's best to ask her what she thinks.

C: 一枚玉扣遗落在地，也许是主人的无心之失，又也许是被有意放在此处。无论是谁为何遗落了它，将它捡起来详加检查一番是个好主意。
E: A jade tracer was dropped here. It could be a moment of absent-mindedness, or it could have been intentionally placed there. No matter what, it would be advisable to investigate it.

C: 星槎的培育分为几个阶段，铖杰师傅想要见证的是，星槎从一枚种子长成一艘大船的过程。\n你也来过几次迴星港，说不定你从未注意过，星槎竟然是从培养舱里长出来的。
E: The cultivation of a starskiff is divided into several phases. Chengjie wanted to see the process between a starskiff seed and a fully cultivated vessel.\nYou have been to Stargazer Navalia a few times, but you probably haven't noticed that starskiffs are grown in an incubator.

C: 黑天鹅开始收集线索，尝试解开花火留下的谜题。你不禁想，花火如此大费周章，究竟是为了什么？但对于花火这样的人来说，考虑「为什么」大概就落了下乘。不如先和黑天鹅一起，玩玩花火留下的推理游戏吧…也许这其中就隐藏着花火的真实目的。
E: Black Swan begins collecting clues, trying to solve the puzzle that Sparkle left behind. You can't help but wonder why Sparkle would go through all this effort. However, when it comes to people like Sparkle, asking "why" normally means you are on the wrong track. Why not play with Black Swan the logic game that Sparkle left behind... Perhaps Sparkle's true motive is concealed within.

C: 纷乱的渡口，被押解运送的犯人逃脱，少年剑士霜锋出鞘，却被人捷足先登。
E: The escorted prisoner attempts to escape amidst the chaos at the harbor. The young swordsman's frosty blade unsheathes, but someone else was a step ahead of him.

C: 受怀炎将军所遣，三月七与云璃登上竞锋舰参与演武仪典。除了要在擂台上争逐胜利，她们还要承担起抵御危机，戍守擂台的职责。只是，初登场的少女剑士难免心怀忐忑……
E: General Huaiyan tasks March 7th and Yunli with boarding the Skysplitter and participating in the Wardance. Apart from striving for victory in the arena, they must also take up the responsibility of defending the arena against potential crises. However, the young swordswoman who will be making her debut can't help but feel anxious at such a prospect...

C: 蒂索克二世——曾经的暴君，现在的善人。无论历史会如何评价她的一生，你现在都该和她告别了。
E: Tizocic II — once a tyrant, now a kind soul. Regardless of how history evaluates her life, you should say your goodbyes to her now.

C: 我应该从来没亲手杀过人。\n母亲死前对我说，宫廷斗争是一场零和游戏，想要自己活下去，就必须要让别人活不下去。但是——她补充道——绝对不要亲自动手杀人，那会使你感受到生命的重量，而那重量是你承受不住的。\n当我发现自己只要说上几句话，就能让一个人从世界上消失以后，事情对我来说就变得越来越简单了。
E: I don't think I've ever killed anyone with my own hands.\nBefore my mother died, she told me — the battles of the court are zero-sum games. If you want to survive, you have to ensure others cannot. However, she emphasized that you should never kill anyone with your own hands. You will bear the weight of the life you took, and it will be more than you could ever bear.\nOnce I realized that I could erase someone's existence from the world with just a few words, things became much easier for me.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 了解到了巴罗的真实过往，或许该把这些情况都记录下来。
E: You learned Barlow's true history. Maybe you should note all this down.

C: 你聘请了智械冷芯为新任大副，替你打理飞艇。新上任的第一天，你想听听他对飞艇事务的看法。
E: You have hired Caldwick, an Intellitron, as the new first mate to manage your airship. On his first day reporting to duty, you want to hear his thoughts on airship affairs.

C: 冷芯请你与他一起到长廊视察，似乎有些事项在等着你处理。
E: Caldwick invites you to inspect the long gallery together. Some affairs seem to require your attention.

C: 为了拯救青雀，你联系了正在梦境中寻找邪恶组织线索的波提欧和银枝。\n巡海游侠和纯美骑士及时赶到，现在你有底气和「四尺圣堂」的信众们对峙了。
E: In order to save Qingque, you have contacted Boothill and Argenti, who are searching for clues about a certain evil organization in the Dreamscape.\nWith the Galaxy Ranger and the Knight of Beauty arriving just in time, you are now filled with the courage to confront the believers of the Four-Foot Hall.

C: 打算寻短见的帕西提亚…得赶快找到她才行！
E: Pasithea is thinking of taking her own life... You must find her quickly!

C: 发现了一只看上去很着急的呜呜伯，去问问它发生了什么要紧事吧。
E: You come across a Wubbaboo that looks anxious. Go and ask it what's going on.

C: 鼹鼠党的尤利安在这里东张西望，似乎在盘算着什么…该不该和他搭话呢？
E: Julian of the Moles is looking around here, as if planning something... Should you talk to him?

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知艾格尼斯发布了委托，想要行使她的正当权益。帮帮艾格尼斯！
E: You see that Agnes has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise her rightful rights. Go help Agnes!

C: 不甘落败的棋鬼又准备了新的「寻径指津」谜题，是时候让它输得心服口服了。
E: Unwilling to accept defeat, the Chess Ghost has prepared a new Pathfinder puzzle. It's time to make it acknowledge defeat gracefully.

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 「仲裁官」的试炼再度到来。它的内容、形式、好处和损害你已经很清楚了，不是吗？去吧，为了「均衡」……
E: The Arbitrator's trial is here once again. You are already well aware of its content, format, pros, and cons, aren't you? Go then. For the sake of Equilibrium...

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 请与医疗科员乔安沟通，帮忙补足列车物资。
E: Speak with the staff member of the Medical Department, Joanne, and help to replenish provisions on the Express.

C: 清理残响回廊，击败在此处出没的所有裂界怪物。
E: Clear out the Corridor of Fading Echoes and defeat all of the Fragmentum monsters roaming in the area.

C: 与守卫迴星港的云骑兵交谈，看看他们是否需要帮助。
E: Talk to the Cloud Knights guarding Stargazer Navalia and see if they need any help.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 两位小贩前脚刚走，汹涌的黑潮造物便接踵而来。\n这种小事何必你亲力亲为？你决定交给柯库翁发挥。
E: Right after the two merchants left, the raging creatures of the black tide come forth.\nWhy waste your strength on such a trifling matter? You decide to leave it to Glykon.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你找到贝洛伯格知名画家雷比尼，从他手中取得约定交付的画作。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to collect a commissioned piece from Belobog's famed painter, Rebini.

C: 金人巷应该有了新的进展，要回去看看吗？\n常回金人巷看看。
E: There should be new developments at Aurum Alley. Would you like to go back and check it out?\nVisit Aurum Alley regularly

C: 想要成为冠军，必须先组建一支强大的队伍。\n收集游离数据，捕捉属于自己的以太灵吧！
E: You must build a powerful team before you can become the champion.\nCollect roaming data and capture Aether Spirits of your own!

C: 寒鸦大人一手促成了捉鬼小队的成立，向她汇报一下太卜司中的情况。
E: Madam Hanya single-handedly established the ghost-hunting squad. Report to her about the situation in the Divination Commission.

C: 「云骑失控」…若非堕入魔阴身，便是有岁阳妖异作乱。顺着求助帖所言，你们来到丹鼎司查探情况，却意外得知一个更不妙的消息：将军的侍卫彦卿曾来到此处，与那失控的云骑对了一剑，随即离去。而在这名云骑的供述中，他声称自己的刀上有个声音同他说起话来。\n岁阳妖物擅于摆布人心，若是让它扰乱彦卿的心智，那一切可就危险的很了！
E: A Cloud Knight out of control... if it isn't a case of mara-struck, then it would be the work of a heliobus. Following the description in the post, you make your way to the Alchemy Commission to investigate, only to accidentally run into an even more distressing piece of news. The general's retainer, Yanqing, had arrived here and crossed swords with the frenzied Cloud Knight, then left. According to the knight's testimony, a mysterious voice emanated from his own sword and spoke to him.\nHeliobi are known masters of manipulating others' minds. If they ensnare Yanqing, the consequences would be dire!

C: 在景元将军的帮助下，你们顺利渡过了罗浮上下鲜为人知的「秘密危机」。捉鬼小队功劳不少，去问问寒鸦大人，看看她是怎么说的吧。
E: With General Jing Yuan's assistance, you have protected Luofu from the hidden peril that few are aware of. The ghost-hunting squad contributed quite a lot to it. Ask Madam Hanya about her thoughts on this matter.

C: 你见到了坠入自己野心中的青雀。她让你感到有些…陌生。但没关系，她决定给你一个发财的机会，可别说做朋友的不关照你啊。
E: You meet Qingque, who has been consumed by her own ambitions. She feels rather... alien to you, but regardless, she decides to offer you a chance to get rich. You certainly can't say that she didn't look after you as a friend.

C: 一切都结束了。你仍沉浸在「博识尊」的数据带来的震撼之中，然而黑塔却把你叫去了……她似乎发现了一些不同寻常的东西——小机器人发展出的「自由意志」。
E: It's all over. While you are still immersed in the shock brought by the data of Nous, Herta calls on you... She seems to have discovered something unusual — the little robot has developed "free will."

C: 功能分区很成功，该回去找保姆机器人汇报下你的成果了，造物们现在都很懂事，想必接下来机器人和你的培育工作都能轻松不少。
E: Splitting the place into functional areas was a great success. Time to go back and report to the Helper Robot with these results. The creations are really compliant now, and you trust that your nurturing work with the Helper Robot is going to be much easier from now on.

C: 杰伊将今日美食所需的食材整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给他吧！
E: Jay has listed all the ingredients required for today's catering menu. Once you have gathered all of the ingredients, bring them to him!

C: 许多监狱区划都被这些古怪的迷钟占据了。你需要想办法修好它们，以免影响美梦小镇的重建工作。
E: Many prison areas have been taken over by these strange Tickers. You have to find a way to fix them, so they don't interfere with the rebuilding of Dreamville.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n在酒吧里听见了争吵的声音，究竟发生了什么事呢？
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nIt appears there's an argument going on in the lounge. What's happening?

C: 不知所踪的「沉眠」出现在了这里…它似乎想说什么。
E: The missing "Dormancy" has appeared here... It seems to be trying to say something.

C: 花火送给你们一枚奇怪的镜头，它究竟有什么妙用？\n以三月七为模特，试试看「镜头万花筒」的效果吧。
E: Sparkle gifted you a weird lens. What does it actually do?\nTry the effects of the "Camereidoscope" with March 7th as your model

C: 「摄影展览」的颁奖典礼即将开幕，三月七究竟能否获得奖项呢？去见证这个激动人心的时刻吧！
E: The award ceremony for the Photography Exhibition is about to begin. Will March 7th be able to win a prize? Go and witness this exciting moment!

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「扎格列斯之手」。只有完成它的试炼才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogea is protected by a seal, and this one is controlled by the "Hand of Zagreus." You will need to complete its trial before you can continue any further.

C: 你们越走越深，来到了一片颇为空旷的房间。
E: As you enter deeper and deeper, you find yourself in an open and spacious room.

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯即将代替山之民达利安与你对垒，让它瞧瞧老牌小海豹战队的底蕴。
E: Spirithief Bartholos will replace the Mountain Dweller Dorian against you. Show it the true strength of a veteran baby seal squad!

C: 从「预言梦」中醒来时，你没料到竟会发生这么多事。\n梦会在回忆中慢慢消散，连欢乐的回忆本身都会悄然消失，尽可能留下这一刻吧。
E: When you rouse from the prophetic dream, you didn't expect so much to have happened.\nThe dream, and even the memories of happiness, will slowly fade away in your memories. Try your best to memorialize this moment.

C: 奥赫玛的某处，一场久违的谈话正在进行……
E: Somewhere in Okhema, a long-awaited conversation is happening...

C: 布凯辛和梅透娜手中的测试数据似乎是黑塔的手笔，现在你明白为什么一定要你来参加测试了。\n黑塔全责。
E: The testing data that Grumpy and Metauna have all seem to be penned by Herta's hand. Now you understand why they had to have you come to do the testing.\nThis is all Herta's doing.

C: 萧瑟
E: Bleak Note

C: 他好像干劲满满。
E: Full of enthusiasm.

C: 我的同伴刃被云骑军带走了，我要把他带回来，解除这次的星核危机，洗脱我们的嫌疑。
E: My companion Blade has been taken away by the Cloud Knights. I want to bring him back, resolve this Stellaron crisis, and clear our names.

C: 联盟是由六艘漂航巨舰「仙舟」组成的同盟，他们追随「巡猎」的岚，以消灭星神「丰饶」为使命。
E: The Alliance is made up of six great ships, all following Lan, The Hunt. Its mission is to eliminate the Aeon of Abundance.

C: 是吗？啧，那可能她特别喜欢你吧……
E: Oh yeah? Huh, maybe she really liked you...

C: 这不是姬子说了算吗？
E: Doesn't Himeko have the final say?

C: 呃，冷静下来转念一想，万一那女人没撒谎，我们不去仙舟会有很多无辜者受害耶…现在不是任性的时候…嘻嘻。
E: *sigh* I calmed down and thought about it a bit. If it turns out that woman isn't lying, then a lot of innocent people are gonna get hurt... Now's the time for thinking about other people... hehe *sigh*

C: 对仙舟人来说，这艘船就是他们的「星球」。
E: For Xianzhou natives, these ships are their planets.

C: 不瞒你说，好几次我都想去助你们一臂之力；但是姬子说，要让孩子们自己体会一次开拓的不易……
E: I gotta say, there were more than a few times where I wanted to lend a hand... but Himeko said I should let you youngsters rise to the trailblazing challenges...

C: …我觉得，很难。并非没有可能，但过程无疑会十分艰辛。
E: I'd say it's unlikely. I guess it's possible, but it would take a long time.

C: 谢谢列车长！
E: Thank you, conductor!

C: 「毁灭」纳努克的打手。你们运气很好，最危险的{RUBY_B#「毁灭」的令使}绝灭大君{RUBY_E#}不在附近，来的只是一群四处作恶的散兵游勇。
E: Goons owned by the Destruction. You're lucky that the most dangerous {RUBY_B#Emanator of Destruction}Lord Ravager{RUBY_E#} among them isn't around, just some nasty minions.

C: 我不记得放哪儿了……
E: But where did I put it...

C: 我真的很生气诶，明明所有科员都完成避难了，他还不服从命令，非要再次搜查收容舱段。
E: I'm very upset he didn't obey my orders and insisted on searching the storage zone even though everyone had already evacuated.

C: 我问完了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 我跟你说，这次袭击空间站的怪物多达数十种，还有一些是站内谱系都没收录的新型造物——
E: You know, there's loads of monsters attacking the space station this time, and some of them aren't even on the station's records—

C: 如果这把枪给的分数是随机的，那可真是个狡猾的恶作剧。
E: It would be a devious prank indeed if this gun was just dishing out random scores.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着赛飞儿：「<unbreak>0.894</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Cipher: "<unbreak>0.894</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 末日兽撕开防护罩易如反掌，黑塔不在，这儿的防御系统对反物质军团来说太过脆弱。
E: The Doomsday Beast can rip off the defense shield like tearing paper — and Herta's not here. The station's defenses are too weak to stand against the Antimatter Legion.

C: 还有疑惑？好啊，我对你有兴趣，愿意回答你的问题。
E: Still haven't made up your mind? Fine. Since I'm interested in you, I'll answer any questions you have.

C: 站长也要注意休息。
E: Make sure you don't burn yourself out.

C: 还想和姬子聊聊。
E: I still have something to talk to you about, Himeko.

C: 强如末日兽，也不过手下败…
E: Even the Doomsday Beast, is no match...

C: 姬子总喜欢在各种地方捡些奇奇怪怪的破烂玩意儿回来修理。
E: Himeko always likes to bring back weird junk and try to fix it.

C: 虽然不想承认，但他们的商品种类确实齐全。
E: Pom-Pom doesn't wanna admit it, but they really do have everything you may need on sale.

C: 姬子很喜欢听留声机，说能播放来自过去的旋律。
E: Himeko likes using the Phonograph a lot. She says it can play melodies from the past.

C: 这不是我家，只是睡觉的地方。
E: This is not my pad, it's just where I sleep.

C: 我们推测星穹列车是从裴迦纳出发，沿途停靠，并最终回到起点，再开启下一段旅程。但是由于星核的出现，每一站都发生了延误。
E: We speculate the Astral Express started its journey from Pegana, stopping at each destination along the way before returning there for its next journey. However, the appearance of the Stellarons has caused a delay at each stop.

C: 那关我什么事？
E: What's this got to do with me?

C: 因为战斗是最能展示命途倾向的行为。只有通过与命途的连接，才能把我们设计好的虚拟「星神」召唤出来。这些家伙虽然没什么本事，麻烦程度上却一点不比本尊逊色……
E: Because combat is the best way to connect with one's Path. Only then can we summon those simulated Aeons. Those guys don't have any special talents, but they are as much a real pain in the butt as the actual gods...

C: 星神将我们的星球与其它世界相连，我们得知了浩瀚银河中的无数可能，也听说了「琥珀王」克里珀——在祂的注视下，我们开始筑建城墙。
E: An Aeon connected our planet to other worlds, and we discovered the endless possibilities of the boundless universe. We also came to know of Qlipoth, the Amber Lord. Under THEIR attentive gaze, we built the city walls.

C: 君命无二——
E: Two Pair...

C: 供暖器为什么在外面？
E: Why is the heater outside?

C: 裂界侵蚀都蔓延到城市里了呀…怪不得那条巷道里全是士兵。
E: I can't believe Fragmentum corrosion has spread into the city... No wonder there are so many soldiers stationed there.

C: 小朋友们还有什么想问的吗？慢慢来，时间还有很多。
E: And what about you guys? Take your time, we're not in a rush.

C: 可可利亚…我们已经好多年没说过话了。曾经我和她是很好的朋友，彼此之间无话不谈。
E: Cocolia... It's been so many years since we last spoke. We were great friends once — there was nothing we wouldn't share.

C: 知道啊。虽然没亲眼见过，但我利用模拟实验和外派勘测做了粗略的定位。
E: Yes. I never observed it directly, but I used lab simulations and outbound surveys to establish a rough location.

C: 都说了不许拆……
E: No! I told you, we're not gonna take it apart...

C: 嗯。我想永远对民众保持诚实…但我更想「存护」住他们的希望。
E: Mm... I'd prefer to be honest with the people... but I also want to preserve their hope.

C: …嘿，吵架我可是很在行的。
E: ...Hmph, they won't go on forever if I win them.

C: 咦，佩拉和虎克也在？怎么说，要不要把她俩也拍进去？
E: Oh, Pela and Hook are here too? Let's make sure we get them in the background!

C: 怎么突然问这个？
E: Why are you asking this all of a sudden?

C: 理解理解。那这件事就拜托你啦。
E: I understand. I'm counting on you!

C: …「超电磁流射演奏器」，简称「电吉他」。
E: ...the "super electromagnetic flux player," or "electric guitar" for short.

C: 希露瓦，这桌上的是什么？
E: Serval, what's this on the desk?

C: 这你就不知道了，老弟——我俩当年的关系好到不分彼此，任何好东西都会拿来分享。
E: I don't think anyone realized, but back then we were so close we didn't even differentiate between each other's possessions. We shared pretty much everything.

C: 那可是兰黛尔祖先留下来的传家宝…你多少也该爱护一下吧。
E: It's a family heirloom — it belonged to Rhonda once... You should take care of it.

C: 呼…总算收拾完了。这行李恐怕不比从士官学校毕业时少……
E: Phew... finally. I think I must have left cadet school with about the same amount...

C: 尝试全拿出来。<color=#dbc291ff>「智识等级≥1」</color>
E: Try to take them all out.<color=#dbc291ff> "Erudition level ≥ 1"</color>

C: 堆成了小山的文件，显示出无纸化办公的必要性。
E: A mound of piled-up documents. They clearly demonstrate the need for a paperless office.

C: 拼好。
E: Piece them back together.

C: 你耸耸肩，离它而去。世界上每时每刻都有人出生，患病，死去，宇宙中未被妥投的邮件数以亿计，这一只又特殊在哪里？
E: You shrug and leave. Every passing moment, people are being born into this world, getting sick in this world, dying in this world. There are countless letters that don't make it to their recipients. What's so special about this one?

C: 一捧凋谢的花，它的恒温罩子已经碎了。
E: Some withered flowers whose thermal dome is broken.

C: 干垃圾！
E: Dry garbage!

C: 既然醒了就活动活动身子吧。我是娜塔莎，地下的医生。你已经在我的诊所里躺了一整天了。
E: Well, now that you're awake, you should probably try moving your limbs. I'm Natasha — a doctor in the underground. You've already spent a day in my clinic.

C: 下层区？你想了解些什么？
E: The Underworld? What do you want to know?

C: …我说怎么小孩子也能玩「搏击」，这不就是猜拳吗！
E: Fists, palms, and fingers... *gasp* Rock, paper, scissors! Phew! No wonder I was confused!

C: 冷面小粉龙！
E: Cold Dragon Younger and Cold Dragon Youngest?

C: 呃，咱们接着走吧，要找的人不在……
E: Hmm, let's keep moving. The person I was looking for isn't here...

C: 这确实是地下的法则，但流浪者们叫嚷着自己的规矩：见者有份。
E: As it happens, that's exactly the law we have down here. But the vagrants have their own custom: See it, share it.

C: …嗯…嗯？蘑菇汤，哪有蘑菇汤？希儿小姐？
E: Hm...? Wha...? Mushroom bread...? I can't see it on the menu... Miss Seele?

C: 啊，那个红衣服的小姑娘怎么办？大机器人要把她带走了！
E: Ah! What about the girl in red? That robot is gonna take her away!

C: 不不不，我可是来真的！你把我们弄到地下来，到底有什么企图！
E: Wait a minute, we're not done here! You dragged us to the underground — so what's the big idea?

C: 桑博？
E: Sampo?

C: 你没回答我的问题。
E: You didn't answer the question.

C: 「地火」想做什么？
E: What do Wildfire want?

C: 我们犯的是什么罪过？
E: What crime have we committed?

C: 在表明意图之后，「大守护者」中断了对话，随后派兵捉拿我们。如今想来，她当时的态度确有蹊跷。
E: After we revealed our intentions, the supreme guardian suspended communications and sent soldiers to arrest us. Her reaction was strange, to say the least.

C: 算了，之后再继续讨论吧。
E: Uhh, that'll do for now.

C: 你似乎很疲惫。不用勉强自己，交给我吧。
E: You seem pretty exhausted, don't overexert yourself. I'll do it.

C: 钢板和绷带，医用酒精，还有止痛剂…记住了，小菜一碟。
E: Metal plates and bandages, rubbing alcohol, and painkillers... Got it, piece of cake.

C: 虎克和老爹的生日就快到了！每年这个时候，虎克和老爹会为对方准备好礼物，一起庆祝生日。
E: Hook and daddy's birthday is approaching! Every year at this time, we exchange gifts and celebrate our birthday together.

C: 哟，原来是大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}啊。刚才忙晕了没仔细看，失敬失敬！
E: Hey, it's the famous {NICKNAME}! I was too busy to look carefully just now, sorry about that!

C: 我要参加下一场比赛。
E: I want to be in the next match.

C: 这是何等的强而有力！观众们啊，将你们的喝彩献给今天的赢家吧——让我们共同纪念这场足以载入搏击俱乐部历史的精彩对决吧！
E: What a marvelous power to behold! Spectators, give your applause to today's winner. Let's commemorate a fight that will go down in the Fight Club's history together!

C: 下次可以手机群发…
E: Maybe next time we can send a group notification...

C: 咱本来就没多少财产…
E: It's not like we have much to will to anyone in the first place.

C: 但是对于那些在封锁年代里出生、长大的孩子们而言——这就是生命崭新的开始。
E: But for the children who were born into this era, who grew up in this isolation... this will be a new life altogether.

C: …我知道你想说，这根本不算是什么好处。不过只想着要好处，大人也太急功近利了吧。
E: ...But I know what you mean. There's nothing in it for you at all. Only thinking of benefits — grownups are so greedy for cheap thrills.

C: 再说了，这个作者写书写得很慢，下一本书又不知道要等到什么时候了。
E: Besides, the author writes very slowly. I don't know how long I'll have to wait for the next book.

C: 你为什么要调查一根路灯？它又没有任何作用。
E: Why are you investigating a street lamp? It doesn't do anything.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 欢迎收听今天的星际和平播报节目。首先为您介绍今天节目的主要内容。
E: Welcome to a new episode of Interastral Peace Broadcast. We are here to bring you the latest news from across the galaxy.

C: 巴兰扎熔炉是联觉信标的重要加工基地。此次袭击将对公司的边境拓荒事业造成不可忽视的影响。
E: Baranza Forge plays a vital role in the manufacturing of Synesthesia Beacons. The implications of this assault will undoubtedly influence the IPC's frontier pioneering efforts.

C: 这么可怕？你不是说她为人很和善嘛？
E: Sounds scary. I thought you said she was kind-hearted?

C: 你对我的误会可大了。
E: I feel offended.

C: 这叫内行看门道，外行看热闹。
E: The connoisseur appreciates the artistry, and the layman enjoys the show.

C: 那样很好，{NICKNAME}，但你要小心：猎手的每一次出现或许都是暗示，为了修正未来的方向……
E: That's good, {NICKNAME}, but be careful — maybe the Stellaron Hunters showing up is a sign that they're trying to change the future...

C: 她真的这么放心吗？未来的可能几乎是无限的，她如此坦然，反而让我觉得：她真的有把握证明自己和这次的星核危机无关。
E: ...but is she really as calm as she seems? The future holds almost infinite possibilities, after all. I suspect she has proof that she has nothing to do with the Stellaron crisis.

C: 多谢{F#叔叔姐姐}{M#哥哥姐姐}帮忙稳定病患的情绪啦，这一手「重击麻醉」技术相当了得啊。
E: Thanks for helping to stabilize the patients — your "assertive sedation" techniques are quite effective.

C: 与此同时，在罗浮的另一边…
E: Concurrently, at the other end of the Luofu...

C: 我懂我懂，这种感觉……
E: I get it. This feeling...

C: 那口棺材里是什么？
E: What's in that coffin?

C: …唉，真是一点都没叫错。
E: *sigh* ...I mean, you're kinda living up to the first bit right now.

C: 你不想去星槎海吗？
E: Do you not want to go to Starskiff Haven?

C: 痕迹…消失了？是「谛听」失灵了吗？
E: The traces... where did they go? Is Diting malfunctioning?

C: 这个妹妹我曾见过的。
E: ...I can put my hand on my heart and say I remember this fine lady.

C: 有言在先，要是真遇上了卡芙卡，请恩公们自管自动手。小女子什么忙也帮不了，能做的也就是在一旁瑟瑟发抖，加油鼓劲什么的啦～
E: Just to warn you, if we do run into Kafka, you'll have to do the fighting, benefactors. I'd love to help, but there's very little I can do except cheer you on from the side lines~

C: 咳咳！对本座的说话方式有意见，不妨直说。
E: Ahem! If the method of my speech is offensive to you, you need but say.

C: 我明白了。但将军曾许诺与我们共享情报。卡芙卡交代的每一个字我们都有权知情。
E: Understood. However, the general promised that all intel would be shared with us. We have a right to know anything that Kafka divulges.

C: 太卜大人，您回来了！
E: Master diviner! You're back!

C: 快去吧。一旦丹炉熄灭，烟气散去，本座立即赶来。
E: Hurry. I will come at once when the crucibles are doused and the smoke dissipates.

C: 时间过去太久了，也不知当年的封印是否仍在…就算在，恐怕也挡不住那个幽魂般的绝灭大君。
E: It has been so long — no one knows whether the seal remains... Even if it does, I doubt it will hinder that spectral Lord Ravager.

C: 您是受选之人，资质不可限量，但云吟术毕竟是基础……
E: You are indeed the chosen one, with endless potential... yet cloudhymn magic is just the beginning.

C: 你以为变成这副样子就能逃得掉么？！逃得掉么……
E: You think changing form will help you escape!? Escape...

C: 巡猎未已，又要同邪魔交战…哼哼，此役之后，不论罗浮存在与否，联盟必与军团不死不休。
E: The Hunt is far from over, yet all the while we find ourselves at war with other evil spirits... Hmph, from this battle onward, the Alliance must fight the Legion to our dying breath, even if it means the end of the Luofu.

C: 军团从未对联盟出手。在情报里，他们是一群疯狂破坏的战争机器。大意啦，七大君各自的军团都有鲜明的风格，真不好办。
E: Our intelligence tells us that the Legion are a mad and destructive war machine, yet they never took up arms against the Alliance. The armies of the Seven Ravagers all have their own means of destruction — they are not to be taken lightly.

C: 「叩祝三爪，朝觐尺木」，指的便是这里。受龙力遏制，建木玄根成了龙形木瘿的姿态。
E: "Reverence to the three talons, the path to the great roots..." This is it. Under the power of the high elder, the Arbor's roots have formed into the image of a dragon.

C: 一只带蹼的小手轻轻压在珍珠质地、半透明的晶壳上，若隐若现。你略带好奇地将手指放在这只小手上，隔着晶壳，彼此相对。
E: A small webbed hand can be faintly seen inside lightly pressing against its pearlescent, translucent shell. You press your fingers up against the outline of the small hand, your touch only separated by the crystal shell.

C: 这画上描述的…是持明族之卵在波月古海蜕生，再世为人的开端。
E: This mural describes the Vidyadhara hatching rebirth in the Lunarescent Depths — the beginning of self-reincarnation.

C: 要碾碎蝼蚁，没有比坠下一颗星星更合适的了。
E: Crushing an ant with the weight of a star — how indulgent.

C: 符玄在的时候怎么不求她？
E: Why didn't you ask Fu Xuan for help while she was here?

C: 既然不能摆脱此身作为丹枫时造就的因果，我想更清楚地了解他的过去。我想看看自己能做些什么，弥补旧日的宿业。
E: It seems I won't be able to cast off Dan Feng's negative karma... so I'd like to learn more about his past. I want to find out what I can do to make up for his sins.

C: 你知道这些东西该往哪儿送了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Do you know where we're supposed to take these things, {NICKNAME}?

C: 你知不知道尚滋味这家店？
E: Have you heard of Spices Supreme?

C: 冒险游历固然令人心潮澎湃，但适时放松也是非常重要的。
E: Well, adventures are exhilarating, but rest and recuperation is equally important.

C: 怎么说，我们现在就去和他们会合吧？
E: Mm... Shall we go meet up with them now?

C: 这是什么地方？
E: What is this place?

C: …我们到了。
E: ...We're here.

C: 酒店安保是雪上加霜，容不得半点闪失。突然发生这种事，真不是这位小姐能说了算的——星穹列车的各位，就别难为人家啦。
E: Hotel security is on high alert, with zero room for error. And with such a last minute change, it really isn't something that this young lady's words can resolve on a whim. My esteemed guests from the Astral Express, please do not make it harder for her.

C: 不打不相识，朋友！现在我们就算真正认识了。
E: What're friends without friction! Now we're truly acquainted.

C: 好了，现在大堂也没人排队，我们去找艾丽小姐吧……
E: Okay, there's no queue in the lobby now. Let's go find Miss Alley...

C: …我在听。
E: ...I'm listening.

C: （不，必须是您熟悉的人——除非您对声音的还原度没有要求。）
E: (Well, it must be someone you're close to, unless you're willing to accept a very unpleasant listening experience.)

C: 当然有。
E: Of course there is.

C: 你们驾驶雪地车闯入泰科铵大球馆，扰乱会场秩序，致使比赛中断，并导致二十名开拓客和你们一起无偿劳动三个月，以修复大球馆外立面的严重损毁——
E: You rode snowmobiles into the Taikiyan Stadium and disrupted the match, causing the match to be suspended. Because of you, Twenty Trailblazers were forced to repair the severely damaged exterior of the stadium for three months without pay...

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: （也许吧，但我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Perhaps it is, but I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: 无名客这么有名？
E: Are the Nameless really that famous?

C: 欸，风险？为什么？钟表小子可是匹诺康尼家喻户晓的大明星，应该没什么问题…吧。
E: Ominous? Clockie is a household name here. There would never be anything ominous about him... right?

C: 你竟然不知道？他可是匹诺康尼历史上的传奇大亨，梦境世界的奠基人，将「梦想」化作现实的人！
E: I can't believe you haven't heard of him. He was a legendary tycoon in the history of Penacony — the founder of the Dreamscape, the man who turned dreams into reality!

C: 我会，报答你！到大树，去！到大树，去！我会，给，你好看的！
E: I'll... repay your kindness! Go to... the tree! Please go... there! There! I'll show... you something... nice!

C: 在匹诺康尼之梦中，有许多物品、设施受到忆质影响，拥有了自我意识。它们被家族驯化，成为了服务宾客的美梦剧团。
E: In Penacony, many objects and facilities have gained self-awareness due to the influence of the memoria. After being tamed by The Family, some of them formed the Sweet Dreams Troupe to provide entertainment for guests.

C: 天啊，头等奖…你的运气也太好了吧！
E: Holy moly, it's the grand prize... Today must be your lucky day!

C: 你说得对，所以你将手伸向了面前这台可疑的电视……
E: You reach out to the suspicious screen in front of you...

C: 天啊……
E: Wait, what...

C: 你的名字叫作「哈努兄弟」，耿直而沉默，是匹诺康尼最负盛名的长篇动画《钟表小子》里擅长各种正常或非正常武器的正义使者，狼人老大哥。
E: Your name is Hanu, a candid and taciturn figure — a messenger of justice and leader of the werewolves versed in conventional and unconventional arms from Penacony's famous, long-form cartoon, Clockie.

C: 「好吧，那我该做些什么？」——你已经完全理解了状况，决定向你的老朋友请教接下来该如何行动，但你的人物设定不允许你这么做。
E: "Alright, then what should I do?" You already completely understand the situations, and decide to ask your old friend about what actions you should take next, but your character design doesn't permit you to do such a thing.

C: （桑博…到底是什么意思？流萤在隐瞒什么吗？）
E: (What did Sampo mean? Is Firefly hiding something?)

C: 噢，看吧，看吧！我没有撒谎！米沙遇到危险啦！
E: See? I wasn't lying! Misha really is in trouble!

C: 也许我们都对「忆质」有所反应，才能察觉这些梦中的不可思议之物。而你比我更敏锐。
E: We can both perceive these extraordinary things in the dream, probably due to our ability to react to memoria. But you're more attuned to it than I am.

C: 呵呵。
E: Hehe.

C: 朋友，您要不然…
E: My friend, why don't you go and...

C: …找个地方静一静？
E: How about you get some alone time somewhere?

C: <size=36>是！老大！</size>
E: <size=36>Yes, boss!</size>

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。真没想到这么快就再会了。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I'm surprised we get to see each other again so soon.

C: 当然，也多亏了你。如果没有你施展的钟表把戏，美梦小镇可就要陷入麻烦啦！
E: Of course, you played a big part too. Without you doing the Clockwork, Dreamville would've been in some real trouble!

C: 我们到了，就是这里。
E: Here we are. This is the place.

C: 啊，两位尊贵的客人…欢迎来到匹诺康尼。
E: Ah, honored guests... Welcome to Penacony.

C: 噢，当然不能。
E: Oh, no way.

C: 那，我们上吧——把它们赶跑！
E: Let's get rid of them!

C: （联系不上啊……）
E: (Can't get in touch with...)

C: 我还没同意呢！
E: But I haven't agreed to anything!

C: 我不信你会被关进垃圾袋里。
E: I don't believe you were sealed in the trash bag.

C: 踢门一脚。
E: Kick the door.

C: 但如果那时，我选择拔刀的话……
E: But if in that moment, I chose to draw my blade...

C: 可以了，愚者。你的作为令我心寒。
E: That's enough Fool. Your deeds have saddened me.

C: 你再次敲了敲门。她没有回应。
E: You knock again, but there's no response...

C: 你…又迷路了？
E: You... lost your way again?

C: 是啊。是什么让她这么紧张？
E: Yes. What is making her so nervous?

C: 这只是一种最坏的假设。但不妨想想，如果这一切的始作俑者就在附近，他为何会放任我们四处搜查？除非……
E: This is just the worst-case scenario. But think about it: If the mastermind behind all this is nearby, why would he let us look around freely? Unless...

C: 剧本指导\n艾利欧
E: Script Supervisor\nElio

C: 表面上看，这场交易对你没有坏处。但砂金是个精明的商人，算盘绝不会只有表面那么简单。
E: On the surface, this doesn't look like a bad deal for you. But Aventurine is a shrewd merchant whose scheme won't just be as simple as it appears to be.

C: 无论如何，谨慎些吧。「开拓」的道路不止一条，在群狼环伺的黑暗森林中，你首先要确保自己能够逃出生天。
E: Anyway, be careful out there. There's more than one way to blaze a trail. In a dark forest beset by wolves ensuring your own escape to safety should be your primary concern.

C: …不行！本姑娘可不能接受这种理由！
E: ...No! I can't accept this!

C: 嗯。保持联络。
E: I will. Keep in touch.

C: …以后不会再有了。
E: ...There'll be no next time.

C: …路呢？
E: ...A dead end?

C: 如果我没猜错，我们得在这座大厅里找到开门的方法，否则此地就是你我的监牢。
E: If I'm not wrong, we need to find a way to open this door in the hall, or this place will be our prison.

C: 看，严丝合缝，堪称完美——呃，接下来呢？
E: Look, the gap is closed, and it fits perfectly — eh, so what's next?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>扭蛋机</color>…地上没有能操作的地方，是头顶上那个？教授，帮我个小忙——
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Capsule machine</color>... There's no mechanism on the floor. Could there be one at the top? Doctor, do me a favor —

C: 当然，您不会因此损失什么，我只想取回本属于自己的东西：人身自由，还有家族保管下的随身物品——那袋礼金，还有……
E: Naturally, you wouldn't incur any loss from this. I just want to reclaim what is mine: My liberty, and the personal items under The Family's custody — the bag of gift money, and...

C: 「你是氏族中唯一的幸存者吗？」
E: "Are you your clan's sole survivor?"

C: …你不妨把话说得更明白些。
E: ...You might as well explain yourself a little more clearly.

C: 可以调取这些记录吗？
E: Is it possible to access these records?

C: 感谢您的协助，艾丽小姐。对了…知更鸟小姐还好吧？我们都很期待她的表演。
E: Thank you for your assistance, Miss Alley. By the way... is Miss Robin doing fine? We are looking forward to her performance.

C: 流光忆庭…还有星核猎手，确实都有可能呢…那公司呢？他们想得到匹诺康尼，肯定也会有所准备吧。
E: The Garden of Recollection... and the Stellaron Hunters, both are possible. But what about the IPC? Since they want Penacony all for themselves, they're bound to have a plan.

C: 没错，我们正在为家族调查凶案呢。可以请你们调取酒店入梦池的记录看看吗？
E: That's right. We're investigating a murder for The Family. May we access the hotel's Dreampool entry records?

C: 那我们直接去找那位治安官不就好了…应该就是{NICKNAME}提到的加拉赫吧？
E: Why don't we just look for the Security Officer then... It's probably Gallagher, the one {NICKNAME} mentioned, right?

C: 但你们为那个偷渡犯如坐针毡的样子，倒是应了我的*猜想*。接下来…就让公司的财富之雨平等地落在每个人头上吧。
E: But the way you're all on edge about that stowaway, it's just as I guessed it would be. As for now... let the rain of wealth from the IPC fall evenly on everyone.

C: 注意安全，朋友。如果遇到危险，猎犬随时为你效劳。
E: Take care, my friend. If you ever find yourself in danger, remember that the Hounds are always ready to help.

C: 一点小钱，不成敬意…你就拿着吧。
E: Yes, it's for you... Just take it.

C: ——等到了那个时候，就请你按下按钮，放个大烟花为我助兴吧。回见，愚者。
E: When that time comes, go ahead and press the button, and light up the sky with a magnificent fireworks display for me. Catch you later, Fool.

C: 观众们在鼓掌，欢呼声如潮水般涌来，悠扬的旋律奏响，彩带挂满肩头，空气弥漫着鸢尾花的芬芳，这滋味…比蜜糖还要甜。
E: The crowd is going wild, applause crashing like waves. The aroma of irises fills the air, a beautiful melody playing, ribbons dancing around us. And the taste... is sweeter than honey.

C: 这是口感最猛烈的辅料…我的最爱。
E: This is the most pungent adjunct we have... and my personal favorite.

C: 家族重新接纳了我，给了我治安官的工作，表面是宽恕，实际是惩罚。自此，我和伙伴…和我的过去彻底断了联系。而米哈伊尔……
E: The Family accepted me and made me an officer, supposedly as a form of forgiveness, but it was actually a punishment. Since then, I've been completely cut off from my partners... and my past. As for Mikhail...

C: 没错，加拉赫先生提到真正的背叛者另有其人…并且很可能潜伏在橡木家系中。
E: Exactly. Gallagher suggests that the real traitor is someone else... probably within the Oak Family.

C: …巡海游侠，黄泉女士？
E: ...Acheron, the Galaxy Ranger?

C: 家族依旧承诺会保护来宾周全，但各位也不妨留个心眼。
E: While The Family is dedicated to keeping our guests safe, it might be wise for you to stay alert.

C: 那沙盘里的模型…应该是黄金的时刻。
E: The model in the sandpit... it's the Golden Hour, isn't it?

C: 所以我得走啦，再见，先生。祝你也能玩得开心！
E: I have to go, goodbye Mister. Hope you have a good time too!

C: 没问题。不过，即将在这里消失的——到底是谁呢？
E: That's fine. But, who exactly is about to disappear here?

C: 这种石头并不珍稀，但色泽却与某种宝石十分接近，因而常被用作后者的{RUBY_B#伪装}替代{RUBY_E#}。而那种更昂贵的宝石……
E: This type of stone isn't rare, but its hue is very similar to a certain gem. In fact, it's often used as {RUBY_B#counterfeit}a substitute{RUBY_E#}. And that more precious gem is...

C: 我真的有点好奇了。为什么你迈出的每一步都在铤而走险，为自己准备的选项永远伴随强烈的自毁冲动？
E: Now I'm really curious. Why does every step you take involve reckless risks, and the choices you prepare for yourself always come with a strong impulse for self-destruction?

C: 从那颗星核，到知更鸟的失声、两起命案、与星期日的交涉，再到那假面愚者的提示，只有这不变的两个字能勾起你的兴趣。而现在，你确实将它握在了手中……
E: Think about it. There's a Stellaron in play, the fabulous Robin loses her voice, two unsolved murders, cryptic messages from a Masked Fool, and a chance to go head-to-head with Sunday himself... and the only thing to pique your interest is one word — the last word, a word that's right there at your fingertips...

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 哼…好吧。先走一步，朋友，我在{RUBY_B#「未来」}前面{RUBY_E#}等你。
E: Hmph... Fine. Time to make a move, my friend. I'll be waiting up {RUBY_B#Future}ahead{RUBY_E#}.
...Sure.

C: 你又在说怪话了…但气势不错，无论如何，我们都不能对匹诺康尼的安危置之不理。
E: You're talking weird again... But it's a good vibe. No matter what, we can't ignore the safety of Penacony.

C: 他的人生从来与安详无缘，而命运又要教他赢下所有，淌过一片又一片暴雨，直到泥浆覆过他的鼻腔。
E: His life knows not quietude. His fate yet demands him to win them all, to weather tempests, one after another... til mire enshrouds his very breath.

C: …艾利欧说的没错，在这片梦想之地，你我都会得到难忘的收获。
E: ...Elio is right. In this Land of the Dreams, you and I will reap unforgettable gains.

C: 这是仙舟「罗浮」景元将军赠予列车的玉兆。这物件在车上，便是仙舟联盟对星穹列车身份的认证。
E: This is the jade abacus gifted to the Express by the Xianzhou Luofu's General Jing Yuan. Its presence onboard serves as the Xianzhou Alliance's official recognition of the Express.

C: 嘘——这项技术尚未公开，原本是要在谐乐大典上首次亮相的，没想到意外泄露了。
E: Shh — this technology hasn't been made public yet. It was originally planned to debut at the Charmony Festival, but it seems it's been leaked.

C: 原、原来是这样啊！那就说得通了，只要能让谐乐大典顺利举办，我一定全力配合！
E: I—I see! Then it all makes sense now. I'll do anything to help make the Charmony Festival a success!

C: 好啦，似乎别的客人也在烦恼呢，我先失陪了，祝你继续享受这片梦境。
E: All right. It looks like there are other guests who are also confused. I'll have to excuse myself — please enjoy the Dreamscape.

C: 听这描述，难道…
E: This description, could it be...

C: 不过这位先生…不能晾在街上不管，能带他去个安全的地方吗？
E: But we can't just leave this man here... Can we take him somewhere safe?

C: 看来人都到齐了啊。正好，见见米凯先生吧，流放之地的负责人之一。米凯先生，他们就是我的同伴。
E: Perfect timing. Now that everyone's here, I'd like to introduce everyone to Micah, who's partly in charge of the land of the exiles. Micah, these are my companions.

C: 至于我，一个失去了双腿的老人…要是没有这片梦境，我甚至都无法走到他们面前。
E: And me? An old lady with no legs... Without this dream, I couldn't even walk toward them.

C: 难以置信，在家族的视线外…梦境中还坐落着如此规模的聚居地。
E: Unbelievable... to think there's a settlement of this size within the Dreamscape... and all beyond The Family's reach.

C: 是你心底里的{RUBY_B#野心}公义{RUBY_E#}。
E: The sense of {RUBY_B#ambition}justice{RUBY_E#} inside of you.

C: 还记得我说过的话么？与公司合作不失为一种制衡家族的方法。
E: Remember what I said earlier? Working with the IPC is a way to keep The Family in check.

C: 以后啊，念那些经文前，先好好想想…橡木家系能有今天的地位，你能坐在这，衣食无忧，高高在上，俯瞰所有人，靠的究竟是什么。
E: Before you start spouting off your holy verses, answer me this... Where does the power of the Oak Family come from? And your power? What makes you think you can sit there, all high and mighty, looking down on everyone else?

C: 如果弱者为延续生存需不惜代价，谁能为他们予以担保？
E: Who can vouch for the weak when they will pay any price to survive?

C: 哈哈，知更鸟小姐真是太客气了。能和宇宙各地的客人们一起没日没夜地狂欢，哪里辛苦！
E: You're too kind, Robin. It's a pleasure to have guests from all over the universe celebrating day and night!

C: 我们约定中的乐园…不该是这样的。
E: The paradise in our dreams... it shouldn't be like this.

C: 你们可有怀疑的对象？
E: Do you have any suspects?

C: 人会因为非理性的冲动做出傻事，会在触及自身利益的时候放弃原则，也会相信一些明知不该相信的东西，宝了个贝的，人甚至会打破自己刚定下的规矩！
E: People do stupid things out of irrational impulses. They abandon their principles when self-interest is involved. They believe in things they know they shouldn't, and fudge— they even break their own rules!

C: 喔，我猜是因为失去了「绝对正确」的领导者后，无名客们必须为自己的选择负责了？
E: Oh? So you're saying the Nameless now have to take responsibility for their own choices because their "absolutely right" leader is gone?

C: 凡人走在命途上，就像坐着小船渡过水面，留下一条蜿蜒的行迹，推开无数可能性的涟漪。相较人类转瞬即逝的一生，这些波浪久久不会平息。
E: Mortals who walk the Paths are like sailors on a vast ocean, leaving behind a trail that creates countless ripples of possibilities. These ripples last longer than the fleeting lifetimes of humans.

C: 开拓未知，挑战极限！真不愧是三月七小姐！流萤小姐呢？
E: Trailblazing into the uncharted and challenging the limits! That's Miss March 7th for you! How about Miss Firefly?

C: 有我在，肯定嘎嘎乱赢。
E: It'll be a shoo-in with me around.

C: 诶…居然没人说话吗？那我就举手了！这题我知道！
E: So... no one's gonna say anything? Then I'll raise my hand — I know the answer to this question!

C: 欢迎来到由苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场热砂盛典第一关：「戏梦奇战」！在这一关里，您可以选择「演技派」或「动作派」两种挑战。
E: Welcome to the first stage of SoulGlad™ Enterprises' thirty-third Scorchsand Festival of the twentieth season: Dreamplay Fantasia! In this stage, you can choose between two challenges: The School of Acting or School of Action.

C: 谁会被这样逗笑啦……
E: You seriously think that would make someone laugh?

C: 这完全是服输了吧…快回来快回来……
E: That's totally giving up... Come back here!

C: 漂亮！漂亮！真是一场精彩的对决！是各位让我明白，为了捍卫伊德莉拉的美名，我还需多加砥砺精进…多么美丽的教训！
E: Beautiful! Beautiful! Truly a captivating contest! It is through you that I realize, to uphold the honor of Idrila, I must further hone my skills... What a beautiful lesson indeed!

C: 我们认同各位无名客的观点，匹诺康尼需要改变，但绝不是以你们要求的方式。盛会之星绝不能、也绝不会变回混乱无序、弱肉强食的逐梦之地。
E: We acknowledge the perspective of you Nameless — Penacony does require change, but not as you propose. The Planet of Festivities cannot and will not revert to a place characterized by chaos, disorder, or anarchy.

C: 苏乐达™…我的苏乐达™…汪……
E: SoulGlad™... My SoulGlad™... Raawrr...

C: 这里也有筑梦师们留下的「筑梦遥眼」…时间紧迫，有需要就直接用吧。
E: There's also a "Dream's Eye" left here by a Dreamweaver... We're running out of time, we'll have to use it if necessary.

C: 好了，让我们说回正题吧。既然相聚于此，想必两位也一定是为了争夺海选冠军而来，对吧？
E: Okay, let's get back to business. Since fate has brought us together, it stands to reason that you both seek the accolade of the audition's victor, correct?

C: 你小子还挺能救…
E: You're quite the savior, aren't ya...

C: 我明白了，看来各位果真在为「纯美」之道四处奔走。
E: It's clear to me now. Evidently, you are traveling in pursuit of the Beauty's ideals.

C: 清醒…也就是说，那乐园仍是一场梦。踏入乐园，便意味着要放弃现实，对么？
E: Wakening... Which means that this so-called paradise is still a dream. Stepping into this paradise means forsaking reality, correct?

C: 难道在你眼中，我也要被归类为弱者吗？
E: Perhaps in your mind, you also view me as "weak"?

C: 走吧，登上那辆列车，然后…就开始你的旅途吧。
E: Now go. Board that train and... start your journey.

C: 可、可我只懂得修表……
E: B—But I only know how to fix watches...

C: 我们也不能退缩。
E: We won't back down either.

C: 有些味道还是能尝见的…比如微微的「甜」。
E: I can still taste certain things... like a faint sweetness.

C: 尚不能断定，但至少能确定他们准备利用「谐乐大典」做些什么。
E: I can't say for sure, but they're definitely planning something for the Charmony Festival.

C: 将军那一击虽然援助及时，破坏力却也极强。令使的力量对撞在一起，普通人难免受到波及。
E: Though the strike from the General was timely, its destruction was also immense. When "Emanators" collide, ordinary people inevitably suffer.

C: 呵呵，无妨。此间正是敌力角气之时，为万安计，我联盟理应代表星穹列车出面斡旋才是，绝不能让各位铤而走险。
E: Heh, that's alright. In these times of conflict, for the sake of utmost safety, it is only right that the Alliance steps forward to mediate on behalf of the Astral Express. We must not allow you to take unnecessary risks.

C: 大概…「久别重逢的喜悦」，也算是「开拓」的一部分吧。
E: Perhaps... the joy of reuniting after a long time can also be considered just another part of the Trailblaze.

C: 总感觉美好得有点不真实…
E: I keep getting this feeling that this is all too good to be true...

C: 然后，就是本次航线会议的重点了——我们需要决定列车的下一站帕！由列车长来为各位介绍一下目前的选项。
E: Now then, we come to the crux of this navigation meeting: We must decide on the Express' next stop! Let me introduce our current options.

C: 答案是…「陷入绝境」。
E: The answer is... when they are in desperate situations.

C: 我以完美无缺的乐章号令——再创乐园！
E: With this perfect melody I command — recreate paradise anew!

C: 看来，这次见面大概只是一盘「前菜」。组织这次会面的人——不管是谁——大概只是想提前来探探公司的口风。
E: If I'm right, this conference is probably just a prelude. Whoever organized it wants to assess the IPC's stance beforehand.

C: 始作俑者呢？猎犬还没把他捉拿归案吗？
E: Where's that prankster? Haven't the hounds caught him yet?

C: 按下去以后到底会有什么反应——真的没人试过吗？
E: What will happen if you press it? Hasn't anyone actually tried?

C: 总之，家族会尽快处理这些东西，还请您保持距离。
E: Anyway, The Family will deal with these things. Please kindly keep your distance.

C: 哪里的话，奥帝先生。能见到您是我们的荣幸。您也许不知道，《奥帝•艾弗法传》可是战略投资部员工入职后的必读书目。
E: No problem at all, Mr. Alfalfa. It's my honor to meet you in person. You may not be aware, but the book Oti Alfalfa: The Biography is a must-read for all Strategic Investment Department employees.

C: 多亏了之前那波小「震荡」，挡在老奥帝改革路上的最大阻碍现在已灰飞烟灭了，嚯嗬嗬嗬嗬！
E: Thanks to the little "reverberation" earlier, the biggest obstacle between me and my reforms has been eliminated! Ohohohoho!

C: 匹诺康尼贯彻的「同谐」之道不能被再度歪曲，同样的悲剧，绝不能再发生第二次。
E: The Path of Harmony in Penacony must not be distorted again... and such a tragedy must never recur.
