C: 这就去办，知更鸟小姐。
E: Right away, Miss Robin.

C: 这段路可以很短，也可以很长。因为我们每人心中都有一片{RUBY_B#野心}空洞{RUBY_E#}，只有不断依赖外物填补。
E: This journey could be either brief or long, as each of us carries a {RUBY_B#ambition}void{RUBY_E#} in our hearts that can only be filled from the outside.

C: 你倒是心宽，还能呼呼大睡。我可是留下了心理阴影，昨晚连眼睛都不敢闭，生怕一睡着就再也醒不过来了。
E: I'm so jealous that you got a good night's sleep. I was traumatized and too scared to even close my eyes. I thought if I fell asleep, I'd never wake up again.

C: 可惜当时我没法到场，否则肯定会助你们一臂之力。
E: Such a pity I couldn't be there, or else I would have lent a helping hand.

C: 该怎么称呼你？
E: What should I call you?

C: 把它的尾巴带给我作为抵押，然后你的愿望就能实现了。
E: Bring its tail to me as collateral and your dreams will come true.

C: 呵，难怪那个赌徒如此看重你。
E: Hm, no wonder that gambler likes you so much.

C: <size=36>一——！</size>
E: <size=36>One...!</size>

C: 唉，小灰毛呀小灰毛，这么长时间过去了，你一点变化都没有，我好失望呀……
E: Oh Gray Hair, Gray Hair, it's been so long, but you haven't changed at all. I'm sorely disappointed...

C: 你还挺有礼貌。
E: You're pretty polite.

C: 知更鸟？知更鸟是谁？
E: Robin? Who's that?

C: 刚才这句话的意思是你不必再骚扰它了——这样你和它看起来都怪可怜的。还是及时终止这场闹剧吧。
E: ...which means there is no need to bother it anymore. It makes both you and the doll appear rather pitiful. It's best to promptly put an end to this farce.

C: 那便是我们人生的一段总结，这段时光中你我全部的缩影…我们一路走来的证明。
E: That is a summary of our lives, encapsulating everything about us in these moments... proof of our shared path.

C: 安抚的工作就交给姬子吧，毕竟这列车上没人比她更会「开导」别人了。
E: Leave it to Himeko. When it comes to comforting, there's no one better on the Express.

C: 也就是说，在选择下一个目的地时必须考虑这点。
E: Which also means that we must prudently consider our next destination.

C: 老人和小孩优先。
E: The elderly and children go first.

C: 都是年轻人，你们不妨和新生一同入学，在校园里随便走走，体验下学生生活。
E: Why don't you youngsters join the new students? You could explore the campus, experience student life...

C: 波提欧？
E: Boothill?

C: 这是我在「创意集会」上买的，是不是很逼真？听摊主说这款特别火爆，专程去也不一定抢得到呢。
E: I bought this from the Creator's Market. Doesn't it look realistic? The booth owner said this design is especially popular and really hard to get.

C: 满意，就这个吧。
E: I'm satisfied. I'll take it.

C: 忍者？为何有忍者？
E: Ninjas? Why are there ninjas?

C: 银河世界千奇百怪，也许真存在一颗「忍法星球」也说不定。
E: Strange things happen across the cosmos. Maybe a Ninjutsu Planet does exist.

C: 球棒•忍者，阁下的留影•忍法甚是精妙啊。
E: Baseball Bat Ninja, your Photo Ninjutsu is exquisite!

C: 算了算了，狂欢的日子不提这种伤心事。请拿好写真集，祝你们玩的愉快！
E: Forget it. Let's not talk about such depressing topics in the middle of festivities. Here's your photobook. Have fun!

C: 但我也不能就这么放你进去，真感兴趣，就先从了解睡蕉小猴开始吧。
E: But I can't just let you in. If you're really interested, why not start off by learning more about Slumbernana Monkey?

C: 嗯，很棒哦。
E: Mm-hmm. You're doing wonderfully.

C: 你觉得我像是会把这猴子摆在床头的人吗？
E: Do I look like someone who'd place that monkey beside my pillow?

C: 作为开场，刻意一些也无妨。
E: What's a little blatant engineering in the opening sequence, won't you agree?

C: 怎么，你还要回来监视我不成？
E: What? Are you here to watch over my shoulder now?

C: 这几位同学正在聊着你听不懂的话题，诸如什么「蕉版卡」、「睡蕉社」、「蕉书育猴」，让教室里充满了快活的空气。
E: These few students are chatting about a topic that you know nothing about... BanaCard? Slumbernana Association? Teaching Monkeys with Bananas? At least the classroom's atmosphere is lively.

C: 还是我和{NICKNAME}去吧。我俩平时没那么正经，就算闹笑话了也不至于特别显眼。
E: How about {NICKNAME} and I go instead? We're not usually that serious, so even if we mess up, it won't stand out too much.

C: 想想迷人而深邃的垃圾桶…
E: Visualize a captivating and profound trashcan...

C: 忍•六相冰！何等强劲的冰遁，琉璃•忍者真乃上忍也！
E: Ninja Six-Phased Ice! Such formidable ice mastery! Ninja Ruri truly proves her might!

C: 下次一定。
E: There's always next time.

C: 在你还未消化这些情感之时，小猴激动地跑向了远方……
E: Before you could process these emotions, the little monkey excitedly dashed off into the distance...

C: 难道…它就是百货•忍徒的父亲，百货•村长？
E: Could it be... the father of Ninja Initiate Merchant, Merchant Chief?

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 终于不用当反派了
E: Yay, I'm no longer the villain!

C: 就算是天生坏种，第一次做这种事…也该有心理负担……
E: Even for someone born with a bad nature, the first time doing something like this should weigh heavily on their conscience...

C: 谁问你了？话我只说一遍——你有什么哲学和苦衷我都懒得听。
E: Who asked you? I'm only gonna say this once — I ain't interested in hearin' your philosophies or sob stories.

C: 试炼？
E: Trial?

C: 请问…在下是否已经称得上「忍侠」之名？
E: Pray tell... Have I proven myself worthy of the title of "Ninja Hero"?

C: 后面的实验她不一定撑得住，如果用模因病毒进行认知干预，保持她的精神稳定，实验也能更顺利。
E: She might not be able to withstand the later experiments. If we use the memetic virus to perform cognitive intervention and ensure that her mind remains stable, the experiments can proceed more smoothly.

C: 道德束缚住了那些人的智慧，终结了那些世界的未来，所以原始博士才会将它们选为返祖实验的目标。
E: Morality has bound the wisdom of those people and ended the future of those worlds. That was why Dr. Primitive chose them as targets of the atavistic experiment.

C: 快点，撕掉这些垃圾！
E: Hurry and tear up this trash!

C: 所以，我决定抛下它了。
E: That's why I've decided to ditch it for good.

C: 警告：C<unbreak>11</unbreak>通道防卫系统已瘫痪，C<unbreak>11</unbreak>通道…
E: Warning: Corridor C<unbreak>11</unbreak>'s security system is no longer functional. Corridor C<unbreak>11</unbreak>...

C: 但有一种梦不会醒来，也不应该醒来——
E: But there is a type of dream that we will never awaken from, and should never awaken from...

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}…庇护我。
E: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... protect me.

C: 死吧，玷污火种的狗鼠！
E: Filthy rat, you'll die for defiling the Coreflame!

C: 不行，必须有人待在外面接应。
E: No, someone should stay outside in case we need help.

C: 你知道，这不取决于我。
E: You know very well the decision doesn't lie with me.

C: …好身手。
E: ...Nice move.

C: 不错，看来还能沟通。那边的灰发战士，回答我——
E: Sane enough to communicate, it seems. Hey, gray-haired warrior. Tell me—

C: 终于找到你们了…不容易。
E: It wasn't easy, but I finally found you two...

C: 请别误会，在能力允许的前提下，我们仍会尽可能为逐火之旅提供帮助。
E: Having said that, Lady Aglaea, please don't misunderstand, we will still do what we can to assist you in the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 你的超级英雄能力是什么？
E: So, what's your superpower?

C: 要不打道回府？
E: Should we head back?

C: …看来果真能倚仗诸位，夺回吾之正身了。
E: ...It seems like I'll really be able to rely on all of you to reclaim my true form.

C: 不愧是阁下。前方…应是慈爱之庭了。
E: I knew you would find it. The Courtyard of Storge should be just ahead of us.

C: 走，我们去看看。
E: Let's go check it out.

C: 大家多加小心。
E: Everyone, let's be even more cautious.

C: 去给「纷争」做祭品吧！
E: Offer yourself to Strife!

C: 总有一天，缇安会走到极限，缇宝会从她手里接过「门匠」的职责，这事*我们*心知肚明。
E: One day, Trianne will reach her limit, and Tribbie will take on the role of gatekeeper from her — we are all aware of that.

C: 阿雅，先别管这些了，快救救伤员！
E: Agy, now's not the time to dwell on that. Let's help the injured people first!

C: 紧张什么呀，不是不能说的事！其实呢，*我们*在很久很久以前…也像阿雅一样，是<color=#dbc291ff>成熟的大人</color>哦。
E: Don't get all nervous. It's not something we can't discuss! The truth is... a long, long time ago... we were a mature adult just like Agy.

C: 其实*我们*也不知道终点会是什么样子。总而言之，这就是*我们*变成小孩子的原因。
E: We don't know what awaits us at the end, either. But anyway, that's why we have turned into children.

C: 还有？
E: And in?

C: 赫菲斯辛、帕狄卡斯、莱昂、托勒密，还有朴塞塔…自我从冥海归来，那五人便始终拱卫左右。
E: Hephaestion, Perdikkas, Leonnius, Ptolemy, and Peucesta... Ever since I returned from the Sea of Souls, these five had been by my side.

C: 帕狄卡斯精通制药，净整些偏方怪方；莱昂善于奔跑，是最受信赖的信使。
E: Perdikkas was an expert in concocting medicines, delving into all those strange folk remedies. Leonnius was a swift runner and our most reliable messenger.

C: 她说的是真的吗？你为何要这么做？
E: Is she telling the truth? Why did you do that?

C: 那就挥剑吧！拿走我的王冠，用先王的血加冕，继承一切…名正言顺，成为悬锋的新王。
E: Then swing your blade! Take my crown, coronate yourself with an old king's blood, and inherit it all... Become the new rightful king of Kremnos.

C: 唔…我也可以学着战斗，保护大家！
E: Ooh... I can learn how to fight too and protect everybody!

C: 「它们说：世界太过沉寂。只愿见，生灵欢笑不息。」
E: "They declared the world too unstirring, hence wished endless laughter upon the living."

C: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹——」</color>{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle —"</color>{RUBY_E#}

C: 原来如此，一举三得！
E: I see! It's like killing three birds with one stone!

C: 缇宝，缇宁！这回找到啦，这是那个「翻红瑞」吗？
E: Tribbie! Trinnon! Look what I found! Is this the "safari"?

C: 愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}使你我眸光锋锐，克敌制胜。
E: May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} sharpen our gaze and grant us victory over the enemy.

C: 没必要感谢我。
E: No need to thank me.

C: 吾师，别让这道残酷的预言压垮他们的脊梁。
E: Teacher, don't let the weight of that cruel prophecy crush their spines.

C: {NICKNAME}，小白，你们准备好了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, Snowy, are you ready?

C: 这里有块黑板。上面画的是什么？
E: There is a blackboard here. What's that drawing on it?

C: 可惜最后除了用来送信，没能派上其他用场。当初学会的知识…现在也都还回去了。
E: Sadly, the inventions served no purpose except to deliver letters, and the knowledge we gained... has all faded away by now.

C: 嘘，嘘！大姐姐，声音轻点！我们好不容易才偷偷溜进来。
E: Shh, shh! Please keep it down! We had to be really sneaky to get in here!

C: 我是缇里西庇俄丝，聆听预言、告说预言，印证预言者——
E: I am Tribios, the Listener, the announcer, and the witness of the prophecy —

C: 然而，汝须记得—— / 然而，汝应记得——
E: Yet, thou shalt remember — / Yet, thou must remember —

C: 从这里开始，我将踏上遥远的旅途。
E: Here, I will set sail toward the distant horizon.

C: 因为缇里西庇俄丝正是这么一路走来，传颂着预言……
E: Because that's how Tribios has journeyed so far to spread the prophecy...

C: 他们的行事方式…确实令人不快。
E: Their conduct... is certainly irritating.

C: 这是在给下个版本埋伏笔？
E: Is this foreshadowing for the next version?

C: 原来是储存卡满了。
E: The memory card is full.

C: 欢迎您，圣女。
E: Greetings, Holy Maiden.

C: 是阿格莱雅派人来了？
E: Did Aglaea's people get here?

C: 奥赫玛的祸患…
E: A disaster for Okhema...

C: 完全不记得。
E: Not a clue.

C: 星穹列车这是开哪儿去了…？
E: Where did the Astral Express head to this time...?

C: 我就知道，我和匹诺康尼缘分不浅。只是把{RUBY_B#令咒}参赛资格{RUBY_E#}烙印在身上的方式，真让人有些不快……
E: I knew it. Penacony and I just can't seem to stay apart. But I have to say, the way they {RUBY_B#Command Spell}mark{RUBY_E#} the participants... not exactly pleasant.

C: 「帕姆先生」，好久不见了～
E: "Mr. Pom-Pom," it's been a while~

C: 哼，「娱乐节目」…原来如此，这玩意儿与圣杯相性不错，也难怪能启动这场圣杯战争。
E: Heh, "entertainment spectacle"... I get it now. That clicks pretty well with the essence of the Holy Grail. No wonder it managed to power this Holy Grail War.

C: 我成为了我想成为的人。
E: I became the person I wanted to be.

C: 不如丢下宝剑，舍弃荣耀，成为台下欣赏他人悲喜的凡夫俗子。
E: Better to cast aside her sword, abandon her glory, and become a nameless nobody who watches the world's grand show on the sidelines.

C: 谁？黑塔女士？这儿当然是她的空间站啊。
E: Who? Madam Herta? Well, this IS her space station.

C: 要不然呢？你总不可能是黑塔吧？
E: What else would you be? Madam Herta?

C: 你怎么不自己来做？
E: Why don't you do it yourself?

C: 我想起来了！你就是他们说的星核精？话说，你睡觉的时候，会像萤火虫一样发光吗？
E: Ah! Wait! You're the Stellaron they were talking about, huh? Tell me... when you sleep, do you glow like a firefly?

C: …这位小姐，你所说的事情，只有天才俱乐部的家伙才会追逐不休。
E: ...Miss, what you're talking about is something only the Genius Society would obsessively chase after.

C: 是先大闹一场，再将这假货打得粉碎才对啊。
E: Nah. We need to whip this fella's hind-end, THEN smash it to pieces.

C: 音符小姐…好酷。
E: Miss Note... is so cool.

C: 葛瑞迪！你还想不想赢下圣杯了？现场改写剧本，改变布景！给我更多的力量，让我碾压他们！像个真正的魔鬼那样，把他们捏在掌心！
E: Grady! Do you still even want the Holy Grail? Go change the script on the fly! Move the stage props! Give me more power... let me crush them all! Crush them in the palm of my hands like a true villain!

C: 打就打，谁怕谁。
E: Bring it on. I'm not scared.

C: 最开始是歌曲的版权，然后是形象，最后是名字……
E: First it was the copyright of your songs, then your image, and finally... your name.

C: 据我判断，将我们分离成不同的个体，多半是出自报复情绪。但由于意识本身具备的自我合并特性，理论上，只要集齐所有的「我」……
E: Judging from what I can tell, splitting us up like this was probably an act of revenge. But our minds naturally try to reconnect. Theoretically, if we can reunite all the "me"s...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>把波提欧的情绪调整到正常状态吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Please reset Boothill's emotional state back to normal.</color>

C: 明明可以腰缠万贯，却把所有的钱都投入了电影，去追求心中的艺术。光凭这点，我愿意承认，你是一位值得尊重的导演。
E: You could've been rolling in riches, but you poured everything into filmmaking to create something you loved. You're a director worthy of respect for that alone.

C: 滴答，你们果然还是来了。想要带走最后的知更鸟吧？但你们绝不会成功，所有知更鸟都是我的囊中之物。
E: Tick-tock. So you've come, after all. Here to steal the last Robin, are you? You'll never succeed. Every Robin belongs to me.

C: 滥用特效，剧情一塌糊涂。本该认真制作的服化道，却敷衍了事。
E: Over-the-top effects. A storyline in complete shambles. Costumes and props that should've been handled with care rushed and half-baked.

C: {NICKNAME}上车才没多久，这趟旅程会不会难度太高了？
E: You haven't been with us on the Express very long, {NICKNAME}. Will the journey be too much for you to handle?

C: 是啊，就算最后不去那儿，燃料问题也得解决。
E: Yeah! Plus, even if we pass Amphoreus over, we've still got a fuel problem to solve.

C: 此行也有别的目的。尽管「哲学的胎儿」已经陨落，但匹诺康尼的「秩序」并非一日筑成，这美梦中恐怕还残留着橡木家系的影响。
E: There's something else I want to do, too. The Embryo of Philosophy may have fallen, but the Order in Penacony wasn't built in a day. This sweet dream is likely to still contain residual traces of the Oak Family's influence.

C: 算是我的部下，著名的加班狂人「工作日先生」。你不认识？
E: Renowned workaholic, Mr. Workday. He works for me. You don't know him?

C: 星期日放上了更多的苜蓿币。
E: Sunday has placed even more Alfalfa credits.

C: 「为我示现，一如往常——凡具瞳孔之物，皆有均等的魂灵。」
E: "Reveal thyself unto me, as is customary — All creatures endowed with eyes bear souls of equal worth."

C: 那男的不是一般人啊，刚才没被发现真是奇迹。
E: Whew, that was no ordinary passerby. It's a miracle that he didn't see through your disguise.

C: 他们只是提供了一个选项。是黑塔女士告诉您的吗？
E: They did suggest a destination, but that was all. Did you hear this from Madam Herta?

C: 唉，还是我来吧…刚才分开后，我们就带着停云小姐四处逛逛，结果遇上了怪事。
E: Forget it. I'll tell you... We walked around with Miss Tingyun for a while after separating from the rest, but then we ran into something... weird.

C: 停云小姐吃下糖，却开始不断打喷嚏！阿嚏！阿嚏——就像这样，然后她就在我们眼前稀里哐啷地变成了好几个停云！
E: Miss Tingyun ate the candy too, but she only sneezed non-stop! A-choo, a-choo! Sneeze after sneeze! And before we knew it, she multiplied into several Tingyuns right in front of us!

C: 事到如今，我认为星期日没有说谎的理由。为避免节外生枝，在他离开匹诺康尼前，我会一直同行。
E: I believe that at this point, Sunday has no reason to be dishonest. But to prevent any unforeseen complications, I'll be accompanying him everywhere he goes, until he leaves Penacony.

C: 呃…是不是该找个人陪着她？
E: Uh... Should we get someone to watch over her?

C: 这是…什么地方？
E: What... is this place?

C: 「这是『毁灭』留下的伤口，已经在你体内生根，挥之不去。」
E: "These are wounds left by the Destruction. They have taken root within your body and cannot be removed."

C: 这…能被称为共处吗？
E: Is this called... coexisting?

C: 嗯，一位天才介入了此事。她在生命领域颇有建树，为停云小姐换得了一线生机。
E: Yes, a genius got involved. She's very accomplished in the field of life sciences and managed to grant Miss Tingyun a shot at survival.

C: 波及没事，别是伤及就行。喂，能不能给我口喝的？感觉自己像是睡了十年。
E: That's alright, so long as nobody was hurt. Can I get something to drink? I feel like I've been asleep for ten years.

C: 爱德华医生最喜欢您这种…嗯，淡然自若的客人。
E: I love customers like you... So easy to work with.

C: 作为一道心绪，她和新生的孩子没有区别。登上这艘船，仅仅是出于内心的悸动。
E: As a fleeting emotion, she's no different from a newborn. Her boarding this ship was solely down to her inner impulse.

C: 可正是那次飞行，撬动了我的一生。
E: This flight was a turning point in my life.

C: 但那个人不一样，他比普通人坚强许多，人们因此产生了一种错觉：即便他倒下了，也会比别人更快站起来。
E: But he's different. He's stronger than most ordinary people, but because of it, people have this misconception: They think that when he falls, he will stand back up faster than anyone else.

C: 黑天鹅将额头抵在三月七的脑袋上，像是在感受她的体温……
E: Black Swan presses her forehead against March 7th's head, as if feeling the latter's body temperature...

C: 别心急，瓦尔特，会有你活跃的机会的。
E: Chin up, Welt. You'll get your chance out in the field.

C: 嗯，此行凶险，列车长和领航员为你们准备了一份特别的「开拓」礼物——
E: Yes. Seeing how this is going to be a perilous expedition, Pom-Pom and the Navigator have come together to prepare a special trailblazing gift for you!

C: 黑塔…黑塔大人！你、你想做什么……
E: Herta... Madam Herta, wait! Wh—What do you want with me...?

C: 哎呀，可爱又可敬的黑塔女士，您的心肠什么时候变得这么软了？
E: Oh, sweet and venerable Madam Herta, when did your heart turn this tender?

C: 别理他们，我们接着去见博识尊吧！
E: Let's ignore them and keep going. We haven't seen Nous yet!

C: 两位突然出现，是敌是友犹未可知。况且你们即便手无寸铁，也身怀不容小觑的力量……
E: It's difficult to tell if you're friend or foe when you appear out of thin air. Even without your weapons, a great power still lurks within you...

C: 没准身处险境的反而是我呢？可不敢懈怠啊。
E: I could be putting myself in harm's way for all I know. I'd be unwise not to take precautions.

C: 我是银河球棒侠。
E: I'm the Galactic Baseballer.

C: 我们商量一下。
E: Please give us a moment to discuss it.

C: 呜嗡——
E: Urrhh... uuuhhhh—

C: 也许各位真能从末日手中解救翁法罗斯。就像今日，四位英雄拯救了我们的生命和信仰。
E: Perhaps you really can save Amphoreus from its doom, just like how the four of you heroes saved our very lives and faith today.

C: 那不就是奥赫玛吗？
E: Wouldn't that be Okhema?

C: 欢迎来到奥赫玛。
E: Welcome to Okhema.

C: …我不是任何人的侍从。
E: ...No, I'm nobody's attendant.

C: …阿格莱雅大人说过，你的时间十分宝贵，不应被无谓的冲突烦扰。
E: Lady Aglaea once said that your time is extremely valuable and shouldn't be wasted on unnecessary conflict.

C: 是在重渊遇见的敌人…看来这场袭击也是「纷争」泰坦的手笔。
E: These are the enemies we met in the Abyss. It seems this attack is also the work of the Strife Titan.

C: 请坐吧，{NICKNAME}。找一个舒适的姿态，然后闭上双眼。
E: Take a seat, {NICKNAME}. Make yourself comfortable, then close your eyes.

C: 伸出右手。
E: (Extend your right arm instead.)

C: 这种资质很少见吗？
E: Is that rare?

C: 看，屋顶上有人。
E: Look, someone's on the roof.

C: …没事！来吧两位，请站好，然后看向我！
E: ...It's no biggie! Okay, strike your poses and look this way!

C: 两位来得正巧，要试试给大地兽喂食吗？
E: Since you are here, do you two want to try feeding the dromases?

C: 奥赫玛唷！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}全世之座{RUBY_E#}足下，金血溯流之始。
E: Okhema! Standing at the foot of the {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Throne of Worlds{RUBY_E#}, your golden blood can be traced back to the very beginning.

C: 省去挽留的言辞吧，我去意已决。
E: Save your words of persuasion. I've made up my mind.

C: ——「天外世界」真的存在！
E: A world beyond the sky really exists!

C: …什么故意的？
E: ...What accident?

C: 还没呢，但*我们*摸清了那些逃兵的去向。要不了多久，就能追踪到<color=#dbc291ff>悬锋城</color>的方位了。
E: Not yet. But we've already figured out where the deserters are headed to. With a little more time, we'll be able to track down the location of Castrum Kremnos.

C: 合上双目，屏住呼吸；隔断听觉，令我的耳语充盈世界。
E: Close your eyes and hold your breath. Sever all other sounds and let my whispers fill your ears.

C: 我用球棒，不用刀。
E: I use a baseball bat, not a blade.

C: 你们凭借真诚赢得了第二次机会。
E: You have earned a second chance with your honesty.

C: 在重渊与他们初遇时，我同样怀有戒心，回圣城的路上始终没有放下防备。
E: When I first met them in the Abyss, I was wary of them as well and never let my guard down throughout our journey back to the holy city.

C: 过去，泰坦是世界的支柱。而黄金裔从神谕中得到的启示，是要击碎这十二根基柱，重构世界的秩序。
E: In the past, the Titans were the pillars of the world. Yet, the prophecy's revelation is that these twelve pillars must be shattered and the world's order reconstructed.

C: ……白昼寂静无声，黑暗已经登场……
E: ...The day is silent, and darkness has taken the stage...

C: 第一次听见泰坦之声时，我还是个只知挥剑的孩子，全然不知生命的意义为何物。
E: The first time I heard the voices of the Titans, I was just a boy playing with swords, oblivious to the meaning of life.

C: 请一定要在浴宫中好好休息。等两位蓄满精力，相信缇安老师也带着悬锋城的消息归来了。
E: Be sure to rest well in the bath chamber. I trust that Trianne will have returned with news about Castrum Kremnos by the time the two of you are fully recharged.

C: …我明白了。回头想想，两位一直出于无私和善意帮助奥赫玛，我们却总是以怀疑和胁迫回应，的确不公平。
E: ...I understand. Now that I think back on it, you both have selflessly helped Okhema, while we have met your good will with doubt and intimidation. It's indeed not fair.

C: 尽管燃料告急，但你们还是完成了最后一次跃迁，寄希望于下一个目的地能解决你们手头的一切烦忧。
E: Despite a fuel shortage, you complete a final warp jump, putting your hopes in the next location and how it might resolve all your worries.

C: 去吧，和两位黄金裔一起。奥赫玛需要一位真正的战神。疯狂的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，他的统治该被终结了。
E: Go. Stand with the two Chrysos Heirs. Okhema has need of a true god of war. It's time for the mad god {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} reign to end.

C: 聆听星宿的声音…这也能做到么？
E: Listening to the voices of the constellations... Is that really possible?

C: 先把问题放在一旁，去参加黄金裔的战前动员吧。
E: Let's set the questions aside for now. The Chrysos Heirs are getting ready to mobilize.

C: …比想象中安静得多啊。
E: It's quieter than I expected...

C: 说起来，你不打算给{NICKNAME}讲讲悬锋城的事吗？不担心我给{F#她}{M#他}灌输些你最痛恨的野史？
E: By the way, aren't you going to tell {NICKNAME} any stories about Castrum Kremnos? Aren't you worried I'll tell {M#him}{F#her} all the historical myths you despise?

C: 这画的是俄罗斯方块吗？
E: Is this Tetris?

C: 哎，难怪这么脆弱，没准是这些人在报复你们呢。
E: No wonder it's so fragile. Maybe these people were taking their grievances out on you.

C: 看，门开了——
E: Look, the gate opened—

C: 那是我俩合力，算到我头上当然要折半，这才叫公平竞争。
E: We fought them together, so naturally I can only take half the credit. That's what I call fair play.

C: …连自己的同伴都要祸害，毫无荣耀可言。
E: It even killed its own comrade... They truly have no honor to speak of.

C: 所有的悔恨、愤怒，在这种时刻，我学会了掌控它们，将它们淬炼成一把锋利无比的兵器，为我所用……
E: All the anger and regret I feel right now, I've learned to control them and hone them into a razor-sharp weapon for my use...

C: 记忆和现实的矛盾，在各地都成为常态了啊。
E: This place has fallen pretty far from the way people remember it.

C: 命运三相殿虽然已经废弃许久，但它的周围仍然残留着祭司们编织的法界。以{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的力量贸然接近，恐怕会有很大的风险。
E: Although the Temple of the Three Fates has been abandoned for a long time, the magical barriers woven by the priests still linger around it. Approaching with {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}'s power recklessly could be extremely risky.

C: 那边——<color=#dbc291ff>那些「奇迹宝珠」也是「岁月」祭司们常用的仪器，说不定能派上用场。</color>
E: There! <color=#dbc291ff>Those Miracle Orbs are instruments often used by Time Priests. They could prove handy.</color>

C: 但这不代表缇宝老师不够强大…她是翁法罗斯最值得被歌颂的英雄之一。
E: But that doesn't mean Tribbie isn't powerful enough... She's one of Amphoreus' most revered heroes.

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}似乎有些气恼…因为我们把它设下的考验当成了儿戏。
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} is frustrated... Because we're treating their challenge like a game.

C: 每位泰坦都拥有截然不同的形体，有些甚至抛弃了物理的躯壳。
E: The Titans all have vastly different physical forms, with some of them even abandoning their physical shell.

C: 等等…{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的反应有些奇怪。
E: Wait... {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s reaction is a little strange.

C: 「母亲？母亲……」
E: "Mother? Mother..."

C: 这是我的记忆吗……
E: Is this... a memory?
Hm...

C: 嗯，我听过和他有关的负面传闻…他有美学上的才能，但若不是他的作为，你和丹恒阁下也不会遭受阿格莱雅大人的审讯。
E: I've heard some bad things about him. He may have some talent in the arts, but if it weren't for him, you and Dan Heng wouldn't have been interrogated by Lady Aglaea.

C: 现在不是说这些的时候…该出发了。希望这个小家伙能帮我们复现悬锋城的记忆。
E: We don't have time to talk about this right now... Let's set off. Hopefully, this little one will help us recreate the memories of Castrum Kremnos.

C: 你希望我用金线割开他们的喉咙吗？这易如反掌。只需要你的认同，我便能让元老院成为历史。
E: Would you like me to slice their throats with golden threads? It would be done in a flash. All I need is your blessing, and the Council will be no more.

C: 因为我们人性尚存，才会想苦中作乐。
E: We find humor in hardship because our humanity still endures.

C: （这块髀石护身符，就送给姐姐吧。希望你每天都能有好运气，将来也不要被任何人欺负！）
E: (I want you to have this knucklebone talisman, big sis. I hope it brings you luck every day and keeps you safe from bullies!)

C: 还有什么解数？尽管使出来吧。
E: Got any more tricks up your sleeve? Let's see them all.

C: 竞赛…？
E: Competition...?

C: 「祭典还要持续多久？欧利庞王…他还在拖延什么？」
E: "How much longer is this festival going to last? What is King Eurypon waiting for?"

C: 我早已发现，你们与此地…不，是与这个年代格格不入。
E: I've long suspected that you two are not from here... No, not just that. You're not from this era.

C: 我同意。
E: Agreed.

C: 这些都是…曾经的你？
E: Are all these... versions of you from the past?

C: 好武器！真是把好武器……
E: What a fine weapon! It's a real beauty...

C: 如果没有二位的帮助，这场战役胜负难料。感谢的话你们也快听腻了吧？但果然还是得——
E: Our victory might not have been possible without your help. I'm sure you've heard enough words of gratitude, but it's only right that I—

C: 我并不清楚个中原理，但如果这样想能令你安心一些…那我支持你的观点。
E: I don't quite get how it works, but if it's going to put you at ease... then I will say yes to that.

C: …那代表他的时机未到，还有更艰巨的使命需要他去背负。
E: ...That would mean his time hasn't come yet. And that there is a more arduous mission for him to see through.

C: 还记得先前盯梢我们的<color=#dbc291ff>元老院</color>么？他们似乎有新动作了。
E: Do you remember the <color=#dbc291ff>Council of Elders</color> that was on our heels previously? It seems like they've made their move.

C: 休息，等待试炼。
E: Get some rest and wait for the trial.

C: 我们走吧…{NICKNAME}！
E: Let's go, {NICKNAME}!

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 翁法罗斯…需要你。
E: Amphoreus... needs you.

C: 对了，有件事得提前告诉你。你的遭遇，黄金裔全都知情了……
E: Oh right, there's something that I have to tell you. The Chrysos Heirs already know everything that has happened to you...

C: 我循着指尖望去，侧耳倾听。巨大的阴影自那方捎来阵阵潮信。
E: I look in the direction they are pointing and listen closely. There, a massive shadow brought the sound of rushing tides.

C: 此话怎讲？
E: Could you elaborate on your statement?

C: 呵…呵……
E: Hngh... Ugh...
Hmph...

C: 赢得大败…你还挺乐观的嘛。
E: Won a glorious defeat... You sure know how to look on the bright side.

C: 但在过去，我是哀地里亚的「督战圣女」。
E: But back in those days, I was Aidonia's Maiden of War.

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}试炼完成的那一天，{NICKNAME}阁下一定也很困惑吧？
E: On the day that {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} Trial ended, you must have had many questions, {NICKNAME}.

C: 呜嗡嗡……
E: Grumph...

C: 有更多线索吗？
E: Are there any other clues?

C: 好耳熟？这不是寓言童话的情节吗？
E: It all sounds rather familiar... Wait, wasn't this part of that fable?

C: 但你似乎不打算隐瞒自己和元老院有所接触…而我与他们的矛盾，恐怕并非秘密。
E: However, you seem to have no intentions of concealing your involvement with the Council of Elders... While most likely being aware of my issues against them.

C: 你该和丹恒聊聊这件事。
E: You should chat with Dan Heng about this.

C: 在黄金世，他可凭此技常胜。但如今，死亡降临世间，那神赐的秘剑，也使他能随意「致人于死」，换言之……
E: He could rely on that move to always achieve victory during Era Chrysea. However, now that death has descended upon the mortal realm, that divine swordplay also means he can send others to death at will. In other words...

C: 它的驾驶员可能就在这里。
E: Its pilot is probably right here.

C: 在你们面前是早已锈损断掉的锁链，那是原本能够去向高塔的通路。
E: Before you are rusted and broken chains, remnants of a path that once led to the tower.

C: …而是给飘荡在此处的一缕思念，展现了某物。而我们将要把这些思念逐一编织，复原成玻吕刻斯完整的灵魂。
E: ...We were instead showing things to a strand of yearning that lingers here. Now we must weave these yearnings together and restore them into Pollux's complete soul.

C: 不必再哀嚎悲泣，我将为你…带去安息。
E: There's no more need to weep in grief. I... will grant you peace.

C: 你还是回到了这里。
E: You still ended up back here.

C: …我没有那段记忆，只是在一场实验中目睹过你的身影。
E: ...I don't have the memories from that time, but I've seen you before during an experiment.

C: 这里是过不去的，我们得返回「现在」。
E: We can't get through here. Let us return to "the present."

C: 事关重大，给他一点时间吧。
E: The stakes are high. Let's be patient.

C: 「演」？错了，即便生性多疑，我也从来以直诚闻名。
E: Performance? No, you are quite mistaken. I may be paranoid by nature, but I've always been known for my honesty.

C: {NICKNAME}，千万别回头啊。
E: {NICKNAME}, don't look back.

C: 我为真理舍弃一切，就是为了换来今天这一刻。
E: I gave up everything in search of truth, and it culminated in this very moment.

C: 这便是「岁月」真正的试炼……
E: This is the true trial of "time"...

C: 她已恭候多时，随我来吧。
E: She's been waiting. Follow me, please.

C: 泰坦与星神…
E: Titans and Aeons...

C: 那，树庭「打劫」过悬锋城么？
E: Well, if you don't mind: Did the Grove ever rob Castrum Kremnos?

C: 没有，甚至从未接近过。炼金是高危活动，那刻夏老师又钟情古怪的材料。学生们经常见他好好地进去，却灰头土脸甚至满脸炸毛地出来，自然不敢靠近这里。
E: No, not even close. Not only are alchemy experiments high-risk activities, but Professor Anaxa also has a penchant for using bizarre materials. Students often saw him walk in looking right as rain but come out covered in soot with his hair singed. Naturally, no one dared to come near this place.

C: 我自有把握。不妨就请眼前这位至高之神，为我们一一道来吧。
E: But it matters not. I know what I'm doing. Actually, why don't we have this supreme being standing before us tell us everything?

C: 如果需要，随时叫上我们。
E: Come find us anytime you need something.

C: 没听到，我睡眠质量很好。
E: No, I'm a heavy sleeper.

C: 黄…什么？
E: Acher... what?

C: 曾经，我们别无选择，但现在，元老院带来了另一种可能。我只剩下最后一个问题——
E: We didn't have a choice in the past, but now... the Council of Elders brings to the table a new possibility. All I have left is one question for you:

C: 我要支持谁？当然——要支持元老院重振权威！
E: Whose side am I on? Why, I'm all for the Council of Elders to reclaim their authority, of course!

C: 有关海洋之神的掌上明珠，我们故乡的故事——
E: A tale about the Ocean God's treasured pearl – our hometown...

C: 果然，这位战士…是格奈乌斯阁下。
E: Of course, this warrior is... Lord Gnaeus.

C: 见证天空之子的真实历史。
E: Witness the true history of the Skyfolk.

C: 最后一枚历史的碎片就在前方。去拾起它吧，风堇姑娘。
E: The final fragment of history lies just ahead. Go and claim it, Miss Hyacine.

C: 但她却无法斩除深埋于人子心中的因果。
E: Yet, she failed to sever the cycle of karma rooted deeply in humanity's hearts.

C: 阿格莱雅……
E: Aglaea...

C: 外面现在怎么样了……
E: What's happening out there...?

C: 这条路恐怕没有看上去那么平坦…当心眼前和脚下！
E: This path isn't as safe as it looks... Stay sharp and watch your step!

C: 必须…夺还……
E: Must... take back...

C: 这并不好笑…
E: This isn't something to joke about...

C: 这就是，世界原本的样子？
E: This is... what the world looked like originally?

C: …回答我的问题，来古士。
E: ...Answer my question, Lygus.

C: 它的喜怒会显化为世间的天象：晴时平静，雨时哀愁。它的吐息是料峭的微风，尖啸则是惊鸿的雷电。
E: The weather itself reflects their mood: Tranquil sunshine, mournful rain. Aquila's breath is a brisk wind, and their cries resound as thunder in a storm.

C: 万一我睡过去了就完了。
E: If I had passed out, that would've been it.

C: 话虽如此，真亏你能想到这种训练方式。在岁月的长河中与过去的幻影交战，就像是吟游诗人口中的「时间与精神之圣所」……
E: Even so, it's impressive you thought of this training method. Battling the phantoms of the past in the river of time... It's just like the "Hyperbolic Time Sanctum" that the bards describe.

C: 你还有我们。
E: We'll be here by your side.

C: 如果不想让谎言被戳破…你未来也得好好表现哦？
E: If you want to keep that lie from falling apart... you'd better keep playing your part in the days ahead.

C: 你凭什么觉得我不会让你失望？
E: What makes you think I won't disappoint you?

C: 看来她对你的判断有所偏误。
E: Looks like she was wrong about you.

C: 所以她真的是被刺杀的…
E: She really was assassinated...

C: 你大概已经在盘算要如何混入黎明云崖，将那颗宝石收入囊中了，对么？
E: You're probably already plotting to sneak into Dawncloud to steal that gem, aren't you?

C: 这种时候，哪还有心思开店啊。
E: As if anyone's keeping shop nowadays.

C: 我在尽己所能把和泰坦有关的神话和相关研究都记录下来。回到星穹列车以后，关于翁法罗斯的一切都会成为智库里的珍贵条目。
E: I'm collecting as many myths and research about the Titans as I can. Everything about Amphoreus is a valuable addition to our data bank when I get back to the Astral Express.

C: 嘟…嘟？
E: Doot... Doot?

C: 啊，我还记得！没想到你会一直坚持到现在，真不愧是丹宝。
E: Ah, I remember! I didn't expect you to keep at it this long — that's so like you, Dannie.

C: 对。您看——有十颗星辰已经被点亮，黄金裔的逐火之旅已经临近完成。
E: It is. Look — ten stars have already been lit. The Chrysos Heirs' Flame-Chase Journey is nearing its end.

C: 嗯…我也希望如此。
E: ...I hope so.

C: 但当我听说，克拉特鲁斯阁下是为了保护缇安老师才挨下了沉痛的一击，我内心的杂念便消散了。
E: But when I heard Lord Krateros took that fatal blow to protect Lady Trianne... All those tangled feelings faded away.

C: 被粉色小狗给吵醒了。
E: A pink puppy woke me up.

C: 现在是<unbreak>10</unbreak>/<unbreak>12</unbreak>场，可以开。
E: Well, it's <unbreak>10</unbreak>/<unbreak>12</unbreak>th time now. We can totally open the champagne.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>正因无法忍受同胞间无休止的纷争，塞涅俄丝才会把枪尖对准高高在上的泰坦。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And Seliose's frustration towards the endless strife among her people made her turn her spear towards the Titan above.</color>

C: 雨之民不会纵容压迫…神明啊，你若沉默不语，那我们就不得不自行锻铸武器，反抗他们为辉光所掩的恶意……
E: The Rainfolk will not suffer in silence... O god, if you remain silent, we shall have to forge our own weapons and resist the malice concealed under your brilliance...

C: 停下，愚蠢的阴云之子！
E: Stop, foolish Cloudborn!

C: 这…是露奈比斯的幻影吗？它会出现在这里，是因为还有未完成的事吗？
E: Was that... Lunabis's phantom? Did it appear here because it has unfinished business?

C: 啊，小伊卡——你怎么自顾自跑出来了？
E: Ah, Little Ica — why did you run out on your own?

C: 莫非，小伊卡是你的……
E: Is Little Ica your...

C: 这台浑象仪，看上去很完整……
E: This celestial globe looks complete...

C: 继续追随艾格勒飞离的轨迹吧，英雄们。这一次，我会和索拉比斯一同引导你们前行。
E: Follow the trail Aquila has left, heroes. This time, I will guide you alongside Solabis.

C: 去找下一处吧？
E: Should we go look for the next one?

C: 不…不必费那个功夫了。
E: No... There's no need to go through that effort.

C: 不必担忧？可是……
E: No need to worry? But...

C: …她一定也不会例外。
E: ...She will be no exception.

C: …白厄。
E: ...Phainon.

C: 黑潮造物在威胁公民——
E: The black tide creatures are threatening the people...

C: 我…不会给出虚假的承诺，或许我短时间内没法回到这里……
E: I... won't make empty promises. I might not be able to return in the near future...

C: 我们得继续前进，{NICKNAME}！
E: We have to keep moving forward, {NICKNAME}!

C: 终于，你们回来了！
E: Finally, you're all back!

C: 我失去了故乡，但你、阿格莱雅、还有所有其他人，共同为我编织出了第二个家园。
E: I lost my home village, but you, Aglaea, and everyone else created a second home for me.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「以祷言之力，填补秘锁之影——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Through the power of prayer, fill the shadow of the seal..."</color>

C: 是风堇的力量么？
E: Is that Hyacine's power?

C: 说来话长，先应付那家伙吧！
E: It's a long story. Let's deal with that guy first!

C: 冷静，卫士！面前这位不是敌人。
E: It's okay, guard. This one is not our enemy.

C: 在仪式开始前，我想问…
E: Before we begin... there's something I need to know.

C: 那过去的，我已如实陈述；那未来的，我将公平见证。对于神礼观众之名，还有翁法罗斯和她的命运，我问心无愧。
E: What's done, I've told truthfully. What's to come, I'll witness fairly. My conscience is clear... to my role as the Theoros, to Amphoreus and her destiny.

C: 看你这样子，是还没睡醒啊。这样吧，你先吹吹风，清醒一下。我在边上等你。
E: Looking at you, someone's still half asleep. Tell you what, catch some fresh air first. I'll hang around here.

C: 想反悔就反悔…能占卜出真东西来吗？
E: If you just redo it when you don't like the result... what's the point of divination?

C: 呵呵，今天没开课呢。清晨用落叶向{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}问了一卜，说是孩子们今天容易受伤，就干脆给大家放假了。
E: No classes today. This morning, I used fallen leaves for a reading, seeking {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s wisdom. They warned of potential injuries, so I gave everyone a holiday.

C: 啊？好、好吧，那就我先来……
E: What? Oh, um... sure, I'll go first...

C: 什么……
E: Hmm...

C: 我有个提议：不妨让昔涟当场为我们开牌，卜算一下吧。如果命运愿意展现底色，我们都能更安心些，不是么？
E: Here's a thought: Let's have Cyrene do a reading. If fate wishes to show us its path, we might find some peace of mind.

C: 虔诚的叩问会得到同等重量的回应。
E: Ask with a true heart, and truth shall answer in kind.

C: 说到这里，我想起来了！我啊，曾经还真有一个念头，想尝尝生来就是家财万贯的贵族小姐的滋味。
E: You know what? I did have one wild dream, to know what it feels like being born a noble lady, drowning in riches.

C: 呵，白厄，我的好学生，还需要再赘述一遍我留给你的话吗？
E: Ah, Phainon, my student, must we go over this again?

C: …发生什么了？！
E: ...What's going on!?

C: 我们…不希望你们白白牺牲。
E: We... don't wish for you to throw your lives away.

C: 走吧，我们一定能赢。
E: C'mon, we've got this.

C: 怕你不知情，我多嘴一句：在悬锋城，你这小偷般的发言已是对角斗的亵渎，当受穿刺之刑。
E: For your information, in Castrum Kremnos, the punishment for profaning a duel with such crooked words is impalement.

C: 「救世主」牌…
E: The "Deliverer" card...

C: 西方有悬锋孤军坐镇，短时间内不会失守。那刻夏老师生前在北方和东方布下法阵，作用犹未可知，但我相信他。至于奥赫玛……
E: The west stands protected by Mydei's Kremnoans. It will hold for the time being. Professor Anaxa deployed wards in the north and east before... Their effectiveness is untested, but I believe in him. And Okhema...

C: 所以，走吧，去命运三相殿！由你接过「岁月」的权柄，让全部的火种回归涡心，为此世的命运划上休止符。
E: So, to the Temple of the Three Fates! You'll take over Time's authority, and we'll return all the Coreflames to the Vortex, then put this world's fate to its final rest.

C: 看来，你终究得逞了……
E: So, in the end, you succeeded...

C: 我会超越神谕的命运，但我有个更好的主意：身为歌耳戈之子，何不让我用一场壮绝的胜利证明自己，正如我过去撕开悬锋先王的胸膛？
E: I'll transcend the prophesized fate, alright, but I've got a better way: As the son of Gorgo, I'll prove myself with one last grand victory, just like when I ripped out the old king's heart!

C: 嘟…嘟嘟。
E: Doot... Doot-Doot.

C: 那是「阳雷骑士」剑指天空的时代。她没能摘得火种，却印证了预言——凡人也能够弑杀神明。
E: That was the era of the Daythunder Knight's battle with the Sky. While she could not seize the Coreflame, she proved that the prophecy was true — that mortals could slay gods.

C: 若虫拥有的自由，只在于决定以何种方式推动圆石：时快，时慢，时而停留在一处不那么陡峭的斜坡上，倚靠圆石小憩……
E: The only freedom the nymph had was in choosing how to roll the stone: sometimes fast, sometimes slow, sometimes resting on a gentler slope, leaning against the stone for a break...

C: 在我的记忆里，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}总是在重复自己的结局……
E: In my memories, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} always meets the same end, over and over again...

C: 那他们死得其所，无愧「纷争」之名。
E: Then they died honorably, worthy of the name of "Strife."

C: 多余的死亡……
E: Unnecessary death...

C: 世界在崩塌，人们在哭嚎。
E: The world is collapsing, and the people are crying.

C: 无法…挽留么…！
E: I can't... keep him here...?

C: 也许现在，忆庭还不值得你为它付出什么。但总有一天，你会明白的…你的命运和「记忆」的命途紧密交缠，不可分离。
E: You may not want to sacrifice anything to preserve the Garden for now, but in time, you'll understand... your destiny and the Path of Remembrance are extremely closely intertwined.

C: 对，她也出了一份力。
E: Yes, she helped make this possible.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>听好了，小家伙。「毁灭」的目光看向了这里。我没有开玩笑，不是机器头，是纳努克。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Listen up, little one. The Destruction's eyes are gazing upon this place. No, I'm not joking, and no, it's not Droidhead. It's the real Nanook.</color>

C: （没什么好怕的，我注定要在这场终局之战扮演最关键的角色。更何况，我早已战胜过另一位绝灭大君。）
E: (There's nothing to fear. I'm destined to play the most important role in this final battle. I've already beaten another Lord Ravager, after all.)

C: 人家也希望是这样。只是，现在还不能排除其他可能……
E: I wish. But other possibilities remain...

C: 「冬霖爵」塞涅卡，请多指教。
E: Seneca, the Dux Brumalis. Greetings.

C: 「律法」的火种，果然在她手里……
E: That really is the Coreflame of "Law" in her hand...

C: 荒谬…简直荒谬！
E: Absurd... simply absurd!

C: 我问你，救世主：于这翁法罗斯的天幕之外，存在名为「星神」的宏伟神祇——此事为真？
E: Let me ask you, Deliverer: Is it true that, beyond Amphoreus's sky, there are magnificent deities called "Aeons"?

C: 只是寻常清洗，不必这么惊讶。
E: Just a regular cleaning, no need to be so surprised.

C: 她看起来挺释然的。
E: She looks quite relieved.

C: 你们好啊~
E: Hello to you too~

C: 你说，天外之界到底是什么样的？
E: What do you think the world beyond the sky looks like?

C: 想知道？自己去问那两个救世主啊。
E: If you're curious, just go ask those two Deliverers.

C: 喜欢便好。
E: As long as you like it.

C: 名为「仙舟联盟」的战舰联邦，好战、守旧；名为「天才俱乐部」的教团，松散、却极端疯狂；还有「星穹列车」，一群无法的流浪者……
E: There is a federation of warships named the Xianzhou Alliance, warlike and old-fashioned. A cult named the Genius Society, loosely organized but steeped in abject insanity. There's also the Astral Express, a group of lawless vagrants...
...Huh?

C: 被这么热烈地盯着…人家真的会害羞的哦？
E: Staring at me like that so intently... it's making me feel shy.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>他们可知为了「律法」的试炼，自己需要付出何种代价？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Are they aware of the price they must pay for the trial of "Law"?</color>

C: 你们所知的神谕，刻法勒口中的「再创世」…是来古士编造的，彻头彻尾的谎言。
E: The prophecy that you know of, the "Era Nova" spoken by Kephale... is nothing but a complete lie spun by Lygus.

C: 至于来古士，他根本不是你们的引路人。他不在乎翁法罗斯，更不可能在乎你们的荣誉和征程。
E: Lygus is not a guide at all. He doesn't care about Amphoreus, and cares even less about your glory and campaigns.

C: 呵…呵呵……
E: Hah... Hahah...

C: 好啦好啦，会配合你的，给——请替我们转告凯撒：无论何时何地，她都可以信任{NICKNAME}。
E: Alright, alright. We'll listen to you. Here you go. Also, please pass on a message to the Imperator from us: She can trust {NICKNAME} anywhere, anytime.

C: 我明白：几乎必然并非必然。对我而言，它相当具有说服力……
E: I understand that a near-zero possibility does not equate to zero. That argument is very persuasive to me.

C: 想和她说上几句话，真是困难重重呀……
E: Why is it so difficult to talk to her...

C: 我是玩家，不是观众！
E: I'm the player! Not the audience!

C: （对啊，我应黑天鹅之邀来到翁法罗斯，还在此接受了浮黎的瞥视，流光忆庭一定与翁法罗斯有千丝万缕的联系……）
E: (That's right... I came to Amphoreus because Black Swan asked us to come, and I even got a glance from Fuli here. The Garden of Recollection must be intricately involved with Amphoreus...)

C: …{NICKNAME}，我想，你是有话要跟我说吧？
E: ...I guess you have something you want to say to me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不过，没想到，还引来了想钻空子的小飞虫……
E: But I didn't expect to attract little gnats trying to take advantage of the situation...

C: 它的名字是「团结」。你要全身而退，将我的死讯带给仍在抗争的战士，与他们一同继续前行。
E: Its name is "solidarity." You must escape with your life and carry word of my death to those still fighting, then keep going with them.

C: 是、是一根长矛……
E: It's... it's a spear!

C: 翁法罗斯不再需要名为「纷争」的神。所以，也让我砸毁旧律，令「天谴之矛」重新变作捍卫世界的武器吧。
E: Amphoreus no longer needs a god named Strife. So let me shatter the former laws and turn the Lance of Fury back into a weapon that protects the world.

C: 谢谢。你们付出了太多。
E: Thank you. You've all sacrificed so much.

C: 我不知道…
E: I don't know...

C: 如你所见，当她卸下枷锁，终于得以环顾四周，迈开双腿，只有剧烈的痛苦袭来……
E: As you've seen, when she cast off her chains, finally turned to look around, and moved her legs, her reward was nothing but searing pain...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那段被洋流洗刷、掩盖的丑恶历史——凯撒以征服之名，行血祭之实，用五百人金血铸成的登神长阶。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>An ugly history long buried by tides and shame. A staircase of apotheosis that the Imperator forged with the golden blood of five hundred human sacrifices under the pretence of conquest.</color>

C: 他们第一次并肩而眠，再也不会从这场梦中醒来。
E: They lay side by side for the first time, never to wake from this dream again.

C: 我的胜利，便会确凿无疑。
E: Then my victory is already assured.

C: 现在，从虚假的宴会离席吧——
E: Now, step away from this false banquet...

C: 打破岁月的器皿，让这池死水倒转吧——
E: Shatter the vessel of time, and let this stagnant pool start to flow again...

C: 下一次回到这里，我便是一名纯粹的过客，透过旅行者的眼眸，我无比熟悉的一切或许也会变得十分不同吧？
E: I'll be just a traveler when I come back here again. And perhaps, through a traveler's eyes, even the things I once knew so well will feel strangely different.

C: 你不过是在重蹈覆辙。
E: You're making the same mistakes they did.

C: 不得不承认：在这场实验中，十二因子对生命行为的模拟已经远超预期。
E: I have to admit, the twelve factors' emulation of life in this experiment has far exceeded my expectations.

C: 这么冲动，可不像平时的你。
E: How impulsive. That's not like you at all.

C: 这是…黑潮？
E: Is this... the black tide?

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯？
E: Anaxagoras?

C: 看来对我这位不速之客，你已经不那么惊讶了。
E: Looks like you're no longer that surprised to see me, even though I am an uninvited guest.

C: 谁会被遗忘？
E: And who would be forgotten?

C: 「那…砂金的筹码呢？那枚小型发信器。公司线路应该能收到消息。」
E: "What about... Aventurine's chip? The mini transmitter. Surely it can get through to the IPC's lines."

C: 「我也能借机渗透进世界内部，在其他忆者入场前，尽可能为星穹列车抢占先机。」
E: "I can also take this opportunity to enter the world and seize as much of an advantage for the Astral Express as possible before the other Memokeepers arrive."

C: 轻轻敲门。
E: Knock gently.

C: 虽然，只是以「精神折跃」的形式……
E: Even if it's just through a "spirit warp jump"...

C: 这是合乎逻辑的推理，丹恒先生。
E: That is a logical inference, Mr. Dan Heng.
Right...

C: 但或许，在她眼里…只要不断向远方丢出漂流瓶，就一定会有被捡到的那天吧。
E: Maybe she thought... As long as she kept tossing drift bottles into the distance, someone was bound to pick one up someday.

C: 至于「明天」何时会到来……
E: As for when "tomorrow" will come...

C: （上传密钥。）
E: (Upload the encryption key.)

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那名为《如我所书》的诗篇。</color>
E: And they shall become the epic known as As I've Written.

C: 假如银河是一座更大的奥赫玛，里头住着一位「凯撒」，那她也许可以替所有人做主，称量天秤两端的重量。
E: If the cosmos were nothing more than a bigger Okhema, ruled by a so-called "Imperator"... maybe then she'd have the right to weigh both sides and decide for us all.

C: 看来…你们去过很多地方了？
E: So... you've been to a lot of places before?

C: 哎呀，当时那场面多紧张，我只能抓拍，有就不错了。
E: Hey, that was a super tense moment! I only had the chance to take a quick one. We're lucky to have anything at all!

C: 噔噔，噔噔噔噔噔噔~
E: Dun-dun... dun-dun-dun-dun-dun-dun~

C: 怎么没看见三月七？
E: I don't see March 7th anywhere.

C: 我明白了，{NICKNAME}是想和我们玩个游戏，对么？
E: Ah, I get it, {NICKNAME} wants to play a game with us, right?

C: 记着，就算末日临近，只有贼灵大人的笑声不会被任何邪恶势力淹没——桀桀桀桀！
E: Remember... when the end of times approaches, the great Spirithief's laughter is the only thing that will never be drowned out by any powers of evil! Hehehehe!

C: 这场战役未免太过残忍…
E: This campaign has been far too cruel...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>███于不█ █朽中██得█永生█ █</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>███From█ █permanence██gain█eternal life█ █</color>

C: 再会，海瑟音。
E: Goodbye, Hysilens.

C: 形如「翁法罗斯」的符号？
E: A symbol in the shape of "Amphoreus"?

C: 准备好了么，{NICKNAME}？一旦踏入其中，恐怕就没有退路了。
E: Ready, {NICKNAME}? Once we step inside, I'm afraid there'll be no turning back.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>{NICKNAME}…丹恒……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>{NICKNAME}... Dan Heng...</color>
...Hmm?

C: 纳努克…？白厄伤到了祂？
E: Nanook...? Phainon managed to hurt THEM?

C: 要如何证明，这不是你的又一场阴谋？
E: How do I know this won't be another trick of yours?

C: 若它从未诞生，那无名泰坦大墓又是从何而来？
E: If it never existed, then where did the nameless Titan's tomb come from?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>最初的「PhiLia」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The original "PhiLia."</color>

C: 星穹列车已着陆。若能接收到这条讯息，请立即回复。完毕。
E: The Astral Express has landed. If you receive this message, please respond immediately. Over.

C: 「而是与凡人同在的『无名客』——」
E: "Rather, I am the Nameless who dwells among mortals..."

C: 「我将它赐予你们——还给这个世界真正的主人——」
E: "I'll bestow it upon you... returning it to the true masters of this world..."

C: 若是背负世界的「全世之座」…也许能为一位彷徨星间的旅人指明前路吧。
E: If they are the "Throne of Worlds" who bears the weight of this world... perhaps they could guide a traveler still wandering among the stars.

C: 「赞达尔」说德谬歌从未诞生——谁信？记录可以被抹除，但真相不能。
E: Zandar says the Demiurge never existed. Who actually buys that? You can erase the records, but not the truth.

C: 所以，我们更不能失手。
E: Which is exactly why we can't mess this up.

C: 这是否意味着，找到德谬歌的希望已经不复存在？
E: Then... does this mean finding the Demiurge is hopeless?

C: 真相。
E: The truth.

C: 没错。根据防御性质判断，这里就是「神话之外」的入口。
E: Correct. Judging by its defensive properties, this is the entrance to the Exomyth.

C: 这也可能是陷阱。
E: But it could be a trap.

C: 识刻锚无法定位，因为在系统层面，「来古士」已经不复存在。导航目标…是一个「空集」。
E: The Chronocognitive Anchor can't get a fix because at the system level, "Lygus" no longer exists. Our navigation target is... a "null set".

C: 终于搞定了。让你的宝贝亮相吧。
E: Finally. All set. Time for your precious treasure to make its debut.

C: 逻辑：他早已意识到「记忆」的威胁，但无从排除。
E: Logic: He had already identified the Remembrance as a threat, yet found no viable way to eliminate it.

C: 看来三千万世「记忆」的重量，让我成熟了许多呢。
E: Seems like the weight of "memories" from thirty million cycles really made me grow up.

C: 站在这里，就会想起许多事。
E: Standing here brings back many memories.

C: 恰恰是那最后一丝火焰，绝无可能熄灭。
E: It is exactly that last flicker of flame that will never go out.

C: {F#她}{M#他}是在夸我们一样好看呢，对吧？
E: {M#He's}{F#She's} saying we're both pretty, right?

C: 「NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>，仍在抗拒？」
E: "NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>, still resisting?"

C: 可如果，白厄和铁墓已经彼此牵连、难分你我，那也意味着……
E: But if Phainon and Irontomb are already inseparable from each other, that would mean...

C: 我明白。
E: I know.

C: 「当然喜欢——等等，这不是重点！」
E: "Of course we do... Wait, that's not the point!"

C: 拿去，我带你们去下一座考场。
E: Take this. I'll bring you to the next test.

C: 「该死，偏头痛都要犯了。」
E: "Ugh, I'm getting a migraine."

C: 「也不奇怪。看看它肚子里——仙之人兮列如麻啊。」
E: "No wonder. Look at what's in its belly... Demigods packed in like sardines in a can."

C: 铁墓的「身」——它降临了。
E: Irontomb's "body"... has descended.

C: 「哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻」……
E: "Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti"...

C: 「尽管『毁灭』的按钮已经被按下，但我们还有机会…改写它的意义。」
E: "Though the button of Destruction has been pressed, we still have a chance... to rewrite its meaning."

C: 我怕你迷路，特意过来看看帕。
E: I specifically came over to check on you, in case you got lost.

C: 不会让你失望的，列车长。
E: I won't disappoint you, conductor.

C: 「是不是有些好奇了？但之所以会把故事放在心里，是因为相信来日方长。」
E: "So, aren't you curious? We kept these stories to ourselves because we believed we had a long future ahead of us."

C: 「以此论证：即便生命归于熵增……」
E: "Here we argue: Even if all life eventually returns to increasing entropy..."

C: 「一如既往，走进人家的『心』。」
E: "And walk into my 'heart' as you've always done."

C: 万物生机，也会从眠床中苏醒。
E: All living things will stir, roused from the cradle of sleep.

C: 订正：我在向吕枯耳戈斯提问。
E: Correction: I was asking Lycurgus.

C: （我们真的…胜利了么？为什么，没有一点实感……）
E: (Did we really... win? Why does it feel so... unreal...)

C: 小灰，你可要想清楚咯。要是我们打个响指，叫来剩下<unbreak>997</unbreak>位缇里西庇俄丝……
E: Little Gray, you better think this through. If we snap our fingers and call the other 997 Tribioses...

C: 当然，人家也是这么想的。
E: Of course. That's exactly what I think, too.

C: 平平淡淡的就好。在虚拟的演算中，我们度过了比许多星星的寿命更为漫长的岁月……
E: Let's keep it simple and sweet. In our virtual extrapolations, we've lived through epochs longer than the lifespans of many stars...

C: …我们永远不会拒绝你的请求呀，阿雅。
E: ...We'd never turn down a request from you, Agy.

C: …原来这么有讲究吗？看来，我也该恶补一下这方面的知识了。
E: ...I had no idea it was so sophisticated. Looks like I need to brush up on my knowledge in this area.

C: 温暖的地方……
E: Somewhere warm...

C: 「同一颗种子，在不同的土壤里，会开出相似而不同的花。但真正让她美丽的，是世界的每一颗心灵。」
E: "The same seed, when planted in different soils, blooms into flowers that are alike, yet never the same. But what truly makes her beautiful is each and every soul in the world."

C: 「接下来的内容，以昔涟小姐的口吻来写，质感会不会更好？」
E: "Would it feel more fitting if the rest were written in Miss Cyrene's voice?"

C: 可是没关系。他们将会将这份疑惑留存于心底，不断地去思索……
E: But that's all right. They will keep that mystery close to their hearts, constantly pondering...

C: 小到，从一枚「种子」开始。
E: So little that it started with a "seed."

C: >>>结论：不会。
E: >>> Conclusion: It won't.

C: 这次也。坐在一起。
E: This time. Too. Sitting together.

C: 有时候，它是孤独，不安。是知道世界并不温柔，希望以更美的样子被它看见。
E: Sometimes, it's loneliness and unease. It's knowing that this world is not gentle, yet wanting to be seen in a more beautiful form by the world.

C: 可以，人比我想象中多。虽然有个家伙只是来凑热闹的。
E: Not bad. More people showed up than I expected, even though one is just here for the fun of it.

C: 如来古士所愿，把他的棺材刨开。
E: Let's open Lygus's coffin like he wanted.

C: 你，还有这位神秘忍者妹，一个比一个难演。花导不喜欢疯子。
E: You, and this mysterious ninja girl... Both of you are impossible to play. Director Sparkle doesn't care for madmen.

C: ██做得好！█你的选择█成为了新的变量█
E: ██ Good job! █ Your choice █ became a new variable █

C: 人们看见「爱」的结局，踏上逐火的征程。\n而逐火的人们，又让花儿在明天诞生。
E: When people see that ending of "love," they set out on the Flame-Chase Journey.\nAnd those who chase the flame let the flower bloom anew tomorrow.

C: 因果在这一行闭合…\n或者，有个更浪漫的词，封笔。
E: The loop of causality is closed in this line...\nOr, there's a more romantic word for it: to seal the pen.

C: 佚名
E: Anonymous

C: 长夜月
E: Evernight

C: 博识尊
E: Nous

C: 这封执行启示，可是温明德队长亲手交到我手里的，绝不会出错。
E: The order was handed to me by Mr. Wen Mingde himself. It can't be a mistake.

C: 去去，你这什么跟什么啊。老爹是要给你来一招仙人指路，保你飞来横财。
E: Huh... what are you on about? I am only going to show you the way to make money. You are guaranteed to make a fortune.

C: 「星际和平公司」曾经想花五百万信用点买下它的配方，被我拒绝了。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation once wanted to spend five million credits to buy its recipe, and I refused.

C: 诓你的人是小狗。
E: I swear on my mother's grave.

C: 放心，生意人讲的就是个公道，我又怎么会为难你？
E: Don't worry, the price is a fair one. Why would I make it difficult for you?

C: 巧了不是，在下就喜欢姬子姐姐这种美貌与智慧并兼，优雅又不失温和的…科学家。
E: How fortunate! As it happens, I'm a huge fan of Himeko... An amalgamation of beauty and brains — the epitome of a graceful and gentle... scientist.

C: 所以？
E: Soooo...?

C: 一定是三月七传染的。
E: March 7th may have rubbed off on me.

C: 这就是我说的，重量级的实质性证据！哼哼……
E: That's what I call substantive evidence! Hmph...

C: 兄弟，你还挺浪漫。
E: Bro, you are very romantic.

C: ——我破坏纪录，那都是为了洛奇好！他为了莱斯莉，整天不学无术…这就算了。
E: I damaged the record for Rocky's own good! He's forgone his research because of that Lesley... Not to mention...

C: 那还会是谁的呢？难道是莱斯莉的错？
E: Whose fault is it then? Lesley's?

C: 辛克尔夫人把我从障碍判别终端调到了这里，让我跟着奇物再收容小队的温明德队长，在前线磨砺意志。
E: Mrs. Hinkel transferred me here from the Obstacle Detection Terminal so that I could follow the lead of Wen Mingde, head of the Curio Collection Squad, to toughen myself up on the front line.

C: 在你开口前，请允许我将它完整念完，否则，我会非常难受。
E: Before you say anything, please allow me to finish reciting it, otherwise, I will feel very uncomfortable.

C: 不过我没想到这条口诀才念了<unbreak>167</unbreak>次，你就激活了界域定锚。
E: But I only recited this chant <unbreak>167</unbreak> times and you already activated the Space Anchor.

C: 二、二、三，三、二、三…
E: ♪ One, two, three, one, two, three, drink... ♪

C: 屏幕上的文本似乎和希拉有关，这应该就是她口中的「监视屏」。
E: The text on the screen seems to be talking about Sheila. Looks like this is the security monitor she speaks of.

C: 既然你有很多疑惑，我们不妨心平气和地聊一聊，也许就能化干戈为玉帛。
E: I see you have a lot of doubts about me. Why don't we have a chat. Maybe we can be friends?

C: …哦，你已经和她说过话了。真是个有心人，如果不仔细核对的话，是不会发现这一点的。
E: ...Oh, you've spoken to her. That's very observant of you. Most people wouldn't notice this without paying close attention.

C: 三，销毁原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>，将这个危险的实验从空间站的历史中抹去。
E: 3. Destroy Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> and erase all records of this dangerous experiment from the history of the space station.

C: 名单一出来，我就安排他们去核查了，但是调查结果都是「正常」。
E: I arranged for them to investigate as soon as I identified the list of suspects. But they all found nothing unusual.

C: 这衣服不是什么名牌。
E: This is not a luxurious outfit.

C: 对啊，现在你该明白了吧？正因如此，你特殊的身份才是干这件事的最好人选！
E: Now you understand, right? That's why your special identity makes you the perfect candidate for this!

C: 对，全部都查出来了。
E: Yes, I think I got the result.

C: （告知自己的所见与分析）
E: (Tell her your observation and your analysis.)

C: 虽说大家有着不同的文化背景，但有些最基础的权益却是大家公认的底线，万万不可剥夺。
E: Although we come from different cultural backgrounds, some of the most basic rights and interests are recognized by all of us as the common bottom line and must not be deprived.

C: 因为乔安之前完全抹掉了自己的个人生活，这非常不合理。用个简单的比喻来说，人的承受力是有限的，就像气球那样——
E: Joanne completely wiped out her personal life, which is very unusual. Think about this simple analogy. People's capacity for work is limited, just like how a balloon can only hold a finite amount of air...

C: 确实有点蹊跷。
E: Sure is.

C: 果然{NICKNAME}也这么想吧？
E: I knew it. {NICKNAME}, you think so too, right?

C: 这个字迹有点眼熟…？像是阿兰的…
E: This handwriting looks familiar... Is it Arlan's...?

C: 还有一部分是有关修行的笔记。
E: It also contained some information on trials.

C: 我…这个只是……
E: I... This is just...

C: 不要说了！
E: Stop!

C: 双方都应该多多沟通才对。
E: You need to talk to each other more.

C: 谢谢你们二位的配合！如果遇到危险，记得及时向防卫科求助。
E: Thank you for your assistance! If you run into danger, remember to ask for help from the Security Department in time.

C: 正义凛然如我，提到神出鬼行、捕风捉影这类歪邪之气，那是一概不知！
E: A man, as righteous as I am, has no knowledge of any activities regarding nefarious spirits and their related photographic activities!

C: 没、没什么！在下正义之士卢卡奇，正在为空间站的非人生物合理权益四处奔走！
E: N—Nothing! I am Lukacs the justice fighter, and I am fighting for the rights of non-human creatures on the space station!

C: 它们在军团入侵期间逃跑了。哎，本来好好躲着，也就和大伙相安无事……
E: They managed to escape during the Legion invasion. Honestly, if they just went into hiding, there would've been no trouble for the rest of the space station...

C: 就跟踪你了。
E: That's right, we did.

C: 这也是为什么它们总被拍到，难缠的对手耗尽了它们用于隐蔽自身的精力。
E: That's why they kept getting photographed. They were so occupied with dealing with difficult opponents that they had no spare energy left to stealth themselves.

C: 艾丝妲小姐说，道谢一定要真诚…可惜最后还是这么仓促……
E: Miss Asta said that gratitude has to be sincere... It's a shame that I had to finish it up so hastily...

C: 嘿，你猜？
E: Hehe, can you guess?

C: 是在给你穿小鞋吧。
E: She's getting revenge on you.

C: 没错！
E: That's right!

C: 发生了什么？
E: What happened?

C: 模拟宇宙要关停？那可是黑塔女士的重点项目啊，要是没了，她会怎么发飙我想都不敢想……
E: The Simulated Universe? Shut down? That's Madam Herta's biggest project. I can't imagine how mad she'd be if it fell through...

C: 可是…
E: But...

C: 她的目标始终是以太卡带，只是在过程中产生了一些意图战胜我和黑塔的想法。
E: Her ultimate goal was always the Aether Cartridge, but she developed an alternative objective in challenging Herta and me in the process.

C: 宇宙存在的终极意义是？
E: What is the ultimate meaning of the existence of the Universe?

C: 我想通过这场演练，让大家对网络安全有更深的认识。当然，在正式开始前，测试和反复修改肯定是少不了的。
E: Through the drill, I want to deepen everyone's understanding of network security. Of course, before we start, testing and repeating revision is compulsory.

C: 纯美骑士团纵情穿梭于各个星球，在寰宇间传播着「纯美」的美名，令众生知晓祂的存在。我等以信仰的诫律严苛要求自身，淬炼肉体、捍卫荣誉。
E: The Knights of Beauty travel from planet to planet, spreading the Beauty's glorious reputation across the universe so that every being may know of THEIR existence. We strictly adhere to the commandments of our faith, tempering our physical forms and upholding our honor.

C: 抱歉，瓦尔特先生，是我太过专注与{NICKNAME}之间的交流。现在，也该正式介绍我登车拜访的初衷：是为合作解决面前的「危机」。
E: My deepest apologies, Mr. Yang, my concentration has been solely centered on my conversation with {NICKNAME}. Now, it is only fitting to disclose the main reason for my presence here: To work jointly in resolving the crisis before us.

C: 原来是这样。如果列车真的已经被吞入腹中……
E: I see. If the Express has been swallowed...

C: …那你之后怎么办？
E: What are your plans after that?

C: 有别的飞船也在这片区域遭遇阻塞，一时没有控制好速度。追尾发生后，有两个家伙找上列车来了。
E: Another vessel in our vicinity encountered the same obstruction and was unable to control its velocity. After the collision, two individuals found their way onto the Express.

C: 列车是众人的家，我们遇到什么事都一起面对帕！呜哇，还好{NICKNAME}乘客也回来了…虽然，虽然有点不赶巧了帕。
E: The Express is home to all of us — no matter what happens, we're in this together! Woo-hoo, you're back! Although I guess that doesn't change our odds...

C: 列车在「开拓」中总会遇到各种各样的困难…不止现在这一次，在可预见的未来…我毫不怀疑会发生很多类似的事，但我们仍不会停止「开拓」。
E: The Express has faced all kinds of obstacles on its journey — today is just another one. It's no reason to stop trailblazing.

C: 你！都这种时候了，还不能有话直说嘛？
E: Seriously? Can't you just tell all of us?

C: 没有。袭击发生的地点是站外基台，不在监控范围内。
E: No. The attack happened on a base outside the station — beyond the surveillance cameras' range.

C: 就经验来看，这也是最高效的做法：怀着否定的心态求索，也是一种求索，同样能帮助我们抵达正确的终点。
E: It is also the most efficient method, judging from my experience — seeking answers with a negative hypothesis in mind is still valid research. It can still help us reach the truth.

C: 听说你有麻烦。
E: I heard you're in a bit of trouble.

C: 不仅要找奇物，还要找人？
E: So not only do I have to find a Curio, I have to find a person too?

C: 我虽然是界种科的室长，但不是界种科最了解奇物的人。小<color=#dbc291ff>阿德勒</color>一定能给你更多线索。
E: Well, I might be the Department of Ecology head, but I'm not the most knowledgeable person when it comes to Curios.

C: 是我，怎么了？
E: That's me. What's up?

C: 证据应该是存在的。阿兰在调查连续失踪事件时，发现了一件怪事。
E: There should be evidence. Arlan discovered something odd when he was investigating the disappearances.

C: 如果他的失踪也和袭击有关——恐怕他真的意识到了什么。
E: If his disappearance is also related to the case here, then maybe he really did stumble upon something important.

C: 我？
E: Me?

C: 时间紧迫，这就从头梳理一遍现状吧。从已知信息中，可以发现三个突破口……
E: We're running out of time, let's retrace our steps and evaluate the situation. From the data we've collected, there are three avenues we can explore...

C: …不，还不够。
E: ...No. It isn't enough.

C: 辛苦了，你做得很好。
E: Good work. You did very well.

C: 事情告一段落了？
E: Is it over?

C: 火焰在逐渐衰弱，冥火大公无法再维持它了。
E: The flame is getting weaker. Duke Inferno can't maintain it anymore.

C: 你的目的，究竟……
E: What... is your goal...?

C: 此前几日，我向黑塔暗示对你有兴趣。因为我想让你成为「助手」，你是合适的人选——在模拟宇宙为数不多的接触中，我如此确信。
E: A few days ago, I made my interest in you known to Herta. My intention is for you to serve as an "assistant." Based on our interactions within the Simulated Universe, I firmly believe you fit the bill.

C: 麻烦？
E: Problems?

C: 嘶…你自己看你培育出了什么吧。
E: Yikes... take a look at what you just cultivated.

C: 出示阮•梅的指令卡。
E: Show Ruan Mei's card.

C: 它似乎在提醒你路上有着可能的威胁……
E: It seems to be warning you of potential threats ahead...

C: （竟然有这么一大群……）
E: (I never imagined there'd be so many of them...)

C: …算了，就当做个示范：我知道你是谁，也知道你在为阮•梅办事；我本是空间站的访客，误入此地，目睹了她的实验。
E: *sigh* ...Never mind. Allow me to clarify something. I know exactly who you are, and I'm aware you are in Ruan Mei's employ. This was not my intended destination — I just happened to find my way here during my visit and saw what she was up to.

C: 各类贵宾。嘶嘶。可能有危险人士，嘶嘶。
E: Many esteemed guests. *buzz*. May include dangerous persons. *buzz*

C: 你的眼光不会错的。
E: I trust your tastes.

C: 你当然可以！实话说，我马上就要去公司接受艺人培训，会离开贝洛伯格很长一段时间。
E: Of course you can! To be honest, I am about to go to the IPC to undergo training, and I will be away from Belobog for a long time.

C: 关键就在于泡茶用的水，寻常的井水河水都不行，必须用海水，而且还得是波月古海的海水。
E: The key is in the water used to brew the tea. Regular well or river water aren't good enough for this recipe. It has to be seawater. More specifically, it has to be seawater from the Lunarescent Depths.

C: 应该不会再有漂流瓶了。
E: I imagine that's the end of the Drift Bottles.

C: 我是你的随身助手，为你解决日常事务是我的职责。
E: I am your assistant. It is my duty to help you complete your daily affairs.

C: 我们穿的就和你们不一样。
E: Take a look at our clothes.

C: 这世界里「星核」的影响恐怕非同寻常。
E: I fear the Stellaron may be exerting a significant influence on this world.

C: 看来我们又得介入了。
E: Looks like we'll have to intervene.

C: 倒也不是，其实我们……
E: Not exactly. Actually, we—

C: 没事没事，我们也不赶急。话说，你不跟着我们进城吗？这雪原多冷呀，还容易迷路……
E: Don't be sorry! It's not like we're in a rush. Wanna come to the city with us? The Snow Plains are freezing, and it's easier than you think to get lost out here.

C: 对，超级喜欢！啊，你们之前见过账账了吧？可惜，它现在应该是自己玩去了。
E: I absolutely adore them! Have you guys met Numby yet? Aw, where'd they go? They must be off playing somewhere.

C: …就刚才啊，在博物馆跟托帕聊完以后？
E: ...Right after we finished chatting with Topaz in the museum.

C: …这叫哪门子「疏散」？明明就是你们强行霸占了矿区，还把矿民赶出了自家家门！
E: Don't lie to us! You seized the mine by force for yourself — you drove the locals out of their homes!

C: 我能够理解，对你而言，这会是一个极度艰难的抉择，因为你必须背负起贝洛伯格全体居民的命运。
E: I can understand that for you, this is an extremely difficult decision, because you, and you alone will bear the fate of all Belobogians.

C: 欸？怎…怎么了？
E: Huh? Wh—What do you mean?

C: 时间很紧了，佩拉！布洛妮娅需要知道大家的想法。
E: We don't have much time, Pela! Bronya wants to get everyone's opinion.

C: 如果公司的方案真的能够立竿见影，付出这样的代价在我看来是值得的。
E: If the IPC is able to bring about immediate change, then I think that's a price well worth paying.

C: 到了我这年纪，那些宏图大业，或者什么远大的计划，早就没什么吸引力了。
E: The truth is, great ambitions and lofty plans no longer hold much appeal to an old-timer like me.

C: 不，不对。这是布洛妮娅的责任。
E: No, this responsibility rests on Bronya's shoulders, not mine.

C: …不管啦，咱们先去铆钉镇找他汇合吧。
E: No time for guesses! Let's just head to Rivet Town and find Gepard first.

C: 这又是在闹哪样…
E: What's going on now...

C: 罗希少爷在哪高就？
E: Master Rossy, may I inquire as to where you'll be employed next?

C: 也就给我爸打打下手…
E: I'll be helping my father with his affairs...

C: 托帕就是顺着这条路离开了铆钉镇。
E: This is the road that Topaz took when she left Rivet Town.

C: 娜塔莎医生，需要我的帮助吗？
E: Need any help, Dr. Natasha?

C: 面子比命重要，我懂你的意思。
E: Appearances are more important than life, I feel you.

C: 我在乎。
E: I care.

C: 「互助」什么？
E: Virtual who?

C: 虽然娜塔莎医生也在这里，但我还是得实话实说…依我看，瓦赫欠缺医德，根本算不上是个医生！
E: I know Dr. Natasha's here, but I have to tell it like it is... Vache had zero medical ethics — he didn't deserve the title "doctor."

C: 把「特效药」交出来吧。
E: Hand over the wonder medicine.

C: 你这家伙，就是诊所那个女医生的跟班吧？你以为我们「互助会」没有自己的情报网吗？
E: You're that clinic woman's lackey, aren't you. Did you think the mutual aid society didn't have its own intel?

C: 他开始尝试复现轻微的裂界侵蚀效果，认为这种研究能促进「风雪免疫」的开发……
E: He began to simulate mild Fragmentum corrosion, thinking that it could lead to breakthroughs in developing Blizzard Immunity.

C: 我宣布：本赛季圆满结束，恭喜您成为冠军！史考特商业联盟已为您准备了海量豪华奖励，请您务必收好！
E: I hereby announce: The season has come to a successful conclusion, congratulations on becoming the champion! Scott Business Alliance has prepared a large number of luxurious rewards for you, please be sure to collect them!

C: 本场比赛，我们隆重有请——搏击俱乐部传说中的客座拳手、来自高墙之外的超级新星——
E: Coming up, we are honored by a legendary guest fighter from the Fight Club, a superstar from beyond the walls—

C: 而在{M#他}{F#她}面前的又是本赛季中另一匹黑马——来自熔锤镇的年轻机械师！
E: And in front of {M#him}{F#her} is another dark horse of this season — the young mechanic from Moltammerville!

C: 你是这么暴躁的人吗？君子动口不动手，这张俏脸要是挂了彩，多难看呀。
E: Is that the kind of violent thug you are? Hey, you don't want to ruin this pretty face, do you?

C: 那你说说，现在是什么状况？
E: Oh... well fine. Then tell me, what's going on now?

C: 自有星辉拂路。
E: A path will be lit by the radiance of the stars.

C: 啊，好像在那儿！
E: Ah! Over there!

C: 不要正面跟他们冲突，找找别的路吧。
E: We should avoid an open conflict. Let's find another path.

C: 冷静，佩拉，冷静…快把今天看到的都忘掉……
E: Calm down, Pela, calm down... Forget what you saw today...

C: 明白了，你要注意安全。
E: I see. Stay safe.

C: 佩拉——我在这里——
E: Pela, I'm here!

C: 游荡的怪物来到这边了…不要惊动他们，快速通过这里吧。
E: Some roaming monsters are here... Try not to alert them. Let's get past this area quickly.

C: 如果运气足够好的话，或许我能拜托他们，帮下层区争取到额外的医疗资源。
E: If I'm lucky, maybe I can convince them to send extra medical supplies to the Underworld.

C: 养母喜欢的花是…
E: What was your mother's favorite flower...?

C: 我的养父是贝洛伯格名气响亮的外科医生。也正因如此，他的每台手术都是医界的焦点…他总是背负着巨大的压力。
E: My father is a famous surgeon in Belobog. Because of his fame, people in medical circles paid great attention to his surgeries... He always had a lot of stress to deal with.

C: 向巡逻的银鬃铁卫解释了你们的身份和来意……
E: You explain your identity and purpose to the patrolling Silvermane Guard.

C: 与娜塔莎一起，为瓦赫在雪中立了一座墓碑……
E: You and Natasha put up a headstone for Vache...

C: 接下来你打算怎么办？
E: What now?

C: 挑好了吗？让我看看你选了什么花吧。
E: All done? May I have a look?

C: …哇，你的直觉好敏锐！没错，这件展品是最近才失窃的。
E: ...Wow, you're quick! Yes, this exhibit was stolen just recently.

C: 或许是因为张贴海报的人希望大家知晓这个组织的存在…只是不想再冒被「地火」或铁卫揭发的风险。
E: Maybe the organization behind this wanted people to know of their existence without giving too much away to Wildfire or the Guards...

C: 不过我理解你的担忧。我也觉得这整个调查过程过于轻松了……
E: I understand why you're suspicious though. This whole investigation was a little too easy...

C: 展品的价值不能单独用金钱来衡量…当然，这小小一块石头也的确价值千金就是了。
E: The value of items housed here can't be measured in money alone... but this little piece of stone could fetch a mountain of cash.

C: 克拉拉，我们来帮你一起调查失控机器人的事吧。
E: Clara, we'll help you investigate what's going on with the robots.

C: …咦？但是，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}和佩拉姐姐难道没有别的要紧事要忙吗……
E: Really? But don't you and Miss Pela have something important to do?

C: 呃，也对哦……
E: Ugh, I guess that's true...

C: …好了好了，就此打住。莱姆士汀先生，您是有什么话想跟我们说吗？
E: Alright, alright, we got it. Mr. Limestein, is there something you want to discuss with us?

C: …成功了！幻灯片播放一切正常，看来微缩胶片没有被损坏。
E: ...It works! The slides play without a hitch — the microfilm is undamaged.

C: …胶片呢？货都准备好了吗？
E: ...And the film? Is it packed and ready to go?

C: 别挣扎了，诺尔伯特少爷——你的从犯已经被我们制服，现在没地方跑了！
E: There's no point in resisting, Mr. Norbert. Your accomplices have been subdued. There's nowhere to run.

C: 很明显，你回答错了。寒腿叔叔这下不做声了…糟糕。
E: You obviously answered wrong. Not a peep can be heard from Mr. Cold Feet. Uh-oh....

C: 这，你这…怎么油盐不进啊，这可不像你啊，{NICKNAME}！
E: I... I mean... H—How can you be so unaccommodating? That is not like you, {NICKNAME}!

C: 在空荡荡的客房里等了一会儿……
E: You wait for a while in the empty room...

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您好！感谢您一直以来的协助，历史文化博物馆现在又重现生机了…我只在小的时候见过这么热闹的景象！
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, hello! Thank you for all your help — business at the museum is booming again! I haven't seen this many people here since I was a little girl!

C: 「有需要的话随时打我号码，你的老朋友保证随叫随到！放心吧，干一行爱一行，我很有敬业精神的——绝对连展品的一根毫毛都不碰。嘿嘿。」
E: "What I mean to say is, If you're ever in need of a passionate and professional individual — one with an inside knowledge of museum security blind spots — I'm only a call away! Don't worry, my exhibit smuggling days are behind me, hehe..."

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。那我们出发吧。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. Then let's go.

C: 哇哦，听起来很适合举办鼹鼠大探险！
E: Wow, sounds like the perfect place for the Moles' big adventure!

C: 哇哦，听起来很适合我们鼹鼠党！
E: Wow, sounds like the perfect thing for us Moles!

C: 就说是我帮你改的…
E: Just say it's my idea...

C: 你想想啊——「贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆」里边的「历史」和「文化」俩词儿，哪个和我沾边？
E: I mean, just think about the name "Belobog History and Culture Museum." Do you really think I would fit anywhere near the "History" and the "Culture"?

C: 没问题，我们会等你的。
E: No problem. We'll wait for you.

C: 哔嘟…怎么样，对查宝刮目相看了吧。
E: Beep, beep, beep... What's that? Is that a hint of respect for Findie?

C: 哔嘟…目前暂不支持搜寻有机生命体的功能。详情请致电「星际和平家电」门店咨询。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Biological life form search is currently not supported. If you have any questions, please call Interastral Peace Appliances.

C: 你知道就好，可不能让这孩子由着性子来。
E: I'm glad we're on the same page. We can't just let this kid do whatever she wants.

C: 案发当时你在干嘛？
E: What were you doing when the crime occurred?

C: 不是我偷的，真的不是我……
E: I didn't steal it. Really, it wasn't me...

C: 哼，反正现在宝物在我手上——你们有种就抢回去啊！
E: Hmph, anyway, I got the device now! Come take it... if you have the guts!

C: 虎克和{NICKNAME}帮老爹抓到了偷东西的小偷！
E: {NICKNAME} and Hook helped daddy catch the thief that stole it!

C: 但是老爹的探测器…已经坏掉了。都怪虎克没有早点找到，不然……
E: But... daddy's detector... is broken. It's all my fault... If only I could've found it sooner...

C: 只拿回一件我也没法开工啊…咱们再商量商量？跟我合作肯定不吃亏……
E: I can't get to work with just one... Why don't we discuss this further? I can promise you won't regret working with me...

C: …行吧。
E: ...Fine.

C: 你想想，这矿具三件套，对矿工来说可不就是宝藏吗？这几件装备结合起来能产出的价值，比任何宝箱战利品都——
E: Think about it... aren't these three pieces of mining tools the real treasure to a miner? The total amount of value that could be produced by these pieces of equipment is surely more than any treasure that I know of—

C: 你…你们是银、银鬃铁卫吗？
E: A—Are you... a Silvermane Guard?

C: 可可利亚，你这个…混蛋！先是终止我的研究，然后又要破坏我的生活…你还想从我这儿夺走什么？！
E: Cocolia, you... you witch! You terminated my research and ruined my life... What else do you want to take away from me!?

C: 这样不太好吧…
E: That might be difficult...

C: 没事没事，这种元件很常见，保不齐附近的废墟里就有能用的替换件呢。
E: That's okay. These components are really common. Maybe we can find a spare one in the ruins around here.

C: 看起来是的，而且大概是不久前才被放在这里……
E: Sure looks like it... And they were probably placed here not long ago...

C: 我觉得…这捆红肠，有可能成为轰动贝洛伯格的科考发现！我们把它带回去吧。
E: I feel like... these sausages might constitute a great Belobogian scientific discovery! Let's bring them back with us.

C: 那么，今晚的主菜就决定是这个了——嘿嘿，让你见识下我的厨艺吧。
E: Then let's just say it'll be tonight's main course, haha. Time to show you my culinary skills!

C: 他们两个都是很厉害，很优秀的人…但也正是因为这样，和他们相处的时候我总会感到压力……
E: They're both really capable and awesome people... Which is why I feel really pressured when I'm with them...

C: 既然你跟了我们一路，想必也知道我们来这里露营是为了什么——
E: Since you followed us all the way here, you probably know why we're out camping today...

C: 玲可好不容易回来一趟…怎么还是不愿意见见我们呢。
E: Between expeditions, it's always a challenge to make time with Lynx... but why doesn't she want to talk to us?

C: 玲可！你终于回来了——
E: Lynx! You're finally back...

C: 如果能让他彻底改过，付出这点代价算不了什么。
E: If it will make him change his ways, it's more than worth it.

C: 你一个人的话可就难了。
E: It wouldn't have been so easy on your own though.

C: 我了解娜塔，她不会介意的。虽说这样会让我俩的善后工作翻倍…不过她肯定能理解，一向都是这么过来的。
E: If I know Nat, she won't mind. Although this will make it more difficult for us... she'll understand. She always does.

C: 你不是把那什么奖章送给埃里克了吗？这玩意没那么值钱，但好歹算个替代。
E: You gave your medal to that kid Eric. This thing might not be as valuable, but it's at least a replacement of sorts.

C: 啊，找到尤利安要的宝贝了！不是那串钥匙，是这些玻璃珠。你看，这有好多种颜色呀！想集齐这一整套可不容易嗷。
E: Ah, we found Julian's treasure! No, not the key — these glass marbles. Look at all the different colors! I bet it wasn't easy collecting all these.

C: 真、真的嘛！老巫婆好像确实说过，有些东西埋久了以后会产生「有毒气体」……
E: Really? The old witch did say that some things will emit a poisonous gas after being buried for a long time...

C: 这就是你的宝贝？
E: This is your treasure?

C: ——帕斯卡，收到！乖乖，等待！
E: Pascal, affirmative! Be good, wait!

C: 是克拉拉，她比我们先一步到了储藏室。止痛剂我们跟她平分了。
E: Clara had already arrived at the storage room by the time we got there. We split the painkillers with her.

C: 重新评估中——个体威胁指数：高。战斗模组启动，准备清除威胁。
E: Reassessing... Subject threat index: High. Initializing combat module. Threat elimination activated.

C: 寻求和平，了解。但那是你们单方面的表态。
E: You seek peace, understood. Nevertheless, your statement is unilateral.

C: 至于我的态度，要在评估和你们的交涉结果后确定。
E: My position will be determined after assessing the result of our negotiation.

C: 「话不投机半句多」说的就是这种情况吧？多亏桑博我早有准备！
E: Guess you guys had a bad talk, huh? Luckily, Sampo's got your back!

C: 来的人越多，可供交易的商品就越丰富，拍卖会的目的也就能达到了！
E: The more attendees we have, the more items there will be for trade, and the better we can meet the auction's goal!

C: 啊，是虎克的熊玩偶吗？基本缝补好了，你拿去看看吧。
E: Oh, your teddy bear? Hehe... He's nearly done. Here, take a look at him.

C: 你好，你们是来参加拍卖会的吗？
E: Welcome! Are you here to take part in the auction?

C: 那个熊玩偶不简单啊…你看到了吗？
E: Well, look at that. That's no ordinary teddy bear...

C: 咳，没错…没想到还有其他人发现了啊。哎，看来想把宝石搞到手没那么容易……
E: Ahem, yes... I didn't think anyone else had noticed. *sigh* I guess getting my hands on those gems won't be so simple after all...

C: 你看它的造型，多可爱！告诉你，它的触感也特别柔软，让人忍不住想紧紧抱住哦！
E: His design is super cute and he's really really soft! You can't help but give him a biiiig hug!

C: 「本来想买」？
E: But not anymore?

C: 好，就抢{F#她们}{M#他们}！上啊！
E: Agreed. Get them!

C: 那个哥哥和他奶奶的关系好像很好哦！如果是他们把「菌菌」抱回家的话，「菌菌」肯定也会开心的吧……
E: Aww, they're really sweet! Junjun will be super happy if they take him home...

C: 三百五十！
E: <unbreak>350</unbreak>!

C: 小事而已，根本不需要奖励。
E: It's no big deal, I don't need any praise.

C: 那就一言为定了。不过，真没想到你们能拍到了这么贵的东西。看来大熊玩偶应该卖出了个好价钱吧？
E: Deal. I can't believe you won such a valuable item. Junjun must have fetched a small fortune, huh?

C: 好奇怪的外号呀……
E: That sounds kinda weird...

C: 小心，我们不要打草惊蛇。
E: Be careful. We don't want to alert the culprit.

C: 唔…它的结构实在是太异常了。克拉拉从没见过这种结构的机器人。
E: Its design is, well, unique. I've never seen a robot with a design like this before.

C: 从先前的检查中得出的结果——该机体核心模组中储存的校验信息与现有硬件不兼容。
E: The examination conducted earlier revealed that the information stored in this robot's core module is incompatible with the new hardware.

C: ——克拉拉！
E: Clara!

C: 没错…这件事因克拉拉而起，也只能由克拉拉来终结。
E: That's right... This all started with me and can only end with me.

C: 那…{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我们出发吧！
E: So... Let's go, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}!

C: 这套程序可以限制帕斯卡的行为，防止它对其他人造成伤害——
E: This suite of programs can regulate Pascal's behavior and prevent him from hurting people.

C: 此前的结论仍然成立——该个体的故障概率及信息噪音比例仍在不断上升，未来有可能引发安全隐患。
E: The prior assessment remains valid. The risk of error and the amount of muddled information in this robot is increasing, and has the potential to cause future security concerns.

C: …不过，我也明白{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的想法。克拉拉必须承认，自己做不到像史瓦罗先生那样理性，考虑事情也没有那么全面……
E: However, I respect your point of view. I admit I might not be as rational as Mr. Svarog, and don't think things through as much...

C: 也许在他看来，帕斯卡会伤害别人是迟早的事…所以他才一直劝克拉拉早点放手。
E: Maybe Mr. Svarog believes Pascal will harm someone else eventually, which is why he keeps telling me to let go.

C: 嗯…难怪守卫森严。
E: Mm... no wonder it's so heavily guarded.

C: 糟了，他是个聪明人……
E: Darn, this guy's not stupid...

C: 银鬃铁卫，列队！
E: Guards, formation!

C: 我也不能丢下你们不管啊！
E: We can't abandon you either!

C: 呃…那个……
E: Ahem... well...

C: 救人性命是我的天职。
E: Saving people is my passion.

C: 后面的事估计你也听到了，我就不说了。总之，我希望你能尽快找到那些失控的机器人，回收他们的<color=#dbc291ff>「核心模组」</color>！
E: I guess you've already heard what happened afterwards, so I'll say no more. In short, I hope you can deal with those out of control robots as soon as possible and take back their <color=#dbc291ff>"Core Modules"</color>!

C: 前线压力越来越大，现在必须得调整铁卫的战术策略了……
E: The pressure on the front lines is increasing, and now the strategy of the Silvermane Guards must be adjusted...

C: 我也看到了，走吧。
E: ...I see it too — let's go.

C: 他们毕生忙于编撰颂扬人类勇气的赞歌，却抽不出时间凝神仰望星空。
E: They spent lifetimes writing songs of praise that lauded the bravery of humanity, but couldn't spare the time to gaze up into the stars.

C: 第一任守护者在这里指挥银鬃铁卫作战，用巨大的牺牲换来了短暂的喘息之机。
E: This is where the first guardian led the Silvermane Guards into battle. She made huge sacrifices for the sake of temporary respite.

C: 喂，你又在说什么丧气话呀！
E: Hey, way to boost morale over there!

C: 我绝不…允许！
E: I will not... let you!

C: 唔…你在这个时候被琥珀王瞥了一眼？这也太巧了吧……
E: Uh... you drew the Amber Lord's gaze? Right at that moment? That's too much of a coincidence...

C: 我渴求你最后一次的施舍…希望你能赐予我最后的安宁。
E: I beg you for one last piece of generosity... I hope you can bless me with everlasting peace.

C: 虽然早知道公司在寒潮前就光顾了这颗行星，但据我所知，反物质军团正式登陆雅利洛-Ⅵ之前，公司的人就已经全部撤离了。
E: I knew the IPC had been on this planet before the Eternal Freeze, but as far as I was aware, it had pulled everyone out before the Antimatter Legion officially landed on Jarilo-VI.

C: 别客气。希望克里珀堡的藏书能为你提供帮助。
E: You're welcome. I hope Qlipoth Fort's book collection will be of use to you.

C: 梅姐又回到事故现场了。
E: Mei has returned to the scene.

C: 我们先去找梅姐问问，再找找有没有目击者的证词吧。
E: Let's ask Mei first before we look for other witnesses for their accounts.

C: 俺就记得今天油鸡店有折扣，芦慧姑娘从前就爱吃这些不健康的东西…她也挺长时间没吃了，所以俺就想买一点给她。
E: I remember a discount at the roasted chicken store today. Ms. Luhui had always liked these unhealthy foods... It's been a while since she had any, so I wanted to buy some for her.

C: 她才没有空操心俺呢，她是大制作人，能调度好几百号人的拍摄现场，可有本事了。
E: She has no time to worry about me. She's a huge producer who commands a film set with hundreds of people working. She's so capable.

C: 从这个角度上来看，好像有星槎的引擎有些问题。
E: From this angle, it seems that there is some problem with the starskiff's engine.

C: 你们有打听到肇事星槎去了哪里吗？
E: Have you found out where the offending starskiff went?

C: 能「发出了巨大的声音」，应该是指非法改造的引擎。估计它还在迴星港里，你们要是现在赶过去，应该能人赃俱获。
E: It made a deafening sound. Its engine must have been illegally modified. There is a great chance that this starskiff is still in Stargazer Navalia. If you go there right now, you should be able to catch it.

C: 你顺着声音的源头仔细寻找，发现一册书不知为何悬挂在树枝上，有一种凌乱的美感。
E: You carefully search the tree for the source of the sound and find a book hanging on the branches. The scene gives off a crude sense of beauty.

C: 实话告诉你吧，这味药来自仙舟人堕入魔阴身后的增生产物。若不猎杀仙舟人，便不可能得到。
E: Let me tell you the truth. This is nothing less than the overgrowth on the bodies of mara-struck Xianzhou natives. You cannot obtain this ingredient without killing Xianzhou humans.

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 「我不会写诗。」
E: "I can't write poetry."

C: 你为什么要抬走蘑菇？
E: Why do you want to pick up a mushroom?

C: 求求你，打开我的后盖。给…我…个…痛…快…吧。
E: Please, open me up. Set... me... free...

C: …我这几句写得也没有什么毛病吧？
E: ...There's nothing wrong with this new verse I just composed, right?

C: 嚯哈哈哈哈！{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}多虑了，老夫没有理由对你出手。
E: Hohoho! You worry too much, {F#young lady}{M#young sir}, I've no reason to hurt you.

C: 哼，手下败将。
E: Hmph. A defeated opponent.

C: 诗又不是航船，还能等来？
E: Poems aren't spaceships. Can it come just by waiting?

C: 我欲乘风归去…
E: Take me to my place of resting...

C: 听说先生喜好远游。不知道此行是否心满意足？
E: I heard that you are an enthusiast for distant sojourns, sir. Are you satisfied with this trip?

C: 我反对，别浪费时间了。
E: Nay. Don't waste your time.

C: 你狠狠地教训了古板的格律诗人，你让它明白了自由派诗歌的力量——虽然它再也没有改变诗风的机会了。真是可喜可贺。
E: You taught the old-fashioned Metrical Poet a lesson and schooled it about the power of free verse. It was a shame that it no longer has the chance to change the style of its poems. How wonderful.

C: 走吧，灵感玉兆和《流云集》都拿到了，我们可以去出发找主人了。
E: Let's go. Since we already have the Inspo Jade Abacus and the Drifting Clouds, we may set off to meet our master.

C: 「蘑菇」我要这样的，你给我这样的！
E: "Mushroom," I want something like that!

C: 不过，以我们持明族的经验来看，这怎么可能呢。
E: However, this isn't possible from the perspective of the Vidyadhara like us.

C: 句不成形，诗不成韵…
E: The verses inside do not follow a certain pattern, and they do not rhyme.

C: {NICKNAME}？我想起来了，你是星穹列车上的人。
E: {NICKNAME}? I remember now, you're one of the Astral Express people.

C: 但是不碍着别人！
E: But this doesn't concern the others!

C: 你把对面吓着了。
E: You scared her.

C: 没错，我们怀疑你冒领他人快递。
E: Indeed, we suspect you of fraudulently claiming someone else's delivery.

C: 把会员资格送给我。
E: Grant me membership.

C: 唔？等等，这个发亮的痕迹是…？我没看错吧，这不是学会的内部标记吗？
E: Huh? Hold on. What's this shiny mark? Are my eyes failing me? Isn't it a marking of the Guild?

C: 这绝不是我在胡诌。内行的人自然能看懂图案意义，但对于从未接触过知识的人而言，这只是一张无意义的图样罢了。
E: I'm not making this up. A professional can understand its meaning, but for those without the knowledge, this is just a meaningless drawing.

C: 这些图样描绘的神话或历史故事也谈不上什么禁忌知识。贝尼尼老师为什么要将这些为人所知的信息留在丹鼎司和鳞渊境里呢？
E: The other myths and historical stories aren't exactly taboos. Why did Bernini leave these drawings in the Alchemy Commission and Scalegorge Waterscape?
