C: 行，咱们走吧。
E: Alright. Let's go.

C: 我不想成为罪犯的帮凶。
E: I have no intention of becoming a criminal accomplice.

C: 你害怕？你害怕被仙舟联盟狩猎？
E: You're scared? Are you scared of being hunted by the Xianzhou Alliance?

C: 我只是…想向你道声谢，{NICKNAME}，自始至终你都从旁见证着我。
E: I just wanted to... say thanks to you, {NICKNAME}, for being there for me right from the start.

C: 这是从药王秘传那里得到的药方，白露你能看看吗？
E: This is a prescription from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Bailu, can you take a look?

C: 不过销声匿迹是一回事，传承断绝是另一回事。就跟医病一样，症候不显，才最麻烦。现在看来，这些人不仅没消失，还在暗中扩张哩。
E: But just because you can't see something doesn't mean it isn't there. It's like eradicating a sickness — easier to do when the symptoms are visible. In hindsight, not only did the Disciples endure, they expanded the organization in secret.

C: 白露，你想跟她一起走吗？
E: Bailu, do you want to go with her?

C: {F#大姐}{M#大哥}你小声点儿！
E: Keep it down!

C: 为什么药王秘传的人会知道他？
E: Why would the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus know him?

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: 治疗就像是吃饭喝水一样，实在是没有感觉，非要说的话，是讨厌？
E: Treating others is like eating and drinking for me. I don't have any feeling towards it. If I had to choose, I think I'd say I hate it...

C: 他就在那扇门后边…明明就差一点。
E: He's right behind that door... We're almost there.

C: ……谢谢你，白露大人，不过我已经感觉不到皮肤与盔甲的间隙了。
E: ...Thank you, Lady Bailu... but I can't feel the gap between my skin and the helmet anymore.

C: 没错，本小姐是来帮你治病的。
E: That's right. I'm here to heal you.

C: 你就别再吓唬他了，这样戒备下去也没有什么用。
E: Stop trying to scare him! It won't help the situation.

C: 我不准你站在半夏的旁边！
E: And move away from Banxia, now!

C: 你知道我是罗浮持明的后裔，也曾在鳞渊境里见过我…「隐藏的力量」。
E: You know that I'm a descendant of the Luofu Vidyadhara. In Scalegorge Waterscape, you witnessed my... "secret strength," as March would call it...

C: 是先随我同长老们会面？还是…去见白露小姐？
E: Will you come with me to meet with the elders first? Or... are you set on seeing Miss Bailu?

C: 看这影子，它是把我错认成了丹枫。
E: Seems this mirage mistook me for Dan Feng.

C: 你认错人了。
E: You've got the wrong person.

C: 他不是丹枫。
E: He's not Dan Feng.

C: 不过直到今天我才确认，他们为了摈除我，竟然不惜使用这样的手段。
E: ...and today I realized — they'll use any means of removing me.

C: 这样一看，丹枫应该也是个内心有一半温柔的家伙吧？
E: In that case, Dan Feng probably had a gentle side to him too, right?

C: 也许吧……
E: Perhaps...

C: 嗯…也没什么不能跟你们说的。
E: Mm... It's not something I need to conceal from you.

C: 所以我们在不同的世界里常常会遇见容貌相似的人。这些人么，可能有完全不同的性格…比方说，也许在某个世界里，和小三月一样可爱的女孩却是个星际大盗。
E: That's why it's possible for us to run into individuals on multiple worlds who share an appearance, but not a personality... For all we know, in some faraway world, March's adorable face might belong to an intergalactic pirate.

C: 对啊，当然相信了！
E: That's right, we believe in you!

C: 当然。既然指控是我们提出的，那我们会担负起举证的责任。
E: Of course. We raised the accusation, we will carry the burden of proof.

C: 罗刹进入了三余书肆，不久后走了出来。他两手空空，大概什么也没有买。
E: Luocha walked into Spare Time Book Shop and stepped out after a while. He left with nothing in hand — perhaps he didn't buy anything.

C: 我看看这个顺序能不能对得上…嗯…罗刹从星槎上下来，进入长乐天，走进一间小客栈放下行李，甚至放下了他的宝贝棺材。
E: Lemme see if this order works... Hmm, Luocha exits the starskiff, enters Exalting Sanctum, goes into an inn, and puts down his luggage — including the coffin.

C: 诸位特地赶来帮忙，才是最辛苦的。我会尽快处理。
E: Your assistance in this matter is what requires gratitude. I'll get you what you need as soon as possible.

C: 不能哦。按照书里的设定，这种药只能让人的身体返老还童，却不能处理人灵魂的损耗。换句话说，就是只「蜕」，没「生」。
E: It wouldn't. In the book, the drug only de-ages the body — it can't repair damage to the soul. In other words, it's like molting, not a true rebirth.

C: 那岂不是更坏了？竟然用《渔公案》这种歌颂正义的小说作为邪恶计划的接头暗号。
E: That makes him even worse! How dare he use a book that praises justice for his evil plans!

C: 可惜那片空地里没有机巧鸟，我们还是不知道他究竟做了什么…但还真是，越查越可疑。
E: It's a shame no cycranes are installed in that area — we still have no idea what he was up to. This Luocha is getting more suspicious by the minute...

C: 可不能现在去现场，要等到推理结束，到现场验证，你们发现真相竟和我说的分毫不差，这才是神探的浪漫！
E: It's too early to start fieldwork — we must wait until my deduction is complete. Then, when we arrive at the scene, you'll see that the facts match my theory to a T!

C: 好了，开始吧。
E: I'm good. Let's do it.

C: 你这样我真没法代入。
E: I'm losing the immersion...

C: （渔公既是侦探，也是侠客！）
E: (The Angler is both a detective and a fighter!)

C: 您看，我上有老下有小，不卖掉这颗星核，全家今晚都得挨饿…您就通融一下，让我见见您家老大吧。
E: You see, I'm selling this Stellaron to bring food to my dear family — or we'll all have to starve tonight. So, be a good chap and do me a favor, will you?

C: 开星槎来接罗刹的那位是？
E: So... who was piloting the starskiff?

C: （天哪，我神探三月七终于获得了杨叔的认可……）
E: (Finally, Mr. Yang approves detective March's theory!)

C: 嗯！这浓郁的味道不可思议…
E: Yes! The aroma was incredible...

C: 我的专业领域不是战斗吗？
E: Isn't combat my expertise?

C: …路上捡来的。
E: ...Picked it up off the road.

C: 没有人能轻易抛下自己的过去。驭空和采翼是出生入死的挚友，她一定留有关于两人过去的一些回忆。
E: However, it's difficult to discard one's past. Yukong and Caiyi trusted each other with their lives. The helm master will have strong memories of that time.

C: 晴霓将事情的来龙去脉讲给了岩明。
E: Qingni tells Yanming the whole story.

C: 呃，那个…作为下属关心上级的心理健康有这么难理解吗？
E: Well, I... As her subordinate, surely I should be concerned with her mental well-being?

C: 不。这不是我该看的东西，别拿给我看……
E: No, this isn't something I should read. Don't show it to me...

C: （说是不该插手，但杨叔还是按捺不住啊…那么该帮晴霓提起哪件事呢？）
E: (I thought Mr. Yang said we shouldn't interject... What should I say?)

C: 救援马上就到了，你睁开眼睛！晴霓还在等你！广渊已经死了，晴霓不能再失去你了！给我醒过来啊！
E: The rescue is almost here — stay with me! Qingni is waiting for you! She lost Guangyuan, she can't afford to lose you too! Wake up!!!

C: 说来听听吧。
E: Tell me.

C: 怪物实在是太多了… {NICKNAME}，我们再坚持一下。不出意外的话，云骑应该也快到了。
E: There are too many monsters... {NICKNAME}, let's hold out for a little longer — the Cloud Knights should be here soon.

C: 你为什么就是不肯听我的？
E: Why won't you listen to me?

C: 对啊，早知道就应该直接扔到哪个垃圾桶里去。
E: Right... because if we'd known, it'd be in the trash by now.

C: 这么一说，我确实想问…
E: Now that you mention it...

C: 黑塔失去兴趣后，这件事就被她忘了，但它记载在螺丝咕姆的数据库里，银狼尝试骇入螺丝星的时候，把它找了出来。
E: As soon as Herta got bored, she forgot about the whole thing, but all her research was recorded in Screwllum's database. Silver Wolf retrieved it when she hacked into Planet Screwllum...

C: 第二个问题：你还想再见到我吗？
E: Hehe, second question: Do you want to see me again?

C: 真令我吃惊，{NICKNAME}，居然看不透你呢。
E: What a surprise, {NICKNAME}, I can't see through you.

C: 那就随便你了，反正往后的事情，艾利欧也没说过。
E: ...Then it's in your hands. Elio didn't say anything about what happens next.

C: 不必担心，从四周留下的痕迹来看，并没有平民遇害……
E: The silver lining is that based on what we can see, no civilians were caught up in the battle...

C: 不是怪物，恩公，那是「{RUBY_B#「长生病」}魔阴身{RUBY_E#}」。
E: Those were not to be confused with monsters, benefactors. We call them {RUBY_B#Long-Life Curse}mara-struck{RUBY_E#}.

C: 网络受限，有些功能却是正常的？
E: The network is down, but some functions still work?

C: 小女子没记错的话，积玉坊的货箱是通过操作台周转运送的。
E: If I'm not mistaken, the containers in the Trove of Verdure can be moved around using a control panel.

C: 桌上有一封信…
E: There's a letter on the table...

C: 有其他事…
E: I'm here about something else...

C: 是战友，也是朋友。是饮月的，也是我们的。
E: She was a comrade and friend both to Imbibitor Lunae and all of us.

C: 即便是转世之身，你的一招一式却与那人并无不同。
E: Even after your rebirth, your moves and techniques haven't changed one bit.

C: 哪来的坏东西，把我药箱还来！
E: Hey! Give me back my medicine box!

C: 以他的所作所为，本该永镇幽囚狱中。可我给了他另一种「自由」。
E: He should have been eternally jailed in The Shackling Prison for his crimes, but I gave him a different kind of "freedom."

C: 果真如我所料，认罪伏法只是手段。利用「十王敕令」前往虚陵，直面六将军乃至元帅…这才是你们真正的目的。
E: Hmph... as I expected. Your surrender is just the next step in your scheme. You wish to avail yourself of the Ten Lords' decree to enter the Xuling and stand before the six Generals — even the Marshal. That is your true agenda...

C: 与此同时，神策府中…
E: Meanwhile, in the Seat of Divine Foresight...

C: {NICKNAME}，怎么啦？
E: Everything okay, {NICKNAME}?

C: 原来…在你眼中我不算美少女么？
E: ...Aaaand why not me?

C: 队长的好意我就心领了。秘密的意思，就是知情人越少越好。
E: I appreciate the gesture... but the fewer people who know about a covert operation, the better.

C: 我来这里，只为捉一个人，和你同行倒是正好。
E: I came here to catch one person. It's quite fortunate that our paths have crossed.

C: 都不是，我来自苍城。
E: ...I'm from the Cangcheng.

C: 信里提到的实验，我翻遍了卷宗，没有任何相关的记录。联想到丹鼎司的洞天被封锁了…其中显然有不可告人的秘密。
E: I went through all our files to find information on the experiment in question, and found nothing. I started thinking about how the Alchemy Commission's delve was sealed off... There must be an unspeakable secret locked away there.

C: 似这等作派，令我想到了一个在仙舟上绝迹千年之久的组织…「药王秘传」。
E: Such actions remind me of an organization that was eradicated from the Xianzhou a thousand years ago... the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 可以理解。妖弓祸祖所谓的拯救与破坏毫无差别。
E: I can appreciate that. The Devilish Archer Author's so-called salvation is no different from destruction.

C: 你们两个怎么不说话？
E: Why are you two always so quiet?

C: 离开穷观阵，回到现实中去吧。过去不值得你探索，结果只会让你受到伤害。
E: Leave the Matrix of Prescience and return to reality. The past is not worth exploring — it will only hurt you.

C: 欢迎来到「桑博旅馆」～
E: Welcome to the Sampo Hotel~

C: 她失去了神明的权柄。
E: She lost her authority as a goddess.

C: 哼，我答应过要看顾你。何况我受惠于「{RUBY_B#博识尊}遍智天君{RUBY_E#}」，绝不能容忍有人设置障碍，阻挡他人探寻真相。
E: Hmph, I promised I'd watch over you. Besides, I've been blessed by the {RUBY_B#Nous}Wisdomwalker{RUBY_E#} — I will never tolerate efforts to impede the truth.

C: 好难受…符玄小姐，怎么突然就中断了推演？
E: Ugh... Miss Fu Xuan, why did the simulation just cut off like that?

C: 那是自然的。光锥哪能和活蹦乱跳的本人相比呢？
E: Obviously! How could "Light Cone me" be cuter than actual me?

C: 一来嘛，时代变了，议会成立，「拔剑成王」的神话早就是个笑话了；二来，<color=#dbc291ff>拔出这柄剑，以及辨认出它仙舟来历的，并不是卡勒瓦拉人，而是一位天外来客。</color>
E: Well, times have changed, and now that we have a council in place, the idea of a sword crowning a king has become a joke. Besides, <color=#dbc291ff>it wasn't a native of Kalevala who last pulled out the sword and recognized its connection to the Xianzhou ship — it was a visitor from afar.</color>

C: 好极了，有这么多人见证宝剑归还，真是荣幸。
E: Wonderful! It's an honor to have so many people witness the sword's homecoming.

C: 爷爷平日总会叫上我一起赏剑。今天这番场合却没向我提过一个字。真是奇怪。
E: Grandpa always asks me to go look at swords with him, but he hasn't said anything about this one. It's really weird.

C: 就像是被岁阳占据那样？
E: So, it's like being possessed by a heliobus?

C: 在那之后，怀炎将军收养了我，我俩以爷孙相称。但对我而言，他胜过那个造孽的父亲百倍。爷爷不仅教了我铸艺，还教会了我剑术。
E: After that, General Huaiyan took me in and treated me like his own granddaughter. To me, he is a hundred times better than my sinful father. He taught me forging and swordsmanship.

C: 孤云失窃，对内失信于罗浮，对外有负使团。大毫执事官，请务必查清真相。
E: If we don't recover the sword, we will be breaking our promise to the Luofu and betraying the delegation. We're counting on you to find the truth, Official Dahao.

C: 不，那叫「人赃并获」。
E: No, that would make it look like you did steal it.

C: 为什么现在要偷走孤云？
E: Why steal Guyun now?

C: 嘿嘿，你能做到吗？不如把身体交给我，杀一个够本，杀两个赚翻。
E: Hehe, you really think you can do it? Why not just give me control, and we can revel in the bloodbath together?

C: 老朋友，仙舟人的余生现在到尽头了。
E: Well, this Xianzhou native's life has finally come to an end, my old friend.

C: 明白了。可是，奖品怎么办？
E: Understood, but what about the prize?

C: 算了算了，我怕自己吃不起苦。
E: Thanks, but no thanks. I don't think I can endure the hardship.

C: 这个怪人又是谁啊？
E: Who is this weirdo?

C: 出示证物「完好的锁扣」
E: Present evidence: intact lock

C: 原来，是我从最初就落入了愚者们的陷阱。
E: So I've been running a fool's errand this whole time.

C: 哎哟，看来这「侦探助手」我是逃不掉了…行吧行吧，唉，都什么事儿啊！
E: Ah, seems like I can't escape being an assistant detective... Fine. It's all fine, no big deal!

C: 这三位也是老朋友呢。
E: Our old friends.

C: 人。
E: People.

C: 不如略过那些复杂的过程，和我来一场敞开心扉的交流呢？可能会有点痒哦。
E: Why don't you skip all this rigmarole and just have a heart-to-heart conversation with me? It might tickle a little.

C: 钟珊这人胆子比较小，遇见山贼转身就跑，结果撞到了山岩上，<color=#dbc291ff>整张脸都破相了</color>。可惜可惜，以前他可是城中难得一见的美男子啊。
E: Then there's Zhongshan — this guy's a coward who ran away as soon as the group spotted some bandits along the road. He ended up smashing into the side of a cliff and <color=#dbc291ff>getting his face disfigured</color>. It's a real shame, as he used to be one of the rare handsome men left around town.

C: 「佐罗」，这家伙的<color=#dbc291ff>手好像断了</color>……
E: Lefton. That guy <color=#dbc291ff>lost his hand</color>...

C: 真是一场惨剧啊，若不是有您这样明察秋毫的神探，凶手一定会逍遥法外！
E: What a tragedy. If it weren't for your incisive detective work, the murderer would still be at large!

C: 青雀小姐，居然一声不吭躲在旁边。
E: Hey, Miss Qingque, care to get involved!?

C: 「穷观阵」停转，符箓黯淡，司部内有星核邪祟未除。云骑忙于保护百姓，我欲恢复阵法，却无可用之兵。
E: The Matrix of Prescience has stopped operating and the symbols have dimmed. There are Stellaron spirits wreaking havoc inside the commission and the Cloud Knights are struggling to protect civilians. I want to restore the Matrix of Prescience but I have no forces available.

C: 我让青雀随行，负责重启阵基的事宜。至于翦除邪祟……
E: Qingque will accompany you. She'll be in charge of restarting the terminal. As for eliminating the spirits...

C: 让我猜猜，「时间」、「因果」…接下来这个阵八成应该是和「能量」有关了吧！
E: Let me guess — time, karma... I bet the next terminal is energy-related!

C: 唔唔，符卿法眼洞见，必是解决问题最快的捷径。但有时候，最快未必最优。你猜猜，我早知星核所在，为何按兵不动？
E: Mhmm, as ever the master diviner's omniscia provides the fastest solution. However, sometimes speed is not everything. I have known the Stellaron's location for a while now, so why have I held back our forces?

C: 建木到底是什么？
E: What exactly is the Ambrosial Arbor?

C: 除了熟知古籍和历史的人，大部分仙舟民众都只将它视作一截年头久远的枯木，连来历也不甚了了。
E: Most in the Xianzhou regard the Arbor as nothing more than the stump of a dead tree... Only those familiar with our history and the ancient texts know of its origin.

C: 没想到将军对各位青眼有加，小女子也只能继续随行了。真是命运难料啊。
E: Who would've thought the general would take such a liking to you? I suppose I must accompany you further... Fate can be so unpredictable.

C: 对了对了，太卜大人不替我们卜上一卦，也好看看有什么该注意的？
E: Wait, wait! Master Diviner, can you divine our fortunes for us? Is there anything we need to watch out for?

C: 只可惜这些人见了咱们，却没献花问好——恩公的猜测未免过于自信啦～
E: Still, it doesn't look like they're rolling out the red carpet... We might be getting ahead of ourselves.

C: 里面怎么了？
E: What happened in there?

C: 谢天谢地，这「造化洪炉」总算无恙。
E: Thank heavens! The Creation Furnace is intact.

C: 多谢各位的援手。我知道你们接下来要去「丹鼎司」。那里与「建木」毗邻，瞧眼前这番景象，那里一定更为凶险。
E: Thank you for your help. I realize you must continue on to the Alchemy Commission, to the Ambrosial Arbor. After witnessing what happened here, I know there will only be more danger ahead.

C: 不必羡慕，这不是天赋，只是目不视物所得到的补偿。我听到的，嗅到的，终究无法替代你眼前真实的色彩。
E: I wouldn't be envious. This is not an innate ability — merely compensation for my visual impairment. Ultimately, nothing I hear or smell can match the vividness of the colors that you perceive.

C: 可你不是也在帮她吗？
E: Aren't you helping to save her?

C: 研究神策府提供的证物，让在下小有灵感。我比照了相关的历史文献记载，调配了一副延寿健体药。
E: Examining the exhibits in the Seat of Divine Foresight inspired me to create this. I referenced some historical texts and concocted a medicine that can extend your lifespan and improve your health.

C: 听你描述，她送你的礼物，与「药王秘传」的诡异丹方同出一炉……
E: From what you're saying, it seems like the gift she gave to you must be related to the Disciples' prescription we examined earlier...

C: 钟珊上前和「四大善人」攀谈了起来。过了一会儿，她转身对你招了招手，示意你过去。
E: Zhongshan approaches the Four Benevolent Ones and talks to them. After a while, she turns around and beckons you over.

C: 希斯曼焦虑地擦了擦脑门上的汗。
E: Heathmann wipes away the sweat on his forehead, looking distressed.

C: 你那么兴奋干什么，大霉了！要严肃一点，严肃！
E: Why do you look so excited? Big trouble is looming ahead! Be serious!

C: 没错，贝娜和希斯曼！还有这两个白痴！要不是他们好糊弄，我怎么会同意接受这个荒谬的放生方案呢！
E: Benna and Heathmann, those two idiots! If they hadn't been so gullible, I wouldn't have accepted this outrageous solution!

C: 你们听见了吗？！这、这是什么怪声音？
E: Did you hear that!? Wh—What was that sound?

C: 打！狠狠打碎它们！
E: Crush them! Smash them to pieces!

C: 这样一来，恚炎的一部分就被装进葫芦里了。
E: Fragments of Furynox have been sealed in the gourd.

C: 哼哼，不相信我的家人这下有难了。
E: Hehe, I think you're in for a surprise...

C: 这绥园是一处园林洞天，不过后来有人在狐眠冢吊唁阵亡的狐族将士，这里便渐渐传出了「绥园闹鬼」的传闻。
E: Fyxestroll Garden used to be a garden delve, but people started coming here to mourn fallen foxian fighters at the Foxsomn Tomb, and rumors spread that the garden was haunted.

C: 说说吧，桂乃芬，去而复返，所为何事？
E: Tell me, Guinaifen. Why did you return here?

C: 我听说岁阳逃逸到处作乱，心里有点害怕。但是我、我会负责把你们送出绥园的，这点小事…我还是做得到的……
E: I—I'm just a bit scared about the heliobi reports... b—but I'll carry out my duties and escort you out of the garden. I should be able to do that, at least...

C: 虽然浮烟说的那些垃圾话夸大其词，但总归伤到她的玻璃心了，你，去安慰她两句吧。
E: Cirrus talks nothing but nonsense... but even so, Huohuo has a sensitive heart. You. Go say something nice to the girl.

C: 你和雪衣大人在，它跑不了。
E: Both you and Madam Xueyi are here. They can't escape.

C: 浮烟挂了吗？
E: Is Cirrus dead?

C: 我正打算再去医馆看看她，我们就此别过吧。
E: I'm heading to the apothecary to check up on her. Catch you later.

C: （糟糕，情况有点失控了……）
E: (Uh-oh, the situation's getting out of control...)

C: （柯柯娜小姐突然恢复正常了……）
E: (Miss Cocona has suddenly returned to normal...)

C: 音乐…唱歌…小娜，你是不是最近太累了，才会有这种天真的想法？
E: Music... singing... Cocona, is it because you've been so tired recently that you're having such naive thoughts?

C: 听爸妈的吧，我们在酒店工作那么久，也算跟家族建立了点关系。之前听说「黄金的时刻」有家奢侈品商店在招店员，你不如去试试。
E: Listen to your parents. We've worked a long time at the hotel, and have some connections with The Family. I heard that there's a luxury goods store at the Golden Hour that's hiring. Why not give that a try?

C: 要是我也能有你那么漂亮的声音就好了…那样我保准也能把人弄得五迷三道的，乖乖把口袋里的钱掏出来。
E: If only I had a beautiful voice like yours... I'd surely mesmerize those fat cats into emptying their pockets on their own.

C: 当初建设匹诺康尼的人，又是怀着怎样的初衷呢…他们会不会想到有这么一天，居然会有人会傻到想要逃离他们建造的这座乐园？
E: The people who built Penacony, what intentions did they bear... Did they think that, one day, there'd be someone foolish enough to flee this haven that they built?

C: 「想象一朵未来的玫瑰……」
E: Envision a Rose Forthcoming...

C: 只要还有生命，一切都能补救。
E: As long as there's life left, everything is worth saving.

C: 柯柯娜转过头去，直面远方的一片虚空。你似乎还能看到她微微上扬的嘴角。
E: Cocona turns back, facing the curtain of void in the distance. You think you can see the corners of her mouth curl slightly.

C: 不会是什么大明星吧？
E: Could she be some famous star?

C: 「{NICKNAME}，愿星光撒遍你的道路。你忠实的——莱斯利•迪恩。」
E: "{NICKNAME}, may the stars shine to light your path. Yours faithfully, Lesley Dean."

C: 求求你了，去帮帮他吧！
E: I'm begging you. You have to help him!

C: 该学会接受现实了，罗伯。哈里…他已经不在了。
E: You need to accept reality, Rob. Harry... Harry is not here anymore.

C: 关闭电视。
E: Turn off the television.

C: 推开房门。
E: Push open the door.

C: 「我是谁」——自这具形体诞生之初，同样的问题就一直萦绕着我。
E: "Who am I"... This question has been following me since the moment I first took this form.

C: 和您一起经历了那么多之后…我感到更加坚定了。我知道自己做了正确的事。
E: After experiencing all of this with you... I feel even more determined. I know that I have done the right thing.

C: 施展钟表把戏
E: Here comes the Clockwork.

C: 罗莎将你带至船长室，她示意你看向空白的墙壁。
E: Rosa takes you to the captain's cabin, and gestures for you to look at the blank wall.

C: 我家里世代航行，算是积累了些家传经验。所以我来这空艇上走了一遭，我就感觉到有些地方可以改进。
E: I come from a family that has been flying for generations, and I've inherited a bunch of experience from my folks. I've made my rounds on the airship, and I feel that there is some room for improvement.

C: 那么，就把这艘空艇重新起名为<color=#dbc291ff>「开拓之尾号」吧</color>——船如其名，只要一直盯着列车长的尾巴，我们就永远不会迷航！
E: Then, we'll rename the airship to <color=#dbc291ff>the Trailblaze's Stern</color>! Just like its namesake, as long as we keep our eyes on the conductor's tail, we'll never get lost!

C: 船长，你把胳膊抱起来试试——呃，和画像的动作一样…对，就是这样！
E: Captain, could you try posing with your arms crossed... Yes, exactly like the painting... That's it, just like that!

C: 发现机会、投资机会，多浅显的道理！要我说，鸢尾花家的人缺的就是这点最基本的商业头脑！年轻人，好好看好好学！
E: Discover opportunities and invest in them — that's just common sense! Such basic business acumen is what the Iris Family lacks the most, if you ask me! Young one, look and learn!

C: 奥帝•艾弗法就这样毫无征兆地突然出现在了你的面前…或许神出鬼没的能力也是「同谐」力量的一种显现？
E: Oti Alfalfa suddenly appears before you without any signs... Perhaps his ability to appear out of nowhere is a manifestation of the power of the Harmony?

C: …压根就没有什么「系统」。即使真的有，丹尼斯也没有告诉你该如何操作。
E: ...There never was any "system" in the first place. And even if there was, Dennis has never told you how to operate it.

C: 我的朋友的名字是，罗…稍等，我再翻一下备忘录……
E: My friend's name is, R— er, hang on a sec. Where did I put that memo...

C: 啊…这么说来，你有没有什么可以推荐的旅行目的地？无名客行于星间，一定去过很多令人惊奇的地方吧？
E: Ah... Speaking of which, can you recommend any travel destinations? As a Nameless, you must have visited many amazing places.

C: 已经帮到我很多了。再次感谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: Your input is very helpful. Thanks again, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你盘起短小的双腿坐在地上，开始模仿起青雀聚精会神地打帝垣琼玉时的动作…摸牌、码牌、胡牌……
E: You sit cross-legged on the floor and imitate Qingque's focused face when playing Celestial Jade... You draw a tile, arrange your tiles, and win the game...

C: 嘿嘿嘿，我们肯定会好好招待你的，新手……
E: Heehee, we'll make sure you have a great time, novice...

C: 要不今天就到这儿吧？再接着打下去感觉也很难逆转局面了。
E: Maybe we should call it a day? I don't think we'll turn the tables even if we keep playing.

C: 碰！
E: Peng!

C: 你还有什么感言？
E: Anything else you want to say?

C: 哈哈哈哈，难得能见到这么不知死活的年轻人。一句话把老夫唤回了那个热血还能沸腾的岁月里，真是教人畅怀啊。
E: Hahaha! It is rare to find a youngster that has such little fear of death. Just being asked to battle takes me back to those years when my blood burned like fire. How refreshing.

C: 青雀，要怪就怪自己吧。
E: You brought this on yourself, Qingque.

C: …小姑娘，你看清楚了，我们可不是符玄…大人？
E: ...Miss. Open your eyes. We are not... Master Fu Xuan?

C: 嗷呜呜呜——
E: Aw woo woo...

C: 转换心情？我不认为转换心情有什么用。不过，这工造司我也待不下去了，无处可去的我，去哪儿都一样。
E: I don't think there's any need for that. But I can't stay at the Artisanship Commission anymore. I'm homeless, so it doesn't matter where I go.

C: 这工造司我也待不下去了，无处可去的我，去哪儿都一样。
E: I can't stay at the Artisanship Commission anymore. I'm homeless, and it doesn't matter where I go.

C: 我本来也应该成为一个星槎设计师的。可是，我资质太差，还没来得及学成出师，老师就去世了。现在我连他仅剩的手稿也保不住了……
E: I should have been a starskiff designer myself. But my grades were too low, and before I could even finish studying, my master passed away. And now, I can't even protect the manuscript that he's left behind...

C: …铖杰你就直说吧，要我们怎么帮你？
E: ...Chengjie, just tell me straight. How can we help you?

C: 这趟旅行对工匠的帮助不大。
E: This trip doesn't seem to be helpful for a craftsman, though.

C: 师傅留下的手稿还没能问世，一旦完成，我相信它一定能成为跨越时间的杰作。
E: My master's manuscript has never been published before. Once finished, I trust it will become a masterpiece that transcends the confines of time.

C: 来，这是我答应给你的仙人快乐茶，每天一杯，干活不累。
E: Here you go, this is the Immortal's Delight that I promised you. One cup a day, all work is just play.

C: 遥控器倒没有坏…你真是太客气了，你应该问星槎是不是坏掉了。
E: There's nothing wrong with the remote control. Thanks for being so considerate of my feelings. In fact, you should ask whether the starskiff is broken.

C: 没关系，就这样吧，反正都是失败作品。
E: Just let it be. After all, it's a failure.

C: 但是你们看到了，刚才就是所谓的「傻瓜式操作」。
E: What you guys witnessed earlier was how the so-called set-and-forget system worked.

C: {NICKNAME}，我现在真的没心情开玩笑…
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm not in the mood for jokes now...

C: 铖杰，没想到我还能回来，给你再上一课。
E: Chengjie, I never thought I could come back and teach you again.

C: 绘画吗？我这些年只画过各种各样的设计稿，我这水平真的可以吗？
E: Painting? I've only drawn design manuscripts before. Will I be good enough to be a painter?

C: <size=36>师傅，谢谢你，今天我出师了！</size>
E: <size=36>Master, thank you. I've graduated today!</size>

C: 一番周折，你们终于完成了任务。
E: After some twists and turns, you have finally completed the mission.

C: 如果不是最敬重的老师亲自开口，他什么也听不进去。他还会用「梦想」为借口继续欺骗自己。
E: He wouldn't have listened to anyone except his master, whom he respected the most. He would continue using the excuse of his master's dream and refuse to give up.

C: 哎，应该早点问问他的。
E: Alas, we should have asked him that earlier.

C: 嗨！旅行还顺利吗？多亏了你们，我跟头儿最近都快闲出毛病了。
E: Hey! How have your travels been? Thanks to you, things are pretty peaceful around here. The chief and I are getting restless!

C: 噢，你听见了？
E: Oh, you heard us?

C: 嗐，别紧张！我保证，这一趟对你来说绝对轻松又愉快。
E: Ha, don't stress! I promise this trip will be relaxing and fun.

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 我感觉…卢卡的推论还挺合理的。前提是窃贼确实只有一个人。
E: I think... Luka's analysis makes sense, provided there was only one thief.

C: 就差…一点……
E: Just a bit... more...

C: 要知道，上一次来仙舟，第一个迎接我们的可是……
E: You know, the last time we came to the Xianzhou, the first person who greeted us was...

C: 不过没关系，你也可以报名参加，云骑所设的擂台向来是不禁外人挑战的。
E: Well, you can still sign up. The Cloud Knights' ring is always open to outsiders.

C: 交给我吧！我是谈判专家！
E: Leave it to me! I'm an expert negotiator!

C: 我听说过{NICKNAME}之前帮助金人巷的事情。当时公司方面的代表，就是这位斯科特先生吧？既然你有对付他的经验…看来这次也得麻烦{NICKNAME}老师了。
E: I heard how you helped Aurum Alley, {NICKNAME}. The IPC representative back then was Mr. Skott, right? Since you've dealt with him before... it looks like I'll have to rely on you again, {NICKNAME}.

C: 但我不一样，作为公司的成员，我的船队接受了这次运输订单，我就必须对这里的每一件货物的完好负责到底。
E: But I'm different. I'm an IPC member, and my fleet has accepted this transportation order. Naturally, I need to be responsible for the integrity of every piece of cargo.

C: 收缴？！你们…你们仙舟人怎么能这么不讲道理！
E: Confiscate it!? How... how can you Xianzhou people be so unreasonable!

C: 斯科特先生把话说到了这份上，我就当你认同了检查手续。来人啊……
E: Since you put it that way, Mr. Skott, I'll take it as your agreement to the inspection procedure. Now...

C: 我现在就是在和你讲道理啊！
E: But I AM trying to reason with you here!

C: 因此今日，在下奉命前来，代主家拜谒新任司鼎灵砂大人。不知丹士长大人可否为在下通传一声？
E: So, I'm here to pay my respects to the Cauldron Master on his behalf. Could you let her know about my arrival, dear chief alchemist?

C: 回来了？你们见过了景元，也到处逛了几个时辰，有何感想？
E: Back already? You've met with Jing Yuan and wandered around for a few hours. So, what do you think?

C: 对了，灵砂小姐。若有闲暇，彦卿想请您来神策府一叙，与我家将军开诚布公聊一聊。相信今日你所说的「恩怨」，其中一定另有隐情……
E: Oh, by the way, Miss Lingsha, if you've got some free time, I'd like to invite you to the Seat of Divine Foresight for a chat with General Jing Yuan. I think there's more to those "personal grudges" you mentioned earlier...

C: 准备好了吗？
E: Are you ready?

C: 好啊！要是赢了你，你就乖乖退出演武仪典的擂台赛，如何？
E: Yeah, I'm up for that! And if I kick your butt, you'll drop out of the Wardance. Deal?

C: 我在尽力，我在研究，这些都需要时间。
E: I'm doing my best, alright? It takes time to figure all this out.

C: 可疑的狐人面部
E: Face of the suspicious foxian.

C: 是我担心伙伴的安危，不得不擅自行动。相关罪责，应当由丹恒一人承担。
E: I was concerned about the safety of my companions, so I had to act brazenly. I alone bear the blame.

C: 判官大人，这判书上的文字就不必念了吧。呼雷其人是我狐族的天敌宿仇，他干下的暴行，可是曜青父母拿来止小儿夜啼的素材，每一桩我都清清楚楚。咱们快进到下一步吧。
E: No need to repeat his crimes and sentence, your honor. He is the greatest enemy of us foxians. The stories of his atrocities are used to terrify our children. I'm well aware of every crime he's committed. Let's move on to the next step.

C: 也许吧，从外观看，这座幽囚狱的许多建筑都留有持明的制式…也许在古早之前，持明确实参与营建了此处。
E: Perhaps. Judging from the appearance, much of the architecture in this prison has a Vidyadharan style... So perhaps they did have a hand in building this place back then.

C: 片刻之前，雪衣已引领曜青使者来到幽狱之底。
E: A few moments prior, Xueyi leads the Yaoqing messengers to the bottom of the prison.

C: 白痴，失去自由的伟大一文不值！一旦离开此地，我需要一张至少看起来不那么可疑的皮囊。
E: You idiot! Greatness means nothing without freedom! Once I get out, I'll need a disguise that won't raise any suspicion.

C: 证言的事先放一边吧？
E: Looks like the testimony will have to wait, huh?

C: 寒鸦小姐，最快前往幽狱之底的通路在什么地方？若不能在时间上争分夺秒，恐怕整个幽囚狱都会成为我们的敌人。
E: What's the fastest way to the bottom of this prison, Miss Hanya? If we don't get there quickly, we'll soon be outnumbered by all the enemies inside.

C: 为今之计，只有使些取巧的办法了，诸位随我来。
E: We'll have to bend the rules. Please follow me.

C: 狱门与囚笼洞天断开了联系，还是让呼雷逃出来了。
E: The gate to the prison delve is wide open. Hoolay has managed to break free.

C: 让我瞧瞧，损坏倒也不太严重。
E: Let me see. The damage isn't too bad.

C: 博识学会有关长生特性的研究…
E: The Intelligentsia Guild's research on the traits of longevity...

C: 元帅认为此事有非人之嫌，与步离人无异，所以……
E: The marshal believed that this would be inhumane and no different from what the borisin did, so...

C: （检查魔阴身遗体）
E: (Examine the mara-struck remains)

C: 嗨，虽然眼下人手不足，但要是有什么想要我帮助的尽管开口，别客气啊。
E: Hey, although we're short-staffed at the moment, if there's anything I can do to help, please feel free to ask me.

C: 寻常百姓的人命，就像随时可能被这家伙一口吞下的肉……
E: To him, the lives of ordinary people are just meat, ready to be devoured at any moment...

C: 没错，有计划外的星槎被制造了出来，全都从迴星港的这个码头里产出。是流水线的产能规划又出错了吗？
E: Yeah, we've had some unscheduled starskiffs being constructed at this dock in Stargazer Navalia. Could there have been an error in the production planning for the assembly line?

C: …这正合我意。离群的狼，早就做好了无法返回故乡的准备。
E: ...That's exactly what I desire. Wolves that leave the pack are prepared for the fate of never returning home.

C: 将军让我转告你，她不回来了，她必须守住「瞰云镜」。
E: She asked me to tell you that she's not coming back. She must protect the Cloudpeer Telescope.

C: 竟、竟然有这种事！这可是大新闻！
E: Y—You're kidding!? That's a huge scoop!

C: 找我？嗯，你有什么想问的吗？
E: Uh... Was there something you wanted to ask me?

C: 三月七努力收起和长椅聊天的冲动，冲云璃点了点头。
E: March 7th tries very hard to contain her urge to talk to the bench and nods at Yunli.

C: 我们可能会选错方向，令无辜的战友白白牺牲；我们可能猜对了敌人的动向，却错估了对手的实力，折戟败北……
E: There is a chance that we will make the wrong decision and allow our allies to be sacrificed in vain. There is a chance that we will predict our enemy's movements correctly, yet underestimate their strength and be overwhelmed in battle...

C: 我也是个像模像样的选手…
E: I'm a decent contestant too...

C: 等这一战结束之后吧！
E: After this fight is over, then!

C: 呼叫长乐天，如果看到空中有光，立刻全员散开！
E: Contact the Exalting Sanctum. Tell them, if they see a light in the sky, all units are to retreat immediately!

C: 你家将军未免太离谱了吧！
E: That general of yours is way out of line!

C: 我想亲眼看她再射一箭…
E: I want to see her fire another arrow with my own eyes...

C: 杀了她，杀光这些狐人——
E: Kill her! Kill all these foxians—

C: 没想到你兜兜转转，又回到了竞锋舰上，不过此刻擂台你是上不了啦。
E: I can't believe you ended up back here on the Skysplitter after running around all over the place. But, you're too late to enter the tournament now.

C: 我可是两位的弟子。
E: I am your disciple.

C: 不必客气。
E: There's no need to thank me.

C: 世间至毒…若能换回无辜的生命，便也可被称作良药……
E: If the most lethal poison known to this world... is able to save innocent lives... Then it can also be called a great medicine...

C: 你看，兜兜转转，不还是回到了这里吗？
E: Well? You may have run all over the place, but you ended up back here, did you not?

C: 这就是你为我准备的「道路」…成为另一个你？
E: So, this was the "path" that you prepared for me... To become a new you?

C: 一旦你衰弱无力，它就会以你为食！
E: The moment you grow weak, it will devour you!

C: 我已经说过了，求生从来不是罪过。各位与我都是持明，本该理解我的苦心。我身为持明，也为诸位留下和而不同的体面法子。
E: I've said it before, survival is never a sin. We are all Vidyadhara, so you should understand my intentions. And as a Vidyadhara, I will leave for you a dignified solution.

C: 毕竟又是激战呼雷，又是和飞霄将军…咳，狠狠切磋了一下武艺！他那副小身板，早就顶不住了。
E: Considering the intense battle with Hoolay and then with General Feixiao... ahem, the rigorous sparring session with her! His small body couldn't take it anymore.

C: 戎韬将军，黄钟系统能维持的时间有限。长话短说吧。
E: Seer Strategist, our time with the Yellowbell is limited. Let's get straight to the point.

C: 朕来这里是有事要办…你刚才有没有看到个喝醉的男人，在街上高声歌唱？
E: I am obviously here on business... Did you see a drunken man just now, singing loudly on the street?

C: 那朕就先回现实接人了。至于你…你叫什么来着？
E: I shall return to reality and see to this release. As for you... what's your name?

C: 埃夫姆先生，首先，你该道歉的对象不是朕。其次，比起道歉，朕觉得彩拿篷先生应该更想听到一个保证。
E: Mr. Ephraim, firstly, I'm not the one who you should be apologizing to. Secondly, rather than an apology, I feel that Mr. Chenapon would much rather have your promise.

C: 皇室的事，去找猎犬帮忙调查，简直是丢人现眼。
E: It's an utter disgrace to ask for Bloodhound assistance in imperial matters.

C: 可是…可是…苏安瓜，她凭什么能忘记一切，像没事人一样生活……
E: But... But... Swanga, how could she have forgotten everything and live life like nothing happened...

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 你不知道吧？灰骑士之前放了你一马…但这不重要。重要的是，{F#她}{M#他}当初不该这么做。
E: Did you not know? The Gray Knight let you go once... but that's not important. What is, is that {F#she}{M#he} should not have done so in the first place.

C: 我想不通，灰骑士——你这样正直的人，为什么甘愿为那样的暴君卖命？
E: Help me understand, Gray Knight: You fight for righteousness, but why would you wholeheartedly serve such a tyrant?

C: 你不知道？我知道啊！不能！
E: You don't know? I do! It can't!

C: 但她曾是暴君又如何呢？正如她所行的善永远也不能遮蔽她所做的恶，她所做的恶也分毫无法污毁她的所行的善。
E: So what if she was a tyrant? The good deeds she accomplished cannot be overshadowed by the wrongs she committed, just as the evils she committed cannot tarnish the good she had done.

C: 不愧是钟表小子的朋友，我也有同感！
E: I feel the same way, too! No wonder you're my friend.

C: 老人的四肢不再因愤怒颤抖。他闭上了眼睛，打算开始追溯自己生命中的一切。
E: The elderly man's limbs stop shaking in fury. He shuts his eyes, trying to trace back everything in his life.

C: 请跟我来吧，两位。
E: Please come with me.

C: 「虚数脉冲」…是叫这个名字吧？
E: Imaginary Pulse... That's the name, right?

C: 对。我下定决心找到他，相信他能帮我反抗公司。
E: Yes. I made up my mind to look for him, thinking that he could help me rebel against IPC.

C: 关闭维生装置。
E: Deactivate the life-sustaining system.

C: 我看到了…他最后留下的一段话。
E: I saw... the final words he left behind.

C: 「钟表匠」这家伙也是死脑筋…设计这么大一盘局，把胜算全押在别人身上。兜兜转转一大圈，没想到最后真给他找到了「完美结局」。
E: This Watchmaker sure is a stubborn one... planning such a gigantic plot and betting it all on someone else. I never thought he'd actually find the perfect ending after going around in such a huge circle.

C: 在梦里不意味着能说梦话，冯恩先生，你可是咱们里最年长的那位。
E: Just because you're in a dream, doesn't mean you can spit delusions, Mr. Vaughn. You're the oldest among us.

C: 他没有亲人，没有家庭，也没受过正规的教育，更不知道该怎样正确地「接触他人」。
E: He had no kin, no family, and was never raised properly, much less how to interact with people.

C: 对你来说，{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼}这里{RUBY_E#}一定是个没有秩序，蛮不讲理的地方……
E: To you, {RUBY_B#Penacony}this{RUBY_E#} must be an orderless, reasonless place...

C: 费歇尔被叫去朝露公馆，估计也是凶多吉少……
E: Fischer being summoned to Dewlight Pavilion probably also spells misfortune...

C: 我想…一位见证过历史的筑梦师就是最好的选择。
E: I think... a Dreamweaver that has witnessed history would be the best choice.

C: 啾啾，原来从下往上看的天空也很漂亮呢～
E: Tweet tweet, so the sky seen from below is beautiful too.

C: 那这事还有我的锅？
E: You mean I caused this problem?

C: 假设城门口来了一群快要饿死的陌生人，只要一口吃食就能活下去。奥赫玛当然有能力救助他们，但代价是你我会少吃……
E: If a group of strangers was starving at the gates, and they could live with a mouthful of food, Okhema would be more than capable of saving them, but you and I would have one fewer bite...

C: 一个带孩子的女人从人群中站了出来。
E: A woman holding a child emerges from the crowd.

C: 难道最后还是要回北方？不，我可不想再走一遍了！
E: Do we have to return north in the end? No, I'm not making that trek again!

C: 除蔬果以外，篮子里也包括了肉类和面包。至于质量，只能算是不好不坏。
E: Besides fruit and vegetables, there are also meats and bread in the baskets. As for their quality, you can only vouch for their mediocrity.

C: 食物不就是给人吃的？
E: Isn't food for people to eat?

C: 如果不介意的话，您干脆留下来和我们共进佳肴吧~
E: If you don't mind, how about having a meal with us!

C: 本案的争议在于，苏克提瑞斯之所以铤而走险，是为了救助一伙受伤的外邦人。然而，这是否能成为他减刑乃至免罪的理由？
E: The controversy in this case lies in the fact that Soctires risked his own well-being to help a group of wounded outlanders. However, is this enough reason for his sentence to be reduced, or even acquitted?

C: 应该减刑。
E: The sentencing should be reduced.

C: 你们悬锋城人这么不爱看书吗？阿卡迪亚是墨涅塔编织的人间仙境，是它送给瑟希斯的礼物之一。在金丝的缠缚下，天谴之矛无法攻入，灰黯之手无法触及……
E: Do you not read in Castrum Kremnos? Arcadia is a wonderland woven by Mnestia. It was one of their gifts to Cerces. Safe under the bindings of the golden thread, the Lance of Fury cannot pierce it and the Hand of Shadow cannot touch it...

C: 它们如今也在为自己神明所爱的神明忙碌，追寻浪漫的足迹，为墨涅塔收集着疗愈瑟希斯的爱意……
E: They now work hard for the love of their beloved god. They trace the trail of romance and collect love to heal Cerces for Mnestia's sake...

C: 或许是没有战事让我感受时间的流逝，奥赫玛的岁月飞逝的速度如同飞矢。
E: Perhaps the lack of battle meant I also felt the flow of time less acutely, but my days in Okhema have flown by like an arrow.

C: 我…我还随梅塔涅拉婆婆学了绣花，我为自己编制衣裙，为帕里斯编制挂毯……
E: I... I also learned how to embroider from Granny Metanella. I wove dresses for myself and tapestries for Paris...

C: 恩人，这份恋情离不开你的帮助。在我心中，你一直是墨涅塔化身一般的存在。
E: Savior, this love of mine has always relied on your assistance. In my heart, you are like an embodiment of Mnestia herself.

C: 你若与她为伍，则会永远背负着共犯的罪责，永远成为被奥赫玛人怨恨的恶徒。
E: If you side with her, you will forever bear her sins. You will become a villain, hated by the people of Okhema for eternity!

C: 你怎能这样污蔑我…这金丝的主人本就是我，我比那个怪物更适合陪伴他吧？
E: How dare you slander me like that? ...I am the original owner of the golden thread. Am I not far more suitable to accompany him than that monster?

C: 你想重回城邦，却又被城前的戍卫当作敌人阻拦。
E: You wish to return to the city, but the garrison guards greet you as an enemy.

C: 所料之事，却难圆满成就。不虞之事，却被神给予了道路。
E: An expectation is impossible for one to make real. When we know not where we're going, our path is revealed.

C: 这幽灵人还怪好的。
E: This ghostly person seems quite nice.

C: 欧洛尼斯，它是否对我的背叛感到愤怒，才降下这样的惩罚？可既然如此，为何又要派遣眷属，指引众人把我从废墟里救出来？
E: Oronyx... are they angry over my betrayal, hence them meting such punishment? If that's the case, why did they send their kin to guide others to save me from the ruins?

C: 当然不信！和灾厄泰坦打了这么多年，每天都要想方设法地去骗那些刁民，好让他们带着所谓的荣誉活下去。
E: Of course not! After fighting the Calamity Titans for so many years, having to lie to those boorish commonfolk every day with a new tale... At least let them live on with their supposed honor.

C: 最近外面是越来越不安生了，神殿外的声音日渐稀疏，送来的祭品也是一天比一天少。
E: It's getting more unsafe outside these days. The sounds outside the temple have been waning, and our offerings dwindle by the day.

C: 放弃挣扎吧，帕西提亚。
E: Give up on struggling, Pasithea.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，你已经准备好了吗？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}, are you ready to go?

C: 你在紧张吗？
E: Are you nervous?

C: 孩子们的活力就像用不完似的，年轻真好啊。
E: The children's energy seems endless. Ah, to be young...

C: 说起来，那本书似乎很有趣。也分给我一册如何？下次再有不听话的小孩，我就用这本书哄他。
E: By the way, that book seems really interesting. Would you mind sharing a copy with me? Next time a child is being difficult, I can use it to comfort them.

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 其实，我也是为铁墓而来…
E: Actually, I'm here for Irontomb, too...

C: 但…故事不就是如此吗？只要相信的人够多，就会逐渐变成真实。
E: But... isn't that how stories work? When enough people believe in them, they gradually become reality.

C: 螺丝和公司签订了专项协议。未来一段时间，他们会密切关注翁法罗斯的状态。
E: Screwy has signed a special agreement with the IPC. They will closely monitor the state of Amphoreus for a while.

C: 迈德漠斯，真是翁星好儿郎！
E: Mydeimos, you're a true son of Amphoreus!

C: 只是星空一隅的所见。
E: Just a glimpse of a corner of the starry sky.

C: 咦，为什么「流星怪盗」系列被砍了，老师你知道内情吗？呜呜呜…我要给电视台寄刀片，这也太不人道了。
E: Wait a minute, why did they cancel "Meteor Thief"? {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, do you know the inside story? Ugh, I guess I will have to send complaints to that platform. It's so inhumane to just cancel the show like that!

C: 相关知识点已全部学习完毕，检测无误。
E: All relevant knowledge learned. Examination passed.

C: 原来是这么回事，我明白了……
E: So that's what it is. I understand now...

C: 现在一般的聊天难不住我，不过…我发现一个小问题——就是在我做实验的时候，我就忍不住会原形毕露……
E: Normal chats can't faze me now, but... I've got a small problem — I can't help but reveal my true colors during lab work...

C: 埃美丽小姐她说话时都面带微笑，而且总是会夸赞我说得好说得对。
E: Emily always smiles when she speaks, and always compliments me on being well-spoken and well-mannered.

C: 固件识别成功，但被拒绝连接。
E: Firmware recognized successfully. Connection denied.

C: 之前我就觉得他不对劲了。不然你见过谁没事一直在科室里加班的啊？
E: I've thought for a while that he's being weird. Who else do you see constantly working overtime in the lab?

C: 防盗门真的会说话吗？
E: Can a security door really talk?

C: 对啊。投稿就是这样没头没尾的，所以才需要我们去调查嘛！
E: Yep. That's how the submission was written. No real ending. That's why we need to investigate!

C: 你好…请问你是？
E: Hi... And you are?

C: 好了，该去帮我找朋友了。和以往一样，要找的人由我来指定。
E: All right, it's time to help me make friends. Just like before, I will decide who I want to make friends with.

C: 一个平平无奇的垃圾桶，就像一个平平无奇的垃圾桶。「垃圾大王」似乎不在这里。
E: An ordinary trashcan... Just like an ordinary trashcan. The "Garbage King" doesn't seem to be here.

C: 唔，大人的脑子可真笨呀，你到现在还没明白嘛？
E: Well, grown-ups are so silly. You still don't get it?

C: 下次我有事召唤你的话，你也要随叫随到哦——那就这样吧，鼹鼠党，解散！
E: Next time I call on you for something, don't forget to show up right away — so that's it, The Moles, dismiss!

C: 好了好了，别浪费时间了，我们快去「地火」的秘密集会所看看情况吧。
E: Alright, that's enough talk. Let's go to the secret gathering place of Wildfire and see what's going on.

C: 不过物资的派送不是一直由「地火」负责的吗？怎么今天轮到你们两个来了……
E: But isn't Wildfire usually responsible for deliveries? Why is it you two today?

C: 嘿嘿，又被我撞到了！你每次出现的时机都刚刚好，简直太完美啦。
E: Hehe, I bumped into you again! You always show up at the right time. This is just perfect.

C: 说唱歌手是这样的。
E: That's how a rapper is.

C: 举手之劳。
E: Piece of cake.

C: 好！看来虽然你缺乏科学素养、盲目迷信传统科学、缺乏独立思考能力、肚里没有半滴墨，但人还是不错的。最起码比那帮官僚强多了。
E: Great! Despite your lack of scientific acumen, your blind belief in the superstitions of traditional science, your lack of critical thinking skills, and your limited cultural prowess, you still seem to be a decent person. Much better than those darn bureaucrats, at least.

C: 已经有很多年，没人为了我的事四处奔走了。我这人说话比较冲，但我是真挺感谢你的…虽然你脑子不太好用。
E: It's been years since anyone cared about my thesis. I know I come across as blunt, but I really am grateful to you... even if you're not very smart.
Five.

C: 喔哦…不愧是波瓦大臣看中的新星，您果然绝顶聪明！
E: Hooboy... you really are Minister Bova's rising star, huh! What an intellect!

C: 啊——我明白了，您是带着任务来的，对吗？您是想来验收一下教育部的题库储备，对吧？
E: Ah, I see. You've come on a mission, haven't you? You've come to test the variety of questions in our quiz pool, haven't you?

C: 呃…这本还是算了吧，之前花店那个小姑娘，拉着我讲了一下午这本书的故事。
E: Ugh... I'll pass on that one. The last time when I was at the florist, she chewed my ear off all day about it.

C: 但她的叙述真的颠三倒四，最后我只记住了阿尔乔姆和什么炽烈且真挚的爱情……搞得我有点心理阴影。
E: But her description was all over the place. All I remember is someone called Artem and his blazing sincere love... it made me kind of gloomy.

C: 「陛下、陛下~你应当遮蔽世间的明镜~连同平静的湖水~你需道出她的真名实姓~驱逐千面的妖妃~」
E: "Your Highness, Your Highness~! You must shield yourself from all mirrors of the world, even the serene lakes! You must ask for her true name and banish that duplicitous succubus!"

C: 你看着面前的男人露出寂寞的神情，随后便如溃散的沙塔般于裂界的土地溶解。
E: The man before you shows a lonely expression before dissolving back into the Fragmentum soil like a collapsing sand castle.

C: 我就说你吃不了吧。
E: I told you that you can't eat.

C: 对呀，这附近也没别人啦。
E: Yep. There's no one else around.

C: 勇敢…我的爸爸…妈妈…会为我骄傲…吗……
E: Brave... My father and... mother... will they be proud of me?

C: 他们什么都往波月古海里放生，那些放生「鳞渊冰泉」的人姑且还算在法律边缘徘徊，但是放生野生生物的就属于违返仙舟律法了。
E: They throw whatever they get their hands on into the Lunarescent Depths. Pouring Scalegorge Spring Water might not be against Xianzhou's laws, but releasing wild creatures undoubtedly is.

C: 虽然听上去挺没有道理的，但这像是他们能做出的事。
E: It may sound unlikely, but this does seem like something they could do.

C: 已经过上财务自由的生活了是吧？那我们护珠人也不要管这个人好了！
E: They've already made a financially independent life for themselves? Then there's no need for us Pearlkeepers to pay this person any more attention!

C: 你根本不在意荒岛上的小小纠结，你关心着如何开展救援。只要这荒岛遇难是真人真事，你所做的就是最正确的判断。
E: You don't care one bit about the petty squabbles on the deserted island — you are concerned about how to perform the rescue. If there truly are people in real danger stranded on an island, then this is the correct call to make.

C: 现在没想好，以后许愿。
E: I haven't decided yet. I'll make my wish later.

C: 喝完喉咙没着火，算什么浓茶？
E: What kind of Flaming Potent Tea doesn't have a burning kick?

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Did you want something?

C: 据说将这种漂亮的宝箱摆在家中的显眼之处，会有效增加自己被盗的概率。有意思的是，在名为「元老院」的机构中，会有人出于不可告人的目的，故意去这么做。
E: It is said that such beautiful chests displayed in conspicuous spots at home serve to increase the chances of being burglarized. What's interesting is that in the organization of the supposed Council of Elders, there are those who would — for clandestine purposes — intentionally do this.

C: 「果蔬摊」
E: "Fruit and Veg Store"

C: 摇。
E: Ring.

C: 在很多世界，品质良好的无杂质红土是一种重要的矿物。
E: In many worlds, high-quality red clay absent of impurities is an essential mineral.

C: 自动化的采石器屈从铁一般的纪律，不知昼夜。
E: The automatic excavators work with extreme discipline and know nothing of time.

C: 泛滥的冥河
E: Overflowing River of Souls

C: 所有火光都会熄灭，所有花朵都会凋落。
E: All flames will eventually die, all flowers will wilt.

C: 那么，这次又是哪个城邦？
E: Which city was it this time?

C: 那些红水晶原矿的断裂面太锋利了，每次见您双手鲜血淋漓地离开，我心里总挺难受。
E: The fractured surfaces of those red crystals are far too sharp. My heart hurts every time I see your hands dripping with blood as you leave.

C: 那时歌耳戈还不是王后，只是一名威严却不失亲切的斗士。她待部族内所有的孩童都如己出，我也有幸蒙她教导，学了一招半式，这才能在悬锋祭典中胜出。
E: Back then, Gorgo was not yet queen. She was merely a ferocious but kind warrior. She treated every child in the tribe as her own. I was also fortunate enough to receive her tutelage and learned skills that I would not have claimed victory in the Kremnos Festival without.

C: 树庭学者们认为这和瑟希斯的审美一致，每个细节都在传递着它的神谕：所谓理性的真谛，大概就是在纷繁中找到本质，即使是在描绘自己的时候。
E: Scholars of the Grove believe this simplicity aligns with Cerces' aesthetic. Every detail conveys the prophecy: the essence of reason lies in finding simplicity within complexity, even in self-representation.

C: 你也想过是否能用欧洛尼斯的力量，再听一句初见的问候：「*我们*是缇~安！」
E: You've also thought about if you could lend the power from Oronyx, for you want to hear the greeting from your first encounter: "*We* are Trianne~!"

C: 吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
E: Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!

C: o((='ω´= )っ「连泡澡也盯着石板，就算是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的眼睛，也禁不住这么用欧！」)∋
E: o((='ω´= )っ "If you insist on gluing your eyes to the slate even while bathing, not even having {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} eyes will help!" )∋

C: 你不得而知，毕竟在翁法罗斯记忆总是包含着奇迹的成分。
E: You cannot say for sure. After all, in Amphoreus, memory always holds a touch of the miraculous.

C: …大姐头，咱们只是俩小偷，天真塌了也轮不到咱们来扛呀。不如听我的，咱们有多远跑多远，凭诡计的神力，就算世界真的毁灭了……
E: ... Boss, we're just two teeny thieves. Even if the sky falls for real, we aren't the ones who need to carry it. Why not run as far as we can? With the power of Trickery, even if the world gets destroyed...

C: 你想起星际网络上很火的各种「解压视频」，不知道拿剪刀把它剪断会不会同样解压。
E: You recall the popular "stress-relief videos" on the Interastral Network. You wonder if cutting it with scissors would be just as satisfying.

C: 装满卷轴的书匣，从它散乱的现况能看出其主人逃亡时的惊慌。
E: A book case filled with scrolls. Its disordered state reveals the panic of its owner during their escape.

C: 「不诚实的孩子，如果我能惩罚你就惩罚你了。」
E: "Dishonest child. If only I could punish you..."

C: 蝴蝶翅膀上的荧光正是亡灵们的象征，犹如身披一件死亡之衣。它们痛恨着，却又用爱拥抱着。
E: The ethereal glow on the butterflies' wings is the very essence of the deceased, as if draped in the cloak of death itself. They despise it. Yet they embrace it with love.

C: 就不能不闭眼睛吗？
E: Seriously? Can't we just keep our eyes open for once?

C: 既没有变成奇美拉，也没有变成八十岁的{F#老婆婆}{M#老爷爷}——甚至不需要重新登录游戏。
E: No transformation into a chimera, no instant aging into a {F#granny}{M#grandpa}. You don't even have to log back into the game.

C: 当然记得。你嘲笑我的衣着简陋残破，真是一尾无礼的金鳟。
E: Of course I do. You mocked my clothing as being simple and tattered. How rude, you golden trout.

C: {RUBY_B#下面这句话在向你「问好」}哦，你好，亲爱的旅人！{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#This means "hello"}Oh, greetings, dear traveler!{RUBY_E#}

C: 真的喀？谢谢恩公指路！
E: Really, crrk? Thank you, savior, for showing me the way!

C: 一个一个来…
E: One at a time...

C: 许多人都抚奏过这架弦琴，但唯有金织和那位医者指尖流出的旋律最为悦耳：前者如轻纱飞舞，后者如晨光拂面。
E: Many have played this harp, but only the melodies flowing from the fingers of Goldweaver and the Healer are truly the most moving: The former like silk veils dancing, the latter like morning light upon the face.

C: 所以你是…二次元人？
E: So, you're a... 2D character?

C: 嗯，这种生物确实会突然出现，向遇到的第一个人提问…{NICKNAME}，它问了你什么？
E: Yeah, these creatures do suddenly pop up sometimes and start questioning the first person they see... {NICKNAME}, what did it ask you?

C: 你想立刻开始第三轮禁区演练吗，{NICKNAME}教官？
E: Would you like to start round three now, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}?

C: 我接下来的梦想就是追上您的步伐，有朝一日能和您并肩作战！
E: My next dream is to follow in your steps so that one day we can fight together alongside each other!

C: 救命，我变成狗了！
E: Help, I've turned into a dog!

C: （跟着这些千纸鹤走，「分装快乐」肯定就在前面！）
E: (Follow these origami cranes. The Joy Filtration Set is definitely up ahead!)

C: 你知道「管家」的事吗？
E: Do you know about the butler?

C: …你要不要看看你是什么物种？
E: ...Do you even see what kind of species you are?

C: 围观的「阮•梅」造物们发出阵阵惊叹，你隐隐听到它们在讨论着人品与食物的议题。
E: Ruan Mei's creations huddle around and discuss something in astonishment. You can faintly hear them discussing character traits and food.

C: 在胡思乱想。
E: Merely lost in thoughts.

C: 好可爱！还从没听过这种演奏，{NICKNAME}表演的话，一定很悦耳！
E: So cute! I've never heard a performance like that before. If it's you, {NICKNAME}, it must sound delightful!

C: 来，让我看看。
E: Come on, let me have a look.

C: 我会尽力避免的。
E: I'll do my best to avoid it.

C: 呀…{NICKNAME}！还没睡吗？在这么晚的时候遇到，都已经是第二次了吧？这样下去可不行哦？
E: Hey... {NICKNAME}! Still awake? This is the second time we've met so late! You really shouldn't keep doing this, you know?

C: 那这个码头我就外包给你了！我先去照看其他的码头了，有缘再见吧。
E: Well then, I'll leave this jetty to you! I'm off to look after the other jetties. See you later.

C: 滴答！此路不通呀！
E: Tick, tock! This is a dead-end road!

C: 我就奇了怪了，你帮我测试这么久，我怎么一个徒弟都没来呢？
E: I was surprised. You've been helping me with the test for so long. Why didn't any of my apprentices come?

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment, I have something else to do.

C: 无妨，等您方便了之后再来找我吧。
E: It's no bother. Come back and see me when it's convenient for you.

C: 请随我来。
E: Come with me.

C: 不过对穷观阵来说，真随机也好，有人弄虚作假也罢，只要老板提供的信息足够，结果必然准确。
E: It doesn't matter to the Matrix of Prescience though whether a number is random or manipulated by someone. So long as I get enough data from this manager, the result is guaranteed to be accurate.

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 一个名字而已，你根本不可能认识的。
E: It's just a name. You couldn't possibly know it.

C: 这次的棋局可非同一般，你准备好了吗？
E: This round of chess will be quite extraordinary. Are you ready?

C: 让棋鬼一个岁阳独自静静。
E: Let the Chess Ghost have some alone time for a bit.

C: 哼哼，别想讨好我！我要回去闭关修炼，下次我可不会手软！
E: Hmph. Don't try to butter me up! I must seclude myself and improve. I will not be so merciful next time!

C: 咱们「寻径指津」呢，一个拿得出手的知名玩家都没有，除了……
E: But "Pathfinder"? We don't even have a single prominent player to our name, except for...

C: 这很合理，因为魔方不太好玩…
E: Fair enough. After all, Hexanexus isn't that fun...

C: 有吗？我的占卜室从来都叫这个名字…啊，你该不会还以为我是个迷钟吧？
E: Did I? I've always called my divination room by this name... Ah, you didn't still think I was a Ticker, did you?

C: 不给~
E: I'm not giving it to you.

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon falls away, only a piece of brocade woven by golden threads is left floating in the air. With a wave of the Garmentmaker's hand, it splits in two, one half flying into your hand...

C: 衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

C: 我风里来雨里去的时候，你们竟然住着别墅，喝着蜜酿，舒舒坦坦地过着好日子？
E: While I was making my way through wind and rain, you were here living it up in a mansion, throwing back ambrosia, and living the good life?

C: 有什么必要吗？
E: Why would I do that?

C: 教他们把财宝全都存进地窖，也省得我到时候复出时到处翻找。是个好主意。
E: Teach them to store their valuables in their cellars, so I won't have to rummage through the whole house while I'm at it. Good idea.

C: 尊重您的选择，但您可真是亏大了！
E: I shall respect your decision, but you're losing out!

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 还你就是…
E: I'll give it back to you...

C: 即便如此，你还是要把它们打包扛走吗？是你的钱包拮据到一分钱都不能放过，还是你的脑子空虚到需要廉价的符号填满？
E: But you're still gonna haul it away? What's your deal — wallet so thin you're scraping for pennies, or mind so empty you need worthless junk to fill it?

C: 那当然、那当然！我巴特鲁斯以后一定唯您棒首是瞻！您想要什么宝贝，吩咐我去便是，根本不劳您亲自动手！
E: Most certainly! I, Bartholos, shall be your devoted servant! Simply name your desired treasures — let my hands do the work!

C: 想想我们也算是老交情了…欸，说起来，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的力量，你之前用得那么娴熟…该不会在漫长的记忆中，我们早就打过无数次交道了？
E: We're old friends by now... And the way you handle {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s power so naturally... Maybe we've danced this dance a thousand times before in their long memories?

C: 直接把宝箱给我不就得了。
E: Just give me the chest and be done with it.

C: 所以天上这东西值多少钱？
E: So how much would that thing up there fetch?

C: 价值连城！当然，前提是你能想办法把它搬走…到时候就算是随便找个山之民把它丢进炉子里给化了，那也能炼出不少金子吧！
E: It's invaluable! Assuming you can find a way to move it... Even if you just had some Mountain Dweller melt it down, you'd still get a good amount of gold out of it!

C: 当然。就像刚才傻转着的那只，巴特鲁斯的分身和分身亦有不同。「人生是一座医院」，扎格列斯老祖说过，「每个病人都被调换床位的事情缠住。」
E: Obviously. Like that silly spinning one earlier, Bartholos creates different kinds of projections. "Life is a hospital," ancestor Zagreus said, "where every patient is fixated on switching beds."

C: 见过，在西风的尽头。
E: Yeah, we've met. At the end of the west wind.

C: 咳咳。不管怎么说，既然你们这么喜欢踩紫色多汁球体的感觉——
E: Ahem. Anyway, since everyone seems to love the feeling of stomping on round, juicy purple things—

C: 锵锵！巴特鲁斯向您伸出圆手——古董水盆一件，敬请收好~
E: Ta-daa! Behold, Bartholos extends his perfectly round hands and presents you: One antique basin. Please handle with care~

C: 好嘞，得令！
E: Ok, command received!

C: 恩维尔带你来到了一个相对僻静的角落……
E: Avilius takes you to a relatively quieter corner.

C: 为什么老师翻译出来的文本总是让人似懂非懂？为什么这种据说属于泰坦的语言如此模棱两可，以至于「光明」和「纷争」、「时间」和「罪恶」竟然在用同一个词汇表达？
E: Why are the translations from the scholar so fuzzy? Why is this language, supposedly having been used by the Titans, so vague that "light" and "strife," and "time" and "evil," are expressed by the same word?

C: 别急着谢我，哦…对了，虽然这话说出来多少显得对树庭缺乏尊重，不过——
E: Don't thank me just yet. Oh, by the way... though I mean no disrespect to the Grove... but—

C: 经历过许多轮回的冒险，你应该不会对一只会吐出机械音的羊头感到奇怪。
E: After countless cycles of adventure, surely you won't be surprised by a goat's head speaking in mechanical tones.

C: 《门扉之启，王座之终》
E: Light Slips the Gate, Shadow Greets the Throne

C: 辅祭，把这石板拿去交给委托人吧，她就在楼下。
E: Acolyte, take this slate to the client. She's just downstairs.

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: ——坏啦！太久没看见活人，我都忘了确认了…你应该会用欧洛尼斯祷言吧？
E: —Uh oh! It's been so long since I've seen a living person, I forgot to check... You know how to use the Oronyx's Prayer, right?

C: 哗啦啦——为何欧洛尼斯的祭司要设置谜题，又为何将谜题留给未来的人呢？
E: *whoosh* Why did the priest of Oronyx set up a riddle, and why did he leave it for future generations?

C: 还有这满地的杂物…这么不想被人解开，肯定是最后的谜题了！解开它解开它，老祭司家就没有余粮啦。
E: And all this junk on the floor... If they didn't want anyone solving this, it must be the final puzzle! Solve it, and the old priest won't have any rations left!

C: 什么玩意啊这是——
E: What the heck is this—

C: 确实… 每分每秒，圣城里都有人死去。
E: Yeah... Every second, people in the holy city are dying.

C: 你也是清洗者？
E: Wait, are you a Cleaner too?

C: 我又筛选出一批火种匣，还剩下七十二个需要确认。该死，这得开到什么时候？可是我…嘶……
E: I've sorted through another batch of Coreflame Caskets. Still <unbreak>72</unbreak> more to go. Darn it, how long is this gonna take? But I... ngh...

C: 为什么不一起去？
E: Why aren't you coming with us?

C: 我们这就撤去安全地带，英雄大人，如果您再遇到她，还请替我们向她道谢。
E: We're heading out to the safe zone now, hero. If you run into her again, please thank her for us.

C: 也不是啦，云骑军人投身沙场，死亡也是平常事。但我们没有用盒子……呃，灵柩盛装遗体的习惯。仙舟人辞别同袍的习俗，是将名字和玉兆供奉在「{RUBY_B#长生管理机构}十王司{RUBY_E#}」的因果殿里。
E: Nope. The Cloud Knights spend a lot of time on the battlefield — death is a common occurrence. It's just, we don't put bodies in boxes — uh — coffins... In Xianzhou, people go to the Hall of Karma in the {RUBY_B#Long-Life Supervisory Authority}Ten-Lords Commission{RUBY_E#} and consecrate the names and jade abacuses of the dead. It's our way of saying goodbye.

C: 这部分就是完全为你服务的了，希望你玩得开心！
E: This part was made specifically with you in mind. Ready to have some fun?

C: 温柔的光雨从天而降，落在你身上轻如亲吻。「丰饶」的药师踏空而来。祂面带笑意，眉眼间蕴藏慈悲，似不忍见你此刻的折磨与痛苦。当祂行走时，一根根荆条生长发芽，开出花来。
E: A gentle sprinkling of light falls from the sky like a soft kiss. Yaoshi the Abundance steps out of thin air. With a smile on THEIR face and compassion knitted into THEIR brows, THEY seem unable to bear seeing you suffer in pain. As THEY walk, thorns sprout up and blossom in THEIR wake.

C: 它要怎么解开「星神」的奥秘？
E: How is it going to answer the mystery of the Aeons?

C: 瞧，你可以自由行动了。我要你扮演阿基维利，先去找几个怪物打打，看看哪位模拟星神会先注意到你。
E: See? You can move around now. I want you to play Akivili and find some monsters to fight. Let's see which simulated Aeon will notice you first.

C: 什么也不做
E: Do nothing

C: 没事，我也不感兴趣。
E: It's okay. I'm not interested either.

C: 走近那个光点，去吧。
E: Approach that spot of light. Go on.

C: 你真的在乎答案吗？
E: Do you even care?

C: 你按捺下躁动的心跳，仔细倾听；这声音存在一些疑点：它们像动物、植物与婴儿在哭，却又异常成熟。而这啼哭的生命并未获得关心…无人在意它们即将凋零的命运。多只无形的手于虚空中收集捕捞…那些跳跃的影子于半空中闪烁。
E: You steady your heartbeat and listen carefully to the odd sounds. They sound like animals, plants, and babies crying, but with a hint of maturity. The crying creatures fail to get any attention... No one cares about them although they are dying. Multiple invisible arms are collecting and capturing them in the void... Those moving shadows flicker in midair.

C: 「蠹星曾经历物种繁盛的时期，此时虫族很可能存在多种生理性别——不同的生理性别在时代变迁中所承担的职能不一，在多基因分支中由哪几支承担生育功能也仍待探究；但不知何时、不知何故，古老的虫类物种似乎渐渐走向灭绝。」
E: "Lepismat was once a site of flourishing biodiversity, where insects of multiple biological sexes may have coexisted with each serving their own unique functions within the Swarm. However, it remains unclear which branches of the Swarm were responsible for reproduction during this era. However, at some point, the ancient insects gradually drifted toward the brink of extinction."

C: 是的，你得相信这不是一场游戏。
E: Yes, you have to convince yourself that this is not a game.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 听不懂？跑一遍就懂了。
E: Confused? Go through it yourself, and you'll get it.

C: 感觉如何。
E: How do you feel?

C: 螺丝咕姆刚提醒我，「宇宙数据封装已近上限，应该及时将它存储起来。」
E: Screwllum just reminded me, "Universe data encapsulation is about to reach capacity. Timely storage is highly recommended."

C: ……万机之王，「<color=#dbc291ff>博识尊</color>」。祂知道的太多了——你什么都可以问祂。在祂面前，人类是如此无知：那些你头脑中仅有的经验、知识，它们…少得可怜。
E: ...Monarch of Myriad Machines, <color=#dbc291ff>Nous</color>. THEY know too much. You can ask THEM anything. Before THEM, humanity embodies utter ignorance. The experiences and knowledge in your head, they are... minutely irrelevant.

C: 「阻止。」螺丝咕姆出现了。他用机械手背挡住了黑塔的视线，「逻辑：会有危险。」
E: "Prevention." Screwllum appears. He uses the back of his mechanical hand to block Herta's line of sight. "Affirmation: It is dangerous."

C: 「『互』的光辉也被模拟宇宙捕捉到了。」阮•梅接着说，「战火越烧越旺，祂不会坐视不管。但无论如何，博识尊计算中的『时刻』一一应验，仿佛没有任何力量出手撼动；或许有哪位星神尝试过，或许从来没有。」
E: "The radiance of HooH was also captured by the Simulated Universe," Ruan Mei continues. "THEY would not stand by and do nothing as the war raged on. However, the moments calculated by Nous did come true one after another as though no forces had interfered with them. Perhaps, some Aeons did or did not attempt to do so."

C: 「好吧。」 妻子说，「洗衣机里还有衣服，记得拿出去晾。」
E: "Alright. There's laundry in the washing machine. Please take them out to dry," the wife replied.

C: 加入法恩莎「护卫队」需要通过「授帽礼」——他们看向你。
E: To join Farnsha's Guardians, you must go through the hat-award ceremony. All eyes are on you.

C: 孩子们牵起你的手，满是泥泞的脸蛋笑着，他们指向一片焦土，那里曾是哈罗瓦最著名的花园，数不清的蝴蝶在其间舞蹈，又被俯冲的飞鸟捕食。鸟儿们飞向更高的地方，阿洛兹图书馆的顶端，银白色的圆盘倾斜，飘荡着雀的咻啾。
E: Children hold onto your hand, beaming out from under muddy faces as they point to a patch of scorched earth where once stood Halover's most beautiful gardens, and where countless butterflies swarm only to be hunted by swooping hawks. The birds keep flying up higher and higher, to the very top of the Alortz Library where the silver disks tilt and bird chatter flutters through the air.

C: 孤狼的愤怒掀动战火的一角，如同印刻在时间里的记忆，秃鹫与猿猴撕咬它的血肉，将困兽的挣扎碾压，它咬断可恨的翅翼，啃下鞭打的长尾，冲破血肉的洪流。
E: The rage of a lone wolf stirs up a corner of the flames of war, just like a memory etched into time. Vultures and primates shredded its flesh, crushing the trapped beast into submission. It gnawed off those terrible wings and chewed through the whip-like tail, before breaking out the almighty torrent of blood and flesh.

C: 枪柄折断，便探出利爪，利爪磨损，便亮起獠牙，它们断裂，然后随着骨骼的生长重新出现。你能看出猎物们在动摇，哪怕抵御了狼毒的侵蚀，瞳孔也在不可抑制地收缩。
E: Your spear snaps, so you stretch out your claws. Once those are blunted, you bare your fangs. Then they break, and reappear as your bones regrow. You can see the prey swaying now — even if they can resist the lupitoxin, their pupils cannot help but shrink to pinpricks.

C: 因为很漂亮。
E: Because it's beautiful.

C: 他们很快就会离开，不再来打扰你的生活。而你终于可以悄悄咪咪地打开另一道大门，将真正的参观者们领进屋来。
E: They'll be gone very soon, and will no longer bother your life. And you can finally, quietly open up another door so that the real visitors can come inside.

C: 谁能想到那做贼心虚的家伙，不仅把实验的受害者塞进铁疙瘩里，自己也是个一半肉一半钢的铁王八。
E: Who would've guessed that vile fellow, racked with guilt as he was, not only hid a victim of the experiment in a metal pod but is in fact a cyborg turtle, half-flesh and half-steel?

C: 等价交换不可反悔。
E: An equivalent exchange cannot be reversed.

C: 「这片土地有很强的电磁干扰，能够屏蔽探测仪，我们就在这里埋藏T<unbreak>500</unbreak>吧。」导师解下背后的铁铲。
E: "There is strong electromagnetic interference in this area. It is enough to block the detector. Let's bury the T<unbreak>500</unbreak> here." The teacher unstraps the shovel from their back.

C: 复仇是如此令人畅快。
E: Who knew that revenge was so satisfying.

C: 「成功？我问你，成功在哪里？」老者把实验数据拍在阿尔比拉德的案前，怒容满面。「我们给你安排海量资金，和伦理派打了半年的论战，甚至私底下和完美进化学派那群疯子做了数据交易。你觉得你的研究结果对得起学派的投资吗？」
E: "A success? Let me ask you, what exactly about this is successful?" The old man slams the experiment data down on the desk in front of Arblad, his face red with rage. "We prepared a huge amount of funding for you, and held six months of debates with the School of Ethics. We even made private data exchanges with those lunatics in the School of Evolutionary Perfection. Do you think that the results of your research are really worth the school's investment?"

C: 「尊敬的委员长，我不得不坚持，因为我无法掌握三百多种外语，而且这仅仅是帕隆莱刻周围一百光年内的语言，我相信在座的各位也不能。」
E: "Honorable committee leader, I have no choice but to continue using the Synesthesia Beacon. I cannot learn over three hundred different foreign languages. What's more, these are only the languages of planets within one hundred light-years of Palonglek. I am certain that this would not be possible for any of us in this room."

C: 委员长取走了那枚铜制指环。
E: The committee leader takes the copper ring from you.

C: 说是失败也许并不准确，至少在权杖的帮助下，传统反应炉的热效率提升了<unbreak>20%</unbreak>，公司因此获得巨大收益。
E: Failure may not be entirely correct. At least, with the help of the Scepter, the thermal efficiency of the traditional reactor increased by <unbreak>20%</unbreak>. The IPC had benefitted greatly.

C: 放轻松，你正缓缓沉入不可知的泥沼。它赋予你相称的身份，无名的学士，路过的看客，或者别的什么东西，例如，石头上的蚂蚁。迷幻的光华将一层轻纱披在你的意识上，耳畔攒动的数据愈发清晰。
E: Relax, you are slowly being submerged into the unfathomable swamp. It gives you a fitting status — a nameless scholar, a passing observer, or something else, like an ant on a rock. Mesmerizing lights will drape across your consciousness like a translucent veil, the bustling data in your ears achieving greater clarity.

C: 当知识在博识学会中走向货币化，缺乏价值的研究，便如流浪的乞讨者，你们身无分文，更不存在尊严。
E: As knowledge becomes a commodity in the Intelligentsia Guild, research that lacks value will become nothing more than wandering beggars. You have no money and have even less dignity.

C: 普遍观点认为，所谓的核心，就是鲁珀特二世。在天才已死的如今，余留的无机细胞，不过是帝皇头脑的残渣。
E: The common opinion is that the so-called core is Rubert II. In the present where the genius is dead, the remaining inorganic cells are nothing more than remnants of the Emperor's mind.

C: 你记得自己的荣誉，在<unbreak>11010</unbreak>星系的歼灭战中，借由「权杖」阻止有机体对帝皇的干涉。为扼制反生命方程的演算，你的机体被摧毁。
E: You remember your glory. In the annihilation war in the <unbreak>11010</unbreak> astronomical systems, you borrowed the Scepters' power to prevent organic lifeforms from interfering with the Emperor. To disrupt the antilife equation's extrapolations, your vessel was destroyed.

C: 「学士们才是能源战争的根源，我们全都被蒙在鼓里！」你呐喊。
E: "Scholars are the true origin of the energy war, and they've kept us all in the dark!" You shout.

C: 你无法再理解耳畔的话语。
E: Suddenly, you can no longer understand a single word being spoken around you.

C: 这趟演算，可以说是故地重游，回到「起点」。但她被困在了「起点」，我始料未及。
E: It could be said that this extrapolation is a return to the beginning, back to the "origin." However, she has unexpectedly become trapped at this "origin."

C: 「祝你们好运。」阮•梅将你们移出切片，在「死亡」抵达的前一秒消失不见。
E: "Good luck." Ruan Mei transports you all out of the section, disappearing the second before "Death" arrives.

C: 「0％的完整度，看来是停在核心瘫痪后的节点了。」黑塔皱皱眉头，「喂喂，螺丝咕姆，能听到吗？快来处理下。」
E: "0％ complete — looks like it's stopped at the node after the core was disabled." Herta frowns. "Hello, Screwllum, do you read? Hurry up and fix this."

C: 天才们，「智识」延伸进现实的思维突触，星神思考的具象化展现。
E: Geniuses. Thought synapses that the Erudition extends into reality. The physical manifestation and phenomenon of Aeonic thought.

C: 你瘫软的身体浸入巢穴，沿着通路下潜。异种生物修筑的透明外壳让通路变得更为坚固，他们站在那里，欣赏你的沉没。而你只想要好好睡一觉。
E: Your limp body sinks into the nest, flowing down through tunnels. The transparent outer shells crafted by alien creatures have fortified the passages as they stand by, admiring your sinking form. All you long for is a good sleep.

C: 「互动戏剧，这是剧目情节中的一环。我们希望从中看到艺术的现代性——打破第四堵墙。我的业务还不太熟练，非常抱歉。」
E: "This is an interactive play. This is a part of the show. We hope to perceive the modernity of art through it — to break the fourth wall. I don't have a lot of experience with this job yet. I'm very sorry."

C: 这是哪里？…你喃喃自语。你掉入了无垠黑暗中，这里没有光线，方向无法辨寻。
E: "Where's this place?" You mumble to yourself. You plunge into the boundless darkness. There is no way to get your bearings as there is no light.

C: 「我叫萨里，是恶魔，我的弟弟则是莱顿宁天使，你要和谁当邻居？」
E: "I'm Sal, a devil. My brother is an angel. Which one do you want as your neighbor?"

C: 「六十自然年的轮回又要来到，翁瓦克岛周期性魔王将从树上果实中诞育。我们的到来即是为了删除生物库中的数据——周期性魔王乃是一条外星虫子！」一位男士说道。
E: "The <unbreak>60</unbreak>-natural-year cycle is about to start again, and Vonwacq's Cyclic Demon Lord will be born from the fruit of a certain type of tree. We're here to wipe this data from the biological database, as the Cyclic Demon Lord is just an alien bug!" A man declared.

C: 「专售异星风味鸡尾酒。」接待员的语调听起来也十分古怪，「天才俱乐部#55余清涂流传至今的调饮配方只剩二十五种，这里兜售三种；是否是她的剧毒配方，我不敢保证。要哪杯？」
E: "We specialize in exotic cocktails." The waiter speaks in an odd tone. "Out of all the cocktail recipes left by Genius Society #55 Yu Qingtu, only <unbreak>25</unbreak> of them have been passed down to this day. Three of them are available here, but we can't guarantee whether those involve her toxic concoctions. Which one would you like?"

C: 噢…你觉得自己好幸福！
E: Oh... You feel so happy!

C: 这些「鏖兜虫」发出了吮吸的声音…你犹豫是否要进入猎杀它们，这或许会让你的身上沾上更多惹人注意的虫类气味……
E: These Combatobugs make a sucking sound... You hesitate to enter the lair and hunt for them, as you might find yourself coated in the insects' scent and incur more unwanted attention...

C: 你等待着星际和平投资机器打开它的*肚子*…但它纹丝未动。
E: You wait for the Interastral Peace Investment Device to open its *belly*... but it stays motionless.

C: 售货机的辉光将你笼罩其中，对客户数据的测定，在古老的机器里发出嘎啦嘎啦的响声。
E: The bright light of the vending machine engulfed you as the client data evaluation process caused the ancient machine to rattle and clang.

C: 「造物工作已完成，请验收——注：由本设备制造的任何物品，其专利及解释权归▄▀▄▄学派所有。」
E: "Creation complete. Please take your item. Please note: The patent and right to interpretation of any items created by this equipment are the sole property of the School of ▄▀▄▄."

C: 「已纳入，确认次级造物需求——你所需要的物品，是否具备时空稳定性？」
E: "Properties integrated, confirming secondary creation requirements. Does the object you require possess space-time stability?"

C: 苍猿消失在了黑暗里，你应该庆幸，至少它没有以侵犯动物人格对你发起诉讼。
E: The ape disappears in the darkness. You should take comfort in the fact that it did not file an animal rights' violation complaint against you.

C: 你抛出沉甸甸的鱼钩，它缓缓地渗透进水晶当中，下潜到肉眼无法捕捉的领域。
E: You cast the heavy fishing hook, and it slowly penetrates into the crystal, sinking into a domain that the eye cannot fathom.

C: 在喧哗的星际百货大楼，一台扭蛋机做作地出现在你的面前。炫彩的灯光，撕心裂肺的音乐和满身的鞋印，足以证明它在这里的受欢迎程度。
E: In the bustling Interastral Department Store, a capsule machine coquettishly appears before you. Its dazzling lights, ear-shredding music, and countless shoe prints all over its surface are evident proof of its immense popularity.

C: 由于你是唯一闲得没事儿押寿司飞船的，这下你可真是赚大发了。
E: Since you are the only one who bid on the sushi spaceship (because you were so bored), you really won big this time.

C: 由于大多数人都押中了这艘船，你的收获不能说没有，只能说比空气多一点。
E: Since most people bet on that ship, you didn't end up completely empty-handed, just somewhat empty-handed.

C: 概念：化约。整个宇宙由最基本的粒子、力等多种要素组成。将它们进行拆分，而后以最小单位开始重组，运算。
E: Concept: Transmutation. The universe's is composed of various elements such as the most fundamental particles and forces. Separate them apart, then reorganize and calculate them based on the smallest unit.

C: 综上，需要考虑一个问题。
E: Therefore, one question must be considered.

C: 「她哄骗那些小孩儿，告诉他们，长大比童年更美好！哈哈哈哈哈哈，嗝。」
E: "She lied to those children and told them that being a grown-up is better than childhood! Ahahahaha *hiccup*."

C: 学者对你口中的「天外世界」嗤之以鼻，并将你这个异端连同锻钢废料一起丢出了工坊。
E: The scholar scoffs at your mention of a "world beyond the sky," then casts your heretical self out of the workshop together with discarded steel scrap.

C: 不知走了多久，坚实的触感终于抵达你的脚尖。劫后余生，你长吁一口气，瘫倒在地上。
E: You can't tell how long you've walked, but a sturdy sensation finally meets your toes. Having survived the calamity, you let out a long sigh of relief and collapse to the ground.

C: 在他曾停留的地方，泛着绚烂色彩的宝物安谧地沉睡着。只不过，长年被黑潮侵蚀的财宝，似乎也早已染上灰黯之手的气息。
E: Where he once stood, treasures gleaming in vibrant hues now rest in serene slumber. Yet, they have long been eroded by the black tide, their luster dulled with the Hand of Shadow's taint.

C: 你曾是一位英雄，只是英雄也终究迟暮。孩子们总爱拉着你，让你讲述过去的故事，和你一同扮演远征的英雄，打败满是涂鸦的木头怪物。
E: You were once a hero, but all heroes eventually face their twilight. Children would always tug at you to mesmerize them with your feats of past, pretending to be heroes on an expedition with you, defeating wooden monsters adorned in painted scribbles.

C: 它曾在神殿里扮作黄金之茧，接受世人的供奉，直到墨涅塔飞入其中，才化身为影子，不急不慢地逃离。愤怒的泰坦，只能降罪于盲目的祭司。
E: They once pretended to be a Chrysalis of Gold in the temple, worshiped by many, until Mnestia flew into it, and they escaped as a shadow. The furious Titan could only curse the blind priests.

C: 扎格列斯的事一件都不能信。
E: Nothing about Zagreus can be trusted.

C: 青铜门闸缓缓打开，面生十目的巨狮一跃而出，它嗅到了你伤口散发出的血腥味，那比人小臂粗的牙齿磨得铮铮作响。
E: The bronze gate rumbles open, revealing the beast, a towering lion with ten burning eyes. It catches the bloody scent of your wounds. Its enormous fangs, thick as a human forearm, grinding together with an ominous metallic screech.

C: 「这样的小猫咪，我还能打十个！」你不知道哪来的勇气蹦出这句话，巨狮似乎听懂了你的嘲讽，十只眼睛气地冒出血丝。
E: "A little kitty like this? Ha! I could take on ten more!" You have no idea what possessed you to blurt that out, but the giant lion seems to have understood the taunt — its ten eyes blaze with bloodshot fury.

C: 最早的反诈骗手段。
E: The earliest anti-fraud measure.

C: 欧洛尼斯倒是吱个声啊。
E: Make a sound, any sound, Oronyx.

C: 重的下沉，轻的上浮；硬的稳定，软的脆弱；热的发光，冷的黯淡…就这样，无数规则被摆上天平两端，接受公正之秤苛刻的评判。
E: That which is heavy presses down, and what is light ascends. That which is hard offers firmness, while that which is soft remains brittle. The hot shines while the cold dims... This way, countless laws were placed on both sides of the scale, to face harsh judgment before the Scale of Justice.

C: 小时候还挺调皮。
E: Heh, they were pretty naughty as a kid.

C: 吉奥里亚是最初的工匠，各种崎岖的怪石，山之民，大地兽，都是它的作品。但它一定不是最优秀的工匠，因为所有作品都与精巧毫无关系。
E: Georios is the original craftsman. Every manner of strange rock, Mountain Dweller, and dromas are works of their creation. Yet, they cannot be considered the best crafter, for their works lack any semblance of finesse.

C: 这是两位泰坦给人类的考验。如果他们收下种子，以耕种获取粮食，瑟希斯就不再追究。
E: This was a trial set by the two Titans for humanity. If they collected the seeds and grew their own food through farming, Cerces would forgive their past transgressions.

C: 无果之爱，冷冽如冬。
E: Unfruitful love is as cold as winter.

C: 爱的羽翼，是如此易折。
E: The wings of love are ever so easy to break.

C: 于是，海边的战士们学会了法吉娜的酿造知识，也会在扬帆起航之日，向天空献上敬意。
E: From that day on, the warriors of the coast mastered the art of fermenting drinks and, before setting sail, would offer their respects to the sky.

C: 巨树飞快生长，从中诞生出智慧和理性。枝叶延伸之处，大地百花盛开，连那些泥浆中诞生的生命也沾染上些许灵气。
E: The tree sprouted with astonishing speed, and from it, wisdom and reason were born. Wherever its branches reached, the land blossomed with countless flowers, and even the creatures formed from mud were touched by its essence, gaining a spark of spirit.

C: 「您目光如炬，普照万方，希望造物受您的祝福，能在白昼行动自如。」
E: "Your gaze is piercing and shines upon all the world. I hope that my creations may receive your blessing, so they may walk freely beneath the light of day."

C: 「特聘测试」是什么意思？
E: What is the special appointment test?

C: 该设备已自动锁定，如需解锁请输入密码，密码！
E: The device is automatically locked. To unlock it, please enter your password. Password!

C: 如果只是路过，就不要随意使用该设备，设备！
E: Please don't attempt to use this device if you don't need access.

C: 为它打榜<unbreak>100</unbreak>次
E: Why not give them <unbreak>100</unbreak> upvotes?

C: 应该在这附近吧？
E: They should be nearby, right?

C: 声音来自这株…植物？你侧耳屏息，等待它下一次「开口」。
E: The voice is coming from this... plant? You hold your breath, waiting for it to "speak" again.

C: 嘴唇触碰杯身的刹那，你感到些许余温。或许这杯咖啡从被制作出来到现在，并未过去太久，仍带有一种「初生」的美感。
E: You feel some lingering warmth the moment your lips touch the rim of the cup. Perhaps it hasn't been long since this coffee was brewed, and it still retains a kind of "newborn" beauty.

C: 你这儿挺热闹啊。
E: You've got quite a crowd here.

C: 「消灭有机生命！」、「消灭奥勒里乌斯！」、「帝皇万岁！」…如此看来，奥勒里乌斯一定是你的名字，而这也确实与你的记忆完全吻合。
E: "Eliminate all organic lifeforms!" "Destroy Aurelius!" "Long live the emperor!" It seems like Aurelius is your name, and it matches what you remember.

C: 「我旁边这家伙，第十九个。」
E: "The guy next to me is the <unbreak>19</unbreak>th."

C: …你不敢说话，只能蹑手蹑脚地体认有关他的一切。爱上一个天才，让你觉得自己更像个笨蛋——直到有一天，哈尔博士突然宣誓了自己的爱情。
E: ...You dared not speak while you carefully took in every detail about him. Falling in love with a genius made you feel even dumber. Your feelings for him lasted until the day Dr. Howl announced the love of his life.

C: 啊…您、您难道不是本地人吗？
E: Ah... are, are you not a resident of this neighborhood?

C: 温暖的篝火啊，散发你汹涌的火光，将一切黑暗驱散吧。
E: O warm bonfire: Spread your raging flames and dispel all the darkness.

C: 真正的硬汉不屑听拐弯抹角的诳语，更不屑走弯弯绕绕的歧路——干脆自己钻一条路喀！
E: A real tough guy doesn't listen to lies and gossip, and has even less time for beating around the bush — just carve out your own way, I say!

C: 壁画里的这堆矿石堆放得也太不对称了，看得人心里痒痒的喀。
E: This pile of ore in the mural is offset. It's not symmetrical, and it's going to trigger people's urges.

C: 不过我信得过你。喏，我手边正好有一把八成新的二手矿镐，你拿去用吧。
E: That said. I do trust you. Hmm. I just so happen to have a mostly new, second-hand pickax. Take it.

C: 冷面小青龙…
E: Cold Dragon Young...

C: …咳，不好意思。一聊到这个，我的话匣子就被打开了。你刚才是想给我们看什么东西，对吧？
E: ...Ahem. Sorry. Once I start talking shop, I just can't get my chatterbox to stop. What did you want me to look at for you?

C: 吃…第四…口…
E: Take... the fourth... bite...

C: 海森伯格
E: Heisenberg

C: 你们就拼命逃跑吧，找地方藏去起来！
E: Run as fast you can! Find somewhere to hide!

C: 于是，你高举双手，从小巷的阴影回到了灯火通明的街道……
E: With that, you raise your hands and walk out of the shadowy alley and into the lit street...

C: 但无论是与不是，你都获得了一笔意外之财——你就当是替铁卫收了罚款吧。
E: Right or wrong, you did receive some unexpected cash. Let's just say you've accepted the fine on behalf of the guards.

C: （不说话装高手）
E: (Be quiet and act like a professional.)

C: 眼前这位居民以迅雷不及掩耳之势，将为数不少的信用点转让给了你。随后，这人便很快离开了现场，不知所踪。但你其实根本不是这个意思……
E: The resident in front of you swiftly hands over a hefty amount of credits, then bolts from the scene without a trace. That isn't what you mean at all...

C: （或者…告诉她？）
E: (Or... tell her?)

C: 对不起，我没拍到。
E: Sorry, I didn't get her in the picture.

C: 有缘再见了，我的同好！愿我们下一次相遇时……
E: Until we meet again, my fellow fan! I hope that the next time we meet...

C: 喀…那是持矛君王派来的侍者吗？好可怕喀……
E: Crrk... Is that who the Spearlord sent over? Super scary...

C: 快来看看我的作品喀——你觉得我画的是什么？
E: Take a look at my work, crrrk. Can you guess what I drew?

C: 「与蛮邦战至力竭身亡」…树庭的勇士并不比其他城邦少。
E: "Died from exhaustion during the battle against the barbarian states." ...The heroic warriors of the Grove are no fewer than those of other cities.

C: 曾属于某位贤人的塑像，因妥善维护而保存至今。时光磨去了它的细节，却无法磨灭它背后的故事。
E: The Sage's Statue has been preserved to this day due to proper maintenance. The years have eroded its details, but the story behind it cannot be wiped away.

C: 精彩。相当精彩。
E: Wondrous. Very wondrous.

C: 我确实是一只岩居蟹…
E: I am a Rock Crab...

C: 「乖，小东西。」
E: "Be good, little one."

C: 「干得好，小东西。」
E: "Well done, little one."

C: 叮！
E: Ding!

C: 嚯！你抬起价来倒是干脆。
E: Whoa! Easy for you to raise the price.

C: 欧洛尼斯，是机灵鬼；塔兰顿啊，可别得罪！
E: O Oronyx, how clever you be. O Talanton, none dare cross thee!

C: 谁都不放在眼里！
E: No one matters to me!

C: 因为怕痛就全点了速度！现在我的战绩是，躲过了十颗陨石，甩掉了二十只怪物！
E: I maxed out my speed because I hate pain! So far, I've dodged ten meteors and shaken off twenty monsters!

C: 其实我已经尝试自毁很多回了，但是我每次从港口掉下去一定深度，名叫「鹤运物流安全系统」就会自动接管我的运动组件。
E: I've actually tried to self-destruct on many occasions, but every time I plunge to a certain depth in the port, something called the Heron Express Safety System will automatically take over my movement components.

C: 我现在还不知道你忧郁的理由。
E: I still don't know why you are depressed.

C: 你们的客户都不是什么善茬。
E: Your customers are bad news.

C: 现在，就正义凛然地盯着它好了。
E: Now the right thing to do is fix your eyes on it with dignity and honor.

C: 事不宜迟，我们现在就出发吧。
E: We can't delay a moment longer. We need to go now.

C: 你注意到这只不满的机巧鸟有些欣喜，它对于自己打赌成功感到意外，但是等到你的错误答案一出口，你仿佛看见了愉快的代码在它的玉兆基板上流淌。
E: You notice that this resentful cycrane is a little satisfied. It is surprised it won the bet, but as soon as it hears your incorrect answer, it is as if the code for happiness is suddenly written onto the screen of its jade abacus.

C: 「我的鳞甲如同层层叠叠的钢甲，我的利爪如同削铁如泥的枪戟，阴影中的小贼，你胆敢轻举妄动，我的呼吸就足以为你带来长眠。」
E: "My scales are like plates of armor, and my claws are like razor-sharp halberds. Little thief hiding in the shadows, you're playing with fire. I could bring you your eternal sleep with a sneeze."

C: 你难道不会吞掉我吗？
E: Are you sure you're not gonna swallow me?

C: 老大，你在说什么呀，你还是我们的老大，这里还是我们的地盘。
E: Boss, what are you talking about? You're still our boss, and this is still our territory.

C: 记得你是墨涅塔的造物吧？
E: You haven't forgotten that you were created by Mnestia, have you?

C: 想象一下，悠闲的午后，你捧上书坐在这样一个落地窗前，和煦的阳光透过窗子洒在地上，那是多么安详的景象。
E: Imagine a tranquil afternoon: You sit by a floor-to-ceiling window, book in hand, as warm sunlight spills onto the floor. What a peaceful sight.

C: 男人突然陷入了沉默，他将回忆的眼神埋入眉头紧皱的阴影里。
E: The man suddenly falls silent as he buries his memories deep within the shadow of his furrowed brows.

C: 不要紧！等您准备妥当，我们再开始「作战」环节！
E: No worries! We'll start the Combat phase once you're good and ready.

C: 没错没错，我们这边后台记录着呢，失踪的机巧鸟都飞回来了。
E: Yes, yes, we've got all in the records here. All the missing cycranes have returned.

C: 我曾听闻吾主述说往事，天空中的人们会驾驭翼兽，一起冲破乌云和风暴的阻碍。
