E: My master once spoke of the olden days, when those who dwelled in the sky rode winged beasts, cutting through storms and breaking past the clouds.

C: 历史循环往复…
E: History repeats itself again and again...

C: 我好像也有一些想吐。
E: I feel the same way.

C: 你确认你不是在模仿我吗？
E: Are you sure you're not just emulating me?

C: 身体不由自主地动了起来…
E: My body moved on its own...

C: 不认识…
E: Who?

C: 哈努钟表不拆不逆，对家勿扰！什么？无差——无差也不行！
E: Don't break or wind back Hanu's clock! Don't touch a thing! What? It's the same... It can't be the same, either!

C: 「人潮分外拥挤，世界光怪陆离，而我唯独爱你。」
E: "Though the streets are crowded and the world has so much to see, you are the only one for me."

C: 前有钟表小子。
E: Clockie is up ahead.

C: 就像有位邪恶的美食家，把苏打豆汁儿、苏乐达和岩烧洞螈搅拌到了一起。
E: It's as if some kind of evil gourmet has mixed mung bean soda, SoulGlad, and stone-grilled olm together.

C: 必须…反攻匹诺康尼。
E: We have to... take over Penacony.

C: 这边还有人呢。
E: There are still people over here.

C: 诸位听众，今日我们讲述艾格勒的故事。
E: Dear audience, today we'll be telling the story of Aquila.

C: 这么可爱？我不信。
E: It's so cute. I don't believe it.

C: 是不是特别地温柔善良？
E: Is she as kind and gentle as they say?

C: 新作的原稿，该给谁看呢…
E: This new manuscript... who should I show it to first?

C: 我在祈福啊。你看见星槎后面那个圆圈了吗？那东西是星槎的引擎，叫做「玦轮」。
E: Why, I'm making a prayer. See that circle behind the starskiff? That thing is its engine — a jade wheel.

C: 嗯…我想到一个好主意，可以增加祈愿成功的概率…一次直接扔三枚硬币！乱枪打鸟，总归能命中。
E: Hmm... I just thought of something that can increase the chance of being blessed... Just toss three coins at a time! Even a broken clock is right twice a day!

C: 糟了！条子来了！咱们快撤！
E: Rats, it's the cops! Let's get outta here!

C: 打住打住！
E: Hang on!

C: 还好是瓦尔特乘客带着你们，要不然帕姆可不放心…这么惊险的战斗，你怎么能当个笑话一样呢？不把自己的性命当回事，这样…这样不好。
E: Luckily, Welt went with you, otherwise I'd have been worried... How can the most thrilling of battles be reduced to just a joke? You should take your own life seriously. This... this is not good.

C: 当时三月七乘客借了一个「奇物」过来玩，好像叫什么…「打分枪」？哦不对，帕姆想起来了，是叫「定分枪」！
E: March 7th was borrowing a Curio to play around. Pom-Pom thinks it was called... a Scoring Pistol? No, let Pom-Pom think... it was called a Rating Pistol.

C: （这不是「莓莓果汁」的配方，再在附近找找吧！）
E: (This isn't the Berry Juice recipe. Keep looking nearby!)

C: 你们上次击败末日兽，拯救空间站于水火之中，多多少少也算是个空间站英雄吧？
E: You guys defeated the Doomsday Beast and rescued the space station. Shouldn't that make you some sort of heroes to the space station?

C: 你能不能伸把手，让我扶着你？
E: Can you give me your hand so that I can hold on to you?

C: 呜哇…不对，能不能拉我一把？那个…帕姆腿麻了，动不了。
E: Urgh... Hold on. Can you pull me up? My... My legs have gone numb, and I can't move.

C: 艾丝妲！
E: Asta!

C: 沉闷至极！
E: Extremely dull!

C: 圆…圆润？！帕姆不想变成像是黑米团子一样的东西！
E: R—Rounder!? I don't want to look like a chocolate doughnut!

C: 接下来，{NICKNAME}乘客就负责把球球扔出去，然后帕姆把球球捡回来！一来一回，也算是有氧锻炼啦！
E: Now, {NICKNAME}, I need you to throw the ball out for me, and I'll retrieve it! Doing a few rounds of this can be considered good aerobic exercise!

C: 那就太好啦！
E: That's great!

C: 你注意到列车的通风系统正在运作，你决定多洒些水，以免蒸发得太快。
E: Noticing that the ventilation system is working, you decide to sprinkle more water so that it doesn't evaporate too quickly.

C: 派我出去打猎？
E: You want to send me out hunting?

C: 对了，到时候记得给我们的机器人配送服务打个好评啊！
E: By the way, remember to give our robot's delivery service a good review!

C: 哎，说来话长了，这和乐队的成员变动有关。
E: It's a long story. Our band is undergoing some changes.

C: 我正在考虑要不要重录以前的专辑呢，所以碟片什么的，我现在可给不了你。
E: I'm considering re-recording the previous album, so I can't give you the disc right now.

C: 虎克。
E: Hook.

C: 充电中…
E: Charging...

C: 鹤运速递，啥都能寄。返航路线生成中…
E: Heron Express — We Mail Anything. Generating return route...

C: 选项二，智取。想办法绕过巡逻铁卫的眼线，然后在侧翼区域找到控制大门的终端。
E: Option 2: Smarts. Find a way to bypass the patrolling guards' lines of sight, then flank them and find the terminal that controls the gate.

C: 能帮上忙就好。
E: Glad I could help.

C: 更用力地敲门。
E: Knock even more loudly on it.

C: （这次不能让它再逃走了。）
E: (I mustn't let it get away this time.)

C: {NICKNAME}！您要是肯来帮忙，那我们可真是得救了。
E: {NICKNAME}! If you are willing to help, then we really are saved.

C: …比俱乐部里的表演要刺激一万倍！
E: ...It's a thousand times more exciting than anything else in the club!

C: 当然了，我们这是正规比赛！
E: Of course, we run officially sanctioned matches!

C: 战斗来得总是如此突然。所以，你准备出什么？
E: Battles can happen unexpectedly. So, what's your move?

C: 你看向西方。那里是无垠的大海，尚未被寒潮永久冰封。
E: You look to the west and see a great ocean that is yet to be permanently encased in ice by the Eternal Freeze.

C: 或许你该换个方向，再探索一次。
E: Perhaps you should change direction and explore again.

C: 北岳之北，是一座名叫查拉图斯特拉萨帕拉——你放弃了读出那个名字——的山峰。毋庸说，那应该就是雅利洛-Ⅵ的最高峰。
E: North of the northern mountains is a summit called Zarathustrazapala, the name of which you've already given up trying to pronounce. That is indubitably Jarilo-VI's highest point.

C: 你结束了这段穿越千年的地理之旅。星球仪静静地停在你面前，原本布满灰尘的表面多出了几个显眼的巴掌印。
E: You end this geographical journey spanning millennia. The armillary sphere comes to a quiet stop in front of you. There are now a few discernible handprints left on its previously dusty surface.

C: 我可以为你分担一部分！
E: I can split it with you!

C: （那个女人最后提到了一个名字…「史考」？听着不像是个完整的名字。）
E: (She mentioned the name "Sco—" at the end, but it didn't sound complete...)

C: 吹半天这刀是瓷打的么？一碰就碎。
E: What is this blade made of, anyway? Ceramic? It's so fragile.

C: 好你个{F#小姑娘}{M#臭小子}，还敢强词夺理。看来，今天不好好教训你一番，你是长不了记性了。
E: Don't get smart with me, {F#missy}{M#scoundrel}! Seems like I'll have to teach you a little lesson here that you won't soon forget.

C: 不行，二百五十！一口价！
E: No, <unbreak>250</unbreak>! That's my price!

C: 下次遇到这种情况，先别急着给钱。记得向您身边的地衡司人员求助。
E: Next time if you encounter situations like this, please don't give money in a panic. Remember to seek help from your nearby Realm-Keeping Commission officer.

C: 显然这是那位仙舟人落在这儿的东西，私人物品暴露在公开场合，难免不太好。
E: Obviously, this is what the Xianzhou man left behind. It's not a good idea to expose his personal belongings in public's view.

C: 你为什么住在罐子里？
E: Why do you live inside a vase?

C: 你可真会替我揽活。
E: You really know how to give me more work.

C: 你放心啦，我们是正规机构。
E: Don't worry. We're legit.

C: 我要去干什么来着？
E: What am I here to do again?

C: 您先不要紧张，我先告诉你一个好消息吧！
E: Don't get all worked up first. I come bearing good news!

C: 不过我更希望您来帮帮我，帮帮鹤运物流……
E: I'd be even happier if you could help me and Heron Express...

C: {NICKNAME}，我们又见面了。鹤运物流最近确实丢了些货物，你懂的。
E: {NICKNAME}, we meet again. ...Well, Heron Express has indeed lost some items recently. You know what I'm saying?

C: 这罐「鲛人泪」很值钱吧！
E: This jar of Draconic Tears is really valuable!

C: 新版本肯定会吸引新人的。
E: This new version is sure to be a hit.

C: …这么简单的道理，这些人怎么就不明白呢？！
E: ...How can these people not understand such simple truths!?

C: 原本以为用这段时间游遍梦境绰绰有余，结果玩起来才发现…真是时光似箭，日月如梭啊。
E: I thought it'd be plenty of time in which to see the dreamscape, but after playing here for a while I've realized... time really is like an arrow — oh, how fast it flies.

C: 这个嘛…说来惭愧，我近来身体抱恙，一时睡得太沉，结果睁开眼……
E: Oh, that... I'm ashamed to say that I'd been sick lately and I fell into too deep a sleep. So when I opened my eyes...

C: 你看到W眼中有怒气划过…仿佛下一秒他就要跳起来狠敲你的脑袋了。
E: You see a flash of anger in W's eyes... as though he is about to jump up and knock you on the head.

C: 可实际上呢？与其说是心地善良，倒不如说是自私伪善；与其说是细腻敏锐，倒不如说是胆小怕事。至于认真负责？
E: But in practice? When they say "kind-hearted," they actually mean selfish and hypocritical. When they say "meticulous and perceptive," they actually mean cowardly and timid. And as for "responsible"?

C: 「砰」——W跳上了桌台，居高临下地看着你。
E: *thud* W jumps up onto the table and, having taken the high ground, looks down his nose at you.

C: 您曾感到孤独吗？不瞒您说，这种情绪就像是一道固执的影子，自童年起便终日在我身边萦绕不去。
E: Have you ever felt lonely? To be honest, this feeling has been like a shadow lingering over me since childhood that has refused to go away.

C: 我是梦境鼓励师阿然，无论您有怎样的烦恼，都可以向我倾诉。
E: I am Ran, a Dreamscape Motivator. Whatever worries you might have, you can tell me all about it.

C: 这也是我选择成为梦境鼓励师的原因。
E: That's also why I chose to become a Dreamscape Motivator in the first place.

C: 怎么有人欺负广告牌啊？
E: Hey... How could you bully a billboard?

C: 年纪轻轻这么急躁可不好…来来来，先喝瓶苏乐达冷静一下。
E: It's no good being so brash at such a young age... Come on, let's drink a bottle of SoulGlad to calm the nerves a little, huh?

C: 锐评不能算欺负…锐评！影评人的事，怎么能算欺负？
E: Strident criticism does not constitute bullying! Strident criticism, I say! How can a film critic ever be accused of bullying?

C: 你没看到广告牌上的海报吗？《汽水人生》——最近新上的一部青春歌舞片。
E: Didn't you see the poster on the billboard? "Life's a Soda" — the latest hot young musical.

C: 即便我至今仍无法直面它们，却始终都背负着它们，直到生命的尽头……
E: Even though I'm unable to face them, I will always carry them with me for the rest of my days...

C: …总之，动用你的想象力吧。你不是个开拓者吗？那就不该被现实束缚了思维！
E: ...Anyways, use your imagination! Aren't you a Trailblazer? If so, you shouldn't restrain your thinking to just reality!

C: 这位贼人年轻时几乎把自己身上的全部零件都换成了义体，在星区内兴风作乱，犯罪无数，头上顶着的悬赏足以买下一整颗星球。
E: When this pirate was young, he switched out almost all of his body parts with prosthetics, wreaking havoc throughout star zones and committing countless crimes. The bounty on his head was enough to buy a whole planet of your own.

C: 当时我们也很疑惑。本以为会有一场惊世大战，没想到一弹未发就跳到了收尸阶段。
E: We were puzzled at the time too. We thought there would be this ferocious battle, but it shifted straight to the cleanup stage without a shot being fired.

C: 所以我想请你帮忙，替我把那东西取来。
E: So I'd like your help in getting me that stuff.

C: 科琳…消失了？她在现实酒店里遇到了什么吗？
E: Colleen... disappeared? Did she encounter something inside the hotel in reality?

C: 五百信用点？！
E: <unbreak>500</unbreak> credits!?

C: 别担心，我之前跟你说过的话都句句属实：我曾经是无名客，现在也依旧向往冒险。除了那笔悬赏以外，我和宇宙商人也没什么不同。
E: Don't worry. Everything I told you before is true: I was once a Nameless, and now I still yearn for adventure. I'm no different from any other traveling merchants, besides the bounty on my head.

C: 是吗？如果我是他，我大概会做出一样的选择。
E: Is that so? If I were him, I would probably do the same.

C: 最开始，我带了一群小弟与他接舷，打算直接上手明抢…后来发现打不过，这艘船上有星际和平公司的护卫。
E: At first, I boarded his ship with my crew, planning to seize the letter by force... However, I soon realized we were no match for the IPC guards on the ship.

C: 作为奇迹本杰明工作室的总负责人，我受家族之邀来到匹诺康尼，为的就是能带队建设一个跨越时代的梦境世界……
E: As the head of Miracle Benjamin Studio, I was invited by The Family to Penacony to lead the construction of a dreamscape that transcends the ages...
Hmm...

C: …嗯？哎呀，您好…这么巧遇见，不如来一瓶？
E: ...Eh? What a coincidence to run into you here. Shall we have a drink?

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 现在你们可以好好*聊聊*了。
E: Now, you guys can "talk."

C: 我不明白……
E: I don't get it...

C: 现在是幻想时间…
E: Guess it's fantasy time...

C: 第一！我们是广告牌，哪来的心？
E: We're billboards, man! We don't have "empathy"!

C: 作为一介短生种，愿意把二十分之一的生命毫无保留地倾注给某个单独的个体…这难道还称不上忠贞和奉献吗？
E: I'm short-lived, yet I'm willing to dedicate one-twentieth of it to just one individual... Is that not loyalty and devotion?

C: 啊？抱歉，没想到宇宙中还有我不认识的明星。
E: Ugh? Sorry, I didn't realize there were stars in the universe I hadn't heard of.

C: 在下所见略同，宇宙经济的繁荣没有让行业变得更好，反而引来了不少投机倒把的家伙，天天搞些歪门邪道。
E: I agree. The cosmic economy boom didn't make things better in the industry. It attracted a bunch of shady speculators who engaged in all sorts of questionable practices.

C: 这可是我在业内见过无数次的事情，你可要小心点哦。
E: I've seen it happen countless times in the industry. So, be careful.

C: 是我太久没唱过自己喜欢的音乐了，以至于我再次唱起它的时候被快乐冲昏了头脑…其实当我站在台上的时候，就已经开始后悔了。
E: It's just that I haven't performed my favorite music in so long that I was overwhelmed with joy when I finally sang it again... However, I already began to regret it as soon as I stepped onto the stage.

C: 而我是已殒星神的卑贱遗民，从小喜爱的是古怪偏门的音乐，养成的审美是不入时宜的审美。我们和我的世界是时间的弃子，注定不能理解世人，世人也不会接纳我们。
E: On the other hand, I am the humble remnant of a fallen Aeon, raised with a passion for unconventional music, nurturing a sense of aesthetics that doesn't conform. My world and I are outcasts of time. We will never truly comprehend the world, and the world will never fully embrace us.

C: 你是一个警探？
E: You are a detective?

C: 到现在，只有苏乐达才能稍微麻痹我的神经，让我不再那么难受…倘若酒吧关门，我就无处可去。
E: Now, only SoulGlad could slightly numb my nerves and ease my pain... If the bar closes, I'll have nowhere else to go.

C: 你应该恨我，然后痛骂我是个无能的废物。为什么，为什么你还能用那样的语气…原谅我？
E: You should hate me and call me useless. Why? How come you can still forgive me... with such a gentle tone?

C: 但年轻人心有不甘，他不想从生到死都只能看见同样的景色——他憧憬瑰丽的奇景，想要像故事里的*无名客*那样自由地遨游宇宙。
E: However, the youngster was reluctant to resign himself to his fate. Not wanting to see the same view for his entire life, he aspired to witness all the wonders in the universe and roam freely around like the *Nameless* in the stories.

C: 据说只要是她出现的地方，惊梦剧团都会退避三舍、作鸟兽散，简直就是酒店的活传奇！
E: Rumor has it that the Dreamjolt Troupe will flee in all directions at the sight of her. She's a legend of the hotel!

C: 我的家乡是个不和平的星球。自从我被挖出来起，战争就没有一刻停歇。
E: My hometown was a chaotic place. The war hasn't ceased for a moment since I was dug out.

C: 我是家乡的罪人吗？我是不是亲手葬送了大家的未来呢……
E: Was I the culprit who ruined the future of my home planet?

C: …滚开、都给我滚开……
E: ...Away, all of you...

C: 我们之间有种奇妙的联系。我会因她的快乐而喜悦，她也会因我的悲伤而哭泣。
E: We share a wondrous relationship: I will be joyful because she's happy, and she will cry because of my sadness.

C: ——在那之前，你又最后瞥了一眼那张照片。奇怪的是，照片上的三个人似乎都露出了一丝笑容…温暖得有些不真实。
E: ...you steal one last fleeting glance at the photo. What's strange is that all three people in the photo are flashing smiles... so warm that they seem a little unnatural.

C: 我们都是匹诺康尼本地人——成年之后，我们都经过了「同谐」的洗礼，成为了家族的一员。
E: We were all Penacony locals... and all baptized into Harmony when we came of age, becoming members of The Family.

C: 别用那种指责的眼神看我。要知道，没我的装备支持，那群人连反抗都做不到，军方的镇压机器可以在一天内把整个片区连地基拔起来。
E: Don't give me that snide look. I'll have you know that without my supplies, they wouldn't even get the chance to resist. The state's machine of oppression would just eradicate them before nightfall, roots and all.

C: 要来瓶美梦糖浆吗？
E: How about a bottle of Dream Syrup?

C: 另外…好心劝你一句，虽然你这次凭着些见不得光的小伎俩赢得了冠军，但也别太把自己当回事。
E: Also... here's a word of advice: You may have won through shameful trickery this time, but don't pat yourself on the back just yet.

C: 你最好别打什么坏主意，不然猎犬的警卫可不是吃素的！
E: You'd better not get any funny ideas, or the Hounds will hunt you down!

C: 她是那么纯粹…她的歌声那么动人，她理当在万众瞩目之下加冕，成为「美」的代言人、成为「美」本身！
E: She's the epitome of purity... Her voice is so moving that she should be crowned before the eyes of millions, becoming the spokesperson and avatar of Beauty!

C: 一天到晚净想这些没用的——学生就该好好学习，天天向上！
E: Thinking about useless stuff day in, day out... No, students should focus on their studies and their self-improvement!

C: 你转达了阿图罗先生给哈里森的嘱托——不要浪费生命。
E: You relay Mr. Arturo's advice to Harrison: Don't waste your life away.

C: 后来我从星际和平网络了解到，这种事压根算不上什么新闻——有钱人的嘴脸，全宇宙都一个样。
E: Later, thanks to the Interastral Peace Network, I realized that such events aren't even considered news at all: Wealthy people act the same, regardless of where they are in the universe.

C: 老鸟已经在外面观察了好一阵子。他的心绪虽然被你拨动，但心中的折痕却并未被抚平。
E: I've been observing for a while from outside. You may have stirred his emotions, but the creases in his heart have yet to be smoothed out.

C: 别说，视频内容还真挺好笑。我怎么从来没想到让蛋糕吃人这么个点子呢！
E: But I have to say, his video is quite amusing. Why have I never come up with the idea of having a cake eat a person!?

C: 没错，走吧，就此离开吧。倘若你取走了垃圾，垃圾桶又该如何实现自我价值呢？
E: Yeah, right, just leave the trashcan be. If you removed all the trash, how would the trashcan fulfill its self-worth?

C: 你打开了第三个木桶，终于发现了某人藏匿于此的宝物——一瓶罐装快乐水。
E: You open the third barrel, and your perseverance is finally rewarded. You have discovered someone's treasure: A bottle of soda.

C: 啊，原来是这样啾？！搞了半天是我把头卡在椅子里了。
E: Tweet? So that's what happened! My head was stuck inside a chair!

C: 真的吗？我不信！像我这么可爱的小鸟，怎么会不受欢迎！
E: Really? Lies! Why wouldn't you when I'm such a cute little birdie?

C: 不许动！
E: Freeze!

C: 让本天才检查检查…咔咔，你有没有摔伤哪里，没看到伤口，不过要是头晕的话记得去上面找那些科员检查！
E: Let me have a look with my genius eyes... Mwahaha, I can't find any injuries from the fall, but if you feel dizzy, please go and see a researcher for a check-up!

C: 所以说你的这版方案就是天方夜谭，根本无法满足需求......
E: That is precisely why your plan is pure nonsense, these requirements simply cannot be met...

C: 别急，方案还没讨论完呢。
E: Hold on, we haven't finished discussing the plans.

C: 我在星球仪上看到过，在过去的某个时候，这颗星球上的确是有海的。我们的祖先曾经乘船环游世界，不知什么时候轮到咱们。
E: I saw this on the armillary sphere before, this planet did indeed have oceans at one point in the past. Our ancestors once traveled the world on ships, I wonder when it will be our turn to do the same.

C: 几个木箱子凌乱地摆在这儿，里面不知装有什么宝贝。
E: A few wooden boxes are piled carelessly on the floor. Who knows what treasures they hold.

C: 除了这些，工地上还有其他三处木箱。只要你把里面的东西都带给我，我就可以付你报酬。
E: There are three other areas with crates on this site. If you can bring the items inside to me, I will reward you.

C: ...一个人的垃圾，另一个人的财宝——多简单的道理。
E: ...One man's trash is another's treasure. Everyone knows that.

C: 取走里面的东西。
E: Take the items inside.

C: 你不信任我，可以理解。我会给你时间好好考虑的。
E: You don't trust me. I can understand. I will give you time to consider.

C: 别打我啾！
E: Don't hit me, tweet!

C: 我要做守时的鸟，你也要做守时的人，再见啾！
E: I'm going to be a punctual bird, and you should go and be a punctual human. Goodbye, tweet!

C: 啾！是哪个坏客人的行李把我压住了啾！
E: Tweet! Which rude guest's baggage is crushing me?

C: 回去之后，我要让其他小鸟们也评价一下啾。
E: When I go back, I'll have to get the other birdies to rate it.

C: 谢谢你，这位…是哈努兄弟啾！
E: Thank you, this... It's Brother Hanu, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，有个爱跳舞的孩子每天都跑到<color=#dbc291ff>某块显示屏附近</color>，试图复刻上面的舞姿——说不定它现在也沉迷在学习中呢？啾啾？
E: Let's see... Oh yes, there's a child who loves to dance and hangs out <color=#dbc291ff>near certain screens</color> every day to copy the dance moves it sees. Perhaps it's engrossed in practicing there? Tweet tweet?

C: 谢谢你，好心的人！我该回去了啾~
E: Thank you, kind soul! I should return now, tweet~!

C: 但你也可能是个灵巧的坏蛋啾！
E: But you could also be a nimble baddie, tweet!

C: 希望再许三个愿望啾…
E: I hope to have three more wishes, tweet...

C: 赤红大哥的锻炼方法啾…
E: How Boss Red trains himself, tweet...

C: 看来你在路上已经碰到所有偷懒的小家伙了啾。
E: It appears you've run into all the slackers along the way, tweet.

C: 美梦小镇的居民越来越多，房子快要住不下了啾…我们必须在小镇外开拓新家园啾！
E: The population of Dreamville is increasing, and there almost aren't enough houses for everyone, tweet... We need to expand beyond the town and build a new home, tweet!

C: 你向面前这只小鸟展示了自己的梦境护照。
E: You flash your Dreamscape Pass to the bird before you.

C: 给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
E: Tell me the story of the origami birds...

C: 好好奇啾…
E: Curious... Tweet~

C: 钟表小子在偷懒啾？
E: Is Clockie slacking off? Tweet~

C: 外面太危险了，我要回黄金公子身边了啾！
E: It is too dangerous out there, I need to get back to Young Master Gold, tweet!

C: 那后面的就都交给你了啾！
E: Then I shall leave it in your hands from here, tweet!

C: 这样会不会太拖沓了呢…
E: Don't you think it's a little too slow...

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 因为这是纸板小屋。
E: Because it's an origami house.

C: 每只折纸小鸟生来都会搭巢——但猫头鹰教授将自己独有的搭巢技巧交给我们，我们才能搭造出小镇如此丰富的小屋啾。
E: Every origami bird knows to build nests from birth... But it was only when Professor Owl shared their own nest-building skills with us that we were able to build such a rich array of huts throughout the town, tweet.

C: 于是你低下头——如你猜想的那样，这里什么都没有。
E: You glance downwards. As you expected, nothing is there.

C: 给我讲讲折纸小鸟的故事…
E: Tell me the story of the origami birds...

C: 什么？其他小鸟也知道藏进雕像里？我居然不是原创的啾？
E: What? Other birdies also know about the statue's hiding spot? I wasn't the first one who found it, tweet?

C: 你飒爽的英姿，就连天上的星星也无可比拟啾。
E: Not even the stars in the sky can match your heroic valor, tweet.

C: 想办法钻进电视机里看看？说不定能在动画的世界找到它。
E: You can try to dive into the TV for a look? Maybe you'll find it in the world of animations.

C: 这报时有意义？
E: Is there even a point in telling the time like this?

C: 看不到我啾。
E: Can't see me, tweet.

C: 对哦，我怎么没有想到这点啾？
E: Oh right. Why didn't I think of that, tweet?

C: 也没有一只小鸟参加比赛啾！
E: Not a single birdie joined the competition, tweet!

C: 不要，我还是做只漂亮的小笨鸟吧。啾~
E: No, I'd rather be a beautiful dumb bird. Tweet.

C: {NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}.

C: 不认识！
E: Dunno!

C: 你回过神检查，这才发现——不知是何方神圣在你口袋里塞了一把「大自然的馈赠」。
E: You come back to your senses only to discover that somehow, someone has stuffed some of "nature's gift" into your pocket.

C: 唉…不管怎么说，《无言之卷》也顺利回收了。交还给玉络吧。
E: *sigh* Anyway... here is the Manuscript of Silence. I should return it to Yuluo.

C: 我在丹鼎司见过你，你还和龙女大人关系不错对不对？你快来看看，这个人好像出事了……
E: It's you! I've seen you at the Alchemy Commission, and you seem to be close with the Dragon Lady. Please help me! Something seems off about this man...

C: 你不会是在幸灾乐祸吧？我是认真的。
E: You're not gloating, are you? I'm serious.

C: 眼观鼻鼻观心，你在心中默念着自己所问之事。
E: You dive into the depths of your mind and meditate on the question in your mind.

C: 你拿起供品细细端详，里面有些精致的吃食，包装完好，就是不知道是否过期。还有些可爱的家居用品，漂亮的头饰、眼罩，看得出来墓主人生前颇为享受生活——
E: You pick up the offerings and study them a while. Inside are exquisite foods, preserved and intact within the packaging, and of unknown expiry date. There's also some cute household items, beautiful headwear, and eye masks. It looks like the grave occupant seemed to enjoy life while it lasted...

C: 「金人巷…里…尚滋味…好看…好吃…还不贵…」
E: "Spices Supreme... in the Aurum Alley... it's beautiful... it's yum... and it's cheap..."

C: 您可以再尝试尝试…
E: You can give it another try...

C: 唉…对不起，是我失态了。
E: *sigh* Sorry, I lost my composure.

C: 可是智慧生命的脑袋里能想象自己从没见过的东西吗？
E: But can intelligent creatures actually visualize something that they haven't even seen before?

C: 怎么了吗？我要是说「岁阳身上有次元口袋」的话，你会感到奇怪吗？
E: What about it? Would you think it was strange if I told you heliobi have an extra-dimensional pocket inside our bodies?

C: …岁阳的事，你可以不用这么清楚的。
E: ...You don't have to get all up in heliobi business.

C: 唉……真伤脑筋……
E: Sigh... what a real headache...

C: 停，别再碰了——我这就变回来。
E: Stop, don't hit me anymore... I will transform back.

C: 奇怪了，我这么逼真的拟态你都能认出来啊？
E: Strange, you managed to see through such a realistic mimicry?

C: 谁、谁啊？我不是说在家族的人来之前别打扰我吗！
E: Wh—who's that? Didn't I tell you not to bug me until The Family gets here!?

C: 在梦里还是别聊这个了吧……
E: Come on, let's not talk about stuff like this in the dream...

C: 佩内洛普的声线崩溃了。在她心中囤积许久的辛酸苦楚化作泪洪，顷刻间夺眶而出。
E: Penelope's voice started to crack. The bitterness and resentment that had gathered in her heart for so long transformed into tears and burst out in an instant.

C: 夏洛特…
E: Charlotte...

C: 我捡到一盘磁带…
E: I stumbled upon a tape...

C: 欢迎下次再来体验*豪华版*的内容啊。
E: You're welcome to come back to experience the *deluxe edition* of our show!

C: 我是由全匹诺康尼排名前五的酿酒大师打造出来的一款黄金香槟，一般的逐梦客大概率一辈子都没机会碰我的瓶身一下。
E: I'm a bottle of golden champagne crafted by one of the top five winemakers in Penacony. The average Dreamchaser probably won't even get to touch my bottle in their lifetime.

C: 赶紧想办法带我们离开！
E: Hurry up and find a way to get us out of here!

C: 黄，其实我不久前偷偷听到了它们俩私下聊天，说了一些不太好听的话。
E: Yellow, I've actually heard the other two talking privately about you not long ago. They said some quite nasty things.

C: 说你的原料不行。
E: They said you're made from poor ingredients.

C: 啾，朋友，东西你找到了吗？快快快快给我！
E: Tweet, my friend, did you find what I wanted? Quick, quick, quick, give it to meeee!

C: 这个推论有些生硬，不过我可能已经抓住了一丝头绪。
E: This theory is a little forced, but I might have grasped onto something.

C: 还犹豫什么？这种场合当然得有三月七！
E: What are you waiting for? Of course March 7th needs to be here for something like this!

C: 要的就是你这股热情！不过垃圾桶这个，确实要求有点高。
E: That's the enthusiasm I need! However, turning into a trashcan is a bit of a tall order.

C: 你是没看到，当时我把瓶盖一拧开，愤怒的气泡直接像燃料一样把我推上颁奖台，整个赛场都凝固了，一半的参赛苏乐达直接当场弃权了。
E: You weren't there to see it, but the moment I opened my cap, my bubbles of rage shot me onto the podium like rocket fuel! The entire stadium froze and half of the contestants dropped out on the spot!

C: 嗯，一定会的。
E: Yes, we will.

C: 我也有张类似的卡片…
E: I also have a card that resembles this...

C: 非常独特的音色……
E: It sounds so unique...

C: 看看有没有你要的谱子…
E: Let's see if there're any scores you want...

C: 金条！我来了，金条！
E: Gold bars, here I come!

C: 好吧，那{NICKNAME}你到时候跟我说一声哦，要是有什么不该看的画面，咱马上就把眼睛闭起来！
E: Alright, then. Well, just give me a holler if there's something I shouldn't see, {NICKNAME}. I'll shut my eyes immediately!

C: 当时…星期日先生并没有对我下狠手，只是把我囚禁在意识中，多亏了景元将军赶来，我才能逃出生天。
E: Mr. Sunday did not deal with me too harshly at the time. He only imprisoned me in the consciousness. It's thanks to General Jing Yuan that I managed to escape.

C: 狱卒的目光一变，开始对你进行上下打量。
E: The prison guard's gaze shifts abruptly, assessing you with keen scrutiny.

C: 能得到你的理解，也是一种荣幸。
E: It's also considered an honor to gain your understanding.

C: 呵呵，你看，我们这不就回来了么。
E: Heh-heh, look, we all ended up back here anyway.

C: 这些人，难道说非常强？
E: Are these people really strong then?

C: 剧本还没有想好，可能是因为我还没有办法好好理解「鬼魂」是什么…对了，我想问你，你相信鬼魂的存在吗？
E: Perhaps it's because I don't fully understand what a ghost is that I haven't managed to come up with the script... That's right, do you believe in the existence of ghosts?

C: 那就好，接下来的话只有你一个人听见就行。
E: That's good. What I'm about to say next is meant for you and you alone.

C: 我试试吧。
E: I'll give it a try.

C: 坏了吗？好像是坏了吧，我不确定，你让人家查查。
E: Is it? I think it might be. I'm not sure. Get someone to check.

C: 嗯？这个味道，是谎言的味道！
E: Hm? That scent, it's the scent of deceit and lies!

C: 你在说什么……
E: What are you talking about...

C: 六哥，{F#她}{M#他}不是看不起你，只是看不见你。
E: Brother Six, {F#she}{M#he} isn't looking down on you. {F#She}{M#He} can't even see you.

C: 你突然体会到一种近乎神圣的氛围——这人对于知识是如此虔诚、如此崇敬，以至于你想要冒昧搅扰的念头简直就是一种罪过。
E: You suddenly sense an almost-sacred atmosphere — this one is so devout, so respectful of knowledge, so much so that the mere notion of your offending disruption would be a sin.

C: 我不太清楚，可能嫌弃我们只是个学生社团吧，没什么经费，设备和拍摄技术也很差，说是要把电影作为人生志向，却总拍些无聊透顶的片子。
E: I'm not too sure. Maybe he felt we were just a small new student society with no future. Our budget's meager, our equipment and filming skills are pretty bad, and for all that talk about filmmaking being our life's aspiration, we only film dumb student shorts.

C: 即将落幕的校庆，所有学生都在为成为舞台上的明星而奋力向前，其中，三名选手的身影尤为引人注目。它们分别是——
E: The school anniversary is soon to end, and all the students are clamoring forth to become stars on the stage. Among them, three candidates stand out brilliantly — they are...

C: 金色酒瓶来担任主角。
E: The gold bottle will play the protagonist.

C: 哼，记得把无关镜头都剪掉，只留苏乐达的内容。我们按时长付费。
E: Hmph, don't forget to cut out the other pointless scenes, and just leave the ones with SoulGlad in. We charge by the hour.

C: 所以…下次可别乱来。这里可是奥赫玛，阿妈说，我们的一举一动，泰坦都能看得见。
E: So... Don't do that next time. This is Okhema, after all. Mom says that the Titans can see everything we do here.

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 收起钱袋就跑。
E: Take the pouch and run.

C: 仙舟风红色马面裙。
E: A Xianzhou-style red dual-pleated skirt.

C: 酸麻感忽然褪去。你的视野又重新恢复了。
E: The sensation of tingling suddenly stops, and your vision resumes.

C: 《崩坏：昏睡铁道》
E: Honkai: Sleep Rail

C: 我相信你。
E: I believe in you.

C: …还有这种奇特的生物吗？我见过不少奇兽，但从未见过没有腿脚、没有肚皮的种类。
E: ...There's such a bizarre creature? I've seen plenty of weird beasts, but none without legs or belly.

C: 吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
E: Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!

C: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
E: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

C: 它急了！虽然你输了问答，但总觉得——这把是你赢了！
E: It's angry! You've got the wrong answer, but you feel like you've won this round!

C: 但罪人确实存在——那便是卫兵！他说扎格列斯给他托了梦，代表他在值勤时睡着了！可他是守城的卫兵，怎么能呼呼大睡？这是渎职！他就是罪人吼！
E: But the guilty does indeed exist — it was the guard! He said Zagreus came to him in a dream, meaning that he dozed off while on duty! But how can someone who's supposed to guard the city be sleeping soundly? That is a breach of duty! He is the guilty party!

C: 它曾是最聒噪的病毒…
E: It used to be the noisiest virus...

C: 现在的垃圾袋，真是一个比一个干瘪了。作为本王的贡品，这怎么够格呢？
E: Trash bags these days are seriously too deflated. How can they serve as a proper tribute to their king?

C: 没有星期日！
E: No Sundays!

C: 这种泛滥成灾的称呼，你拿来形容我，说明你根本就不懂我，也不懂哲学……
E: The fact that you're using such a ubiquitous title to describe me shows that you neither understand me nor the concept of philosophy itself...

C: 你也不知道吗？那么，我们是否都在这个未知的空间中迷路了？无知并不可怕，可怕的是我们停止了探索和寻找答案的勇气……
E: You don't know as well? If so, are we all lost in this unknown space? The unknown is not a scary place, what's truly scary is how we've stopped discovering the world and our lack of courage in searching for answers...

C: （…之前写了什么来着？）
E: (...What did I write last time?)

C: 嗷呜…阳光青提，好吃嗷！
E: Awoo... The sun-kissed grapes are delicious!

C: 也许过去的「昔涟」在迷境经历过什么，但我的记忆却很模糊。和{NICKNAME}一样，甚至有种初次拜访的感觉……
E: Perhaps "Cyrene" experienced something in the maze before, but my memory is a blur. Just like {NICKNAME}, it feels like my first time visiting this place...

C: 谢谢你，为人家解答了疑惑——
E: Thanks for clearing that up for me—

C: 我记得刚见人家时，你心里有许多疑问需要解答。
E: I remember you had many questions for me when we first met.

C: 覆满了血污的盔甲，看得出它的主人曾经历过漫长而残酷的厮杀。但你认出了刻在头盔中央的小小的天秤标志，你记得这位忠于信念的战士。
E: A suit of armor that is covered in blood stains. It is clear to see that its owner experienced a long and brutal struggle. However, you recognize the insignia in the center of the helmet of a set of scales and recall the soldier that remained true to their faith.

C: 不过，木马的肚子里传来了窸窸窣窣的声响，似乎有人正躲藏在里面。
E: But wait — rustling sounds are coming from inside the wooden horse, suggesting someone might be hiding within.

C: 既然要踏上传递神谕之旅，自然得有气势。所以我提议将神驹整体涂为红色，不仅易于辨认，也适合传颂圣女的名号。
E: When carrying prophecies across the land, appearance matters. That's why I proposed painting the divine foal red — striking to behold and perfect for heralding the Maiden's name.

C: 古老的言语还在耳畔回荡，但活窗已然合上。恍神间，你似乎看到木马的周身亮起微光，像是无形的门扉正在开启，难以用言语描述的空洞感忽地涌上心头。
E: The ancient words linger in the air, but the sliding window has been sealed shut. In your daze, you notice a faint glow around the wooden horse, as if an invisible portal opens — an ineffable emptiness suddenly grips your heart.

C: 我为人们颂讲泰坦意志与世界的来历，解读征兆与古老的预言，还有那即将迫近的灾厄，花了整整十天十夜。我太累了……
E: For ten days and nights I proclaimed the Titan's will, the world's creation, interpreted signs and ancient prophecies, and the impending calamity. I'm exhausted...

C: 又换人了？！
E: It's someone else again!?

C: …那位神驹已经安歇了。对，就是字面上的意思。
E: ...That divine foal is resting in peace now. And I mean exactly what you think I mean.

C: 好冷……
E: So cold...

C: 给我燃起来啊！
E: Fired up!

C: 但是从个人角度的话……我最喜欢的是呜呜伯。
E: But from my personal perspective... I'd say Wubbaboos are my favorite.

C: 我有什么可以帮你的吗？
E: Is there anything I can help you with?

C: 但我会通过我的语言，去指引每一个，就像是你这样，迷失在慌乱之中的人。
E: But with my words, I will guide all those who are lost and in a panic like yourself.

C: 这怎么能叫人不担心，不害怕呢！
E: How can I not be worried? How can I not be scared?

C: 没错，捏住鼻子，这玩意儿不过是褐色的液体而已。
E: Yes, pinch your nose. It's just brown liquid.

C: 诶，要是两个都不喜欢，岂不是双重踩雷，波少会讨厌我的吧……
E: But if he dislikes both of them, wouldn't it be twice as bad? Master Capote is going to hate me...

C: 谁是波少？
E: Who is Master Capote?

C: 哎哟，好乖的年轻科员。这么热心肠的孩子，我可是不多见了。
E: Oh, what a good kid! Not many kids these days are as kind as you are.

C: 算了，不逗你了。
E: Fine, fine, I'll stop messing with you.

C: 你在空间站里收藏了什么？
E: What's in your collection here on the station?

C: 要是我们都离开阮•梅女士，她该怎么排解自己的烦恼啊…想想就很孤单，不行，绝对不行！
E: How is she going to deal with her troubles without us... I can feel her loneliness just by imagining the situation. No way! I can't let that happen!

C: 我没什么想说的了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 是你？我记得你，你走之后就再也没回来看过我…现在倒好，看我被丢在这个垃圾回收站里，是不是很丢人？是不是很丢人！喵！
E: It's you? I remember you. You never visit again after leaving. Look, I'm being dumped at the recycling station! Isn't it embarrassing? Isn't it? Meow!

C: 还有我在你身边呢。
E: I'm here for you.

C: 去找你的小伙伴聊聊吧。
E: You should talk to your peers.

C: 就是让那些什么科员把尖端设备挂在它身上，让它送过来给其他造物们展示，向大家传递友好的信息嘛。
E: I'll have those researchers hang advanced equipment on Wubbaboo. Then, Wubbaboo will come back and show the equipment to my people as a friendly gesture.

C: 嗷！我知道一点，但不多，里面的零件太复杂了我不敢拆，但外面的开关和显示屏我还是会修的。
E: Oh, I only know the basics. The parts inside are too complicated for me to disassemble and fix, but the switches and display outside shouldn't be a problem.

C: 外面乱哄哄的，危机四伏！这里就不一样了，你是不是觉得这里很安全？
E: It's chaotic and dangerous outside. Here, it's different. You feel safe here, don't you?

C: 是你教导我要谦虚一点，你不记得了吗？
E: You taught me to be humble. Don't you remember that?

C: 行吧！以后再聊。
E: Alright! Catch you later.

C: 我没什么要问的了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 你也是自己编的吧？
E: You made that up all by yourself too?

C: 哈哈，你也不赖！
E: Haha, you're pretty good too!

C: 但你已经是个成熟的开拓者了，很明白行事绝不能鲁莽的道理——
E: However, you are an experienced Trailblazer. You understand by now that one must not act recklessly...

C: 靠近仪式道具时，<color=#dbc291ff>卷轴会发生变化</color>
E: When you approach a ceremonial item, <color=#dbc291ff>the scroll will change</color>.

C: 眼见两人又要为「真理」的定义争吵起来，你赶忙快步离开了现场。
E: Seeing that both of the men before you are hurtling towards another argument about the definition of "truth," you rush away from the scene as quickly as possible.

C: 我同意希诺的观点。
E: I agree with Zeno's view.

C: …波瑟芬妮…别怕…我的波瑟芬妮……
E: ...Possephone... Don't be afraid... My Possephone...

C: 我骗你干嘛，这事儿可是那位德墨忒尔亲自检举的！
E: Why would I lie? That's what Demetria herself reported!

C: 黄金战争期间，我们两家各自代表着自己城邦的立场，在战场上相互厮杀，双方家族都有不少成员葬身于对方的刀剑下。
E: During the Chrysos War, our families fought against each other on the battlefield as each represented the banner of their own city. Plenty of members from both families were slain by the other city in the fighting.

C: 奇怪的事…锁链…宁芙的管家，上周订了锁链。
E: There was something weird... Chains... Nympha's butler, last week, ordered some chains.

C: 难道是拿来关住她的？
E: Perhaps they were for tying her up?

C: 你拒绝了无数出身高贵的奥赫玛青年，没想到竟是为了个悬锋族人？还非得是这个！要不是卫兵将那条项链拿给我看，我都不敢相信他所言为真。
E: You rejected all those high-born young Okheman boys, but I never thought you were doing that for a Kremnoan! And it had to be this one! I'd never have believed it was true if the guard hadn't shown me the necklace.

C: 这就是悬锋人的实力吗…
E: Is that the strength of a Kremnoan...?

C: 去学习乐律吧。
E: Go learn some music theory.

C: …看来这个推论无法成立。
E: ...Seems like this hypothesis is unfounded.

C: 人们被黑潮造就的怪物杀死、死后又被黑潮转化为新的怪物——纵然对黑潮与它的造物你已然不再陌生，这样的事实依旧令你感到不安。
E: Humans are slain by monsters created in the black tide, and they in turn are turned by the tide into new monsters — Though you're now no stranger to the black tide and its offsprings, the thought still sends chills down your spine.

C: 他似乎仍在试图向你道谢，却因泣不成声而只能挤出些许断断续续的含混音节。
E: He seems to be trying to express his gratitude, but only manages to vocalize broken and confused syllables through his sobs.

C: 那我这次喝这个吧！
E: I'll drink this one this time!

C: 这有什么可笑的，我小时候还想当大明星呢。
E: What's so funny about that? I wanted to be a celebrity when I was younger.

C: 只要保持高强度水群，就不会错过消息！！！
E: Just keep our text threads going at a high intensity and you won't miss out — will you!?

C: 靠着这位饲养员先生的关系，你从大地兽工坊里弄来了成堆的红土。要是那<unbreak>1200</unbreak>只大地兽全都在场的话，或许还能吃完——可惜在不得。
E: Thanks to the caretaker, you manage to procure heaps of redsoil from the Dromas Workshop. If all <unbreak>1,200</unbreak> dromases were present, they might've finished it all — but alas, they're not.

C: 冷静了？
E: Have you calmed down now?

C: 我愿意接受符合{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}精神的裁判。
E: I'll accept a judgment in line with the spirit of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，你是奥赫玛的大英雄，肯定能进出云崖。你可以带我去刻法勒的身边吗？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, you're Okhema's great hero, so you must be able to come and go at Dawncloud. Could you bring me to Kephale?

C: 信仰心可没有贵贱之分。
E: Nobility matters not when it comes to faith.

C: 你推崇的所谓平民祭法，连有价值的供奉都不舍得拿出来，刻法勒怎么可能给予回应？
E: This "civilian's rite" you favor doesn't even provide a valuable offering. Why would Kephale respond to that?

C: 我不知道拜见尊神应该遵循何种礼仪。我只知道，见到爸爸，只要真诚地说话…就一定能得到温柔的抚慰。
E: I don't know what rituals you follow when meeting a god. I just know that if I speak sincerely to my dad... I'll always receive his gentle comfort.

C: 可是，我想恳求您，千万不要把奥赫玛的光明丢下……
E: But I beg of you, please don't abandon the light of Okhema...

C: 是我，全世之座，众生之父，永昼的背负者。
E: It is I, the Throne of Worlds, Father of All Beings, and Bearer of Eternal Day.

C: 谁想要签名啊？
E: Who even wants your autograph?

C: 演出了身受重伤的样子。
E: You sure acted like you were seriously injured.

C: 不忍卒看的残酷战斗结束了，柯库翁一瘸一拐地回到你身边。
E: The brutal battle, too hard to watch, finally ended, and Glykon hobbled back to your side, limping.

C: 赞美仁慈的父！瞧，这位{F#女士}{M#先生}的担保和我说的一样吧？
E: Praise the merciful Father! See? the {F#young madam}{M#young sir} agrees! Told you!

C: 咦？真的可以？
E: Huh... really?

C: 就这么办！
E: Let's do that then!

C: 遭部族驱逐后，小维吉妮娅加入了逐火，这才找到自己的归身之处。
E: After being banished from her tribe, little Verginia joined the Flame-Chase Journey before she finally found a place to belong.

C: 既然如此，为什么你要……
E: If you knew that, why did you...

C: 这便是理性的顽石必须滚落山崖的原因——它不忍打扰另一侧，那微风吹拂的静谧湖面。
E: That's why the stubborn boulder of reason must tumble down the cliff — it can't bear to disturb the serene lake surface on the other side, where gentle breezes blow.

C: 阿波罗尼，请允许我为你朗诵一首赞诗吧。这是我…在心底深埋了许久的诗。
E: Apollonius, please allow me to recite a poem of praise for you. This is a poem that I've... kept buried deep in my heart for so long.

C: 这是你自导自演的幻境……
E: This is just a fantasy of your own making...

C: 你并未变，我也不会。
E: You haven't changed, and neither will I.

C: 再见，{NICKNAME}…希望我们还有机会再见。
E: See you around, {NICKNAME}... until we meet again.

C: 选择卷八
E: Select Volume 8

C: 奇妙，这瓶紫色的液体没有任何味道，有种在喝水的错觉。
E: Weird. This purple liquid is completely flavorless. Might as well be drinking water.

C: 刚刚在工作吗？
E: Here for work?

C: 相信我在这儿会拥有许多愉快的回忆。
E: I believe I'll have lots of happy memories here.

C: 人类…还真是矛盾的生物啊。
E: Human beings really are conflicted life forms...

C: 老爹平时总是说腰不舒服…三月七姐姐说，只要把这个玩偶垫在腰上，就会舒服很多了！
E: Daddy always says his back is sore... March said if we lay this puppet behind his back, he'll feel much more comfortable!

C: 喔，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！虎克大人正找你呢，你跑哪去啦！
E: Hey, honorary member {NICKNAME}! Boss Hook has been looking for you. Where have you been?

C: 这就是你偷懒的借口？
E: You sure you're not just ignoring your writer's block?

C: 在这列车前后车厢转了好久，终于找到你了。
E: Oh, you are here. I've been looking for you up and down the train.

C: 列车里弥漫着的浓郁咖啡香…闻起来真不错。
E: *sniff* Is that coffee...? Smells good.

C: 你知道得不少嘛。
E: You seem to know quite a lot, don't you?

C: 丹恒，快逃！
E: Dan Heng, watch out! Make a run for it!

C: 站在棋盘边，离两侧座椅同样远的点位上，面朝过道对面的观景窗，将视线对准车厢顶部的虚空鲸投影，然后打开界面，确认取消三次后转动扭蛋，就是命中目标的最佳时机。
E: Stand at the edge of the board, at a point equidistant from the seats on either side, facing the viewing window opposite the aisle. Align your eyes with the void song whales hologram near the ceiling and open the interface. Then pull for the prize after confirming and canceling three times in a row. This is the best strategy for obtaining the desired prize.

C: 可惜，天空已经不再属于我了。也许有一天，我会回到它的怀抱中，但那一定会是我最后一次翱翔。
E: It's a shame. The stars no longer belong to me. Perhaps one day I shall feel their embrace once again, but it will undoubtedly be the day of my last flight.

C: 刚才遇到姬子小姐，和她聊了一会儿。没想到她这么内行。
E: I just bumped into Himeko. We got chatting, and, well... I never knew she was such an expert.

C: 如果我真的是一个有勇气的人，是不是更应该在遭受压迫的时候，第一时间给他说出不呢？又或者是说早一点和他谈一谈，而不是以这样的方式画上句号呢？
E: If I really am brave, shouldn't I have said no to him the first time he oppressed me? Or should I have talked with him earlier, so that things wouldn't have to go down this way?

C: 也不知道是自己已经从那段过去中彻底走了出来，所以不在意他的回应；还是说从没想过他会道歉，所以真正听到的时候有些诧异。
E: I don't know if I've totally put that time behind me and didn't care about what he could have said, or I never thought he'd apologize and was surprised he actually did it.

C: 好呀，那就时常来叨扰老师了。
E: Alright! Then I'll be here to bother you more often in the future.

C: 现在就能带你去。
E: Well, I can take you there right now, if you're up for it.

C: 哦，哈哈，你来了啊。
E: Oh, haha, you're here.

C: 向丹恒请教了许多知识……
E: I learned a lot from Dan Heng...

C: …不过，条件大概会比那时候艰苦得多——你要做好心理准备哦。
E: ...But the conditions will probably be a lot worse this time around — you'll need to be ready.

C: …比如现在，我才刚来没一会儿，就已经有点怀念下层区空气的味道了。哈哈哈~
E: ...Case in point, I've only been here for a while, but I'm already kinda missing the taste of the Underworld air. Hahaha!

C: 如果有这么高级的技术……
E: If only such advanced tech were available...

C: 这样说来，还要感谢你们…有时公务繁忙，还可以来这里躲个清闲…你们是仙舟的贵客，自也没人敢来这里找我。
E: I must thank you for this... I can come here to have some peace and quiet when my work gets too busy... You are esteemed guests on the Xianzhou — I doubt any would dare to pull me away.

C: 不知不觉，本座竟与姬子闲谈了半日…
E: I didn't realize I'd spent half a day conversing with Himeko...

C: 你是这么想的吗？原来如此……
E: Is that how you feel? I see...

C: 那个人？哦…你是指，我方才说的有松弛感的那位？
E: Who? Oh... you mean the state of composure?

C: 他能拥有全新的生活，我也为他感到高兴。
E: I'm happy that he was able to find a new life.

C: 未来在列车前行的路上若是遇到了难处，别忘了罗浮永远是诸位的避风港。
E: If the Express ever runs into trouble in its future endeavors, please remember that the Luofu will always be a sanctuary for you all.

C: …但是，后来我又探测了好几遍，那里真的是什么都没有…不、不会真的是什么太空幽灵吧？我来之前，没、没有想到列车会有这么可怕……
E: I used all the tricks in the judges' handbook, but couldn't get any evidence. I—I—It's not some sort of space ghost, is it? I—I didn't think the Express would be this scary!

C: 欸？是这样吗？
E: Oh, is that right?

C: 斯蒂芬…这孩子十分善良，总是让人禁不住多关照他几分。
E: Stephen is a kind-hearted boy, always making one feel compelled to look out for him.

C: 我一点都没觉得
E: I can't say I do.

C: 登上列车的客人……
E: Every guest who comes aboard...

C: 哦对了，还有这个。
E: Oh yeah, there's this too.

C: 我们无法决定人生，但梦境注定还是梦境。对于那些正在坠入深渊的人，我希望尽我所能帮助并治愈他们，让他们能安稳地回到现实……
E: We may not be able to decide our lives, but the Dreamscape is doomed to be just a Dreamscape. For those who fall into the abyss, I can only hope to help them heal and return to reality in peace...

C: 我以前从来没有做过这样的梦。在梦里，很多时候我都是从一个面具，走向另一个面具……
E: I've never had such a dream before. In most dreams, I just go from one mask to another...

C: 所以很遗憾，目前我也无法帮助她找回失去的记忆。
E: It is a pity that I can't help her retrieve her lost memories.

C: {NICKNAME}，我的挚友。请允许我用骑士的方式，向列车表达真诚的问候！
E: {NICKNAME}, my dear friend, please allow me to extend my sincere greetings to the Express in a way that only a knight can!

C: 令人唏嘘的消息。
E: What sobering news.

C: 虽然晶石是真，但我为自己的疏忽感到十分惭愧。
E: Although the Rainbowite is real, I am extremely ashamed of my negligence.

C: 一颗——两颗——三颗……
E: One... two... three...

C: 方才在三月姑娘房里看到了不戴帽子的列车长，忍不住多待了会儿……
E: I just saw the conductor without their hat on in Miss March's room, and I couldn't help but stand there a little longer...

C: 嗝——感觉有点不消化，是吃太多了吗？
E: *Burp* My tummy's not feeling too good. Did I eat too much?

C: 嘘，吾在炼心，保持安静。
E: Shh, I'm training my mind. Keep quiet.

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 当然可以，有的商人能一边称兄道弟，一边把你卖了数钱。但我不是那种商人，我有自己的原则。
E: Of course, some businesses can be on intimate terms with you — all the while selling you down the river. But I'm not that kind of businesswoman. I have my principles.

C: 想问你几个问题…
E: I have a few questions...

C: 现在是休息时间。作为公职人员，公私分明是最基本的素养。
E: I'm currently on break. As a public official, separating professional and private time is of basic importance.

C: …你在问我？
E: ...Are you asking me?

C: 这两部作品构思别出心裁，情感色彩鲜明，语言精雕细琢，具有强烈的个人风格…
E: Powerful, stylish, and full of unexpected twists and turns, these two books demonstrated with their refined language the strengths of both authors.

C: 最近？预计会有不少新书出版，不过都是一些和下层区环境生态有关的科普读物——毕竟现在大家对那里的境况都很好奇呢。
E: Recently? We're expecting to have several new books coming out, but they are all popular science books about the Underworld's environment and habitat. After all, people are curious about what things are like there.

C: 真的吗？
E: Is that so?

C: 最近怎么没看到你上剧？
E: Why haven't I seen you in anything new lately?

C: 唉，光有一身演技有什么用呢？音乐剧总归是要演唱的。
E: *sigh* That won't do. People come to musicals for the songs.

C: 「和声之间有某种奇妙反应～我确定他就是我的唯一～」啦啦啦～
E: I can feel something deep in the harmony... I'm sure he's the one... la la la...

C: 其实我一开始是不信的，直到他用那玩意随手印出两张序列号一模一样的冬城盾纸币，我才信了他的邪……
E: I didn't believe him until he used it to print money. He made two bills with the exact same serial number...

C: 布洛妮娅都不行？
E: Even Bronya can't handle it?

C: 最近有什么大新闻？
E: Any big news lately?

C: 让我看看…
E: Let me see...

C: 干后勤，干后勤，每天就是干后勤，唉……
E: Logistics, logistics, all I do is logistics every day, *sigh*...

C: 怎么，你找我有什么事吗？
E: What do you want from me?

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 那行，以后要有机会再合作吧。眼下我还得想下排班的事，回头再聊。
E: Okay. I'm looking forward to working with you sometime. I have to figure out scheduling, so I'll talk to you later.

C: 这件事对你有什么好处？
E: What's in this for you?

C: 哼，这你就不懂了吧！将来铁卫们肯定会长期驻扎在这里。那么问题来了——这下层区本来也没什么娱乐活动，那他们该去哪儿找乐子呢？
E: Hmph, you just don't get it! The Silvermane Guards will definitely be stationed here for a long time. So, here's my question: There's nothing to do for fun down in the Underworld, so what are they going to be getting up to for entertainment?

C: 原因的话，我也不是特别清楚啦。
E: I'm not sure why.

C: 你要是能再带点跳跳糖过来的话，我就教你怎么搜集下层区最前沿的信息！
E: If you can bring me some more popping candy, I'll tell you how to collect the hottest gossip about the Underworld!

C: 呃…不对不对不对。虽然这件事很重要，但我总觉得要说的不是这件事……
E: Er... No no no. This matter is major, but I don't think it's what I wanted to say...

C: 你想找布洛妮娅干嘛？
E: Why do you want to see Bronya?

C: 我…我就是普通的「地火」文员，平时干些…记录工作，还有会、会计活。
E: I'm... I'm just a regular bureaucrat for Wildfire. I do... admin and accounting.

C: …看你这反应，明明就听到了吧！
E: ... So you did hear it!

C: 怎么区分鉴定难度？
E: How do you distinguish the difficulty of the appraisal?

C: 如果我们找到了某样值得仰望的东西…满怀希望地上路，步子都会变得轻盈，就算被绊倒了也能很快振作起来，重新出发。
E: But if you find something to look up to and move forward with hope, then your steps will grow lighter... and if you should fall, you'll be on your feet before you know it.

C: 我不知道托帕为什么没在信里提及那些数字和概率…是她对自己足够自信？还是她在刻意隐瞒？
E: I wonder why Topaz didn't mention the numbers and probability in her letter... Was she confident enough in herself? Or did she deliberately hide them from me?

C: 这里是我的家，我唯一熟悉的地方。有机会的话，我也想去见识见识外面的广阔世界…但现在还不是时候。
E: This is my home, the only place I've ever known. If I get the chance, I'd love to see the world out there... but now's not the time.

C: 大守护者的训诫提醒我们，绝不要将「存护」的恩典视作理所当然！我们必须继承筑城者先祖们的精神，在这个世界上坚韧地生存，与一切灾祸勇敢抗争！
E: The Admonishments of the Supreme Guardian remind us to never take Preservation's grace for granted! We must inherit the spirit of our Architect ancestors: To persevere and survive in this world of ours, and to bravely defy any calamities we face!

C: 听听围观的人们在议论什么。
E: Listen to what the crowd is saying.

C: 存护！好耶！
E: Preservation! O praise!

C: 但针对你的合理提问，我还是会给出公正的回答：布洛妮娅大人是「存护」意志忠诚的追随者，她将引领我们走向琥珀色的温暖黎明！
E: But I'll still give your reasonable question a fair answer: Lady Bronya is a loyal follower of the will of Preservation. She will lead us to its warm amber dawn!

C: 不对，我记得还有另外一个人…是谁来着？一下居然想不起来……
E: No, I remember there was another person... Who was it again? I can't believe it, I actually can't remember who it was...

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 公司的事已经顺利解决了。
E: The problem with the IPC has been taken care of.

C: 不愧是我们！
E: We're amazing!

C: 这只是身为手足亲人需要尽到的基本责任而已。
E: I'm merely performing the base duty required of a family member.

C: 我要购物。
E: I want to buy something.

C: 先聊到这里吧。
E: We'll end the talk here for now.

C: 不过，克拉拉觉得…要找到合适的外壳也不容易，所以正在想其他的解决办法呢。
E: But, I think... it's hard to find a good one, so I'm trying to think of something else.

C: 克拉拉觉得，托帕姐姐选择把「源代码」托付给我，一定有她的理由…这代表了她对我的信任。如果真的是这样，那克拉拉就必须努力担起这份责任。
E: I think that Miss Topaz must have chosen to give me the Source Code for a reason... This represents her faith in me. If that is really true, I must work hard to bear this responsibility.

C: 没错。该装置之纪念意义现大于实际意义。
E: Correct. This device has a more symbolic than practical application.

C: 那是个坏家伙，别和他玩了。
E: That's a bad guy, stop hanging out with him.

C: 最近在忙什么？
E: What have you been up to recently?

C: 只要你人还在下层区，「地火」就会待你如贵客。有什么需要，尽管开口。
E: As long as you're in the Underworld, Wildfire will always treat you with utmost hospitality. Never hesitate to speak your needs.

C: 哟！
E: Yo!

C: 给你们带去驱散寒潮的韵脚！
E: Here're some rhymes to drive away those winter blues!

C: 哟…听好。
E: Right... Listen up.

C: 四千个日子里见不到光，黑暗~
E: Four thousand days with no light / gets dark~

C: 想和你聊聊天…
E: I'm just here for a chat...

C: 关系…不算好，但也不坏。
E: Well... we don't always see eye to eye, but we're not standing eyeball to eyeball, either.

C: 那只是比赛的宣传画，看样子就知道了吧？
E: That's just a poster for the tournament. You can tell purely from its appearance, I presume?

C: 小冰原熊歪着脑袋打量着你，扑扇着两只半圆形的耳朵。
E: The little arctic bear cub watches you with its head tilted, flapping its semicircular ears.

C: 太糟糕了…这可不是你这个水平的选手应该交出的笑话。
E: Terrible... This is not the kind of joke someone of your talent should be telling.

C: 没听说剧院招人啊？
E: I didn't know the theater was hiring again?

C: 妈妈，为什么天是蓝色的？
E: Mom, why is the sky blue?

C: 不开门，经理也不上班啊……
E: We're not open, and the manager isn't on duty today...

C: …你有完没完啊？
E: ...Are you finished?

C: 哼，我就知道，只靠着那老三样，歌德饭店指定走不远……
E: Hmph, I knew that only relying on the same old recipes would never take the Goethe Grand Hotel very far...

C: 爸爸，你快去找妈妈道歉吧。
E: Daddy, apologize to mommy.

C: 嗯哼哼~啦啦噜~
E: Mm-hmmm~ Lalala~

C: 明白。
E: Yes, sir.

C: 最近的外来者越来越多了。
E: There are more outsiders day by day.

C: 想和你聊聊天…
E: I want to chat with you...

C: 三五朋友聚在一起玩玩牌，多好呀，看着他们玩儿，我心情也好起来了。要是开个棋牌馆就能赚钱，我就不搞收费占卜了。
E: How nice it'd be to play a few rounds with friends. It lifts my spirits just seeing them play, too. If I could earn a living with a games parlor, I wouldn't be doing any divination.

C: 忧郁诗人有些怪，它说适度忧郁感觉更有安全感，让我帮它再调整了一下。有机会的话，你还是能找到它。
E: The Gloomy Poet is a quirky one. It told me that the right amount of melancholy makes it feel safe, so it asked me to adjust its settings. You can still bump into it if you're lucky.

C: 好吧，你就是一朵蘑菇。
E: Fine then. You're a mushroom.

C: 再见。
E: Bye.

C: 建木停止生发的消息你听说了吗？
E: Have you heard that the Ambrosial Arbor has stopped sprouting?

C: 像您这样的贵客，八成看不上我们集团这些粗制滥造的产品…但监狱里由囚犯们满怀匠心制作的产品，您在其他世界可见不着！
E: A guest with your esteem probably won't like our group's shoddy products... But we do have products crafted with our prisoners' full ingenuity. You won't find these anywhere else!

C: 给我看看货吧…
E: Show me the goods...

C: 这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，健身武术了解一下！…来，你先瞅瞅我们这份传单，我再和您详细讲讲。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, wanna learn about martial arts and fitness? Come take a look at our flyer, and I'll fill you in on all the details.

C: 好嘞！那等您感兴趣了再来看看，我会等您，不过这身体可不会等您啊！
E: Okay! Take a look whenever you're interested, and I'll be waiting for you. But this body of yours will wait for nothing!

C: 我看见你才发愁。
E: I'm the one who's having a headache.

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 感觉这里面可能蕴含着机遇，能让我找到些新的营生点子。
E: I feel like opportunities could abound here — perhaps even some new ideas to make a living.

C: 能聊聊天吗？
E: Can we chat for a bit?

C: 那还能有忘记的？「誓如云翳障空，卫蔽仙舟，永不落地」，参军时每个人都要复颂的嘛。
E: How could I ever forget? "As clouds that cover the heavens will we protect the Xianzhou and soar eternal." Every soldier in the army recites these lines daily.

C: …话是这么说，但是一家人办事，总得比那些外人方便吧？
E: ...Maybe so, but it's always easier for family to come together and do business, right?

C: 人们都说，十王好过，书吏难缠～让我看看，今天又有谁阳寿已尽～
E: Everyone always says: "The Ten Lords have it easy. It's the scribes that are hard to deal with~" Let's see who has expired their wakespan today~

C: 老夫是不是又说了些难懂的话？哈哈哈哈，罢～了～
E: Have I prattled on again about my usual cryptic rants? Heh, whoops~

C: 那位工正的技术远不如老夫，知识和经验更是有限，但他有着惊人的行动力、非凡的想象力和绝佳的设计直觉……
E: That artisan was far below my level, and even worse when it came to knowledge and experience, but he possessed a terrifying ambition, incredible imagination, and a top-notch intuition for design...

C: 可能有点答非所问，但我也只能说这么多了。
E: Perhaps I strayed off-topic a bit there, but that's really all I can say.

C: 正好有一件麻烦事儿找你…
E: I just so happen to have a really thorny problem that I could use your help with...

C: 灾难过后你们还忙吗？
E: The disaster is over, are you guys still busy?

C: 我叫白图泰，以前的本职是克里姆特立宪国的法官，副业是旅行作家…不过，现在只是个等待天舶司遣返的犯罪分子罢了……
E: I'm Battuta. I used to be a judge in the Klimt Republic. My side job was a travel writer... But now, I'm just a criminal waiting around for the Sky-Faring Commission to repatriate me...

C: 很多行星的生态环境与我们的首都迥然相异…所以宰相和议会…咳咳…也就是我们的政府，需要我这样的法官去帮助各地制定和修订因地制宜的法律……
E: Many planets exist in ecological environments different from this one... And so the prime minister and council... ahem... That is, our government needs judges like me to help ratify laws and regulations tailored to each of the differing local conditions...

C: 最终，在普朗克汗的文治武功之下，「埃伊加汗国」将「古登堡汗国」、「黎曼汗国」和「海森堡汗国」归于一统，成为了现在的「埃伊加文明」。
E: In the end, Planck Khan's cultural and military achievements unified the Aigaia, Gutenberg, Riemann, and Heisenberg Khanates under one banner — the almighty Aigaian civilization, which we know to this day.

C: 没曾想正当此时，竟又有更多的逃犯涌了过来！而您临危不乱，大吼一句「 规则，就是用来打破的！」挥舞着球棒，挡住了潮水般的暴徒……
E: ...but unexpectedly, even more escapees rushed over at that moment! Yet, you stood resolute amidst the chaos, loudly proclaiming "Rules, are made to be broken!" Then, you brought your bat to bear, and halted the rushing mob like a dam bearing the weight of a wave...

C: 我其实没什么事，只是想聊聊…
E: Actually, it's nothing. Really, I just come to chat...

C: 我好像在哪儿见过你。
E: Where have I seen you before?

C: 还有些人会给来生留下一封信，祝自己的来生一帆风顺，不要再误入前尘往事之类的。期许本身是好的，但用处嘛…不能说有效，只能说百无一用。
E: Some people even leave a letter behind for their future self, wishing them all the best and imploring them not to commit the same mistakes they did. The intention is good, but as for its usefulness... It is practically useless.

C: 有什么内幕消息吗？
E: Do you have the lowdown on the situation?

C: 我见证历史了？
E: I'm going to witness history?

C: 对了，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，我之前没见过你啊，你是刚进来的么。年纪轻轻就进了幽囚狱，可以啊你。
E: By the way, {F#girl}{M#boy}, I haven't seen you around before. You fresh round here? Getting put into The Shackling Prison at such a young age... That's some impressive work.

C: 你这个问题问的，我要知道的话不早跑出去了么。
E: Well, if I knew that, then I'd have escaped a long time ago, wouldn't I?

C: 那种破解难关时的妙趣横生，躲避抓捕时的紧张刺激，重获自由时的酣畅淋漓。啊！世界上还有比越狱更美妙的事么。
E: The fun of solving a challenging problem, the excitement of escaping the guards, the joy of regaining your freedom... Ah! Is there anything more wonderful in this world than escaping from prison?

C: 「而是提供人们做出更明智决策的基础」，我明白，我只是…有些遗憾。
E: "It's to provide a basis for people to make a wiser decision." I understand, but... I just feel somewhat sorry for it.

C: 接受？他们有选择么？
E: Will they accept? Well, do they really have a choice?

C: 我只和真心找工作的人聊工作内容。你只是打听打听，聊到这种程度就够了。
E: I only share the details of my jobs with serious job seekers. You should already have enough to go on if you're just shopping around for opportunities.

C: 你在这儿嘀咕什么呢？
E: What were you muttering about?

C: 以前仙舟人提起「药师信徒」就想起那群「药王秘传」，但以后，他们提起「药师信徒」，一定会立刻想起咱们「放生帮」！
E: Back then, the Xianzhou people often associated the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus with Yaoshi followers. In the future, they will think of the Unshackled at the mention of Yaoshi followers!

C: 战争旷日持久，无数生灵湮灭…后来机械帝国覆灭，人们的恐惧却从未停止，人们将能言会道的智慧机械视作是潜在的威胁。
E: The war lasted for eons and consumed countless lives... Even after the downfall of the Machine Empire, the fear it aroused never ceased, as people saw intelligent machines as a potential threat.

C: 同事们在谈到公司的时候，总是把它当做东方启行或是路易斯•弗莱明。
E: Whenever they talk about the IPC, they do it in a way as if it were Dongfang Qixing or Louis Fleming.

C: 对外宣传时，「公司」是宣传部门；采购物资时，「公司」又是采购部门；对外讨债时，「公司」又是债务部门……
E: But in fact, the IPC plays different roles when it comes to advertising, procurement, and debt collection...

C: 最近生意还顺遂吗？
E: Has business been going well lately?

C: 结果客人们也很赏光，我感觉现在的美馔阁比以前更加有魅力，哈哈哈，这都得感谢你。
E: As it turns out, my customers love the food. Delicacy Pavilion now seems to be more charming than before. Hahaha, I owe this to you.

C: 请问我可以在哪里打赏呢？
E: Could you tell me how I should tip you?

C: 有些文玩材质特殊，要恒温保存，又要保证湿度，诸如此类的讲究颇多，我这也才是不得已才如此待客。
E: For example, some of them must be kept at constant temperature and humidity, and different fandangles have different requirements for storage conditions. That's why I have to prohibit my clients from touching what we have worked so hard to preserve.

C: 姐一直想问她：「短生种一辈子不过百年，为什么要一直做这种危险的演出呢？」但…这话姐这个做老板的不适合问出口啊…哈哈哈。
E: I've always wanted to ask her. "Even if you led a peaceful life, you would have less than a century to live. Why are you so dedicated to such dangerous shows?" But... as you know, since I'm her boss, I can't just ask her like things that... Hahaha.

C: 我在想，也许有些学术上的谜题，反而在幽囚狱里才更容易搞清楚…比如…「起源长生者」的秘密～
E: I've been wondering... Perhaps certain academic conundrums can only be solved more easily if one is incarcerated in the Shackling Prison. For instance... the secrets of the Primus Immortus?

C: 你这家伙很会洞察人心嘛～当然不是了。人活一世，总要保留点梦想，对吧？
E: You're perceptive, aren't you? Well, the answer is no. Since we only have one life to live, we shouldn't give up our hopes and dreams so easily, don't you think?

C: 开口都是传承不凡，门第高华；奇遇便是寻得神器利刃，服下灵丹妙药，锻成仙体金身；斩的妖孽不是如山巨兽，便是煮海孽物……
E: Every hero in those stories is just a self-insert with either an outrageous inheritance or enviable status. And those plots are always a trope where some artifacts must be found, elixirs be taken, weapons be forged... and the hero is suddenly and miraculously overpowered to the point of being invincible, going on a mindless rampage, slaying a bunch of nondescript behemoths of monstrosity left and right.

C: 本座受惠于遍智天君，时间充足的话，满足他人的好奇也算是分内之事。
E: As someone who receives the Wisdomwalker's grace, satisfying the curiosities of the people is also part of my job. I'd love to do so if time allows.

C: 可就算有机巧辅助，外加将作息安排的效率规划至极限…一人身兼两大责任，实在是太难为自己了。
E: But even with the help of ingenia and being as efficient as possible with my schedule, wearing two big hats at once is pushing me to my limits...

C: 工作变忙了呢，青雀。
E: Looks like your job has become more demanding, Qingque.

C: 抛开这层身份，无论是对你还是对星穹列车，我都没有任何恶意。希望你能理解。
E: Putting that role aside, I mean no harm to you or the Astral Express. I hope you can understand my position at the time.

C: 很快，「我们」两方都达成了自己的使命。在四个琥珀纪虚无的徘徊后，全部十万七千三百三十六个信息体逐渐合众为一，成为「我们」。
E: It didn't take long before both civilizations fulfilled their missions. After wandering in the void for four Amber Eras, all <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> data entities eventually merged as one, forming "us."

C: 因为人的意识如果留存在一个她不熟悉的身体中，便会一直感到烧灼，如烈火焚身，跳入冰窟亦不得宽解。
E: It is because when a person's consciousness dwells in a body they are unfamiliar with, they experience a burning sensation so overwhelming that even hiding within an ice cave would provide scant respite.

C: 总之现在还是经常会做一些相关直播，下次找个机会，咱们捉鬼小队再聚首，卖卖情怀，狠狠赚点打赏～
E: Either way, I still do a lot of related live streams. When I get a chance next, the ghost-hunting squad are gonna get together to talk about all our stories and try and get some tips~

C: 被收伏的岁阳会怎么样呢？
E: What happens to the captured heliobi?

C: 哪里哪里，多亏了{NICKNAME}大人的福，现在心情好多了。
E: Don't be silly, you've really lifted my spirits, {NICKNAME}.

C: 您问吧，反正我现在也没有什么事情。
E: Ask away, I have nothing else to do at the moment.

C: 好好站岗！不许打瞌睡！
E: Stand your post! No slacking off!

C: 至于我是哪一种出身嘛…就随你想象咯。
E: As for which category I belong... That's up to your imagination.

C: 还有别的事，先不聊了。
E: I got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 最后，也是最重要的职责，我们会将长生种的自我收入因果殿中，加以判读研习，以推演人们何时堕入魔阴身。
E: Lastly, and most importantly, we will keep the long-life species' true selves in the Hall of Karma for learning and studying, deducing when mara will strike.

C: 没问题，那我就讲讲这个自适应玉石透彻率。目前市面上大部分的玉兆，对篆刻回路的使用都是大开大合的，牵一发而动全身的。
E: Alright, then I'll talk about its self-adaptive jade opacity. Most jade abaci on the market currently use their engraved circuit in an all-or-nothing manner, where the entire circuit gets activated for every function.

C: 哪里来的大财主？
E: Where did this Mr. Moneybags come from?

C: 想听一些典当的趣事。
E: I wish to hear some amusing stories in your line of work.

C: 那你再给我讲讲茶吧。
E: Tell me more about tea, then.

C: 那我讲讲这「鳞渊春」吧。「钟鳞渊之灵禀，擅飞云之秀气」，一品茗香，卧看星海。
E: Let me tell you about the Whale-Tide Spring tea, then. They say "one cup of Whale-Tide Spring invigorates the sense and brings the beauty of clouds." Lay back, imbibe, and watch the starry seas.

C: 说书啊，确实是一门没落的艺术，后继无人算是一个问题，没有地方登台表演问题更为严重——无论是说书、相声，这都是要面对观众的手艺。
E: Storytelling is indeed a declining art. Few wishes to carry on this tradition, which is a problem. Far more serious is the lack of a stage — be it storytelling or crosstalk, these are art forms that require an audience.

C: 抱歉，我不是来喝茶的。
E: Sorry, I'm not here for tea.

C: 小老板娘做生意有模有样的。
E: You are the model of a good young business owner.

C: 我在休息，顺便等待下一个远行的机会。
E: I'm taking a break, and waiting for a chance for a voyage while I'm at it.

C: 每一家都难吃。
E: All of them are bad.

C: 好呀，总觉得我们还会再见面的。
E: Sure, I feel like we'll meet again anyway.

C: 所以，我只是在云骑的看管下来星槎海放放风，等收监时间到了，我还得被十王司的人来押回去。
E: Anyways, I can only come to Starskiff Haven for a breather under the Cloud Knights' supervision. When it's time for lock-up, I'll still be escorted back by the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 没有风，您是睡在地窖里吗？这风可大了，整整刮了一宿啊！
E: No wind? Do you sleep in the basement? It was gale force, and it kept on blowing for the whole night!

C: 对了，既然肌肉的引力场在吸引着我们二人，不如我将珍藏多年的独家健身餐配方交给你。这样的话，你也可以一边吃着健身餐，一边锻炼了，就像我一样。
E: Since the muscle gravitational field has drawn you to me, I'll be glad to share the recipe for my special workout meal with you. This recipe is something that I've treasured for years. With it, you will be able to train while maintaining a diet suitable for bodybuilding, just like me.

C: 环绕在竞锋舰的凝聚态筋肉粒子，它们渴望对战和交流，通过碰撞提升自己的筋肉力。
E: The condensed muscle particles surrounding the Skysplitter... They crave violence and action. They yearn to clash and collide with others to take their strength to the next level.

C: 神仙姐姐是谁？
E: Who is this celestial lady?

C: 再后来，连县官都要听神仙姐姐的命令，连皇帝都要来镇上找神仙姐姐求药。咱就是在皇帝来为太子求药的那个冬天出生的！所以叫做冬生！
E: Then even the county official had to listen to the celestial lady. Even the Emperor came to town to ask for her miracle medicine for the crown prince! That's the very winter when I was born! My name, Dongsheng, means "winterborn"!

C: 谢谢提醒，我会注意的。
E: Thanks for the reminder. I'll keep that in mind.

C: 哦，原来是这样啊，早知道就不问你了……
E: Oh, is that so? I should've known better than to ask you...

C: 堂堂天击将军，和我在罗浮仙舟外私斗输掉，这样传出去影响不好，有碍于仙舟联盟团结稳定，尤其是对青丘军来说。
E: It'd be terrible if news of the great Merlin's Claw losing to me in a duel outside the Xianzhou Luofu spreads. It could shake the unity and stability of the Xianzhou Alliance, especially among the Verdant Knights.

C: 我看出来了，你其实不是很擅长聊天，对吧？
E: I see, you're not one for conversations, are you?

C: 找大博主桂乃芬的话，估计会获得很多年轻人的关注吧？
E: A popular influencer like Guinaifen will get plenty of attention from youths, I reckon.

C: 躲在这浥尘客栈做跑堂？
E: Masquerading at the Petrichor Inn as a waiter?

C: 闲杂人等尽快回家。
E: Idlers, please go home as soon as you can.

C: 买点啥呢…
E: What should I buy...

C: 我大概能理解的。
E: I kind of get it.

C: 那些骂我是标题党的读者，在批判我之前，还是先想想自己会点开什么标题吧！
E: Before lambasting me, those that despise me for writing clickbait should do some self-reflection and think about what kind of headline they'd click on in the first place!

C: 况且人家说「走后门」，也不是让你真的跑到天舶司的后门来啊！你傻啊！
E: Besides, when people talk about "back doors," they aren't talking about literal back doors of the Sky-Faring Commission — you idiot!

C: 总有人爱听说书啊，你不喜欢，你算老几？
E: There'll always be a market for storytelling. You might not like it, but who are you to criticize it?

C: 连好心人都要骗？
E: You trying to fleece someone nice like me?

C: 此言差矣！我这是为了罗浮万民的满足感。
E: That's not true! I do it for the satisfaction of the Luofu's citizens.

C: 辞职之后打算做些什么？
E: What'll you do once you've resigned?

C: 等等！你这张脸我好像在哪里见过！竞锋舰的捕狼行动前，好像同步过信息…你不会就是那位星穹列车的无名客{NICKNAME}吧？！
E: Hang on! I've seen your face somewhere! Before the Skysplitter's Wolfcatcher Operation, I think we've synced up intel... You're not {NICKNAME}, the Nameless of the Astral Express, are you!?

C: 我不知道这是谁的货箱。
E: I don't know whose crate this is.

C: 一天有那么多时间吗？
E: Are there really that many hours in a day?

C: 一艘船的记忆，有些难以理解。
E: A ship's... memory? That's hard to fathom.

C: 看着照片就满足了吗？
E: Are you happy just looking at the photo?

C: 力道够了，准度差了点～
E: You're using enough strength, but your precision needs work!

C: 青春可不是只能剩下遗憾啊！
E: You're not meant to leave behind regrets in your youth!

C: 就喜欢这种权力相争的故事。
E: I love these kinds of stories of power struggles.

C: 怎么识别香的好坏？
E: How do you tell if an incense is good or bad?

C: 啊！水！你是多么地水！
E: O water, how watery you are!

C: 我知道你很急，先别急。
E: I know you're anxious about it. Don't worry.

C: 这个托蝶幻境是有年龄限制的，您还没到年龄，所以我们得没收它。
E: This Butterfly Immersia is age-restricted. We'll have to confiscate it, because you're underage.

C: 对呀。
E: Yes.

C: 我本想大声痛斥他！
E: I wanted to yell at him at first!

C: 看上去和仙舟建筑没差。
E: It looks just like a Xianzhou building.

C: 我们是长生种，可以活得很久，可归根到底，活这这么久是为了什么？
E: We do have a really long life. But honestly, what's the purpose to live such a long time?

C: 不不不，不对，三倍，三倍以下免谈！
E: No, I want triple the sum! Anything less than that is out of the question!

C: 我也不是见识短，我听说过葬礼的存在，只不过我活了几百年，才第一次参加。
E: I've heard of it, but this has been my first time participating in one in my entire life.

C: 你说的是他的奠仪吗？嗯。
E: Are you talking about his soul-soothing ceremony? Yes.

C: 按我们的规矩…你看看他生前喜欢什么吧…准备好之后将送别的礼物，放在他的星槎上。
E: According to our practice, you may find out what he liked when he was alive. Then, prepare the gift and put it on his starskiff.

C: 天马没说错。尽管岁数见长，吾的心智却未必有雅辛忒丝那般成熟。
E: The pegasus is right. Despite my age, my mind may not be as mature as Hyacinthia's.

C: 正好，瞧，这是昏光庭院的新产品——小伊卡限量周边！本来已经被抢完了，幸好我自己还留着一个，灰宝就把它捎回家吧！
E: Perfect timing! Look, this is Twilight Courtyard's new product, Limited Edition Little Ica merch! They were all sold out, but luckily I kept one for myself. Here, Grayie, take it home with you!

C: 最后一世，在多洛斯平原与凯撒一战后，我与歌耳戈都认可了逐火的使命，这才使悬锋的荣耀不再囿于纷争的血泪。
E: In my last life, after the battle with the Imperator on the Plains of Dolos, both Gorgo and I acknowledge the mission of Flame-Chase, finally freeing The Glory of Kremnos from the tears and blood of Strife.

C: 呵呵，我也没想到，当年嚷嚷着要去悬锋城学剑的你，有一天竟然能击败尼卡多利！
E: Heh, who would've thought? Back then, you were all about "wanting to learn swordsmanship at Castrum Kremnos!" And now look at you, you've actually beaten Nikador!

C: 倘若有一天它能孵化，从中诞生的新生命，或许是翁法罗斯第一个真正步入银河的生命吧？
E: If it hatches one day, perhaps the new life born from within will be the first Amphorean life to truly step into the cosmos?

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 等等，刚才的小大地兽去哪了？这一头也太过庞大了？
E: Wait, where did that little dromas go? This one is way too huge!

C: 又得给它修剪枝条了…
E: It's time to trim the branches again...

C: 呃…我是药王秘传。
E: Ugh... I'm a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 消消消消消消灭人类暴政…
E: O—Overthrow the human tyranny...

C: 姐给你买艘更大的！
E: I'll buy you a bigger one!

C: 场外粉丝冲突倒是不少。
E: Just plenty of fans fighting outside.

C: 难道幽囚狱里面也能收快递？你不禁对鹤运物流的业务之广感到惊诧。要是住在这里，有快递，通网络，每天什么也不用做，幽囚狱还能被称为监狱吗？
E: Is it even possible to receive deliveries inside the Shackling Prison? You can't help but marvel at the wide delivery network of the Heron Express. If there are courier deliveries and internet in the Shackling Prison, and prisoners don't have to do anything every day, is the Shackling Prison really a prison?

C: 兼备照明功能的玉兆单元，能够将运算中产生的废热转化为光能向外释放。你似乎理解了，无论是什么样的世界，人们总喜欢在这种科技产品上看到RGB的灯光。
E: A Jade Abacus Unit that also has built-in lighting. It can convert the waste heat generated during calculation into light energy and release it. You seem to come to the understanding that no matter what world it is, people love to see RGB lighting on tech products.

C: 猜猜我是谁的方式【系统推荐】
E: "Guess who I am" mode [System Recommended]

C: 星历<unbreak>8065</unbreak>年
E: Star Calendar Year <unbreak>8065</unbreak>

C: 材质：螺肉，几丁质外壳
E: Materials: Conch meat, chitin shell

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 主动认错的老将。
E: A veteran that readily admits his crimes.

C: 年代不明
E: Period unknown

C: 对于那艘星槎来说，它会觉得这是一种被拿捏的感觉吗？
E: As for that starskiff, would it have felt like it was being manipulated and toyed with?

C: 颈部运动！预备，起！
E: Neck exercise! Ready, go!

C: 嗨！管那么多干嘛？
E: Hey! Not our problem!

C: 最后那番话实在发人深省！
E: That last remark really touched my heart!

C: 呜呜呜…我的眼泪停不下来…
E: *sobbing* ...I can't stop my tears...

C: 大门深锁，十分符合人们对小说中刑事案件现场的想象。
E: A locked gate is a must-have element of a crime scene pictured by most people.

C: 不要随意触碰精密仪器。如果你执意如此，那么最好先给自己买好保险。
E: Do not touch the precision instruments. If you insist on doing so, you'd better get yourself insured first.

C: 你信手抽出了其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 「可以说，在反物质军团登陆前，这些世界早已是失去灵魂的空壳了。无人知晓这是哪位大君的手笔，也无人知道这些混乱是如何发生的。」
E: "In other words, these worlds were already past their heydays before the Antimatter Legion even arrived. It was unknown which Lord Ravager was the culprit behind the chaos and how it happened."

C: 「挫败帝皇鲁珀特意志的继承者『僭主』盖乌斯的十三军团（其手法至今未明）……」
E: "Defeating the Thirteenth Legion of Gaius the tyrant, the successor of Emperor Rubert's will (by unknown means)..."

C: 据说这棵树会依外界环境变化自动生长出新的结构，所以太卜司常会派卜者定期前来修剪它的代码。
E: It is said that the tree will grow new parts in response to the changes in its surroundings. Hence, the Divination Commission will send diviners over regularly to trim its code.

C: 老实说——不知道。
E: To be honest — I have no idea.

C: 翻箱子。
E: Check the package.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 「好吧，我不会靠近你。」你向快递盒发誓——尽管你不知道自己是否能够兑现这个诺言。
E: "Fine. I won't come any closer." You make a promise to the courier package, though you are not sure whether you can keep it.

C: 啊哦，看来你这下可是好心办坏事了。趁没人发现——快逃吧，别让开拓客的名誉毁于一旦！
E: Oh no, your act of kindness has backfired. You should take off before anyone notices. Don't tarnish the Trailblazing name!

C: 有些熟悉，调查看看吧。
E: This seems familiar. Go take a closer look.

C: 这都是我应该做的。
E: It's the least I could do.

C: 要是把乐队赶下台…
E: If they evict the band from the stage...

C: 我的天，你就这么爱看这些有的没的？
E: Wow, you're really that into such petty gossip?

C: 你重新封好三个箱子，将它们摆回原处，带着对科学的敬畏转身离去了。
E: You seal up the three boxes and return them to their original place, and turn to leave with a new respect for science.

C: 「快递箱」正寓意着我们的现代生活，而「龙」则寓意着我们的传统价值。
E: The "delivery boxes" are an expression of modern life, whereas the "dragon" is a representation of our traditional values.

C: 说说都有些什么东西？
E: And what, pray tell, might those be?

C: 我又不识字，气得我给他们一顿乱填，呸，识字了不起啊。
E: I can't read, so I decided to mess around with them. Meh! So what if they can read?

C: 堆满房间的粉红气球，象征着玫瑰般似火的热情。
E: Red balloons fill the entire room, symbolizing the fiery passion of roses.

C: 据说在梦里就连垃圾都有喜怒哀乐，这让你不由得开始思考，我们同这些垃圾之间，究竟有何区别。
E: It's rumored that even trash in the Dreamscape has feelings. It makes you wonder: How are we different from mere trash?

C: 装修漂亮的店往往意味着里面的商品价格不菲，看来大部分人注定与这里无缘。
E: A shop with gorgeous decor usually suggests that its prices are quite dear — it looks like most people are not destined to enter this place.

C: 一家潮玩店，找不到标识，也没有任何宣传招牌。
E: A pop gadget where no logo can be found, and is devoid of any promotional signs.

C: 在万千书籍的注视下，你心底萌发出了一股愉悦的暖流，令你毛孔大开……
E: Under the gaze of these tens of thousands of books, a warm and joyful stream radiates from your inner self, making your pores expand...

C: 表皮光滑而完整，可以肯定的是，房间的主人绝对没有在这养过宠物。
E: Its surface is glossy and flawless. It is most certain that the master of this room never kept pets.

C: 两人份的下午茶——会是谁呢？现在他们又在哪里？
E: Afternoon tea for two — who could they have been? Where have they gone?

C: 视野绝佳的观景台，几乎能将整个筑梦边境的景色尽收眼底。
E: The observation deck with breathtaking views. You can almost see the entire Dream's Edge at a glance.

C: 你朝管道里丢了块石子，许久都没有回声传来。看来从这里爬进去的计划不太现实。
E: You throw a stone into the pipe, but you can't hear the echo. It's not a realistic plan to crawl through the pipe.

C: 空荡荡的前台，像现实里那样门庭若市的情景怕是再也看不见了。
E: An empty front desk — bustling crowds of reality will probably not be seen.

C: 你拿起听筒，里面只传来无意义的尖鸣声。
E: You pick up the receiver, and all you can hear is meaningless static.

C: 仿佛是察觉到自己的姿态与周遭格格不入，它很快消失在了你的眼前。
E: Sensing its incongruity with its surroundings, it quickly vanishes from your sight.

C: 我想，你大概也是他们中的一员。
E: I suppose you're one of them.

C: 但愿你的所作所为能惊艳整个梦境，逐梦客。
E: May your achievements blow everyone in the Dreamscape away, Dreamchaser.

C: 要是可以的话，我真恨不得在这里住上一个琥珀纪。哎，要怎么才能让我那几个兄弟姐妹同意呢……
E: I'd love to stay here for an Amber Era if I could. Alas, how am I supposed to convince my siblings to let me do it?

C: 我没什么兴趣。
E: I'm not interested.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 比你高的皮皮西人呢？
E: What about Pepeshi who are taller than you?

C: 要是皮皮西人把梦境形象换成…
E: What if a Pepeshi person changed their dreamscape avatar...

C: 你怎么知道我不是皮皮西人？
E: How would you know if I'm not Pepeshi?

C: 喂喂，你该不会是想…做什么失礼的事吧？
E: Hey, don't tell me you're trying to... do something rude?

C: 垃圾桶怪客，为我们热舞一曲吧！
E: Trashcan Monster, come on and give us your best move!

C: 算了，有什么大不了的？我可不能让客人失望！您稍等……
E: Never mind. What's the big deal? I mustn't disappoint my customer! Please wait a minute...

C: 要是客人有猎奇心理的话，还可以让他们体验亲手训练道具的感觉……
E: And if the customers are keen to try new things, I can always let them experience the feeling of training props...

C: 眼下的生活有什么不好的吗？简直太好了！
E: What's so bad about my life? It's perfect!

C: 这里很安静，不会——至少暂时不会——被人打扰。
E: It's very quiet in here, and at least no one will disturb me — for now.

C: 夏洛特周边的空气失去了颜色。
E: The air surrounding Charlotte loses color.

C: 有一件事是肯定的——我的确爱着韦和小佩。但我对他们的爱…好像和别人眼里的爱有很大区别。
E: One thing I'm sure of... I love Wes and Pennie. But my love for them... seems different from the love people see.

C: 这是什么广告？
E: What is this advert for?

C: 广告牌指着街上路过的小情侣骂骂咧咧。
E: The billboard points at couples passing by in the street and curses them.

C: 换个问题。
E: Next question.

C: 除了物质原料外，「情感」也能影响表针的跃动吗？
E: So, it's not just the raw materials themselves... do even "emotions" influence the rhythm of clocks?

C: 这是梦境，什么都可能发生。
E: This is the Dreamscape, where anything can happen.

C: …因为他营养不良？
E: ...Because he was starving?

C: 兴致高昂时他仍会不自觉哼上几句，却早已换了活泼欢快的调子。
E: He hums a few lines when inspiration strikes, transforming his melody into a lively rhythm.

C: 唉，家族的未来可怎么办啊……
E: *sigh* What can we do about The Family's future...

C: 起初我加入翔水商会，其实是为了寻找让自己长出尾巴的机缘。
E: When I joined the Aquaglider Guild, I wanted to find an opportunity to grow a tail.

C: 不管怎么样，都得让家族的人给我个交代……
E: In any case, The Family has to take responsibility for this...

C: 他们只看到我向来生活得清苦朴素，为了省钱凡事亲力亲为，就偷偷称我「吝啬鬼」、「守财奴」…让人难过！
E: All they saw was the frugal life I led, doing everything myself in order to save money, and they called me a miser and a scrooge behind my back... I was so sad!

C: 我不住豪宅、不买豪车，吃穿用度能省就省，家务维修亲力亲为…说实话，我一直过得很辛苦。
E: I don't live in a spacious mansion, I don't buy luxury cars, I scrimp and save on what I eat and wear, and I do my own chores... Honestly, I've been living a harsh life.

C: 真想看看那些规矩是哪个大聪明想出来的！
E: I'd really like to see who's the genius who came up with these rules!

C: 关于酒店的宾客…
E: About the guests in this hotel...

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 一天不喝浑身难受。
E: I can't go about my day without drinking it.

C: 疾风侠出动！疾风——力量……
E: Quicksilver in action! Speed is power!

C: 你好。
E: Hello.

C: 此处不知为何留下了一支录音笔。你摁下播放键……
E: There is a voice recorder here. You press the "Play" button...

C: 对啊，让它给我丢个骰子，根据点数决定到底怎么选……
E: Yeah, get it to throw a die for me, and make my choice from the number thrown...

C: 介意聊会天吗？
E: Mind if we have a little chat?

C: 再见。希望有朝一日，你也能欣赏到我的战甲。
E: Goodbye. I look forward to the day when you can see my armor.

C: …可能是战甲缺少能源？是时候狂吃飞碟堡补充快乐元素了。
E: ...Maybe the armor needs more energy? It's time to chow down on some Floatdisc Burgers for more of that happy element.

C: 公司想抓到我可没那么轻松！
E: If the IPC wants to catch me, it won't be that simple!

C: 我想买点吃的。
E: I'd like to buy some food.

C: 客人您又来啦，欢迎欢迎！今天想要吃点什么、喝点什么？
E: Dear customer, you're back! Welcome, welcome! What can I get you today? Something to eat? To drink?

C: 抓到我们也没奖励啾！
E: You won't get a reward for catching us, tweet!

C: 冷漠不会带来任何好的结果，只会加深彼此的孤独和痛苦。
E: Apathy will not bear favorable outcomes, only deepening our loneliness and pain.

C: 唉，为何沉重的命运总压在我身上，为何怪物不能停止互相伤害，非以戏耍同类为乐？
E: Ah, why must the great weight of destiny weigh so heavy on my shoulders? Why can't monsters stop harming each other and learn to take joy from playing together?

C: 这就是匹诺康尼所谓的美梦！
E: That's the Penaconian Dream for you!

C: 哦~我无意冒犯。很抱歉，我惯常如此，或许你可以将其视作某种表达友好的方式。
E: Ooh, I didn't mean to offend. I apologize. It's just a force of habit. You can just take it as my way of a friendly greeting.

C: 能再次见到你我很开心，亲爱的。
E: It's so nice to see you again, darling.

C: 哼，好心提醒你，小灰毛，太过轻视眼前的人可是会吃苦头的。
E: Hmph, may I please remind you, Gray Hair, that you shouldn't insult people, or you might regret it.

C: 是我想的那个朋克洛德吗？
E: Is that the same Punklorde I think it is?

C: 但现在，看看这乏味到令人昏睡的会场，或许是到了我该离开的时候了。
E: But when I look at this place now, it bores me to death. Maybe the time's come for me to leave.

C: …河球棒侠！！
E: Silver.... mane guard!?

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 不管！我是在宇宙间流浪的牛仔，不会为任何事情停留！
E: Who cares! I am a cowgirl who roams the universe as I please! I won't let anything stop me!

C: 家族…哈哈…家族……
E: The Family... haha... The Family...

C: 先聊这么多。
E: Let's leave it here for now.

C: 所以说啊，种田也要讲究家族法！
E: That's why I say you have to abide by The Family's rules even when farming!

C: 也许谁都阻止不了。
E: Maybe no one can stop it.

C: 在驻留流梦礁的这段时间里，我结识了许多朋友。
E: I had made many friends during my stay in the Dreamflux Reef.

C: 我们的主营业务同样是「自动乐器」，客人只需花费少许苜蓿币，就能带心仪的乐器回家，让它为你演奏。当然，本人是非卖品。
E: Our main trade is also in automated instruments. For just a few Alfalfa credits, customers can take home the instrument of their choice and have it play for you at home. Of course, I personally am not for sale.

C: 唉，真是想念他……
E: *sigh* I miss him so much...

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: ——但扮鸟太累了，我拒绝。光是修这座「清醒村」就够我忙的了。
E: ...But playing a bird is tiring, so I'm refusing this role. I'm busy enough fixing up Rouseville.

C: 折纸小鸟的故事？自己看《钟表小子》动画去，讲得比我清楚多了。
E: The origami bird story? Go watch the Clockie series yourself — they explain it much clearer than I would.

C: 汽水赛场？
E: Soda Racetrack?

C: 后面那俩也是鸟？
E: Those two are also birds?

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个小家伙吵着要去看冠军，也不知道它有什么办法，<color=#dbc291ff>总不至于到终点去拦住人家啾。</color>
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: There's a little fella that keeps yelling about wanting to see the champion. I don't know what it's up to, <color=#dbc291ff>but I sure hope it's not waiting to accost others at the finish line, tweet.</color>

C: 从现在起，你就是美梦小镇飞得最快的鸟了啾！这些报酬通通都给你啾。
E: From now on, you're the fastest bird in the Dreamville, tweet! All these rewards are for you, tweet.

C: 你这是？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 来，这是人家特地为您准备的礼物，请务必收下，以后也多多关照啾。
E: Here, this is a present I've specially prepared for you, you must take it. I look forward to our future encounters, tweet.

C: 感谢你的赞美，我只是个偶尔喜欢卖弄文墨的诗歌爱好者，面对如此瑰丽奇景，难免有些心绪澎湃……
E: Thank you for your praise, but I'm just a dabbler of poetry who occasionally likes to show off. It's natural that one's emotions would be stirred when overwhelmed by such a resplendent view...

C: 我还能看到苏乐达流淌在银河各处那一天吗？
E: Will I see the day when SoulGlad dominates every corner of the cosmos?

C: 哎呀，夸得我都不好意思啦！
E: Oh dear, I'm all ablush from your praise!

C: 那就来聊点让我感觉开心的话题吧——现在有越来越多的人想了解匹诺康尼的过去了。
E: Let's talk about something that makes me happy, then — there are more people nowadays who wish to learn about Penacony's past.

C: 这次…我一定会把握住它的。
E: This time... I will definitely seize the opportunity.

C: 而在这十五分钟里，除了留下后代之外，它们所有的时间都用以积蓄力量，来产生会将自己杀死的一闪而过的光点。
E: In those <unbreak>15</unbreak> minutes, apart from assuring the continuation of their species, they spend the rest of their time collecting the energy required to create a flash of light — the same light that would also end their lives.

C: 随身携带的粮草早已消耗殆尽。你想尝试狩猎，可这里的动物那么矫健，光是躲过追杀就耗尽你所有力气。
E: "Your food supplies are gone. Despite attempts at hunting, the animals are too quick, and you've spent all your energy just avoiding predators."

C: 等我搜集证据，揭发这幕后黑手…我的意思是…替我朋友报仇！
E: Just wait until I collect enough evidence and expose the culprit... I mean, secure justice for my friend!

C: 这…我…这就是本音……
