E: Th—This is... actually how I talk...

C: 就不说匹诺康尼，我的上一站是一个名叫「毛哈达」的海滨度假胜地。在那里光是坐趟地铁，我就快要把积蓄全花光了。
E: Let's not even talk about Penacony. When I was at my previous stop, the Mhada beach resort, I almost had to shell out my entire savings just to ride the subway.

C: 你谁啊，真不熟。
E: Who are you again? Never heard of you.

C: 哎，明明前景这么好…害我抱有那么大的期望…现在却要闭店？呵，生意场如战场…或许这就是商业世界残酷的一面吧。
E: They were really promising before this, that's why I had high hopes for them... Who would've expected them to close shop? *sigh* Looks like the business world is indeed a battleground, and this is just one of its harsh sides.

C: 慌什么！天塌了有总监顶着呢。
E: What's there to worry about! Even if the sky falls, the director will hold it up!

C: 不说了，我得继续工作了，还有一大堆邮件没看呢。
E: Alright, time to get back to work. There's a ton of mail I have to read and respond to.

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个孩子特别喜欢这艘游艇，还和人家说想要<color=#dbc291ff>成为船长</color>呢啾~
E: Let me think... Oh right, there's a child who loves this airship so much it told others that it wanted <color=#dbc291ff>to become the captain</color>, tweet~

C: 你怎么长得跟我一样？
E: Why do you look just like me?

C: 具体我也不清楚，但很多人会被我吸引过来，我听船员们说，好像预售行情还是挺火爆的。
E: I don't know the detailed statistics, but I seem to be attracting many people. I heard from the crew that the pre-sale seems to be very popular.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 贵客光临，汪！客人您好，苏乐达最近搞活动，想来点吗？汪！
E: Welcome, esteemed guest! Woof! SoulGlad is currently running a promotion! Would you like to get some? Woof!

C: 说起来，现在换了新船长，空艇也要换名字吧？「晖长石号」要作废咯…不知道船长您会取个什么样的名字呢？
E: Actually, now that we have a new captain, are we going to rename the airship? Looks like Radiant Feldspar's going to be a thing of the past... What will the captain name it, though?

C: …你说得有点道理。
E: ...You have a point.

C: 只是因为我在家里辈分比较高，加上我航行的年头又久，大家给我个面子，便尊称我一声「佩德罗叔叔」。嗐，都是各家的后辈，我总得照拂一二。
E: It's only because of my advanced age and all those space voyages I have under my belt that they're calling me Uncle Pedro — a form of respect, I suppose. Well, I do have to watch over them a little, considering how they're all descendants of different families.

C: 关于你的过去…
E: About your past...

C: 你认识财富学院的契波吗？
E: Do you know a Czipo from Fortune Academy?

C: 我不做评价。
E: No comment.

C: 你已经做的很好了。
E: You have done extremely well.

C: 而且…看在是熟人的份上，说不定期末考试的时候，我还能给你加几分呢？
E: Plus... as we're friends, I may be able to bump your grades up a bit when it comes to end-of-term exams?

C: 案发现场就在大剧院，绑匪留下了封不知所云的绑架信，通篇都在说什么乌鸦什么的…可真够离谱的，对吧？
E: This all happened at the Grand Theater. The kidnappers left some kind of incomprehensible kidnapping note talking about crows or something... Pretty crazy, right?

C: 看来有时间得给你好好补补课…放心吧，我可是专门整理过每个怪谈的详细内容，给你当教材足够了！
E: Looks like I'll have to fill you in when we get time... Fear not, I have organized all of the details on every ghost story. You'll have plenty of materials to learn from!

C: 喜剧社是做什么的？
E: What does the comedy club do?

C: （写下严肃的寄语）
E: (Write a serious message)

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我有件事想请你帮忙。学校要制作毕业年鉴，每个学生都有自己的页面。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Manager, I have a favor to ask of you. The school is about to launch its graduation yearbook, and every student has their own page.

C: 老实说我也不知道毕业之后能不能在匹诺康尼找到工作，但我相信我的未来不会差的。
E: Honestly, I don't even know if I'll be able to land a job in Penacony, but I believe my future isn't too bleak.

C: 不对，没有「蕉」了，这口癖真是不好改…{NICKNAME}同学，你可是巨星，你的支持肯定能为我引流不少粉丝过来的！记得关注噢，拜托了！
E: Wait, there's no "bana" anymore. It's really hard to kick bad habits... {NICKNAME}, you're a superstar, and your support will surely bring me lots of fans! Don't forget to follow me, please!

C: 还是聊聊其他事…
E: Talk about something else...

C: 请勿在赛前两个系统时内饮用，如无视警告，后果由参赛者自负。
E: Do not drink two system hours before a contest. Participants who ignore this warning will be responsible for the consequences.

C: 黄金钟表小子，坐拥热砂之地，毗邻豪华宅邸，尽显高调奢华——你，值得拥有。
E: A golden Clockie sitting amidst the scorching sands, adjacent to a luxurious mansion. It exudes a lavish sense of luxury, and you most certainly deserve to have it.

C: 舵轮中间的构建似乎是通讯装置，你好奇是否有船员在此声情并茂地朗诵过：「噢！船长！我的船长！」之类的诗句。
E: The construct in the middle of the wheel appears to be a comms device. You wonder if there have been crew members who had the urge to open with: "O captain! My captain!" or some such verse.

C: 使用望远镜。
E: Use the telescope.

C: 朝右看。
E: Look to the right.

C: 钟表披萨，钟表小子都爱吃的聚会美食。在你成为船长后，它会每年向你缴纳广告费吗？你很好奇……
E: Clockie Pizza is party food that even Clockie likes to eat. After you become the captain, will it pay you annual advertising dues? Most curious...

C: 「『探查模式』已结束。」设备提示音响起，将你的视线拉回到眼前的球体上。
E: "Exploration Mode has ended." The notification sound of the device pulls your vision back to the sphere in front of you.

C: 做个梦还那么激动…
E: Tsk. You're getting all excited over a dream...

C: 是不是该多要点药。
E: Should I ask for more medicine?

C: 售价<unbreak>1868</unbreak>万。
E: It's priced at <unbreak>18.68</unbreak> million.

C: 那么，你可听闻，它心中无限苦闷——生为报纸非所愿，它只想做个蹩脚诗人！
E: Despite birth as a paper, its plea resonates true. Yearning to be a poet, terrible through and through!

C: 「我发现你今天有点怪，怪可爱」……
E: "You look a bit unusual today, unusually cute..."

C: 如果有选择的话，我其实想做一只小猫……
E: If I was given a choice, I want to be a kitten...

C: 怎么就不让进呢？
E: Why won't they let us in?

C: 我们去合个影吧。
E: Let's take a group picture!

C: 都怪你们拖我后腿！
E: It's all your fault for holding me back!

C: 比赛都结束了，你为什么还在鼓掌？
E: The competition is already over, why are you still applauding?

C: 你不会把工资也搭进去了吧？
E: You didn't put all your salary on the line, did you?

C: 是时候叫橡木给苜蓿草让让位了。
E: It's time to ask the Oaks to cede to the Alfalfas.

C: 大家都是家族的一员，只要坦白出来，我们不会为难你的。
E: Everyone is part of The Family. As long as you are truthful, we will not make this difficult for you.

C: 我也听说了，还好咱们最近都没下过泳池……
E: I heard about that too. Good thing we haven't been in the pool lately...

C: 有美食相伴，聊起来也开心些。
E: Your chat will go much better with good food as an accompaniment.

C: 最近生意还不错，你呢？
E: Business has been good lately. How about you?

C: 抱歉，请降低音量……
E: Sorry, please lower your voices...

C: 非常抱歉，给您添麻烦了……
E: Really sorry to cause you trouble...

C: 光线不够明亮的地方会滋生邪恶，在校园题材的故事里，走廊的阴暗角落往往是欺凌频繁发生的场所，好在你并没有见到。
E: Evil breeds in places where the light is dim. In stories that happen in school, the dark corners of hallways are typically where bullying occurs. Luckily, you haven't seen anything like that.

C: 整齐的礼服，一尘不染的羽毛…所有装束无不彰显着这位校长对细节的追求，而他所创建的折纸大学完美印证了这点。
E: The neat formal wear, the impeccable coat of feathers... His entire visage is a testament to this dean's pursuit of detail. His founding of Paperfold University perfectly seals his legacy in this regard.

C: 让人心跳不已的！
E: One that sends the heart aflutter!

C: 太好了，原来是站友啊！这下不用担心在走廊里丢人了，来，咱们聊聊天。
E: Perfect, we can be buddies! It's not so embarrassing if we have company. Come, let's chat to pass the time.

C: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
E: *ring*... *ring*!

C: 你建议它自己联网搜索，并警告它不许偷翻你的相册。
E: You suggest it search for itself online and warn it not to snoop through your photo album.

C: 上至天道行运，下至人势沉浮，穷目而观无穷。
E: From the workings of heaven to the rise and fall of humanity, observing the infinite.

C: 不准夜间喧哗。
E: No loud noises at night.

C: 关于你上次欲言又止…
E: About our unfinished conversation from last time...

C: 有梦想不是挺好的吗！
E: But it's nice to have dreams, right?

C: 哎…简单来说…他认为我们是瑟希斯的信徒，不应该……
E: Well... simply put... he thinks that we as followers of Cerces should not...

C: 对不起，我要退出。
E: Sorry, I want out.

C: 都说历史是人们对往事一致认定的说法…这让我对世界的未来忧心忡忡。不论什么年代，人们总是在重复同样的错误。
E: They say history tends to reflect the collective views of the past... and that's what worries me about the future. Regardless of the era, humans just can't seem to break free from the same mistakes.

C: （我想问的差不多了。）
E: (That's pretty much all I wanted to ask.)

C: 感谢命运指引我们在此相遇，有什么想听的诗歌吗？利波愿意为您献上全部的收藏~
E: Thank fate for this moment we share. Any poem striking your fancy today? Lipos got a trove waiting just for you!

C: 「天生的绝伦美艳、蒙受诸泰坦垂怜，阿多尼娅的昳丽令万物黯然。」
E: "Beauty since the cradle, adored by the Titans' gaze. Adonia's brilliance eclipsed all in its blaze."

C: 就这样？
E: So that's what it is, huh?

C: 差点送我去打复活赛的遐蝶。
E: Castorice, after our rough encounter.

C: 下次再聊吧。
E: Let's catch up another time.

C: 我老分不清你和缇安、缇宁。
E: I can never tell you, Trianne, and Trinnon apart.

C: 你是雅努斯的信徒？
E: You're a disciple of Janus?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 说起来，在黑潮泛滥之前，还有些城邦会产一种叫做青冈木的木材…那家伙才是真的结实，不光能做家具，拿去当架桥的梁柱也一点问题都没有。
E: Come to think of it, before the black tide spread, there were cities that produced a wood called "blue oak"... That stuff was really strong. Not only could you make furniture with it, but it was completely reasonable to use it as a support in bridge construction.

C: 事关个人安全，可不能疏忽。想要畅饮浴场特质秘酿，一定得仔细看过协议——
E: We can never be too careful when it comes to personal safety... To quench your thirst via our bath's craft ambrosia, please read the agreement carefully...

C: 开始畅饮！
E: Let the party begin!

C: 请你也用稳稳当当的心境去迎接它吧。
E: Please meet it with a steady state of mind.

C: 你听见一阵可爱的天外之声，像是小型动物打着呼噜，在窸窸窣窣进食。
E: You hear a wave of adorable celestial sounds, like small animals snoring and rustling through their food.

C: 拥有壮硕身躯的卫士看着你，一言不发。
E: A burly guard looks at you, silent as ever.

C: 既然这位智者愿意加入讨论，我们就来选个直观而深奥的论题。阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，我先退让一步，将确定论题的权力交付你。
E: As this wise one has seen fit to join us in debate, let us select a topic that is both intuitive and profound. Parmenides of Icatus, I shall step back and pass the rights of topic selection to you.

C: 精彩！智者的论辩果然高明，若是你参加公民大会，必定能成为正义的代言人吧。
E: Wonderful! Your ability to debate is truly brilliant! If you were to join the citizens' assembly, I am certain that you could become an ambassador of justice!

C: 那天，我正在街头画素描。阿格莱雅大人从我身边经过，停下来看了看画。她说…具体内容有些记不清了，大概就是——
E: I was sketching on the street that day when Lady Aglaea passed by. She stopped to examine my drawing and said... I don't quite remember the exact words, but it was something like—

C: 嘿嘿，还真有点不好意思，记得常来找我们玩啊，勇士阁下！
E: Heh, I'm embarrassed. Make sure to swing by and hang out with us again soon, great warrior!

C: {RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的信徒在墓地里载歌载舞、孤儿院修菜窖挖出了一整箱利衡币、有人在投奔奥赫玛的路上遭到不明黑衣人盘问……
E: Disciples of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} are dancing and singing in the graveyards, a whole crate of Balance Coins was uncovered in the orphanage vault, and someone was interrogated by a man in black on their way to seek refuge in Okhema...

C: 啧啧啧…啧啧啧…他这个臀部已经是翘到可以顶一瓶石榴水……
E: Tsk, tsk, tsk... and their glutes... round enough to balance a bottle of pomegranate juice...

C: 我说两位——差不多适可为止了吧？其他人可都在往这边看呢，你们确定还要继续娱乐大众吗？
E: I say, you two — don't you think that's enough? Everyone's staring at you now. Are you sure you want to keep this show going on?

C: 虽说浴场人来人往，空地上多个什么东西倒是不稀奇。但那作品的样貌实在太前卫了，我每次经过都忍不住多看两眼。
E: The baths are always crowded, so it's not unusual to find something new being placed here. But the design of that piece was so avant-garde that every time I passed by, I couldn't help but take a second look.

C: 拒绝是不可能的，最多就是用行动抗议罢了——告诉所有人，我不想干！
E: Refusing is impossible. At most, I'll protest through my actions — let everyone know I don't want to do it!

C: 「卡弥特斯」…那并非是城邦的名字，而是我们居住的海湾的称呼。那是个很美的地方，轮廓明晰，色彩丰富，美得就像是幅描绘墨涅塔的画。
E: Carmitis... That is not a city's name, but what we call the bay where we live. It is a beautiful place with clear contours and vibrant colors. Its splendor is akin to a painting of Mnestia.

C: 奥赫玛的人们称呼它为水漫琴，但对我们来说，它就是普通的琴。我原以为这些精密的机械早已被黑潮吞没了，没想到在此处还能见到。
E: The Okhemans call it a water lyre. But to us, it is an ordinary lyre. I thought these intricate devices were long devoured by the black tide. I never thought I'd see one here.

C: 行啊，不谈生意就不谈呗，反正我现在也有空。你说话也好听，不像我妹妹，那么大个人了，说话就知道凶我，跟{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}亲临似的……
E: Sure, I've got time for some non-business talks. You sound nice too, unlike my younger sister — an adult by all accounts, but would only scowl at me like {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} themself is arriving...

C: 通过特定的操作，可以在传信石版上开放授权给指定的人浏览。至于这背后的原理，除了瑟希斯的赐福之外，和树庭多年来传承的技术也有关系。具体原理太过复杂，我就不跟你赘述了。
E: By employing certain methods, we can authorize a specific individual to browse our teleslate. As for the underlying principles, apart from Cerces' blessing, it's also to do with the techniques passed down by the Grove for many years. The exact details are really complex, so I won't bother you with them.

C: 后来悬锋人对配方加以改进，才有了今天我们喝到的口味，就连那些法吉娜信徒都没法完全复刻！
E: The Kremnoans later improved upon this recipe, turning it into what we drink today. Even Phagousa's disciples can't get its flavor down completely!

C: 免费的肉片麦粥，每人一份，自主领取！
E: Free meat n' wheat porridge, one for everyone, come get yours!

C: 我想和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat with you.

C: 就这样吧，你以后要是改主意了，可以随时来找我。知识就应该是公开的，免得说我不给你机会。
E: We'll leave it at that. You can seek me out if you change your mind. Knowledge should be shared, so don't say I didn't give you a chance.

C: 只可惜如今世界的尽头早已被黑潮淹没…我们已经无法检验这种记载是真是假了。也许，它其实只是古人编出来的故事？
E: Unfortunately, the ends of the earth have now long since been devoured by the black tide... There is no way for us to test whether these records are true or not. Perhaps they are just stories that the ancients made up?

C: 那么，阁下，我爱莫能助：天底下并无免费的神谕。愿{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}揭示你的路径。
E: Well then, My Lord, I cannot help you. There is no such thing as a free prophecy in this world. May the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} guide your path.

C: 别想捞一个子儿。
E: You're not getting a penny from me.

C: 雅努萨波利斯筑有命运三相殿，即使狂妄如悬锋人，也不敢轻易冒犯命运泰坦之所在。
E: The Temple of the Three Fates is located in Janusopolis. Not even the crazed Kremnoans would dare offend the home of the Fate Titans without proper consideration.

C: 对了，我看你好像是远道而来，走了很久吧？要不要先去休息一下，需要向导的话可以随时来找我~
E: You've traveled a long way. Why not rest up for now? If you need a guide, I'm usually around.

C: 回见。愿命运泰坦们庇佑你！
E: Farewell. May the Fate Titans bless you!

C: 哦哦，热情烂漫！正符合神谕的描述，与前代圣女如出一辙，多么令人欣喜的传承啊！
E: Oh, so spirited and full of life! She's exactly as the prophecy foretold, just like the previous Holy Maiden. What a wonderful legacy!

C: 你很虔诚嘛。
E: You are indeed faithful.

C: 听上去，你不想在这继续工作？
E: Sounds like you're not too keen on staying in this job.

C: 那位新成员看着和当时照料元老的年轻人长得一模一样，可就是神情不是很像，她不再活泼开朗了，反倒一副老态龙钟的样子。
E: This new member looked exactly like the young caretaker, except their demeanor had completely changed. They weren't cheerful anymore — just weary and aged beyond their years.

C: 由于这个城市的名字有着如此之多的含义，渐渐地，人们反而不再使用那个名字，而只用「城市」称呼自己的家乡。
E: Over time, the name of the city gained so many meanings that people stopped using it altogether. Instead, they simply called it "The City."

C: （不说是不是就不会死？）
E: (I live if I stay quiet, right?)

C: 这是个很长的故事…幼年时的我偶得眼疾，是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的神迹救了我，使我重见光明。
E: It's a long story... In my childhood, I suffered from an eye condition. It was a miracle from {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} that saved me and restored my sight.

C: 呵，区区资金之忧，怎能与贵族的义务相提并论。
E: Hmph, these financial worries pale in comparison to the noble's duty.

C: 嗯…有位织者心怀信仰。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>拱廊尽头的墙面上</color>，聆听他人的告解呢。
E: Hmm... A weaver holds faith. The golden thread brings news that it is listening to confessions on <color=#dbc291ff>the wall at the end of the arched walkway</color>.

C: 那些萤火虫也是若虫吗？
E: Are those fireflies also nymphs?

C: 而那些志向高远或胸怀宽广的灵魂，则会被捏塑成萤火虫，用自己的光芒点亮黑暗。
E: And those with lofty ambitions or open minds are shaped into fireflies, using their light to illuminate the darkness.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

C: 我不确定到底发生了什么…天空突然暗了下来，紧接着浴场上层传来了尖叫声……
E: I don't know exactly what happened... the sky suddenly darkened, then screams came from the upper level of the baths...

C: 马尔库斯是谁？
E: Who is Marcus?

C: 我以前觉得他在胡说八道，我骂他不尊重死者。但最近…我也开始做梦了。梦见我的妻子站在远处呼唤我，孩子们在玫瑰丛中奔跑……
E: I used to think it nonsense, and accused him of disrespecting the dead. But lately... I've started dreaming, too. My wife calling from afar, children running through rose bushes...

C: 一个不再天天担心会被陨石砸死，另一个在安全区跑前跑后，帮助来避难的人们。
E: One stopped worrying about meteor strikes, the other runs around the safe zone helping refugees.

C: 是啊…
E: Yeah...

C: 不要吵架，不要吵架。
E: No fighting, please.

C: 唯有这点是确凿无疑的。
E: Only this remains certain.

C: 我们想要升高时，就向上仰望。有人向下俯视，因为他已经升高。
E: When we wish to rise, we look upward. Those who look down do so because they've already risen above.

C: 哦，你是说……
E: Oh, you mean...

C: 「不喝这水的人，会在水中渴死；喝了这水的人，却会失去自己的名字。」
E: Those who don't drink this water will die of thirst in its midst. Those who drink will lose their very names.

C: 来吧伙计们，新鲜的红土刺身——
E: Come on, fellas! Fresh raw redsoil —

C: …别担心，她没事。
E: ...Don't worry, she's fine.

C: 你好像完全没有危机感嘛。
E: You really don't seem to have a sense of crisis.

C: 恐惧是滋养黑暗的温床。它能带来一时宽慰，但放任不管，终有一日会用指端扼住我们的喉咙，从那里撕扯出血淋淋的哀告。
E: Fear is the breeding ground for darkness. It can provide temporary relief, but if left unchecked, one day it will tighten its grip on our throats and tear out our blood-curdling pleas.

C: 嗯…有位织者对建筑修筑颇有研究。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>天象画壁前</color>，感叹这奇观的伟丽呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is highly knowledgeable in construction. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the celestial mural</color>, admiring the grandeur of the spectacle.

C: 嗯…有位织者践行职责千年之久。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>通往天象画壁的大门</color>前守候，是时候唤它回到我们之间了。
E: Hmm... There was a weaver who faithfully carried out its duty for millennia. The golden threads brought news, it now waits before the <color=#dbc291ff>gate to the celestial mural</color>. It's time to call it back to walk among us once more.

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 想听故事吗？我有好多好多，可以一个个讲给你听。条件只有一个——要仔细听，好吗？
E: A story? I have so many I can tell you, but you'll have to listen to each and every one carefully. Alright?

C: 你摸起来好舒服迷！
E: You feel so soft, memi!

C: 最近在掉毛迷！
E: I've been shedding fur lately, memi...

C: 行了行了，别念啦——都这么多回了，我还能不知道你要说什么嘛。
E: Alright, alright, I get it already — you've said it a million times. I know what's coming.

C: 是、是谁在呼救迷？！
E: Wh—Who's calling for help, mem!?

C: 我也听饿了。
E: Now you've made me hungry, too.

C: 你在和我说话？
E: Are you talking to me?

C: 一靠近它们就溜走了。
E: They always run off the moment I get close.

C: 迷，偷偷告诉你，赢家能得到大树的祝福，实现一个心愿哦！
E: Memi, I'll let you in on a secret. The winner gets the big tree's blessing and one wish!

C: 对不起，这里已经满员了嘤！
E: Sorry, we're full here, eep!

C: 昔涟发出均匀的呼吸声，看上去睡得正沉。
E: Cyrene's steady breathing suggests she's sleeping soundly.

C: 好呀。人家会一直待在这里。{NICKNAME}需要的时候，就来找我吧。
E: That's okay. I'll be waiting right here. Look for me whenever you need me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 有可能哦！小动物们都会在爱的浸泡中长大，奇美拉一定也是。
E: You might be right! All baby animals grow with love and care, and chimeras are probably no different.

C: 那，该做些什么好呢？
E: Well then, what should we do next?

C: 震惊，冬霖爵在写信？
E: Shocking. Dux Brumalis is writing a letter?

C: 以金血铸薪柴，燃尽深海的晦暗…总觉得干巴巴的。
E: Forging firewood from golden blood to burn away the gloom of the deep sea... feels too dry and lifeless.

C: 这点，大、大家都是知道的嘛。
E: E—Everyone knows this.

C: 感谢阁下的宝贵建议。宴会是剑旗爵最喜欢的事物，自从她加入我们以来，欢宴便成了逐火军最为熟识的日常。
E: We thank you for your valuable advice. The banquet is Dux Gladiorum's most favorite thing. Ever since she joined us, banquets have become routine for the Flame-Chasers.

C: 凯撒大人所说的星海，我并无兴趣。我在意的，唯有翁法罗斯的命运罢了。
E: The sea of stars fascinated the Imperator, but holds no allure for me. My sole concern is Amphoreus's fate.

C: 你，你不懂，灌进来的蜜酿又不要钱，不喝多可惜…
E: Y—You don't understand. I didn't have to pay for those honey brews they forced on me, it's a waste not to drink them...

C: 老规矩，<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>。
E: You know the rule, <color=#dbc291ff>"Memory Crystal Shards"</color>.

C: 愿你们被人回望。
E: May you be remembered.

C: 行啦，又不是你探险，就别说风凉话了。城外那种危险的状态，他们七个都能平平安安的回来，还能带回点收获，已经很了不起了好吧。
E: All right, all right, not like you're the one exploring, so can it. Danger lurks everywhere outside the city. It's already a feat that the seven of them came back unscathed, with a minor haul in tow.

C: 今年是光历<unbreak>4931</unbreak>年…这样算来，奥赫玛已经快有五千年了呢！
E: This year is Year <unbreak>4931</unbreak> of the Light Calendar... So, Okhema has been around for almost five thousand years!

C: 哎，伊克西翁，我理解你担心城邦的安危，希望尽自己所能。但万一你失败了呢？那金血，凡人碰了可是要殒命啊！
E: Ah, Ixion... I know that you are concerned for the safety of the city, and you want to do what you can. But what if you are unsuccessful? If a mortal comes into contact with the golden blood, they will lose their lives!

C: 时光的流水，温雅却难再演。黎明初照绿叶，终将与岁月共眠。
E: The river of time flows soft and slow, yet once it's passed, it cannot glow. As dawn's first light on green leaves falls, they'll rest with time, as each one calls.

C: 你可闭嘴吧，众所周知，黎明机器将永远照亮奥赫玛！
E: Oh, do shut up. As far as we all know, the Dawn Device will forever illuminate Okhema!

C: 有点可惜啊。
E: Rather a pity.

C: 知足吧。
E: Be happy with what you've got.

C: 你们在干什么？
E: What are you all doing?

C: 我其实很多天没有睡过一次好觉了。
E: In fact, I haven't had a good sleep for many days.

C: 我没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 没有什么问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 虽然交流时间不长，但我能感受到，你已经领悟了我想要表达的所有含义。
E: Although we didn't chat long, I can feel that you already understood everything I try to express.

C: 不过在那个地方，她每日沐浴神眷，与优秀的同事一起完成科考，一定比在空间站要更加幸福开心。
E: However, she is bathed in divine blessings every day over there. She must be much happier doing research with other outstanding researchers over there than staying on the space station.

C: 那就压根儿是不可能的事儿！
E: It's just something impossible!

C: 荒笛大人教会了我很多事情…现在想来，那都是为了有一天我能迈向自己的旅行。也许还需要一些时间，我就能够做到了。
E: Lord Terravox taught me many things... Looking back now, it was all to prepare me for the day I could embark on my own journey. Perhaps with a bit more time, I'll be ready.

C: 我真好看。
E: I'm so beautiful.

C: 无论「毁灭」如何影响整座树庭，它始终是「理性」火种的一道保险。
E: No matter how the Destruction affects the entire Grove, the Grove remains an insurance for the Coreflame of Reason.

C: 我也会一起帮忙的！嗯…老师，那大餐……
E: I'll help out too! Um... Miss, about that feast...

C: 我…对不起，我还是记不住那些复杂的流程和祷词……
E: I... I'm sorry, I still can't remember all those complicated procedures and prayers...

C: 哈哈，感谢！那你们也别急着卖铁饼了，不如先等我再赢个冠军回来吧。
E: Haha, thanks! Don't rush to sell those iron pancakes just yet. Wait until I bring back another championship!

C: 吾师，别冲动，你再好好想想！
E: Sir, please! You have to think this through!

C: 这位朋友，我见你颇有资质啊，有没有兴趣了解一下我们「曳石学派」？
E: I see great potential in you, my friend. Perhaps you'd be interested in Helkolithism?

C: 噢噢，我忘了，十敌大人和丹恒大人都不在，没有训练师在身边的小海豹，是不允许无证冲撞的哟！
E: Oops, I forgot! Neither Lord Yourdei nor Lord Dan Heng is here. And remember? A baby seal without trainers around isn't allowed to go bumping!

C: 坏，都被他记住了。
E: Drats, he remembered it all.

C: {RUBY_B#歌尔巴尼帕尔大图书馆}你的图书馆{RUBY_E#}，还能再带我去看看吗？
E: Can you take me to {RUBY_B#Gibranipar Grand Library}your library{RUBY_E#} again?

C: 咳！至于逐火的后辈们，该由臣子觐见君王，岂有君王无故召见的道理？
E: Ahem! As for the younger generation of Flame-Chasers, it is only proper for a subject to seek an audience with their monarch, not the other way around.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 和你度过的点点滴滴，我都记得。你呢？有没有把人家好好放在心里呀？要记得常看如我所书，多让我们陪陪你哦。
E: I remember every little moment we spent together. What about you? Have you kept me close to your heart? Remember to review As I've Written often, and let us keep you company!

C: 现在一切归于平静，他们却针尖对麦芒地拌起了嘴，哎，只能说…人和人之间的气场还真是玄妙啊！
E: Now that everything's calm, they're at each other's throats bickering... *sigh* I guess you could say... the chemistry between people really is a mysterious thing!

C: 没有纷争的世界，会无聊吗？
E: Would a world without strife be boring?

C: 「于英雄撰写的神话中，亦有通往神话之外的路。当三束光芒汇聚，缝隙便会为光敞开。」
E: "In the myths written of heroes, there lies a path to the Exomyth. When three beams of light converge, the rift shall open to their radiance."

C: 嗯，我会一直在此等待。
E: It's alright. I'll wait here for you.

C: 三月前几天来找我，用合成机打印了石板和封面，那时候我就在构思了。
E: March came to see me a few days ago and used the Synthesizer to print out the tablet and cover. I was already thinking about it back then.

C: 看来，你还没有找到自己的答案——时日无多，请尽快思索吧。
E: It seems you haven't found your answer yet. Time is running out, so please think it through quickly.

C: 关于开拓…
E: About Trailblaze...

C: （聊聊关于史瓦罗的事情）
E: (Chat about Svarog)

C: 拿起货箱
E: Pick up the crate

C: 没想到真的还有后来的书页？
E: So there really are pages to be found.

C: {M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，我有个问题。越是让人期待的作品，越是让人等得很久。是不是期待让时间变慢了呢？
E: I have a question for you. The more I look forward to something, the longer I have to wait. Is time being slowed down by expectations?

C: （鼹鼠队的小伙伴们就是这样找到了暗门吧……）
E: (That's how the Mole team found the secret door...)

C: 侦侦侦测到路径中存在障碍碍碍碍，请求排除除除除——
E: De—De—De—Detecting obstacles in th—th—the way. Please cl—cl—clear the path—

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 不就是个矿车嘛，看我——哎呦，师傅别掐了别掐了疼疼疼！
E: Seems easy enough, just watch me — Ouch! Master, stop pinching me, it hurts!

C: 来，给你报酬——然后就是最后一道谜题了……
E: Here's your reward — and now, the final part of the puzzle...

C: 滴、答…唉，我真是个不幸的钟，忧愁令我颓靡，仅仅是转动指针就已耗尽全力——有的迷钟从刚造出来就死了，直到报废的时候才埋。
E: Tick, tock... Ah, I am such an unfortunate clock... My melancholy drains my strength, just turning my hands takes all of my energy... Some Dream Tickers die as soon as they are made and don't even get buried until they're scrapped.

C: 滴答！歌听完了，心情好多了！我的钟生应该还是有希望的！
E: Tick-tock! I listened to my song and I feel much better! My little life may still have some hope yet!

C: 这个活动策划有点东西。
E: This event designer has a thing or two up their sleeve.

C: 你打招呼她也听不见的…这只是一段预设好的留言，正在通过监控室的屏幕播放。
E: She can't hear anything you say... This is a pre-recorded message blaring out of the screen in the monitoring room.

C: 嗯。毕竟以她的说法，这应该只能算是新手教学。
E: Um. After all, as she'd put it: This is like a tutorial.

C: 艾丝妲相信你可以解决危机。
E: Asta believes you can fix everything.

C: …好了，我知道了。这次得麻烦你跑一趟<color=#dbc291ff>大矿区</color>——不出意外的话，<color=#dbc291ff>雷比尼</color>应该就在那里。
E: ...Got it. This time, I'll have to task you with a trip to the <color=#dbc291ff>Great Mine</color> — unless I'm mistaken, that's where <color=#dbc291ff>Rebini</color> should be.

C: 她后来成为了贝洛伯格士官学院首屈一指的尖子生，以年级第一的身份从那里毕业。人们都说她是贝洛伯格最智慧的头脑。
E: Later, she became the top student at the Belobog Military Academy, graduating at the top of her class. People say she had the most intelligent mind in all of Belobog.

C: 这样的话……
E: In that case...

C: 出动！
E: Move out!

C: 你…还会触碰天空吗？
E: Will you... ever touch the sky again?

C: 做得好，就让它停靠在这里吧。
E: Well done. We'll keep it docked at Foxsomn Tomb.

C: 来来来，我教你！先把拍摄主体放进取景框里，相机会有目标识别提示的——接下来按下快门就好啦！
E: Come on, let me show you! First, line up the subject in the viewfinder. There's a target recognition thingy — then just push the shutter button!

C: 你这拍的不是佩佩吗？
E: Is this a photo of Peppy?

C: 黑塔操纵来了两具遥控人偶……
E: Herta manipulated two remote-control puppets to come over...

C: 你突然感受到了一股巨大的冲击，眼前一片漆黑……
E: You suddenly feel the force of a massive impact, and everything goes dark...

C: 把照片还给我！
E: Give me back the photo!

C: （还差最后一张照片，总感觉这个人影很眼熟……）
E: (Just one more pic. This person seems familiar to me...)

C: （拍摄的角度不太好，还是再拍一张吧……）
E: (The angle isn't great on this one, I should take another one...)

C: 目标对象被遮挡！
E: Target is blocked!

C: 你听说过「苏打豆汁儿」吗？仙舟本地人总说这玩意儿可好喝了。我买来喝了一口，喷了邻桌食客一身。
E: Have you heard of mung bean soda? The Xianzhou locals say it's delicious. So I bought one, took a sip, and then sprayed it all over the diners at the next table.

C: …我想着能不能出一份力，让这里变得更美好一些。
E: ...Now I'm keen to do my part and make this place a little better.

C: …这我并不否认。
E: ...I'm not denying that.

C: （继续看戏）
E: (Keep watching the drama)

C: …公司这是给商会下套呀。
E: ...Sounds like the IPC set a trap for the merchant guild.

C: 啊…也就是说，「金人巷」要没了吗？
E: Ah... So no more Aurum Alley?

C: 说说眼前的事吧——我们要怎么做？
E: Let's not get ahead of ourselves — what are we gonna do about the matter at hand?

C: 虽然商会手头并不宽裕，但绝不会亏待你的。
E: The Merchant Guild is tight on funds, but we'll be sure to make it worth your time.

C: 如果对手是功夫了得的恶人，我倒是能挺身而出过上几招。但是金人巷这事仅靠拳脚功夫也没法解决，我有劲却无处使。
E: If our opponents were martial arts types, I could hold my own against them... but Aurum Alley's problems aren't something we can fight off with a sword.

C: 什、什么？！你们居然还上了？凭什么！
E: Wh—What? You already paid back the lease? How!?

C: 哈——？你说这个谁懂啊，快拿回去吧。
E: Ha...? What's this about? Get that out of here.

C: 但是这一切都是值得的。
E: Worth every step.

C: 我也给素裳姑娘发个信息，到陈机铺去汇合。
E: I sent a message to Sushang telling her to meet up at Oldies Depot.

C: 给我一个机会，证明你是错的。
E: Give me a chance to prove you wrong.

C: 我们的做法和公司是有区别的！
E: Our proposal is different from the IPC's!

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 为什么我不能在列车上吃到呢？
E: Why can't I order from the Express?

C: （我自己再想一句）
E: (Need to come up with one more...)

C: 去拍摄「白露与她的小伙伴」。
E: Take a photo of "Bailu and Friends."

C: 金人巷就交给我们吧。
E: We got this.

C: 自称主人公可还行。
E: It sure feels like it sometimes...

C: 对，我也是这样想的！
E: Agreed!

C: 别别别，你要给那个小姑娘说了，咱这批货是要留下痕迹的…这不太好。
E: No no no, you have to tell that little girl that this batch of ours is going to leave behind traces... That's no good.

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: （要不就在这里用机巧鸟把霍三哥的「货物」送上去吧……）
E: (Why not use the cycrane to send Mr. Huo's "goods" straight from here...)

C: （照他说的，放下霍三哥的货）
E: (Do as he says, and put down Mr. Huo's goods)

C: 可仙舟也没有垃圾桶啊！
E: But there are no trashcans on the Xianzhou! ...Trust me, I've checked.

C: 我要是有那胆子，我费劲请病假是要做什么啊。
E: If I had the courage for that, what would I need to get a healer's note?

C: 但是病假证明不是万能的。
E: But a medical certificate can't beat everything.

C: 我、我……
你们少血口喷人了，我为什么要搞小动作？你们这破码头，既没有商铺合作，又频繁出现事故，这跟我有什么关系？
E: Don't be so slanderous! Why would I stoop so low? What do the frequent accidents at this dock have to do with me?

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 这是你用数据得出的结论？
E: Do you have data to support your statements?

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 你要说可疑是挺可疑的，麻烦你了。
E: They seem more than just a little suspicious, mind you.

C: 救…救命…救救我…我、我要不行了……
E: Please... help me... I—I'm about to break down...

C: 如果总是绕远路，最后亏钱的还是我们……
E: If we keep going the long way around, we'll be in the red...

C: 抓走空闲的机巧鸟。
E: Catch the Idling Cycrane.

C: …你是什么时候出现在身后的？
E: ...When did you appear behind me?

C: 雪堆下的东西跳了出来……
E: Something jumped out of the Snow Drift...

C: 哎，这个东西啊，奶奶也不会用……
E: Ahh, Grandma doesn't know how to use this either...

C: 我是不是在哪儿见过你？
E: Have we met somewhere?

C: 会不会是平行世界的你…
E: Could it be you from a parallel universe?

C: 哎呦别走，别走啊！咱们餐厅还是有正经活动的！
E: Hey, don't go! We have some legitimate activities in our restaurant!

C: 至于其他的…完蛋，我又忘词了……短信上还说有啥活动来着？
E: As for the others... Oh dear, I forgot the lines again... What did the message say about the activities?

C: 坏消息是，那些狱卒刚刚破坏了航道，我们必须手动调整路线才能继续前进。
E: The bad news is that the prison guards have just damaged the track. We need to fix it manually to proceed.

C: 多亏之前的那步奇招，我们已经占领了整个美梦小镇监狱一半的分区。石头老板和他手下那群饭桶再也没可能把我们抓回牢房里去了。
E: Thanks to that unusual move we pulled off earlier, we've taken over half of the prison in Dreamville. Boss Stone and his underlings can never take us back to the prison again.

C: 不过英雄也并非万能，仅凭他一人很难对付整个分区的警卫。所以我们必须通过电视机，将梦境力量传递给他。
E: But even a hero like him isn't invincible and can't deal with all the guards by himself. We need to channel the Dreamscape energy to him through the television.

C: 没什么事。
E: Nothing, I'm fine.

C: 从迷钟们手中得到的积木堆放在此处，散发出一股不祥的气息。
E: The building blocks retrieved from the Dream Tickers have been piled here, and they emanate an ominous aura.

C: 啊，我想起来了——报社的那条信息确实是我群发出去的，只是以前几乎从来没人回应过我。
E: Ah, I remember now — I did send that agency message to the group, just that everyone mostly ignored me.

C: 哟，你回来啦？
E: Ho, you're back?

C: 主厨喜欢用嘴巴里的火来喷人——然而这却是这档「地狱厨房」节目的名场面。
E: The head chef seems to enjoy the spectacle of spewing fire from his mouth at people, which is, incidentally, the main selling point of this "Inferno's Kitchen" show.

C: 噢。抱歉，我不是故意要这么做的，只是…不小心，手劲大了点，就捏碎了哈哈哈！你不会要掉小珍珠了吧？多来点，多来点！
E: Oh. I'm sorry, and I didn't mean to break it. I just... held it too tightly and crushed it by accident, hahaha! Are you going to cry? More, please!

C: 我是这里的调饮师，都听我的！
E: I'm the drinksmith, and I call the shots here!

C: 这边这边！陪我玩！我看到速度快的东西就想扑上去汪！
E: Over here, over here! Play with me! I wanna pounce on anything I see moving fast, woof!

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 人家就是…唉，平日里让人面红耳赤的话说惯了，到了关键时候，真心的话儿就怎么都没法坦率说出来。
E: I'm just... well, I'm just used to saying things that make people blush, but when it comes to the moment of truth, I just can't speak out what I really want to say.

C: 自从遇到了你以后，感觉生活充满了快乐。悲剧终于要闭幕，欢笑的喜剧要上演了！
E: Life feels full of joy since I met you. The tragedy is finally ending, and the comedy is about to begin!

C: 最近大家的情绪不太好，惹了不少麻烦，会不会…是被她讨厌了哇？
E: We've been a pain in the neck lately and have caused a lot of trouble. Maybe... she's not into us anymore?

C: （好了，现在怪物们的问题都得到了解决…该出发去调查舒翁了！）
E: (Now that I've resolved all the monsters' problems... it's time to investigate Siobhan!)

C: 我非得跟那群混蛋拼了！
E: I'll fight those scoundrels no matter what!

C: 怎么回事，带来的怪物都逃走了？
E: What's happening? The monsters are running away?

C: 是啊。什么都不会改变，我没有彻底拯救你们的能力。对不起。
E: Yeah, nothing will change. I can't help get rid of the nightmare completely. I'm sorry.

C: 注意到你靠近了包裹之后，帕姆兴奋地从别处走了过来。
E: After noticing that you got close to a package, Pom-Pom excitedly came over from somewhere else.

C: 我听说过雅利洛-Ⅵ，那不是一个宜居的星球吗？
E: I've heard of Jarilo-VI. But isn't it supposed to be quite a hospitable planet, no?

C: 该死，该死！不是说在讨伐迷因的时候牺牲了吗？为什么会丢下我和妈出现在这里？
E: Darn it! Darn it! Didn't you die during the expedition against the memes? Isn't that the reason why you abandoned me and Ma?

C: 这堆赃物可真沉啊，难怪没被带上一起跑。
E: These filthy loots weigh a ton. It's no wonder they left them behind during their escape.

C: 不要倒下，想想我们的友谊、羁绊，还有你的工资！
E: Don't fall yet. Think of our friendship, our history... and your wages!

C: 怎么样，很有趣吧？滴答，像不像匹诺康尼的卡通明星——钟表小子？
E: This is fun, isn't it? Tick-tock, do I look like the cartoon star of Penacony — Clockie?

C: 没错，绝不会认错的，他与我见面时就是戴着这顶礼帽。听说这是对他非常重要的东西，如今却在您的手中……
E: Yes, I'm pretty sure this is it. He was wearing this hat when I met him. I heard it's something very important to him, but now it's in your hands...

C: 但当初我们的影片送审时，鸢尾花家系唯独封禁了这部《美梦大机密》的胶卷——他们非说影片内容有问题，必须得到「钟表匠」先生的出面解释。
E: But when we submitted the series for review, the Iris Family only banned Dreamjoy Secrecy. They insisted that there were issues with the content and demanded an explanation from Mr. Watchmaker.

C: 「同谐」包容不同观念，但不会包容可能诞育危险的思想——艺术作品的煽动力远比你想的要可怕。
E: The Harmony embraces diverse concepts, but not those that can lead to danger. The provocative nature of artistic works is far more formidable than you might imagine.

C: 是啊，对于寻找快乐的观众，动画就只是动画而已。但如果能有人从镜头、表演、故事甚至一句台词中读出深意…那他就能与「钟表匠」的灵魂相逢，聆听那些过去的梦。
E: You're right. For viewers who are here to seek entertainment, the movie is just an animation. But if someone can decipher the hidden message behind the camera work, performance, story, or even a single line of dialogue... then they will be able to meet the Watchmaker's soul and listen to the past dreams.

C: 拍摄结束，导演您辛苦了。
E: The filming is complete. Thanks for your hard work, Director.

C: 这是《美梦仙踪》的第一场戏：「在很久很久之前，某次罗盘号的巡航中，钟表小子因飞船故障而落入了一处奇妙的世界——美梦剧团所在的美梦仙境。」
E: This is the first scene of Dreamjoy Ascension: "Long, long ago, during one of The Compass's voyages, Clockie fell into a fantastical world due to a ship malfunction — the dreamland where the Sweet Dreams Troupe was located."

C: 嗯，我的这个台词很帅。
E: Mm, my line is very cool.

C: 啾啾，钟表小子救救啾啾。
E: Tweet tweet, help me, Clockie.

C: 不了，我是来聊合作的。
E: No thanks, I'm here to talk about collaborating.

C: 「经典的情节，不变的感动。苏乐达——创造一切可能，代表美梦与幻想的奇迹！」
E: "A classic plot with unchanged emotions. SoulGlad — creating all possibilities, the miracle of dreams and fantasies!"

C: 没错…就是那种能瞬间治愈所有伤口，让人充满精力的传奇饮料……
E: That's right... It's a legendary beverage that can instantly heal all wounds and energize one with vigor...

C: 石头老板肯定布下了更周密的守备，搞不好还会有一场苦战——滴答，要做好准备！
E: Boss Stone must have laid down more intricate defenses. We could be greeted with another long battle. Tick-tock, better get ready!

C: 拍摄外传的任务就拜托您了！在您的导演下，我们的角色一定会成为留名影史的经典人物！
E: I'm counting on you to shoot the Extra! Under your directions, our characters will definitely be classics that echo down the annals of cinema!

C: 快看，天上奇怪的痕迹消失了！
E: Look. The strange markings in the sky have disappeared!

C: 嗯，那我先去帮动画师了。
E: Alright, I'll help out the animators first.

C: 是「钟表匠」的恶作剧？
E: Is this some kind of prank from the Watchmaker?

C: 咕噜噜，完成了，谢谢导演！
E: *gurgle* All done. Thank you, Director!

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 天呐，这真是个悲伤的故事啾……
E: My goodness, that really is a tragic story...

C: 关于木头老爷。
E: About Old Man Wood.

C: 喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美味速速达！
E: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, and make your dreams a blast!

C: 在「演技派」挑战中，您需要根据三份剧本完成表演，打动现场的评委；在「动作派」挑战中，您需要干净利落地战胜三组敌人，抵达终点。
E: In the School of Acting challenge, you have to complete three performances from three scripts and move the panel judges. In the School of Action challenge, you have to defeat three groups of enemies convincingly and reach the end.

C: 身为来到匹诺康尼的逐梦客，打倒它们，是你迈向成功的第一步！
E: As Dreamchasers who've come to Penacony, defeating them is your first step towards success!

C: 已经渐渐习惯这种感觉了…说不定还能操作哈努兄弟做些高难度动作呢。
E: I am gradually getting used to this... who knows, I might even be able to perform some high-level moves with Hanu.

C: 我没听说过…应该不是什么重要的人物。
E: Never heard of him... Probably no one important.

C: 因为你受到祂的垂怜。
E: Because you have received THEIR grace.

C: 只有十五天？好…好啊！
E: Only fifteen days? Alright... fine!

C: 我还是比较担心小老板娘的情况，我们去看看吧。
E: I'm still worried about the owner. Let's go check on her.

C: 出门靠朋友，总会有奇遇。
E: Friends on the road bring twists of the fate.

C: 身手不错，你通过了。
E: Yeah, well done! You passed with flying colors.

C: 你说的对，我在江湖上可是学了不少！
E: Absolutely! I've learned a lot from my adventures!

C: 没错，你很敏锐嘛。
E: Yep, you're sharp.

C: 当然！我心里的「英雄大侠」会这样做的！
E: Yes, absolutely! The great hero within me is definitely up to the task!

C: 少废话，你失去的拿不回去了！
E: Spare me the lecture! You're not getting back what you lost!

C: …也许有可能！不过，我有没有做过像这样的奇怪行为呢？
E: ...That's entirely possible! But have I ever acted so strangely?

C: 小心，是逃逸的岁阳！
E: Careful, it's that escaped heliobus!

C: 彦卿师父、云璃师父，对不起…我输了……
E: I'm sorry, Master Yanqing, Master Yunli... I lost...

C: 连弟子都不愿保护，你算什么师父？
E: You won't even stand up for your own apprentice? What kind of master are you?

C: 好了，废话少说，三月七，准备好学狗……
E: Well, enough for chit-chat. March 7th, I'm going to make you bark...

C: 你喜欢我，对吗？
E: You like me, don't you?

C: 嗯？三月小姐这是在写信吗？
E: Hmm? Are you writing a letter, Miss March?

C: 可是，到了比武的时候，斯科特肯定会用上他们公司的机甲。那东西怎么想也不是能用两把剑解决掉的吧！
E: But Skott will definitely use the IPC's mechs. There's no way I can take them down with just a couple of swords, right?

C: 这样…就可以打败斯科特了？
E: So... I can defeat him just like that?

C: 银狼一点也不厉害，在将我接入您的武器时，银狼粗糙的焊接技能使得剑体的抗冲击性能下降了百分之十二。
E: No, Silver Wolf is not amazing at all. When Silver Wolf installed me into your sword, her terrible welding skills actually reduced the sword's impact resistance by <unbreak>12</unbreak> percent.

C: 三月七，算我求你一次，这机甲不便宜，你别给我玩坏了！
E: Miss March, I'm begging you! These mechs aren't cheap. Please don't break them!

C: 这个好！这个好！
E: This! This one's good!

C: 将人参从泡菜坛中取出，切成薄片，辅以醋、姜、蒜、红油酱料做成。
E: I extracted the ginseng from the kimchi pot, julienned it, and used vinegar, ginger, garlic, and chili oil as condiments.

C: 将「黑玉断续膏」煮沸过滤，加入阿胶，最后再加入鹰栗粉晾凉凝固。
E: I boiled and filtered obsidian ground paste, then added donkey-hide gelatin, and finally added corn starch to congeal it.

C: 没错，这药方是饲喂灵蛇的法子。据说那条蛇最初通体灰黑，持续服用灵芝、参茸等珍奇药物之后二十年后，已经是通体发红。
E: That's right, it's a remedy used to feed spirit snakes. It's said that the snake used to be coated in gray-black, but with continued consumption of spirit fungi, ginseng, deer antlers, and other rare herbs for two decades, its entire body eventually turned red.

C: 击败公司机甲还需要灵感？反正我现在还很闲，给我讲讲呗？
E: Inspiration to defeat the IPC mechs? I've plenty of time now anyway, how about explaining the situation?

C: 这次公输师傅也在呢？看来公输师傅也……
E: So, Master Gongshu is here too? Seems like he also...

C: 我…就算做出来，也不会是阿休了……
E: Even if... I were to craft it now, it wouldn't be A-Xiu...

C: 就像放久了的汽水无论密封多好，都会从其中逸出气体。人类的思维活动也会产生微量的「忆质」。它们太稀薄了，稀薄到可以忽略不计。
E: No matter how tightly a soda bottle is sealed, some gas will leak out after the bottle has been lying around for too long. Similarly, human thoughts produce tiny amounts of "memoria," but they are so diluted that they are almost completely negligible.

C: 提到「友谊魔法」，回忆一下涌上心头，不知不觉就和宝力先生说了好多。可能有些啰嗦，不好意思。
E: When you mentioned the Magic of Friendship, so many memories came flooding back to me. Before I knew it, I had been talking non-stop for ages with Mr. Pony. Sorry for getting carried away and rambling.

C: 一起走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 谢谢安慰…唉，其实我早有心理准备。第一次见世面，难免会遇到文化冲击，只是没想到这冲击实在太大，我站不稳了。
E: Thank you for comforting me... Actually, I did do some mental preparations. It's my first time going out into the world, but I didn't expect it to be so overwhelming that I can't keep my footing.

C: 呜呜呜…炽烈的友情啊。你们不要这样好不好，我的镜头…进水了，画面…模糊了…呜呜呜……
E: Such a burning friendship. Don't do this to me, guys. My camera... it's getting wet, and the shot... it's getting blurry... Oh...

C: 再稍等一下。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 好不容易见到了「寻圈」的传奇人物，可不能就这么放你走了。
E: It's not every day we meet a "Pathfinder" legend! We can't let you leave that easily.

C: 可惜银河太大了，一颗星球的呼救声又太小了…抱歉，我刚才不该用那么轻佻的口吻说什么「新鲜故事」。
E: Alas, the cosmos is infinitely vast, easily drowning out one planet's meek cry for help... Sorry, I shouldn't have spoken so flippantly about a "fascinating tale" earlier.

C: 公平竞赛，怨不得人。倒不如说要感谢卢卡朋友，他们对你的实力大加赞赏，表示要努力练习。
E: It was a fair match, so no one's to blame. Actually, we should be grateful to you — they were so impressed by your abilities that they said they want to train harder.

C: 原来素裳小姐的队伍人气那么高？
E: So Miss Sushang's team is really popular then?

C: 这位…小哥…呃…不知您多大年纪，我可以叫您「小哥」吗？
E: Excuse me... little bro... Uh... I'm not sure how old you are. Can I call you "little bro"?

C: 都到这个份上了…想吃点什么就吃点什么吧。
E: You're already at this stage... Just eat whatever you like.

C: 就是他。趁着寒潮消退，玲宝…咳咳，玲可一直在探索古代城市「马斯列尼察」的遗址。几个月前，她在那儿找到了一座独立于公共墓园之外的坟墓。
E: That's him. When the Eternal Freeze subsided, Lynxy... Ahem, Lynx took the opportunity to explore the ruins of the ancient city of Maslenitsa. A few months ago, she found a lone grave outside the public graveyard.

C: 坟墓中没有遗体，只有一条机械臂和一块破损的宝石挂坠。公司的人说，那条机械臂是旧世界时代的科技了，至于宝石，则是一种被称为玉兆的仙舟器物。
E: The grave had no body, just a robot arm and a cracked pendant with an embedded gemstone. An IPC worker said that the arm was tech from the Old World. As for the stone, it's a Xianzhou implement called a jade abacus.

C: 总之事情就是你听到的这样。你给老子好好当教练，让那小子漂漂亮亮赢几场，知道了吗？
E: Anyway, you heard it. You better be a good coach and make sure that kid wins a few matches in style, got it?

C: 玛吉…拖着这么小小的身子，一直在和病魔战斗。她一直在战斗，她必须赢下这一场啊！
E: Margie... She was battling the demons of her sickness with that frail, tiny body of hers. She was always battling — she must win the next round!

C: 告辞了，卢卡先生。
E: I shall take my leave, Mr. Luka.

C: 终于有我不认识的参赛选手了！
E: Finally, there's a contestant I haven't met before!

C: 我本意是想考验一下你的觉悟…但拿生死大事威胁一个比赛对手，确实有点过分。
E: My intention was to test your resolve... but threatenin' a competitor with life and death was a bit over the line.

C: 我要离开，除了必须抓紧时间外，也有那个守擂剑士的原因在。
E: I'm leaving not just because time's running out for me, but partly because of that ringmaster too.

C: 竟然马上就要上场了…感觉跟做梦一样。
E: Can't believe the match is about to start... I feel as though I'm having a dream.

C: 我的奖金，能买到一支军队吗？
E: Can my prize money buy me an army?

C: 她说自己是为了丹轮寺的僧侣和孩子前来比武的。她…真的是逃犯吗？
E: She says she's competing for the monks and children of Claretwheel Temple. Is she... really a fugitive?

C: 我也只能再回答一遍，贫僧绝对没有触犯杀戒。但事情的来龙去脉，也恕我无法回答。
E: I can only repeat my previous answer. I absolutely did not violate my vows against bloodshed. However, I cannot divulge the details of the situation.

C: 我知谛苦真实，死生缘起，故不放逸，以待涅槃。
E: I know the truth of suffering, of death, and of life, thus I shall not be indulgent in my wait for Nirvana.

C: 么么～么么！
E: Mehr, mehr! Mehr, mehr!

C: 首场擂台赛就拿下了开门红，应该能给卢卡增强信心。
E: Getting off to such a great start in his first Faceoff Match should give Luka a confidence boost.

C: 前排左手边第二位。
E: Front row, second from the left.

C: 还要说什么吗？我觉得不用说什么，大家心里都清楚。
E: What else is there to say? I don't think there's a need. It's quite clear in everyone's minds.

C: 技不如人罢了…
E: Skill issue...

C: 请这位记者朋友注意分辨信息来源。
E: I would remind this journalist to be discerning about your information sources.

C: 如果品牌方们不嫌弃，希望在演武仪典赛程结束之后联系卢卡选手经纪人商谈合作的事项。
E: If any brands are interested, please contact Luka's agent after the Wardance to discuss any collaboration opportunities.

C: 那就不要怪我乱猜了。
E: Then don't blame me for making my own guesses.

C: 你随便问点吧。
E: Just ask whatever.

C: 你知道我是谁，我就不介绍了哦。
E: You know who I am, so I'll skip the introduction.

C: 卢卡选手再度创造了奇迹！不愧是卢卡选手！
E: Luka pulls off another miracle with his bare hands! What a man!

C: 喔？卢卡选手怎么突然愣住了？
E: Oh? It appears Luka is dazed all of a sudden.

C: 既然如此，我也将弃剑不用。就让我们用双拳决定最后的胜者吧。
E: In this case, I'll stop using my swords. Let's decide who the winner is with our bare fists.

C: 对不起我走错房间了。
E: Sorry, I must have entered the wrong room.

C: 其实就是以前那些传统庙会游戏的交感幻戏升级版～以前你要亲自到线下去体验的那些经典仙舟游戏，现在可以在庙会上一站式体验了！是不是很有趣？
E: It's actually an improved Empathic Immersia of those traditional temple fair games you used to know! The traditional Xianzhou games you had to be there personally to experience are now all available at this temple fair! Isn't it amazing?

C: 欢迎，{NICKNAME}。要不要来一局紧张刺激的「大衍万象」？
E: Welcome, {NICKNAME}. How about a thrilling game of Mutare Magnus?

C: 这段话的槽点实在有点多…
E: There are quite a few loopholes with this line...

C: 不是，您多理解一下，这是学生内部的事务，理应由……
E: No, please do understand. This is an internal student matter, and it should be handled by...

C: 方才听闻诸位正为音律祭典的忍首之位争论，若苦思不得法，不妨听在下一言。
E: I overheard that you all are deliberating the appointment of the Chief Ninja for the music festival. Should you find yourselves at an impasse, may I be permitted to offer a humble suggestion?

C: 全仰仗您。
E: I'm counting on you.

C: 叫我的名字，我不需要什么忍号。
E: Call me by my name. I don't need any ninja nicknames.

C: 对呀，你会作曲吗？
E: Yeah, do you?

C: 即便信奉的忍道有所差别，言出必行乃是在下闯荡忍界的信条，未曾有任何懈怠。
E: The ninja tenets we pursue may differ, but my creed in the ninja world has always been to keep my word — I have never reneged in this regard.

C: （说点正经的）
E: (Say something proper)

C: ——盛会巨星！实在是太厉害了！
E: Festive Superstar! That was awesome!

C: ——我申请退出乐队。
E: ...I submit my resignation to the band.

C: 好吧，那等此次作战结束，在下将会向诸位传授「缭乱•忍法」的核心奥义。
E: Alright. After this battle is over, I will teach you the true secrets behind my Dazzling Ninjutsu.

C: 明白。我会遵守的。
E: I understand. I will honor your decision.

C: 果真？
E: Really?

C: 距离作战开始的时限所剩无几，恐怕没有余裕来探访吉他•忍徒的去向了。
E: We have no time, as the battle is about to begin. I fear we don't have time to go in search of Ninja Initiate Guitar's whereabouts.

C: 万策尽了！
E: You've done everything you can!

C: 就是！害得台上的我们像傻子一样。乱破小姐，我契波大人申请即刻出发，缉拿叛忍！
E: Yeah, exactly! We looked like fools on stage. Miss Rappa, I, Lord Czipo, officially ask for permission to set off and personally apprehend this traitorous ninja!

C: 还有谐乐学院的那个老东西，关键时候就没影了是吧？
E: And where'd that old coot from Charmony Academy disappear to at such a crucial moment?

C: 要是他走路速度跟史瓦罗一样快，咱们就输定啦。不过没事，乱破同学会遵守承诺的！
E: If his walking speed was as fast as Svarog's, we would definitely lose. But it's okay. Rappa will keep her promise!

C: 不会还要搞个大的吧？
E: You're not still trying to end with a bang, are you?

C: 咕咕，真是谦虚，就像左轮队长一样。
E: Hoot hoot, so humble, just like Captain Revolver.

C: 噢！
E: Yes!

C: …悲伤的「阮•梅」造物。
E: ...Ruan Mei's sad creation.

C: 这种理由，我在向学院请假的时候用过好多次了。
E: I've used an excuse like this so many times at the academy.

C: 没见过的小动物！好可爱~
E: I've never seen such an animal before! It's so cute!

C: 嗨——我亲爱的桶友，见到你们可太高兴了，最近过得还好吗？
E: Hiii! My dear trashfriends, it's a joy to see you. How have you been?

C: 什么乱七八糟的，还想打人，倒反天罡了是吧？清洁工呢，快收拾干净！
E: What's all this nonsense? And trying to pick a fight? Have you lost your mind? Where's the janitor? Get rid of these riff-raff quickly!

C: 哎…不留神就说多了，别太在意，就当是个前乐队成员的辛酸故事吧。
E: *sigh* ...I said too much before I knew it. Don't mind me. Just treat it as a cautionary tale of sorrow from a former band member.

C: 来吧。
E: Bring it on.

C: 哇哦，{F#姐们}{M#哥们}你也太酷了！不过这事你在空间站讲讲就算了，出去外面可别到处跟人说，免得给你惹出麻烦来。
E: Wow, you're so cool, {F#miss}{M#mister}! But you should probably forget about this exchange outside the space station — you don't want to run into any future trouble.

C: 这些过度曝光了，姬子姐姐白得在反光！
E: These are overexposed. Himeko looks so pale that she's practically blinding!

C: 没错没错，太酷炫了～
E: Yeah, it was super cool!

C: 等等，不对劲帕。怎么感觉你们两个是专门跑过来一唱一和地劝我换掉扫把的呢？
E: Hang on, this isn't right. Why does this conversation feel like you two discussed it beforehand, just to persuade me to change the broom?

C: 你们别这样。我看这原料都是正常的原料，再糟糕能糟糕到哪里去呢？姬子小姐难得下厨，大家给点面子嘛！
E: Come on, guys. These are all normal ingredients. How bad can it be? It's rare that Himeko is cooking, so let's show her some respect!

C: 三月乘客的技能，竟然在意想不到的地方发挥了重要作用，列车长好感动！
E: March, your skills have played an unexpectedly crucial role in this matter. I am truly touched!

C: 瓦尔特出手。
E: Send Welt.

C: 嗯，太了解了。
E: Yes, all too well.

C: 安全起见，我们还是先开溜吧？有什么事等黑塔女士做完实验再说……
E: Should we leave first, just to be safe? We can talk about whatever it is after Madam Herta is done with her experiment...

C: 我看看都要准备什么…蜜饯类零食、饼干类零食、肉类零食、糕点类零食、坚果类零食……
E: Let's see what I need to prepare... Candied snacks, cookie snacks, meat snacks, pastry snacks, nut snacks...

C: 三月，稍等一下，「蜜饯类」还要细分「水果蜜饯类」和「蔬菜蜜饯类」。
E: March, wait a sec — candied snacks also need to be separated into candied fruit snacks and candied vegetable snacks.

C: 第一份请托，是「丹轮寺」请我们协助他们，与{RUBY_B#护教僧团}护法众{RUBY_E#}一起将一群可怜的战争孤儿护送到丹轮寺。
E: The first commission is from the Claretwheel Temple seeking our assistance, to escort a group of poor war orphans to the Claretwheel Temple with the {RUBY_B#Apologetic Sangha}Dharma Defenders{RUBY_E#}.

C: 好在有惊无险，任务平安完成。
E: At least nothing serious happened, and the mission was completed uneventfully.

C: 不是我，我在看书。
E: It's not me. I'm reading.

C: 不过，这儿光线不大好，咱们去演艺教室吧。
E: But the lighting's not great here. Let's head to the performing arts classroom.

C: 叫「无名客的钟爱」吧。
E: How about "Nameless' Beloved"?

C: （好大的睡蕉小猴…走近些看看吧。）
E: (What a huge Slumbernana Monkey... let's get closer and take a look.)

C: 额咳咳——哈哈，抱歉，我入戏太深了。多谢你们替我拍照，请收下这个吧！
E: Aaahem... Haha, sorry, I was too immersed. Thanks for taking my photo. Please accept this!

C: 好啦，最后给照片起个名字吧~
E: Alright, last thing — name this photo!

C: 好不容易来一趟，当然得入乡随俗。
E: It's not every day we get to visit. When on foreign grounds...

C: 好古怪的镜头，到现在都摸不清它的作用到底是什么……
E: What a strange lens. I can't figure out exactly what its use is...

C: 明明是借住，还总是一副趾高气扬的样子——作为十王司的判官，判你好吃懒做、冷嘲热讽、指指点点罪！
E: I'm just lending you a place to live, yet you're always acting so high and mighty! As a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, I find you guilty of the crimes of sloth, mockery, and finger-pointing!

C: 发之胸臆，心游物外……
E: Right from the chest, heart wandering beyond...

C: 我感觉到…在另外一个方向！
E: I sense that... it's in the other direction!

C: 真是端水大师！
E: You sure are unbiased!

C: 来都来了，就别打退堂鼓啦。
E: Since you're already here, no reason for you to back out now.

C: 你和三月七又邀请了其他朋友合影留念。
E: You and March 7th have also invited other friends for a group photo.

C: 好奇的{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，请不要在意。
E: Curious {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, please don't mind me.

C: 嘿嘿，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，我帮你标注几个可能有「眼睛」的地点——
E: Hee-hee, {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, I'll help you mark out some locations where the "Eyes" may be...

C: 我们千百年来只是受你庇护的羔羊，但你需要一群狼与狮，成为你最勇猛的兵戈，令你的剑锋悬于万民之上！
E: We are but lambs sheltered by you for eons, but you need a pack of wolves, a pride of lions, to become your fiercest soldiers, to raise your blades above the masses!

C: 我如此耀眼，怎会是尘埃？
E: I'm mad bright. How can I be dust?

C: 没事，不是有我在吗。别紧张，我会认真教你的！
E: Don't worry. I'm here, aren't I? Don't be anxious. I'll teach you in earnest!

C: 灰宝！公民大会很恐怖的，要是惹他们不开心的话，甚至会被驱逐出奥赫玛的哦。
E: Grayie! The citizens' assembly is terrifying! If you upset them, you might even be driven out of Okhema.

C: （再安抚它们）
E: (Placate them now)

C: 嗯…我同意您的看法，完全同意嗷呜…没有任何意见。
E: Mm... I agree with you, I totally do, awooo... I have no objections.

C: 嗯，灰宝接手了这支队伍，正在认真工作呢，我也会帮些忙。
E: Yeah, Grayie just took over this squad and is working hard on it. I'm also helping out.

C: 灰宝！明明你刚才还和我一样惊讶，这种时候就别逞强啦！
E: Grayie! You were just as surprised as I was earlier. Stop pretending!

C: 这么说来，那只小队的标志，确实是缇宝老师的图案。我应该早点察觉到的。
E: Come to think of it, that squad's insignia is indeed Tribbie's design. I should have noticed it sooner.

C: 好深奥，听不懂嗷呜。
E: So profound, I didn't understand a word of it, awoo.

C: 这只小东西就跑过来，提出和我结盟。如果我愿意帮忙的话，它可以帮我付罚款——我也不知道它究竟哪来的利衡币。
E: So this critter scampered over and suggested we work together. If I was willing to help, it would help me pay the fine. I also didn't know where it got the Balance Coins from.

C: 太棒啦！
E: Wa-hey!

C: 当然，也可能是不久后的将来。
E: Of course, it may also be a moment in the near future.

C: 也过去看看吧……
E: Let's take a closer look...

C: 桀桀桀，我兜里的花样比你们想象的更多，咱们——走着瞧！
E: Hehehe, you haven't seen half of what I can do, so — stay tuned!

C: 惊。
E: Shocking.

C: {NICKNAME}选手一定是在认真地…调节气氛吧。
E: {NICKNAME} must be seriously... trying to lighten the mood.

C: 「金海豹杯」！「金海豹杯」！
E: Gold Seal Cup! Gold Seal Cup!

C: 你闭嘴吧。{NICKNAME}，小心这家伙，和他合照后，你就会变成「超级英雄」沐浴皂的代言人了。
E: Shut up. {NICKNAME}, be careful with this one. After a photo with him, you'll end up as the ambassador for Superhero Shower Soap.

C: 嗷呜～你放心吧，泡泡就算不知道预言梦中的一切，还是会帮你的！
E: Awooo!~ Fret not. Bubbles will aid you even if you keep the dream a secret!

C: 那个小海豹的比赛…?
E: The Baby Seals tournament...?

C: 短暂的休赛期结束，浴池被清理干净，受到影响的小海豹也得到了照顾。
E: The short break has ended. The baths are cleaned, and the affected baby seals are cared for.

C: 话都说到这个份上了，那我——参加比赛就是了。
E: Well, since you've made it so clear, then I'll — just enter the competition.

C: 咳咳…我开发了一款以星穹列车为题材的游戏。换句话说，它是我为星穹列车献上的一份心意。
E: Ahem... I developed an Astral-Express-themed game. In other words, it's my little homage for the Astral Express.

C: 为什么游戏是个嘉年华？
E: What's with the carnival theme?

C: 我们利用梦境中特有的技术，做出了全沉浸式的体验——所以，没朋友也完全没关系，单人即可游玩！
E: We use unique Dreamscape tech to create a completely immersive experience — so, you don't even need friends to play it. It's a single-player game!

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all I wanted to know.

C: 莫非…你真以为能胜得过我？
E: Could it be that you really believe... you can beat me?

C: …青雀怎么不打牌也来赛车了？
E: ...Since when does Qingque race instead of playing tiles?

C: 「专业代打」号并没有停下而是向远方驶去——像是接受她的邀请，你紧随其后。
E: The "Professional Substitute" didn't stop but instead drove off into the distance — as if accepting her invitation, you followed closely behind.

C: 咳，一般来说，不爱说话是高手的常见特征之一。看来咱们的冠军更倾向于用实力说话，不喜欢多言！好，那我们就用掌声再次祝贺{NICKNAME}！
E: *cough* Well, powerful figures often prefer to save their words. Looks like our champion would rather speak their actions! Alright then. Let's just put our hands together for {NICKNAME} once more!

C: 哎呀，老板您有所不知，现在街机厅的玩家就喜欢快速上手的活动！
E: C'mon, boss. Arcade players these days like games that they can pick up and play!

C: 啥叫「不打游戏我就要死了」？
E: No-Game-No-Life? What's that supposed to mean?

C: 捉鬼小队只是过来打游戏的吗？
E: Was the ghost-hunting squad just here to play games?

C: 好恶劣的大人。
E: What a nasty adult.

C: 当然可以。但我这满是褶皱的脸皮，如果脏了股东的手，就得不偿失了。
E: Be my guest. But this wrinkly old face of mine? Might not be worth dirtying a shareholder's hand.

C: 啾！托帕，鉴于你在匹诺康尼的优异表现，战略投资部决定额外提高绩效奖，并对你的职级作出如下调整——
E: Tweet! Topaz, in light of your excellent work in Penacony, the Strategic Investment Department has approved an increased performance bonus and the following rank adjustment—

C: 通知下去，二十分钟内出现在工位上的组员当日工资翻倍，增加一天年假。大闹钟，你又有什么事？
E: Tell everyone that any staff who shows up at their workstation within the next twenty minutes will receive double pay for today and an extra day of annual leave. Big Clock, what's your deal this time?

C: 求学的机会难得，还是不要打扰为好。素裳朝你感激地望了一眼。
E: Better not interrupt her in a rare moment of learning. Sushang gives you a thankful glance.

C: 实在太不像话了！第三课名为：逻辑。我教你演绎论证、概率统计、辩证思考与形而上学，如何？
E: This is unacceptable! The third lesson is titled: logic. I'll teach you deductive reasoning, probability, critical thinking, and metaphysics. What do you think?

C: 你要觉得这样的话术能激怒我，那就大错特错了。冷静是求知者必备的特质。
E: If you think words like that can get under my skin, you're completely mistaken. Composure is essential for any true seeker of knowledge.

C: 星穹列车，现在要发车了！
E: The Astral Express is departing now!

C: 嘿！东张西望什么呢？
E: Hey! What are you looking at?

C: 为了我们的友谊，干杯！
E: To our friendship, cheers!

C: 这里只有我一个客人。
E: I'm literally the only customer here.

C: 效果太简单直接了吧。
E: The effect is a little too direct, if you ask me.

C: 你有些想打哈欠了。
E: You're starting to feel a yawn coming on.

C: 答案：因为她安装了「防火墙」。
E: Answer: Because she had a "firewall."

C: 哇哦，教授，恭喜你！是不是会给你发一个大奖杯？
E: Wow, Professor, congratulations! Will they give you a big trophy?

C: 呼…呼…呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...
"Please~~~ Come~~~ Test~~~"

C: 我们的对手包括当地垄断财阀、丰饶信徒、反物质军团等等，一个个都不是善茬。他们不仅霸占公司的资产，甚至用武力驱逐公司员工。
E: Our opponents include local monopolistic tycoons, disciples of the Abundance, the Antimatter Legion, and more, none of them to be taken lightly. They've not only seized IPC's assets but have even used force to drive out IPC Workers.

C: 你如果还感兴趣的话就去<color=#dbc291ff>大矿区</color>看看吧，要是找到了好东西可以给我看看，鉴定费好商量！
E: If you're still keen, head to the <color=#dbc291ff>Great Mine</color> and take a look. And if you find anything worth keeping, bring it over to me. Everything's negotiable!

C: 遗迹里有不少怪物和失控的机兵，也有些不守规矩的同行会来抢你的成果，听说有人还看到了更可怕的东西……
E: There're lots of monsters and buggy automatons down there — not to mention some of my shady peers who won't hesitate to steal the fruits of our gains. And I've heard some talk about even more terrifying things...

C: 这个古代遗迹是怎么来的？
E: How did the ancient ruins come about?

C: 总而言之啊，我觉得这个故事，缺乏吸引观众的刺激要素！
E: Overall, I think this story is lacking a few exciting elements that we need to draw in the audience!

C: 「药王秘传既得烬灭祸祖的恩赐，那我等亦可从丹鼎司中求取仙丹，洗髓伐毛，脱胎换骨，凭空增加个数百甲子的功力！」
E: "The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have received their mandate from the Ruin Author. We though can strive for a miracle pill from the Alchemy Commission, turning over a new leaf to be born anew through generations of cultivated power!"

C: 嗐，瞧您这话说的…力量没有善恶，人才有。厨刀是在厨师手里，还是在凶徒手里，那肯定是不一样的。
E: Ha, listen to yourself... Power in and of itself knows no good or bad. Only people do. Is a kitchen knife evil when it's in the hands of a chef or when it's in the hands of a murderer?

C: 哎，矜持一点！
E: Hey, stay classy!

C: 接下来应该是您这段故事的高潮和尾声了，在下可得好好想想该怎么写。
E: What follows should be the climax and the end of your story, so I need to think carefully about how it's written.

C: 天金既得，接下来便是将它们铸合一体的过程了。要完成这项艰巨工作，非得依靠工造司中造化洪炉才能办得到。
E: With the Ignis Aureliae in hand, the next step was to forge them into one instrument. This arduous task will need a trip to the Artisanship Commission to borrow their Creation Furnace.

C: 那咱们这就走呗。
E: Then let's hit the road.

C: 你，学会了吗？
E: Did you get all that?

C: 还是算了吧，方才那段内容，和咱俩自身不贴合，而且没什么意思。
E: Nah, forget it. It's terrible, not catchy at all.

C: 你慢慢地将这杯「烈焰浓茶」喝下肚，先前的两次新品已经令你吸取了足够多的教训。
E: Having learned so much from the previous two mugs, you take your time and slowly drink this last mug of Flaming Potent Tea.

C: …我倒不知道我们家「烈焰浓茶」还有这种效果，发出这种评价的…你是头一个。
E: ...Well, I didn't know my Flaming Potent Tea could have such an effect. You're the first to make... such a remark.

C: 我找了不少关系，这才借来了谛听。这小家伙能测定物件的年限，用来鉴别古董真假是再合适不过了。
E: Here, I got this Diting through some connections. This little guy will help you figure out the origin year of objects, so you'll know which antiques to smash.

C: 够了！快住手！
E: Enough! Stop!

C: 等等，让我研究一下你的以太灵吧！
E: Wait, let me research your Aether Spirit!

C: 看来光分析数据是不够的，还得经过实战检验啊……
E: It seems analyzing data isn't enough, I also need real battle experience...

C: 再打印出来，与其他玩家切磋对战…让以太灵伙伴为您争取荣誉……
E: Just print it out and compete against other players — let your Aether Spirits fight for your glory...

C: 来吧来吧，聊聊《以太战线》——我可是十八年老玩家了！你们有什么想要了解的，我一定知无不言！
E: Come on, let's chat about Aetherium Wars! I've been playing it for <unbreak>18</unbreak> years, so ask me anything — I'll tell you everything I know!

C: 事不宜迟，既然二位有兴趣，我就带着二位前往庆典服务大厅注册账号吧。跟我来，这边请！
E: There's no time to waste! Since you're both interested, let me take you to the Festival Service Hall to register your accounts. This way!

C: 哈，维尔德！我正在想你去哪儿了呢——
E: Ha, Wilder! I was just wondering where you'd got to...

C: 喂，{NICKNAME}…你看他的面具，挺酷的呀？
E: Psst, {NICKNAME} look at his mask! Pretty cool, don't you think?

C: 太失礼了，三月。
E: That's not very polite, March.

C: 那就请多指教啦，乔瓦尼先生。
E: Pleasure to meet you, Mr. Giovanni.

C: 哈哈哈，那是自然！我一定不遗余力，协助二位旗开得胜。
E: Hahaha, why of course! I assure you that I will do everything in my power to assist you both.

C: 太好了！我就知道你肯定不会放弃它的。
E: Awesome! I knew you wouldn't abandon such a cute and defenseless creature!

C: 哈哈哈，没关系——实践出真知！多多尝试，自然就能上手了。
E: Hahaha, I wouldn't worry yourselves too much. Remember — practice makes perfect! I imagine you'll grasp the core concept in no time.

C: 我刚刚又上星际互联网络查了查攻略，才知道这「决胜乐园」是公司和竞技协会专门向各个星球租借的场地——公司的腕儿可真大。
E: I just looked up some tips on the Interastral Network — these Victory Zones are leased by the IPC and the Gaming Association from various planets. The IPC's reach is impressive...

C: 哼哼，哼，哼哼！
E: Oink! Oink, oink! Oink!

C: 好久不见，各位！
E: Long time no see, everyone!

C: 那，我们也出发吧——就按黑塔说的做！
E: Alright, let's get moving. We should follow Herta's instructions.

C: 愣着干什么？你们要的不就是这个吗？
E: What? Isn't this what you wanted?

C: 不过，身为玩家，我还是可以为两位提供一些攻略参考——比如这座决胜乐园的谜题机关。
E: As a fellow player, I can still give you some good advice — like how the mechanisms in this Victory Zone work, for example.

C: 《以太战线》…是最近孩子们之间流行的游戏吧？可以呀，但我可不怎么熟悉这款游戏。
E: "Aetherium Wars"... That's the game the kids are all crazy about, right? Alright, but I'm not familiar with how to play this game.

C: 要凑局？那我肯定来啊，发牌发牌！不对...去吧，以太灵！
E: You want to play? Bring it on! Deal the tiles! Deal 'em! Oh, I mean... go, Aether Spirits!

C: 先聊到这里吧。
E: That's all I wanted to talk about.

C: 就让你们看看吧——我「冠军首席」的称号可不是白叫的。
E: Watch and learn — there's a reason they call me a champion!

C: 不过还好，你们赢了，皆大欢喜。你们大概不知道吧，贝洛伯格有些人可是你们的狂热粉丝…要是你们被淘汰出局了，他们不知道会闹出什么动静来。
E: But things are going well — you guys pulled off a win, and everyone's happy. You've got quite a few die-hard fans in Belobog, you know. If you guys had been knocked out of the competition, there's no telling what they might have done.

C: 能看到大家乐在其中，我也非常欣慰。但是直觉告诉我，事情恐怕没有这么简单…这些天外来客将这种娱乐带来贝洛伯格，真的是好事吗？
E: Seeing everyone enjoying themselves brings me great satisfaction... Still, my gut tells me something's happening below the surface... Are these visitors from beyond the sky really doing us a favor by bringing this kind of entertainment to Belobog?

C: 去吧，回到休息区好好做准备——你们可千万不能辜负那位女士的期待啊！
E: Off you go now, head to the prep zone and ready yourselves — I'd hate to see you disappoint her!

C: 呃，虽然被人夸是很开心啦…但你们为什么莫名其妙地跑来说这些？
E: Ahem, I... I mean, I appreciate the compliments... but what's with the flattery all of a sudden?

C: 托帕小姐！还有…艾丝妲小姐！
E: Miss Topaz! Miss Asta!

C: 哼哼，哼……
E: Oink! Oink, oink...

C: …竟然是她吗？！
E: ...Her again!?

C: 庆典总决赛即将正式开始，请各位选手准备入场——
E: The grand final is about to commence — contestants please take your places...

C: 这个谜题搞定啦！真不愧是我们！
E: One down already! We're on fire!

C: 其实还挺难的。有的信息一眼假，但有的信息嘛…仅凭网上的只言片语恐怕很难分辨。
E: We have our work cut out for us, that's for sure. Sometimes a lead is obviously fake, but other times... it's hard to tell from just a few words on the Internet.

C: 简单，咱们把捉鬼……呃我是说「镇伏岁阳」的过程实录发出去就好了！我们现在可是给十王司当差，谁手上还能有比我们更劲爆的料啊？
E: That's the easy part — we just post some videos of us ghost hunting... Uh, I mean, subduing heliobi! We're working for the Ten-Lord's Commission after all — we're gonna have the best content out there!

C: 我…我想起来了！真是对不住对不住。一时兴起表演了吞剑，结果散场时竟然忘了把那柄剑还给小哥。
E: Huh? Oh! I—I remember... I should apologize — I did a sword-swallowing performance on the spur of the moment, but forgot to return the sword to him when I left the stage...

C: 怎么突然让我们打架…
E: That escalated quickly...

C: 跟我说相声呢？嘴可真够贫的！
E: Did I hear something from the peanut gallery?

C: 说句实话…阿灼似乎并不像印象中的其他岁阳那么危险。
E: Truth be told... Luxie didn't seem as evil as the other heliobi we've seen.

C: 就当是吧。与小女子靠得太近，会有损阳气喔。
E: And maybe we are... don't get too close, or you might turn into a ghost too.

C: 唉，那天小桂子拉我来绥园，是希望我保护她的，结果我就…被吓晕过去了……
E: Like the time Guinaifen dragged me to Fyxestroll Garden so I could protect her, but I was so scared I ended up fainting...

C: 帝弓在上…这家伙跑得也太快了……
E: Whew... By the Arbiter... They sure know... how to run...

C: 没有下一次啦！藿藿，拜托了。
E: There won't be a next time! Huohuo, you know what to do.

C: 倒也不是，毕竟交给我的事儿都有按时完成……
E: Not exactly, I do complete all my assigned work on time...

C: 嗯嗯，本座得好好想想封口的法子了…说笑罢了。
E: Hmm, I shall have to think of a way to keep her from talking... Hehe, just kidding.

C: 「太卜被岁阳附体」这件事传出去不好听，我明白了。
E: Mm, I agree that "Master Diviner Gets Possessed" wouldn't make for a good headline...

C: 话说回来…我也能理解她的苦恼。毕竟我们都是在各自看不见的道路上分毫不差地前行着。
E: That said... I can understand her plight. After all, we are all moving forward on our own unseen paths... in no uncertain terms.

C: 算了吧，我不喜欢两次品尝同一道菜，也不喜欢在同一个肉体里呆两次。
E: ...Forget it. I don't like tasting the same dish twice — the same goes for possessions.

C: 真抱歉，刚刚发了牢骚…
E: My apologies for rambling on just now...

C: 接下来，要麻烦判官小姐在另一边那个位置上站定就好，别发抖喔。
E: Next, Judge Huohuo, you stand on the other side — and stop shaking!

C: 怎么跟我娘一样…不是，我是说，这件事果然和岁阳有关！
E: That sounds just like... a heliobus!

C: 哼哼，好个胜生败死，扮出一副前辈高人的模样，侃侃而谈品评什么剑法高低。其实不过是把人当棋子随意使唤，利用别人的好胜心满足杀欲的坏东西……
E: Hmph, "life for victory and death for defeat," huh? All this talk of laws of the battlefield and the universe — you think that gives the appearance of a grand master? You're just using someone else's ambition to satisfy your own desire to shed blood.

C: 我手中这柄轩辕剑是家传之物，我娘把它交给我时对我说：「剑客折纸不可多」。平日里我总是在想，这话到底什么意思？
E: This Xuanyuan Sword in my hand has been passed down through my family for generations. When my mother gave it to me, she said: "The bread may bake, but the hearth remains..." and for a long time I had no idea what she was talking about.

C: 不妨把话说开了吧，这件事确实与我有关。
E: Let's cut to the chase. I do know something about it.

C: 还有，别忘了将岁阳封印到「束形却邪阵」里。
E: One more thing, don't forget to seal the heliobi within the Evil Binding Matrix.

C: 你不是藿藿，你不是我的女儿…你身上带着那样的脏东西，别靠过来！
E: I don't know who you are, but you're not my Huohuo. Keep that filthy thing you're carrying away from me!

C: 怎么样，棋鬼的事到底是怎么回事呀，要不要在「罗浮杂俎」上更新一下？
E: So, what was the real deal with the Chess Ghost? Do you want to post an update on the "Ghostly Grove"?

C: 喵喵喵……
E: Meow, meow...

C: 这下可愁人了，要是岁阳碎片都往天上躲，咱们岂不是只能坐等它自己下来？
E: This is bothersome. If the heliobus' fragments are hiding in the sky, are we supposed to wait for them to fall?

C: 藿藿将符箓贴在三月七身上，什么也没有发生。
E: Huohuo pastes the talisman on March 7th. Nothing happens.

C: 总算来了？好戏还没结束呢！
E: Finally? But it's not over yet!

C: 嗯…听你的介绍，岁阳附身会对宿主产生不小的危害。但我到现在什么感觉也没有，说明它确实没做过坏事。
E: Hmm... You mentioned before that a heliobus' possession will do a lot of harm to the host. However, I haven't felt anything so far, which means it hasn't done any harm to me.

C: 你在干什么？
E: What are you doing?

C: 我，说不出来这是怎样的一种感受。我们人类，不知为什么拥有了思考的能力，拥有了许多烦恼和痛苦，可我们也能享受到这样的平静。我想，这是宇宙对我们的祝福吧？
E: I can't describe that kind of feeling with words. We humans somehow have the ability to think, to possess a lot of worries and pain, but at the same time, we can also enjoy moments of peace like this one. I guess it's a blessing for us from the universe, isn't it?

C: 你说，这列车上是不是有些不干净的东西？我该怎么办啊……
E: Say, do you think this Express is haunted? What should I do...

C: 哦…也就是说，这个符箓和之前贴在我身上的是同一种。
E: Oh... In other words, this talisman is the same as the one you pasted on me previously.

C: 已离婚。
E: I'm divorced.

C: 我们小桂子真的又懂事又可爱，比棉袄还贴心！
E: Little Gui gets it, and she's so cute! I feel closer to her than this blanket!

C: 我觉得此事相当蹊跷，上回发帖的人叫「桂桂的咸辣豆汁」，这回发帖的叫「请桂桂喝冰糖豆汁」。
E: I find this all really weird. The user who posted up last time was GuiguiSpicySourJuice, and this post is by SweetBoba_4_SweetGui.

C: 桂桂你先别发火，我叫漫漫，刚才吓到你很不好意思，我也不是有意要害你的或者想怎么对付你，我只是……
E: Guigui, please don't be mad. I'm Manman and I'm sorry for scaring you just now. I didn't mean to hurt you or to do anything bad to you. I just...

C: 未成年人追什么直播？
E: Minors shouldn't be following streamers!

C: 嗯，它们是挺可爱的，能和其他智慧生命正常相处，也没什么攻击性。
E: Yeah, they're pretty cute and get along with other intelligent beings without any hostility at all.

C: 这批物资就在附近，正在呼叫物流机器人，稍等——
E: These supplies are nearby. I will arrange for a delivery robot to bring that over. One moment...

E: The sleeping supplies are here. Perhaps now you can try accommodating the creation you nurtured on them?

E: Am I not supposed to talk with it?

C: 为什么不跟我说话呢？
E: Why aren't you talking to me?

C: …你到底在哪里？
E: ...Where exactly are you?

C: 你不是想得很清楚了么？
E: Don't you already have an answer?

C: 汪！是和我一起工作过的骰子先生哇！
E: Woof! It's my peer Mr. Dice!

C: （这里是舒翁的内心世界，她将过往袒露出来，是为了重获怪物们的信任。）
E: (This is Siobhan's inner world. She's revealing her past to regain the monsters' trust.)

C: 哎。
E: Hey!

C: 汪！可是我们已经有「小星星」了哇！
E: Woof! But we already have a "Starlet"!

C: 噢…噢……
E: Oh... I see...

C: 见鬼，怎么还是你？哇嘎嘎嘎嘎嘎，你到底欠了多少钱啊，签了卖身契还是保证书，非要把这家酒吧经营到再次伟大？听我的，别费那个心！
E: Dang, it's you again. Wahaha, how much money do you owe? Did you sign a contract or a letter of guarantee that you're gonna work this lounge until it's back to its former glory? Listen here, just forget about it!

C: 听懂了就赶紧去调你的饮料，少在这装模作样，别让我想起那个蠢货。
E: If you catch my drift, then hurry up and start mixing your drinks. Stop pretending like you're doing something. I don't need any reminders of that idiot.

C: 即使算上那时候，你调出来的饮料也是最难喝的。更要命的是……
E: Even considering how awful the drinks were back then, the drink you made was just the worst. What killed me even more was...

C: 听着，新人就要有新人的样子。弯下你的腰，做好你的事，服务你的客人，用你最低的姿态。我是来买快活的，你要让我感觉到我很特别，明白？
E: Listen here. You're new, so you better act like it. Be sure to bow, do your job right, and serve your customers. Be the humblest you can be. I'm here to buy happiness, so you should be making me feel special, got it?

C: （掏出球棒。）
E: (Take out the baseball bat.)

C: 所谓的幸福是什么呢？
E: What is "happiness" anyway?

C: …好像真忘了。
E: ...I've forgotten about it.

C: …没有的话，要不对我使用试试，看你能不能成功？
E: ...No? Maybe you can try using it on me and see if it works?

C: 哈！您真是位优秀的调饮师，调出来的饮料正正好好就是我想要的！
E: Ha! You're truly a superb drinksmith — your drinks are exactly the way I want them!

C: 呃…您是不是太累了，发挥有些失常。没事的，您调出来的饮料，我都能喝！
E: Err... You don't seem like yourself. Are you too tired? It's all right. I'll drink anything you make!

C: 哎，命运的底色总是悲剧，即使如此，我仍旧希望再度与你重逢。
E: *sigh* The primary hue of fate is always a tragedy. But even so, I still hope to see you again.

C: 明明是个打工的人，就不要用调饮师来自称了嘛。名字再厉害，也掩盖不了本质嘛。
E: If you're just here working a job, you shouldn't use the title of drinksmith. A fancy title isn't going to cover your essence.

E: WoofWoofWoof  Woof

E: Woof

E: Researchers <rhythm>are <rhythm>sloppy

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 就是那种穿…穿啥来着…黑色西装的！碰见就想逮住我，吓得我都掉小珍珠了。结果你猜…怎么着，他们根本就不敢进来哈哈！
E: They were all wearing... something like... black suits! They wanted to arrest me when they saw me. I was so shocked I got teary-eyed. And in the end, guess what... they don't even dare to step foot in here. Hahaha!

C: 好像有点口渴…再给我来杯味道<color=#dbc291ff>超级强烈</color>的饮料吧，要能让我回忆起戏耍他们的愉悦的那种！
E: I'm a little thirsty... Bring me another <color=#dbc291ff>super intense</color> drink, one that reminds me of the joys of playing tricks on them!

C: 至于委托的报酬，说出来怕吓到您——可以直接兑换等额信用点的<unbreak>5000</unbreak>苜蓿币，怎样，没见过这么阔绰的手笔吧？
E: Now, for the reward... Brace yourself because this good news might shock you! It's <unbreak>5,000</unbreak> Alfalfa credits! Enough to redeem the same amount of IPC credits! Incredible, right?

C: 这价位很不错了，其他同类的委托更低，<unbreak>5000</unbreak>还是因为在公馆才加的钱。放别人那儿，就这，还得再黑走您两千，五五分成已经不能再良心了。
E: That's a decent price. Other agents pay even less! You'll get <unbreak>5,000</unbreak> credits because we're in this Pavilion, and if it were someone else, they'd take another <unbreak>2,000</unbreak> credits from you! A <unbreak>50</unbreak>/<unbreak>50</unbreak> split like this is good enough.

C: 地形居然还带变的，筑梦师在设计反入侵装置的时候究竟经历了什么？
E: Hold on, the terrain even changes? What were the Dreamweavers thinking when they designed this security system?

C: 怎么样，看到我这么「咻——」地一下出现在面前，你就没什么想说的吗？
E: Well? Don't you have anything to say after seeing me pop up in front of you so suddenly?

C: 你一直在监视我？
E: You've been spying on me?

C: 怎么样，基本玩法都会了吗？会了就先去打一局练练手。
E: How's it going? Gotten the hang of it yet? If you're ready, you can try a practice match.

C: 嗯，谢谢你。
E: Thank you.

C: 是我，三月小姐。好久不见，很高兴见到你。
E: It's me, Miss March. It's good to see you again.

C: …哈，我就说吧，果然就是个白盒……
E: Ha, told you! It was totally a white-box test...

C: 全部通关了，小菜一碟。
E: I cleared all the levels, and it was a cinch.

C: 这些新闻报道和采访稿，绝对不是临时准备的。这是蓄谋已久的恶意报道！
E: These reports and interviews were clearly not whipped up at the last moment. They're the result of a premeditated malicious report!

C: 顺带说一句，我给你带了一只全新的战斗义肢作为礼物——我注意到在之前的比赛中你的铁臂总有些轻微的制动失误，怕是磨损得厉害，不堪用了吧？
E: By the way, I brought you a new combat prosthetic as a gift. I noticed some slight malfunctions in your iron arm during the last match. The wear and tear is probably so much that the arm is no longer suitable for use, I presume?

C: 报仇！报仇！报仇！
E: Avenge! Avenge! Avenge!

C: 是啊，托帕小姐？托帕！你跑到哪里去了！这怎么变成他的发布会了？这不是我的发布会吗？托帕小姐，这跟我们说好的不一样啊？
E: Indeed! Miss Topaz? Miss Topaz! Where did you go? How did this turn into his launch event? Isn't this supposed to be my event? Miss Topaz, this isn't what we agreed on, is it?

C: 「铁拳卢卡！无敌拳法！」
E: Iron Fist Luka! Iron Fist Fury!

C: 别着急嘛～照这个势头，你很快就会遇到他的。
E: Don't worry. You'll probably meet him soon.

C: 托帕小姐的计划，看起来相当歹毒，但却是打小人不打君子的阳谋。如果铄金是个正直的人，靠这招就根本没办法让他进圈套。
E: Miss Topaz's plan, though seemingly malevolent, is a cunning strategy that targets the unworthy, not the noble. If Shuojin were a person of integrity, this tactic wouldn't have lured him into the trap.

C: 这是一段被「终末」带至此地的景象。当你穿过<color=#dbc291ff>「黄金与机械」</color>的战火，跨越<color=#dbc291ff>美梦雕琢的世界</color>后，终会抵达的未来。
E: This is a scene brought here by the Finality. This is the future you're destined to arrive at after weaving through the fires of war in <color=#dbc291ff>Gold and Gears</color> and traversing the <color=#dbc291ff>Dreamjoy Statue World</color>.

C: 逻辑：诚然，可以直接找到黑塔女士，从外部将她强制弹出。但很可惜，那并非轻易能到达的场所，我们的时间也不甚宽裕。
E: Logic: It is possible to directly locate Madam Herta and forcefully eject her externally. Unfortunately, the location in question is difficult to reach, and time is running short.

C: 只能硬着头皮上了。
E: I'll have to bite the bullet.

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 其实我还想听它讲笑话。
E: I haven't had enough of its jokes, actually.

C: 人类不能失去电竞房，就像星际和平公司不能失去庇尔波因特。
E: Humans can't afford to lose the gaming room, just like the Interastral Peace Corporation can't afford to lose Pier Point.

C: 哈哈，再锻炼几回，下次就可以你来维修列车了。
E: Ha ha, with a bit more practice, next time you could handle the Express repairs yourself.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你来得正好！帕姆最近添了些新衣服，决定在这里给自己安排一个衣帽间～
E: Passenger {NICKNAME}, you arrived just in time! Pom-Pom recently got some new clothes and decided to set up a coatroom here for myself~

C: 在很久以前，奥赫玛周围曾经簇拥着许多附属城邦——就像黎明机器被欧洛尼斯的群星围绕那样。
E: A long time ago, countless allied cities existed around Okhema... In the same way that Oronyx's stars surround the Dawn Device.

C: 呜…呜嗡？（地大地…地大什么？）
E: Grumph... Grumph? (Dro... Dro-what?)

C: 灵知是「能将其潜能挖掘到多深」的判断标准。别看大地兽平时憨憨的，其实潜力比人们想象中大多了。
E: Spiracuity is the measure of "how deeply their potential can be tapped." Despite their simple appearance, dromases have incredible untapped potential.

C: 咳！先说结论，这一现象确实类似疾病，是因身上的「岁月」神力失衡所致。
E: Ahem! To get straight to the point, this phenomenon does indeed resemble an illness, caused by an imbalance in the divine power of Time within the body.

C: 为什么要问这个问题呢？
E: Why are you asking that question?

C: 举例来说——我住的地方就在某位神搞恶作剧时爆炸过一次。
E: Take me, for example. My place literally got blown up once when a certain god pulled a prank.

C: 呜嗡？（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，还在发呆吗？我已经收拾好了哦？）
E: Grumph? ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, are you still spacing out? I'm all packed up!)

C: 嗯，明天见。
E: See you tomorrow.

C: 这宝贝什么来头？
E: What's the story of this treasure?

C: 哎，你说白厄大人是在戏弄我吗？这样一个云石天宫随处可见的澡盆，应当劈成柴拿去给{RUBY_B#大工匠}哈托努斯{RUBY_E#}烧了，而不是拿给我。
E: Ah, is Lord Phainon pulling my leg? Such a common tub, seen everywhere in the Marmoreal Palace, should be chopped for firewood for the {RUBY_B#Grand Craftsman}Chartonus{RUBY_E#}, not handed to me.

C: 奥赫玛的打假就靠你了，灭灭骗子们的气焰！
E: Okhema's battle against counterfeiters is in your hands! Show those fraudsters who's the boss!

C: 点心机器人忠实履行着自己的职责，把更多糕点递给了你。
E: The pastry robot dutifully fulfills its task, offering you more pastries.

C: …那也在「严重」的范围内啦。
E: ...That still sounds pretty "serious" to me!

C: 当然，对你来说一定轻轻松松，对吧？不打算说点什么吗？
E: Of course, it must've been a breeze for you, right? Not going to say a few words?

C: 她的加入，会为「迷其林美食评审」带来怎样的变数呢？敬请期待迷！
E: What kind of twist will this special guest bring to the Memchelin Food Review? Stay tuned and find out, mem!

C: 好在，我对美食品鉴还有些心得，便接受了妖精们的邀请，来担任特邀评审员的职责。
E: Still, I do have a decent palate when it comes to gourmet dishes. So I accepted the fairies' invitation to act as a guest judge today.

C: 不知为何，今日的餐馆门口格外喧嚣。等你赶到时，才发现……
E: For some reason, the front of the restaurant is unusually noisy today. By the time you arrive...

C: 首先，正如那位评审员所言——目前的菜单实在过分单调了。
E: First of all, just like that judge said, the current menu is way too limited.

C: 这是我的职责。
E: Well, it's part of my job.
Huh!?

C: 发现了吗？「缇安」与「甜」谐音，缇安的就是甜的，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Did you notice? "Trianne" has "tree" in her name, and she's reliable as an old oak, her hair's as red as a maple tree in autumn, and she's sweet as maple syrup!

C: 迷！迷迷！
E: Mem! Mem, mem!!!

C: 既然如此，我恰好有位伙伴想引荐给各位。
E: In that case, I have someone I'd like to introduce to everyone.

C: ——你的{RUBY_B#菜品}理念{RUBY_E#}，就由我们来{RUBY_B#吃个干净}彻底否定{RUBY_E#}吧！

C: 味道很不错，确实是极致的美食盛宴。但是…两位厨师，还有没端出来的菜品么？
E: Delicious. This really is the ultimate feast. But... chefs, is there anything left you haven't served?

C: 但是，得等我先想到答案。
E: But first, I need to come up with a solution.

C: 因为大地兽吃得多！

C: …这么想来，我还真做了不少有意思的事啊。
E: ...Looking back, I guess I really did have my share of interesting moments.

E: For me... having the chance to savor Lord Mydei's specialties, and exchanging thoughts on crop cultivation with Professor Anaxa...

C: 至于发问，我在初次结识时便已回答过——凯撒的高位既是荣耀，亦是禁锢；君王若是入席，只会让臣民难得酣畅。

E: Energy's full! Quick, use your Ultimate.

E: The eerie doll watched you with a gentle gaze.

C: 「闭嘴」尝试为自己添加「硬件升级」，并毫不意外地失败了。但在拟真智能元件短路时，它领悟了<unbreak>25.6481</unbreak>个冷笑话。真是因祸得福。
E: Shush attempted to give itself a hardware upgrade and, unsurprisingly, failed. However, during the short circuit of the simulated intelligent component, it learned <unbreak>25.6481</unbreak> dad jokes. Truly, a blessing in disguise!
