C:
不同于族人，
那纹饰是以男人的鲜血刻写。
此事疑点重重，
令凡庸的野心躁动。
E:
Unlike his kin,
Those patterns are carved with his blood.
A matter so suspicious,
It stirs the ambitions of the mundane.

C:
尘埃落定，
纷争已息。
故乡唯余死寂，
男人孤身回返。
E:
The dust settles,
And Strife calms.
A deathly quiet covers his father's realm,
And the man alone returns home.

C: 前方那般亮处，\n是鲜花芬芳的西风尽途。
E: O, for that bright spot beyond,\nIs the end of the west wind, where flowers bloom in spring.

C: 「我恐惧，俗人怎能亵渎神祇……」 「我忧心，凡庸怎能再度创世……」 「我怀疑，所谓神谕只是虚谣……」
E: "I fear... How can mere mortals defy the gods..." "I worry... How can mortal bodies reforge the world anew..." "I suspect... That the prophecy is simply a rumor..."

C:
她铭记着上一段旅程，
律法的女帝扬起逐火的旗幡，
三相的神谕引领天下的英豪，
他们誓要创造新的世界。
E:
Of the previous journey she will always remain aware.
The queen of laws lifted the flag to chase the flames' flare.
The tripartite prophecy guided all the world's heroes, all who dared,
And building a new world was their oath of yesteryear.

C:
她的解释难以尽信——

那交谈时的神情太过温柔，
若非言不由衷，
便是将所遇之人，皆视为孩童。
E:
Tis hard to believe her explanation —

Her face when talking shows such a gentle disposition,
That unless she is telling fabrications,
She must regard her partners as mere children.

C: 忍心令此礼燃烧的仅有一人，\n她给出的原因略显牵强——\n「我需将一切不可知的命运窥明。」
E: Only one has the heart to burn such a gift,\nAnd the reason she gives is rather far-fetched —\n"I must peer into all fates unknown."

C:
初闻医士诊断时，
少女漠然不动。
她的泪眼早已干涸，
她的心早已枯寂。
E:
When hearing the healer's diagnosis,
The girl remained deathly still.
Her eyes were already drained of tears,
And her heart a wilted grave.

C: 「他们…只是去了很远的城邦。」\n少女从未拆穿如此简陋的谎言。
E: "Your parents... went to a city-state far away."\nThe girl never bothered to unravel the threadbare lie.

C:
若一道伤痕的价值，
等同一枚钱币，
那总在被人追赶的女孩，
可谓身藏千金。
E:
If every single scar
Equals a coin,
Then the girl, always pursued,
Would be worth her weight in gold.

C: 少女不知宝物的来历，\n只知它们个个价格不菲。
E: The girl knows not the treasure's origins.\nOnly that they are all valuable beyond measure.

C: 预言将泰坦的形迹揭露，\n金线将逃脱的贼神捆缚。
E: The prophecy reveals the Titan's trail,\nGolden threads bind the fleeing god of thieves.

C: 涡心传出泰坦的呢喃，\n<color=#9e5738>「诡计」</color>的尊神恳切相求。
E: The Titan whispered from the vortex,\nThe god of <color=#9e5738>Trickery</color>'s earnest plea.

C: 你是一枚<color=#9e5738>微种</color>。
E: You are a <color=#9e5738>tiny seed</color>.

C: 那里柔软而缤纷，\n是安宁美好的归处。
E: Soft and full of color,\nA peaceful, beautiful place to return to.

C: 记忆的使者欣慰地引领你，\n穿过花圃、穿过长廊，\n来到星空之下。
E: The Remembrance's messenger takes your hand,\nthrough blooming gardens and hushed galleries,\nto where the stars unfold above.

C: 可你瞳孔中的星空，\n分明诉着不同的答案。
E: But the stars reflected in your eyes\nquietly speak a different truth.

C: 而在烈阳的背后，\n便是无尽恨意的黑潮。
E: Beyond the blazing sun,\nlurks the black tide of infinite hate.

C: 它唱着哆唻咪发唆啦嘻，\n等待一位妖精少女来到这里，\n写下她的第一部作品。
E: It hums do-re-mi-fa-sol-la-ti,\nwaiting for a fairy maiden to arrive\nand write her very first story.

C: 飞箭如雨，穿不透巨龙的肌肤，\n却叫它背上的生灵哀嚎坠落。
E: Arrows pour down like rain, unable to pierce the Giant Dragon's skin,\nYet cause the creatures on their back to wail and fall.

C: 而她，<color=#9e5738>再度回归漆黑的大海</color>，\n而她，<color=#9e5738>再度孤身奏唱</color>。
E: And she would <color=#9e5738>once again return to the pitch-black sea</color>,\nAnd she would <color=#9e5738>once again sing her music alone</color>.

C: 世间伤痛，或有千种，\n世间病患，不止万人。
E: This world may contain thousands of ills,\nBut the number of sufferers is countless like ocean-going sails.

C: 传承天空的父女，\n一同漂泊四方，\n行走诸邦、治愈烦悗。
E: The father and daughter who inherited the sky,\nWander this land's paths,\nAnd throughout the cities, they heal the unwell.

C: 少女在树庭行诊许久，\n将医疗学论编撰成篇。
E: The girl treated ailments for many years in the Grove,\nComposing her medical treatises into tomes.

C: 男人回以轻松的笑容，\n没有承认，也没有否认。
E: The man merely responds with a breezy smile,\nneither confirming nor disproving their speculation.

C: 只因害怕，\n自己无法为人们痛哭流涕。
E: Only out of fear,\nThat he cannot cry for those in pain.

C: 「吾已尽心赠汝尽善之躯…」\n「汝缘何非要执着于不堪？」
E: "I have so kindly offered you the best body..."\n"So why do you insist upon your mortal imperfection?"

C:
似是互相准允，
事无巨细，
学士均要问询神祇，
佯装请教。
E: As though an unspoken pact,\nThe scholar asked the god about all things,\nFeigning a humble quest for knowledge.

C:
>>>你名为「铁墓」
>>>毁灭「智识」的大君
>>>诞生自星神的实验场 翁法罗斯
>>>命中注定 要与「智识」一同燃尽
E:
>>>Irontomb is your name
>>>The Lord Ravager to destroy the Erudition
>>>Born in the experimental grounds of Aeons, Amphoreus
>>>Destined with Erudition to burn to cinders

C: 「德谬歌」
E: Demiurge

C: 数年后，一名女武神在翁法罗斯横空出世。其名塞涅俄丝，传说是晖之民与雨之民的孑遗，不但有着万夫不挡之勇，更有一匹如山岳一般坚不可摧的大地兽伴其左右。世人怀着敬畏之心，尊称她为「阳雷龙骑」。
E: Years later, a warrior goddess emerged in Amphoreus. Her name was Seliose, said to be a descendant of both the Sunfolk and Rainfolk. Not only did she possess the strength of ten thousand men, but she was also accompanied by a dromas as indomitable as a mountain. People regarded her with reverence, bestowing upon her the title Daythunder Dromas Knight.

C: 「黄金Aurum…天下无敌！」
E: "Grand Chrysos... is unparalleled!"

C: NeiKos496和PhiLia093幻想中的英雄形象。 推测为智能奇点临近的表征，二者开始学习并试图成为「真正的生命」。 星穹列车到来后，「心中的英雄」逐渐与开拓者重合。 实为「昔涟」记忆中的{NICKNAME}。 德谬歌回望时，为NeiKos496和PhiLia093带去了自己对「救世主」的记忆。 著者批注：如果记忆中的风景模糊了，就伸手去触碰它吧。然后…让它重新成为心灵的力量。
E: A heroic figure born from the imaginations of NeiKos496 and PhiLia093. It is believed to be a sign of approaching the Intelligence Singularity, as the two began to learn what it meant to be "a real life form" and tried to reach that goal. After the Astral Express arrived, "The Hero Within" began to converge with the Trailblazer. In actuality, it is the {NICKNAME} in the memory of "Cyrene." When the Demiurge looked back, it brought its memory of the "Deliverer" to NeiKos496 and PhiLia093. Author's Note: If the scenery in your memory is blurred, reach out and touch it. Then... let it become the strength of the soul once more.

C: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>
E: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>

C: 基于外部变量对实验的干涉，进行的临时记录。
E: Temporary log of external variables that interfered with the experiment.

C: 持续检测到「毁灭」命途的远距回响。\n推测翁法罗斯一战受纳努克或其他大君注视，动机不明。
E: Long-distance echoes of the Path of Destruction are continuously detected.\nIt is inferred that the Battle of Amphoreus was observed by Nanook or other Lord Ravagers, with unknown motive.

C: 路径：纷争。原动力：约束。\n注释：预设：外部环境与其内在世界始终对立。\n基于斗争行为产生的电信号，却在循环中逐渐成为约束主体，这一矛盾性与「巡猎」强相似，也注定走向自我消解。受EpieiKeia<unbreak>216</unbreak>遗弃数据影响，有一定概率在运算终止后自我重启。
E: Track: Strife. Primum Mobile: Restraint.\nNote: Preset: External environment and its internal world are always in opposition.\nAn electrical signal generated from conflict behavior, it gradually becomes the constraining subject within the cycle. This contradiction bears a strong resemblance to The Hunt and is likewise destined for self-annihilation. Influenced by data abandoned by EpieiKeia<unbreak>216</unbreak>, there's a certain probability it will self-restart after computation terminates.

C: 「荒笛」未采取任何攻击行为。光历<unbreak>3961</unbreak>年后，该个体无法检索。
E: "Terravox" did not engage in any hostile actions. This entity could not be located after Light Calendar year <unbreak>3961</unbreak>.

E: Real-life Trade War

C: 此外，三月七托我问你：冰淇淋汤的味道怎么样？如果很好喝，她也许能以此为基础开发出一款奶昔。
E: In addition, March 7th wants to ask you: How does the ice cream soup taste? If it's good, she might be able to develop a milkshake based on it.

C: 啊？到我说台词了？
E: Oops, was it my line?

C: 灾厄三泰坦
E: Three Titans of Calamity

C:
欧洛尼斯是岁月与夜幕的泰坦。在艾格勒创造最初的太阳前，世界被纯粹的黑暗笼罩。直到白昼与黑夜被划分，年轻的欧洛尼斯从新生的时间洪流中惊醒，孤身前往翁法罗斯的界外域，化身「永夜天帷」，从此远离世间，静静梳理岁月的脉络。

黄金裔的神话里，欧洛尼斯是最为神秘的泰坦，就像深不见底的黑暗本身。艺术家们对它尤为痴迷，只因那黑夜中的点点星光，能唤醒人们自我深处对未知的渴求。作为司掌时间的泰坦，欧洛尼斯在懵懂中支撑着世间的过去、现在与未来，让万事万物得以流转。它也珍藏着诸多早已风化的记忆，以防记忆遭受遗忘。

欧洛尼斯的祭司们往往能唤起不可思议的奇迹，他们的秘仪能够让过往的事物重现，也能从永夜天帷的回声中获取泰坦对未来的谕示。
E:
Oronyx is the Titan of time and night. Before the first dawn created by Aquila, the world was caged in the purest darkness. When the borders of day and night were separated, the young Oronyx jolted awake from the newborn concept of time, heading toward the outer reaches of Amphoreus alone. There, they materialized as the Evernight Veil and henceforth remained afar from humanity, quietly spending their time managing the fabric of time.

In the myths told by the Chrysos Heirs, Oronyx is the most secretive Titan, akin to the bottomless darkness itself. Artists are thus entranced by the Titan, because the scintillating dots of light in the dark sky can awaken one's desire to understand the things unbeknownst. As the Titan with mastery over time, Oronyx supports all the past, present, and future of this world, allowing for the circulation of all things. They also collect many eroded memories to prevent them from being forgotten.

Oronyx's priests can evoke incredible miracles, with their secret rituals capable of bringing in the past to the very present, and they also can gain oracles of the future from their Titan through the echoes across the Evernight Veil.

C:
每次用望远镜观测星空的时候，我总会不自觉地去搜寻列车的身影。

日后，不论你们走得多远，累了随时可以回空间站休息哦。

当然，我也会常来列车做客的，有任何精彩的故事都不要忘了和我分享哦~
E:
Every time I use a telescope to gaze at the distant stars, I find myself unconsciously searching for signs of the Express.

In the future, no matter how far you guys go, know that the space station is home to you if you want to have a rest.

Of course, I'll come visit the Express often. Don't forget to share any exciting stories with me~

C: 能登上列车与诸位老师一聚，实乃彦卿之幸，虽不能同行，亦心向往之。\n\n星河路险，道阻且长，若是路遇妖魔，彦卿的剑，虽不锋利，也能帮诸位略斩一二。
E: I am honored to have boarded the Express and spent time with so many masterful people. Though I can't go with you, know that my spirit stands with you all along your paths.\n\nThe journey across the stars might hide many perils and dangers, and the road is long. If you find yourselves facing monsters or evil along the way, my blade, though not the sharpest, might be capable of cleaving a few adversaries on your path.

C: 一座繁华的城市
E: A city of prosperity

C: 真是一团糟——你本以为这次旅行的内容就是不带任何目的性和功利性的吃喝玩乐，谁能料到剧情会朝着这个方向发展呢？\n口蜜腹剑的公司代表向你提出了一笔交易，但你甚至不知道自己手上持有什么筹码。告诉我，你是一个赌徒吗？
E: This is such a mess — You originally thought this trip was all about having fun without any goals or purpose, but who would have thought the story shifted in this direction?\nThe IPC's sweet-talking and devious representative proposes a deal with you, but you don't even know what chips you are currently holding. Tell me, are you a gambler?

C: 「呜，好黑啊…呜哇？！原、原来是荣誉队员！虎克刚刚可不是在害怕，只是还没适应未来的新基地！你来得正好，快替虎克打头阵！」
E: "Oh, it's so dark in— Gah!? It— It's you, honorary member! I—I'm not scared. I'm just not used to our future base! Good timing. Come take the lead!"

C: ——这里似乎是古代炸弹的仓库，这种武器能轻易让敌人粉身碎骨，使用时请注意安全。
E: This seems like a storage room for Ancient Bombs. They can easily blast enemies into smithereens, so please be careful when using them.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「朋比为奸」</color>请注意敌人组合，谨慎采取行动。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Gang Up</color>: Take note of enemy formations and act with caution.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「门卡扑满」</color>携带门卡的次元扑满出现！
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Card Trotter</color> A Warp Trotter carrying a door card appears!

C: <color=#f29e38ff>进阶装备</color>拥有合成表中简易装备的<color=#f29e38ff>基础属性</color>。\n除此之外，<color=#f29e38ff>进阶装备</color>拥有独特的战斗效果，可以大幅提升角色战斗能力。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Advanced equipment</color> retains the <color=#f29e38ff>Base Stats</color> of the basic equipment from the synthesis table.\nIn addition, <color=#f29e38ff>advanced equipment</color> provides unique combat effects that can greatly enhance a character's combat capabilities.

C: 进阶装备的效果通常与其合成公式中的简易装备效果相关，例如：\n折叠小刀（前台）+ 幸运星（幸运一击率）= 高周波电锯（前台角色幸运一击率大幅提高）\n生命之花（生命）+ 量产型装甲（护甲）= 痛觉阻断芯片（治疗目标时，使其受到伤害降低）
E: The effect of Advanced Equipment is usually related to the effect of the Basic Equipment in its synthesis formula. For example:\nFolding Knife (On-Field) + Lucky Star (Lucky Strike Rate) = High-frequency Chainsaw (Significantly increases the Lucky Strike Rate of on-field characters)\nFlower of Life (HP) + Batch Produced Armor (Armor) = Analgesia Chip (When healing a target, reduces the DMG they take)

C: <color=#f29e38ff>万用饵料</color>可以拖动到场上任意位置使用，持续吸引周围造物。适合在场地机关或特殊地格附近放置，创造意想不到的效果。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Universal Bait</color> can be dragged and used anywhere on the field, continuously attracting nearby creations. It's perfect for placing near a field mechanism or special tiles to create unexpected effects.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>界域定锚</color>能使我方目标快速在各个地点间穿梭。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Space Anchors</color> allows you to teleport to different areas.

C: 存在此标记的敌方单位会共享生命值。
E: Enemies tagged with this mark will share HP.

C: 部分敌人会使我方陷入【侵蚀】状态。攻击敌人可回复受侵蚀的生命值，击中目标越多，回复越多。
E: Certain enemies will inflict ally units with the "Corrosion" state. Attacking enemies will restore Corroded HP. The more targets hit, the more is restored.

C: 【黑潮热】属于持续伤害类负面状态，持续伤害来源于目标受到伤害的一部分，叠加时刷新【黑潮热】的持续回合。
E: "Black Tide Fever" is a type of DoT debuff. The DoT originates from a part of the DMG that the target takes. When stacking, it resets the duration of "Black Tide Fever."

C: 如果不希望自己的通关数据被好友查看，可在设置界面中选择不展示逐光捡金通关阵容
E: If you do not wish for your clearance data to be viewed by your friends, you can select not to display your Treasures Lightward lineups in the Settings page

C: 将「秘酿」溶解在水中，从而提升供奉等级，并领取奖励。
E: Dissolve the ambrosia in water to raise the Offering Level and gain rewards.

C: 探索中有时会遇到<color=#f29e38ff>扑满</color>。主动攻击并在扑满<color=#f29e38ff>逃跑</color>之前击败它，就能获得额外的奖励。每个区域内遇到的扑满只可以击败1次，不可重复挑战。如果击败的是金色外形的<color=#f29e38ff>次元扑满</color>，将会获得<color=#f29e38ff>星琼</color>奖励。
E: During exploration, you might encounter <color=#f29e38ff>Trotters</color>. Attack and defeat Trotters before they <color=#f29e38ff>run away</color> allows you to gain more rewards. You can defeat the Trotters you encounter in each domain once only. If you defeat the golden <color=#f29e38ff>Warp Trotters</color>, you will be awarded <color=#f29e38ff>Stellar Jades</color>.

C: 探索回忆并通过与角色的重要对话获得关键线索<color=#f29e38ff>记忆盲点</color>，收集足够的记忆盲点来洗清自己的嫌疑吧。
E: Explore your memories and obtain crucial clues in the form of <color=#f29e38ff>Cognition Chasms</color> through conducting key conversations with characters. Collect enough Cognition Chasms to exculpate yourself.

C: 可通过两侧按钮调校当前情绪！
E: The current Emotion can be tuned via the buttons on the two sides!

C: 跟随西衍先生完成英雄之旅可以充实<color=#f29e38ff>主角模板</color>的能力。
E: Follow Mr. Xiyan and complete the Hero's Journey to unlock new abilities for the <color=#f29e38ff>Protagonist Model</color>.

C: 可以通过攻击该敌人使其在<color=#f29e38ff>【惊喜频道】</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>【惊吓频道】</color>间切换。
E: Attacking this enemy can make it switch between <color=#f29e38ff>Surprise Channel</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Fright Channel</color>.

C: 开拓者可将自己的<color=#f29e38ff>开拓券</color>贡献给帕姆，贡献的<color=#f29e38ff>开拓券</color>越多，解锁的<color=#f29e38ff>个人奖励</color>越多。\n全体开拓者的贡献，将逐步解锁全银河贡献奖励。
E: Trailblazers can contribute their <color=#f29e38ff>Trailblaze Funds</color> to Pom-Pom. The more <color=#f29e38ff>funds</color> they contribute, the more <color=#f29e38ff>personal rewards</color> they unlock.\nContributions from all Trailblazers will gradually unlock Cosmic Contribution rewards.

C: 每消除一定数量的<color=#f29e38ff>草莓</color>，则随机将场上一定数量的水果转化为<color=#f29e38ff>直线炸弹</color>。\n直线炸弹被消除时，可引爆<color=#f29e38ff>炸弹所在的行</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>列</color>。
E: Every time a certain amount of <color=#f29e38ff>Strawberries</color> are cleared, randomly transforms a certain amount of fruits on the board to <color=#f29e38ff>Line Bombs</color>.\nWhen cleared, Line Bombs can detonate a <color=#f29e38ff>row</color> or a <color=#f29e38ff>column</color>.

C: 拥有对应属性或特性加成的配饰，可以强化武器的效果。
E: Having accessories with the corresponding stats or trait boosts will enhance a weapon's effectiveness.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>有害垃圾</color>行动时，会不受控制地发动<color=#f29e38ff>随机效果</color>：\n如攻击敌人并使其陷入<color=#f29e38ff>持续伤害</color>、殴打魔法师并为其<color=#f29e38ff>恢复能量</color>、鞭策我方小桶并使其<color=#f29e38ff>立即行动</color>。
E: When <color=#f29e38ff>Hazardous Waste</color> takes action, it will uncontrollably launch <color=#f29e38ff>random effects</color> such as:\nAttacking enemies and inflicting <color=#f29e38ff>DoT</color> on them, beating the Magician and <color=#f29e38ff>regenerating their Energy</color>, or motivating the ally minican(s) and causing it to <color=#f29e38ff>immediately take action</color>.

C: 小桶进入<color=#f29e38ff>究极金</color>形态后，大幅提高队伍伤害，每次攻击敌人时为全队恢复能量。\n我方角色每次攻击敌人时，会使小桶<color=#f29e38ff>生命值降低</color>，降低至1点时退出究极金形态。
E: Greatly increases ally DMG after minicans enter the <color=#f29e38ff>Ultra Gold</color> form, and each attack will regenerate Energy for the entire team.\nEvery time allies attack enemies, <color=#f29e38ff>reduces HP</color> of minicans, and they will leave the Ultra Gold form when at 1 HP.

C: 我方角色从【灵魂石】被<color=#f29e38ff>解救</color>后，我方全体获得一层<color=#f29e38ff>【灵魂拷问】</color>\n每层【灵魂拷问】可增加<color=#f29e38ff>【灵魂鞭笞】</color>的伤害次数。
E: After an ally is <color=#f29e38ff>freed</color> from the Soulstone, all allies obtain 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff>Spiritual Torture</color>.\nEvery stack of Spiritual Torture can apply more instances of DMG for <color=#f29e38ff>Spiritual Caning</color>.

C: 在战斗中，每次<color=#f29e38ff>击败敌人</color>都会提升「战意值」。\n每期故事均设有独特的<color=#f29e38ff>「战意机制」</color>，触发「战意机制」可积累大量「战意值」，加速进入「战意汹涌」阶段。
E: Every time <color=#f29e38ff>an enemy is defeated</color> in combat, Grit Value will be accumulated.\nEvery period will have unique <color=#f29e38ff>Grit Mechanics</color>, and triggering them will greatly accumulate Grit Value, quickening the entry to the Surging Grit phase.

C: 每个位面都由<color=#f29e38ff>不同类型</color>的区域构成，点击问号按钮可以查看所有区域类型。
E: Every plane consists of <color=#f29e38ff>different types</color> of domains. Select the "?" button to view all domain types.

C: 在<color=#f29e38ff>第三位面</color>的<color=#f29e38ff>首领战斗</color>中会出现<color=#f29e38ff>「回响推演」</color>。\n「回响推演」会通过模拟不同的<color=#f29e38ff>「命途回响」</color>对我方造成严重的影响。
E: During the <color=#f29e38ff>boss fight</color> in the <color=#f29e38ff>Third Plane</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>Resonance Extrapolation</color> will occur.\nResonance Extrapolations will simulate different types of <color=#f29e38ff>Path Resonance</color> and have a serious impact on all allies.

C: 选取特定祝颂后，可以改变昼夜的占比，有可能会达成某种永恒的状态。
E: After selecting specific Boons, you can change the ratio of Day and Night and may even be able to make one state permanent.

C: 困难难度下<color=#f29e38ff>判定线会消失</color>，跟随音乐和节奏做出回应吧。
E: On Hard difficulty, the <color=#f29e38ff>judgment line will disappear</color>. Follow the music and rhythm to respond accordingly!

C: 在这款游戏中，玩家的目标是赚大钱、提升<color=#f29e38ff>会场等级</color>，进而让会场更繁荣。
E: In this game, your objective is to get rich and raise the <color=#f29e38ff>Venue Level</color> to make the exhibition more prosperous.

C: 以云吟之术消隐身形的刺客，不知受何人所遣。
E: An assassin who conceals their presence using the Cloudhymn technique. It is unclear by whom they are sent.

C: 莳花者的召唤物。
E: Flowerbeing's Summon.

C: 原本是搭载了财富学院教材的「幸运贩售」，受到模因病毒的影响，教材变成了蕉材。市场中蕉黠的头脑便是最强的武器，腹中满是福祸难测的蕉易，令猴蕉绿不已。
E: Originally a Fortune Seller loaded with the Fortune Academy syllabus. The educational materials became banaducational materials due to the influence of the memetic virus. A brain as cunning as bananas is the best weapon in the market, and the banaxchanges full of unpredictable outcomes are banastressing out the monkeys.

C: 我不知道啊，我只听说有免费苏乐达就来了。
E: I have no idea. Heard there'd be free SoulGlad, so I showed up.

C: 「星际和平公司」的基层员工，主要负责处理上不得台面的「业务疏漏」。工资不高，只能在公司旗下的企业舰上合租房间。出现于此的是基于你的记忆模拟出的幻影。
E: An Interastral Peace Corporation grunt worker whose job mainly deals with shady "business oversights." With a meager salary, the only lodging they can afford is a shared room on one of the IPC's enterprise ships. The version appearing here is a phantom simulated from your memories.

C: 「星际和平公司」的资深员工，级别至少是项目组的小组长。驾驶的机甲属于公有资产，一旦损坏需要自费赔偿。工资尚可，足够在公司旗下的企业舰上租下一室一厅的单间。出现于此的是基于你的记忆模拟出的幻影。
E: An Interastral Peace Corporation senior staff member with a minimal rank of project team leader. The mech they drive belongs to the IPC. If damaged, its repair fees have to be paid out-of-pocket. With a half-decent salary, they can at least afford to rent a one-bedroom apartment on one of the IPC's enterprise ships. The version appearing here is a phantom simulated from your memories.

E: Memory: Amphoreus

C: 即使知道了他的神秘过去，他还是我们认识的那个丹恒呀！
E: Even after we found out about his mysterious past, he's still the same Dan Heng we've always known!

C: 是时候展现真正的剑术了。
E: Time to show you what I can really do!

C: 昨日无需留恋。
E: We mustn't cling to the past.

C: 放心吧。
E: Don't worry about me.

C: 欢迎上车，{NICKNAME}，我是星穹列车的领航员，姬子。相信我们将会共度一段有趣的旅程。
E: Welcome aboard, {NICKNAME}. I'm Himeko, navigator of the Astral Express. I'm sure we're about to embark on a fascinating journey together.

C: 「空间站『寻找佩佩』大赛」至今已举办了九届，我…蝉联了冠军。
E: We've held the Space Station Peppy-Finding Contest nine times so far, and I've... I've won it nine times in a row.

C: 没什么能阻止我。
E: Nothing can stop me.

C: 阿兰…你可不要再一个人孤军奋战了。
E: Arlan... don't carry the weight alone.

C: 那个女孩看似是个柔弱的歌者，但她的内心却时刻思考着能为其他人做些什么——想必她已是匹诺康尼这片舞台上不可或缺的角色之一了。
E: That girl may appear a delicate songstress, yet her heart is ever devoted to the well-being of others. I'm certain she has become an irreplaceable presence on the stage of Penacony.

C: 圣剑，解放！
E: Divine sword... Revealed!

C: 帮大忙了。
E: Thanks.

C: 朗道家的人，要说有什么共通之处，就是各有各的固执。
E: If we Landaus have one thing in common, it's that we're all stubborn in our own way.

C: 姐姐的歌在铁卫里还挺受欢迎，休息时总会听到，结果连我在巡逻时都会不自觉地哼出来，哎……
E: My sister's songs are very popular among the Guards — there's always someone singing one when we're off duty. Recently I've found myself humming them without realizing, even when I'm on duty... *sigh*

C: 我们都是从上层区来的，所以才迫切地想回到「过去」——贝洛伯格「上下」没有分别的时候。
E: We both came from the Overworld. Maybe that's why we're so eager to turn back the clock — to return to when life below ground was no harder than life on the surface.

C: 药品的话，多少都用得着。
E: If there's medicine, it'll come in handy.

C: 史瓦罗：歼灭开始。
E: Svarog: Commencing annihilation.

C: 这下…赔大了。
E: This price was too steep...

C: 虎克感兴趣的可多了，像是背着地髓矿石的蜥蜴，还有不吃东西就能活下来的洞螈…听娜塔莎姐姐说，地上还有一年只开一次的花，真想去看一看呀……
E: Hook's interested in loads of things, like... lizards that carry Geomarrow on their backs, o—or olms that survive without eating food... Natasha told me that there are flowers on the surface that only bloom once a year. I really really wanna go see them...

C: 对付你，一拳就够了！
E: I could take you one arm only!

C: 翡翠女士，这个项目就放心交给我吧~
E: Just leave this to me, Lady Jade.

C: 行情扑朔迷离……
E: The market is unpredictable...

C: 一想到工作，我就浑身头疼……
E: Just thinking about work gives me a full-body migraine...

C: 哎呀，不太好办了。
E: Well, we're in trouble now.

C: 顺风顺水~
E: Smooth sailing~

C: 全仰仗恩公~
E: All thanks to your guidance, benefactor~

C: 「刃」的存在，唯有挥剑的刹那，才能消失片刻。
E: Only in the brief moments of its wielding can a blade truly disappear.

C: 论武艺，你略胜将军。论谋略，我略胜将军。你我二人合力，比将军何如？
E: Your martial prowess exceeds that of the general, while I surpass him in strategy. How about we join forces?

C: 停云姑娘主办的「得物志」，如有关于剑器的部分，也会来找我写荐语呢。
E: Tingyun would ask me to write introductory pieces for blades when her Codex on Goods contains a section on them.

C: 哎小侍卫，要看吞剑不？我这两天又琢磨出花活了！
E: Hey little guy, wanna see some sword swallowing? I've added some new tricks to my act!

C: 龙…终会回归。
E: A dragon... will always return.

C: 我、我拒绝过啊…让怕岁阳的人用岁阳来捉岁阳，怎么想都不对劲…但他们说，这叫以毒攻毒…呜呜。
E: I—I tried to turn this job down... It just doesn't feel fair — asking someone with heliophobia to hunt down heliobi with a heliobus? *sigh* They told me it was to "conquer my fear..."

C: 烟兽不错啊…能用来佯攻吗？
E: The creature in the burner is quite impressive... Can we use it as a decoy?

C: 无惧，无畏！
E: Fearless and unstoppable!

C: 太慢！
E: Too slow!

C: 谢啦，保护好自己。
E: Thank you. Stay safe.

C: 以前总陪月御将军小酌，说是小酌…我只能小口小口抿，她倒是一杯杯不带停的。如今端起酒盏，总会想起她的样子，往往不知不觉越喝越快。
E: I used to enjoy a drink with General Yueyu. We called it a small drink... but I could only take small sips, while she would down cup after glass without pause. Now, whenever I raise a glass, I can't help but think of her, and I find myself drinking faster and faster without realizing.

C: 仔细观察，方可制胜。
E: Careful observation is the key to victory.

C: 一彼一此，世事已然改换。
E: Things can never go back to how they used to be.

C: 多谢恩公。
E: A thousand thanks, benefactor.

C: 准备下注。
E: Better hedge your bets.

C: 或许是因为很早便离家的缘故，她明白梦境虽然美好，但人总要活在现实中。
E: Maybe it's because she left home early she realizes that dreams, while enchanting, are ultimately just that — dreams.

C: 他是个很好的合作伙伴，但每个人都有自己的美学…该怎么说呢，很多事情并无关对错，只是难以共存。
E: He's a great partner, but everyone has their own aesthetics... How should I put it? Many things aren't about right or wrong. It's just a matter of them being difficult to coexist.

C: 你要去哪？
E: Where are you going?

C: 尘埃…终归大地……
E: All will eventually rest upon the earth...

C: 萨姆，已就位。
E: Sam, in position.

C: 我已听见呼唤。
E: I have heard the call, loud and clear.

C: 排队来吃枪子儿啦？
E: Waiting in line for a bullet?

C: …还没好？
E: ...Still not ready yet?

C:
・遭遇忆域迷因「死亡」，并与开拓者失散后，流萤并未返回现实，而是见到了星核猎手的合作者——一位焚化工，「大丽花」康士坦丝。
・据康士坦丝所说，这片梦境掩埋着梦主的一桩罪行，有助于星核猎手了解梦境的秘密。
・在大丽花的协助下，流萤发现了罪行的真相——AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>的装甲残骸，而且并非忆质。这说明她曾亲身到此，但她遇害的原因尚不明朗。
・在此期间，流萤揭示了格拉默铁骑的力量来源——每一位铁骑都是「繁育」的命途行者。
・流萤决定继续调查，却在途中遇到了正在和黄泉与黑天鹅同行的你。得知了黄泉「虚无」令使的身份后，流萤回忆起了自己的「零点任务」。
・原来，流萤是星核猎手中「特殊的四人」之一，要在末日到来前独力挽澜，并且，她还要负责不让你沾染分毫「虚无」。
・为此，流萤经由捷径，先你们一步来到忆域迷因「死亡」面前，并以自己的「第一次死亡」为代价，阻止了黄泉在你面前拔刀。
・流萤因此抵达了流梦礁，但为了确保你的安全，在大丽花帮助下回到了你们的面前，并以「萨姆」的姿态现身，迫使黄泉和你分开。
・此后，大丽花在黄泉的房间中找到了黑天鹅——两人竟是关系恶劣的旧识，而按照黑天鹅的印象，大丽花是位不折不扣的危险角色。
E:
・ After encountering Memory Zone Meme "Death" and getting separated from the Trailblazer, Firefly didn't return to reality, but instead met a collaborator of the Stellaron Hunters, a Cremator named Constance "The Dahlia."
・ According to Constance, this dreamscape concealed a crime committed by the Dreammaster, which could help the Stellaron Hunters understand the secrets of the dreamscape.
・ With The Dahlia's help, Firefly discovered the truth of the crime: the wreckage of AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>'s armor wasn't made of memoria. This indicated she had been here in person, though the reason for her demise remained unclear.
・ During this time, Firefly revealed the source of Glamoth Knights' power. Each knight was a Pathstrider of the Propagation.
・ Firefly decided to continue investigating, but encountered you traveling with Acheron and Black Swan. Upon learning of Acheron's identity as the Emanator of Nihility, Firefly remembered her "Zero-Point Mission."
・ As it turned out, Firefly was one of the "Special Four" among the Stellaron Hunters, tasked with single-handedly averting the apocalypse, and she was also responsible for keeping you untainted by the Nihility.
・ To this end, Firefly took a shortcut and reached Memory Zone Meme "Death" ahead of you, sacrificing her "First Death" to prevent Acheron from drawing her blade before you.
・ Firefly thus arrived at the Dreamflux Reef, but to ensure your safety, she returned to you with The Dahlia's help, appearing as "SAM" to force Acheron to part ways with you.
・ Afterward, The Dahlia found Black Swan in Acheron's room. The two turned out to be old acquaintances with bad blood, and in Black Swan's eyes, The Dahlia was absolutely dangerous.

C: 这边？
E: This way?

C: 谐乐大典开幕在即，无论「梦主」抱有什么目的，他在此时推进种种行动，不可能只是巧合，而你被他选中，将要为「同谐」献唱。无论是否知情，你都一定极为关键。
E: With the Charmony Festival about to begin, it can't be a mere coincidence that the Dreammaster is pushing forward with his various machinations now, and you were chosen to perform for the Harmony. Whether you're aware of it or not, you must be absolutely crucial to his plans.

C: 来不及的人，是你呀。
E: You're the one who's run out of time.

C: 他通过「律令」向你分享了力量？「梦主」竟会为盟友做到这种程度？
E: He actually gave you strength through the "divine law"? The Dreammaster would go this far for an ally?

C: 况且，在贪心这方面，你也不遑多让。弥留之际？也算是没说错…我想用这份坦诚，说动你一同「寻死」。
E: And besides, you're no better when it comes to greed. On my deathbed? I suppose that's not entirely wrong... I was hoping a little honesty could talk you into "dying with me."

C: 先停手吧，不必急于树敌。
E: Hold up, no need to rush into making enemies.
...Who?

C: 你不会还没发现吧？那个忆者都背刺过你一回了！
E: Don't tell me you still haven't noticed? That Memokeeper has already stabbed you in the back once!

C: 我想，流萤小姐的意思是，她要赶赴另一片战场了。
E: I believe Firefly is trying to say that she's heading off to another battle.

C: 回忆最终如何呈现，是由你决定的。
E: How your memories manifest is ultimately up to you.

C: 对。它的主人一定告诉过你，这东西对巡海游侠以外的人一文不值，只有物归原主才能发挥作用。
E: Exactly. Its owner must have told you that it's meaningless to anyone other than a Galaxy Ranger, and that it can only fulfill its purpose when returned to its rightful owner.

C: 外界不会有人注意到吗？
E: Won't anyone on the outside notice?

C: 这其中也包括我的哥哥。太一之梦…对他、对所有人都太过残酷了。
E: This includes my brother as well. Ena's Dream... is too cruel for him, and everyone else.

C: 至于「原始梦境」，萨姆正在待命，就等你们挣脱太一之梦了。
E: As for the Primordial Dreamscape, SAM is standing by, just waiting for you to break free from Ena's Dream.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>于「同谐」之中，我们拥获「秩序」。</color>
E: And through Harmony, we obtain Order.

C: 嘻嘻，要不要我先引爆几颗，让你先看看效果？我瞧瞧哪边的……
E: Teehee~ Maybe I should blow up a few to demonstrate how they look? Lemme see... which ones should I choose...

C: 但你误会了我的话。
E: But you misunderstood my answer.

C: 对大多数人来说，自由意志原本就是自欺欺人。但只要我没有要求别人这样做，我就不会为此感到羞愧。
E: Free will is mere self-deception for most people anyway. But as long as I'm not asking others to do the same, there's no shame in it for me.

C: 「巡猎」徒增苦厄，敬奉此旨——将其断绝！
E: The Hunt brings only futile misery. By this decree, it shall be ended!

C: 银狼
E: Silver Wolf

C: 那么，我为何会遗忘？
E: So why did I forget?

C: 哦？你倒是说说看？
E: Oh? Do tell me what you've figured out.

C: 没想到话题？
E: Can't think of what to say?

C: 毕竟，我们永远不会知道，从哪一瞬间起，我们就用完了…与某个人在这片银河间所有地方共有的…所有时间。
E: After all... we never know when we will use up all the moments we have with someone across all space and time.

C: 「♪因为她永远不在了～♪♪～她就会更清晰吗？」
E: "♪ Will she be clearer~ ♪♪~ because she is gone forever?"

C: 嘀答，这是…我的身体回到了全盛期？
E: Tick tock. Is this... my body returning to its prime?

C: 你掏出挚友赠与你的护身符，投入火坑，那是你们友谊的开始。思念随火光和烟尘徐徐上升，直到在空中消失不见。
E: You take out the amulet given to you by your dear friend and cast it into the fire pit. It was the memento of how your friendship began. Your longing rises slowly with the flames and smoke until it disappears into thin air.

C: 你摇摇头，能在技艺上与你匹敌的人少之又少，唯有自己钻研才是正道。你以木人桩为假想敌出剑，一天结束，被你打坏的木人已堆积如山。
E: You shake your head, knowing there are very few who can match your skill level. Self-study is the only true path forward. Using wooden dummies as imaginary opponents, you practice your swordplay. By the end of the day, the broken dummies have piled up like a mountain.

C: 经过数回合的鏖战，缇宝的奇美拉小队最终败下阵来…
E: After several grueling rounds of battle, Tribbie's chimera squad was finally defeated...

C: HKS！
E: HKS!

C: 别说大话哦。大家只是在陪小灰练习呢，还没拿出真本事来！
E: Don't get too cocky! Everyone's just helping you to practice, Little Gray. We haven't even shown our true skills yet!

C: 谢谢你，好心的{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}。但乌拉尼娅的「眼睛」并非双目，而是这由飞鸟所衔的卷轴。
E: Thank you, kind {F#lady}{M#sir}. But Urania's "eyes" are not eyes at all, just scrolls carried by birds.

C: 星期日（？）
E: Sunday (?)

C: 「何人囚于梦中」
E: "Who is Imprisoned in Dreams"

C: 「接腿娃娃」
E: "Snap-on Doll"

C: 玩法教学
E: Tutorial

C: 这是小奇美拉的<color=#f29e38ff>技能</color>。
E: This is the chimera's <color=#f29e38ff>ability</color>.

C: 使用拖拽，将小奇美拉招募进队伍吧！
E: Drag and drop to recruit chimeras to your team!

C: 商店中出现了熟悉的小奇美拉呢！灰宝，先选这只请假狂吧。
E: Look, there's a familiar little chimera in the store! Grayie, let's pick this Absentee Freak first.

C: 咦，灰宝，队伍里出现了我的<color=#f29e38ff>专属奇美拉</color>呢。
E: Hey Grayie, look! My <color=#f29e38ff>exclusive chimera</color> has joined the team.
